title: Glucocorticoid receptors in oligodendrocyte precursor cells regulate hippocampal network plasticity and stress-induced behavior in mice
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Glucocorticoid receptors (GRs) are key mediators of how the stress hormone glucocorticoids (GCs) shape postnatal brain development and adaptive plasticity. Because GC signaling is critical during this period, postnatal GC concentrations are tightly regulated in the brain, whereas excessive levels of circulating GCs can disrupt developmental trajectories and increase the risk of psychiatric disorders later in life. GR function influences multiple neural cell types, but its cell-specific roles, particularly early in development, remain poorly understood. Oligodendrocyte precursor cells (OPCs), which generate myelinating oligodendrocytes and actively modulate neuronal networks, express GRs and can therefore respond to fluctuations in GC levels. Although excessive GC exposure during early life adversity has been linked to changes in OPC development, the physiological role of GR signaling specifically within OPCs remains unclear. To address this, we conditionally deleted GRs in postnatal OPCs in mice to investigate the role of physiological GC signaling in OPC proliferation and maturation, as well as in neuronal network activity and behavior. This deletion resulted in reduced oligodendrocyte and myelinated axon density in the hippocampus, sex-specific alterations in hippocampal activity and long-term potentiation following acute challenge, and impairments in memory formation in adulthood. Our findings reveal an OPC-specific role for GRs and suggest that physiological GR activity in the oligodendrocyte lineage contributes to normal hippocampal plasticity, learning, and memory.
title_zh: 少突胶质细胞前体细胞中的糖皮质激素受体调节小鼠海马网络可塑性和应激诱导的行为
abstract_zh: 糖皮质激素受体（GR）是应激激素糖皮质激素（GC）影响出生后大脑发育和适应性可塑性的关键介质。由于 GC 信号在此期间至关重要，因此出生后 GC 浓度在大脑中受到严格调节，而循环中 GC 水平过高会扰乱发育轨迹，并增加日后患精神疾病的风险。 GR 功能影响多种神经细胞类型，但其细胞特异性作用，特别是在发育早期，仍知之甚少。少突胶质细胞前体细胞 (OPC) 产生髓鞘少突胶质细胞并主动调节神经元网络，表达 GR，因此可以对 GC 水平的波动做出反应。尽管早年逆境期间过度接触 GC 与 OPC 发育的变化有关，但 GR 信号在 OPC 内的生理作用仍不清楚。为了解决这个问题，我们有条件地删除了小鼠出生后 OPC 中的 GR，以研究生理 GC 信号传导在 OPC 增殖和成熟以及神经元网络活动和行为中的作用。这种缺失导致海马少突胶质细胞和有髓轴突密度减少、海马活动的性别特异性改变和急性挑战后的长期增强，以及成年期记忆形成的损害。我们的研究结果揭示了 GR 的 OPC 特异性作用，并表明少突胶质细胞谱系中的生理 GR 活性有助于正常的海马可塑性、学习和记忆。

title: Echolocating bats sacrifice binaural localization cues for target-focused hearing during high-speed foraging
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Accurate sound localization is critical to navigation and foraging in echolocating animals. During both passive listening and active echolocation, bats are thought to rely solely on interaural level differences (ILDs) between the two ears, attaining very large ILDs by orienting their outer ears apart. However, detecting weak prey echoes during high-speed foraging should instead favor target-focused pinnae that maximize sonar range and reduce clutter interference. Therefore, we propose that flying bats orient their pinnae toward prey. We test this hypothesis using a unique wind tunnel and by employing deep-learning-facilitated high-speed stereo photogrammetry and show that freely flying bats indeed orient their pinnae forward, directly on target. This produces large spatial overlap between each ear’s receiving beams, markedly reducing ILDs, and rejects the hypothesis that bats rely solely on ILDs for localization in flight. Instead, bats achieve a highly directional acoustic field of view through coordinated alignment of the emitted and received sonar beams, which amplifies the central acoustic axis and attenuates off-axis echoes. Parallel to visual object tracking, flying bats likely prioritize signal-to-noise ratio, trading off large ILDs for clutter-filtering and sonar range, which allows them to use very weak echoes and simplify their self-generated auditory scene. We hypothesize that this highly directional acoustic field of view aids in localization, potentially in combination with interaural time differences, in the absence of large ILDs. This envisions an inherently simplified acoustic scene that better accounts for how bats hunt efficiently in complex environments.
title_zh: 回声定位蝙蝠在高速觅食期间牺牲双耳定位线索以实现目标聚焦听力
abstract_zh: 准确的声音定位对于回声定位动物的导航和觅食至关重要。在被动聆听和主动回声定位过程中，蝙蝠被认为仅依赖两耳之间的耳间电平差（ILD），通过将外耳分开来获得非常大的ILD。然而，在高速觅食期间检测微弱的猎物回波应该有利于以目标为中心的耳廓，从而最大化声纳范围并减少杂波干扰。因此，我们建议飞行蝙蝠将其耳廓朝向猎物。我们使用独特的风洞并采用深度学习促进的高速立体摄影测量来测试这一假设，并表明自由飞行的蝙蝠确实将其耳廓向前定向，直接瞄准目标。这会在每只耳朵的接收波束之间产生较大的空间重叠，从而显着减少 ILD，并驳斥了蝙蝠在飞行中仅依赖 ILD 进行定位的假设。相反，蝙蝠通过协调排列发射和接收的声纳束来实现高度定向的声场，从而放大中心声轴并减弱离轴回声。与视觉目标跟踪并行，飞行蝙蝠可能会优先考虑信噪比，用大型 ILD 来换取杂波过滤和声纳范围，这使它们能够使用非常微弱的回声并简化其自身生成的听觉场景。我们假设，在没有大 ILD 的情况下，这种高度定向的声学视野有助于定位，可能与耳间时间差相结合。这设想了一个本质上

title: A transition toward flightlessness in Mallards, Indian Runner Ducks, and their hybrid offspring
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
title_zh: 野鸭、印度跑鸭及其杂交后代向不会飞的转变
abstract_zh:
许多研究探索了飞行鸟类的翅膀功能，以及如何通过个体发育和进化获得飞行能力。然而，飞行能力往往会随之减少或丧失，并且鸟类如何从依赖翅膀过渡到依赖腿尚不清楚。大多数损失发生在很久以前，因此从未对机翼缩小的阶段进行过功能评估，甚至从未观察到。在这里，我们评估了一个独特的群体：会飞的野鸭（会飞的野鸭）的解剖学变化和运动后果。
                    绿头鸭
                    ）、不会飞的印度跑鸭（野鸭衍生品），以及它们通过实验产生的杂交后代。基于野生鸟类，我们假设发育的变化会导致杂交鸟类，尤其是奔跑鸟类的翅膀缩小，同时补偿性地增加腿部尺寸和性能。我们的结果表明，奔跑鸟确实与野生不会飞的鸟类有许多共同特征，而杂交鸟则处于中间状态。然而，这些功能的组合却令人惊讶。翅膀变得相对较小，是由于身体尺寸的增加，而不是由于保留的翅膀面积或肌肉的减少。相比之下，腿部是不稳定的：与绿头鸭相比，跑步者在青少年时期对腿部肌肉的投入较少，但在成年后则较多。翅膀保护与身体和腿部变形之间的对比表明，至少在某些飞行损失中，身体和腿部先于翅膀发生变化，而翅膀在缩小之前按比例变小。考虑到刚开始飞行的青少年和飞行能力减弱的成年人都使用了翅膀和腿

title: Identification of a conserved gene family with an essential role in Leishmania parasite–insect vector adhesion
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Adhesion to tissues and surfaces is used by pathogens to avoid clearance, maintain infections, and facilitate transmission. An important example is the adhesion of the
                    Leishmania
                    parasite to the stomodeal valve of its insect vector, the sand fly, which is important for life cycle progression, and occurs through its flagellum via a cytoskeletal adhesion complex. While three essential kinetoplastid-insect adhesion proteins (KIAPs) are known, the overall proteome of the adhesion complex is obscure. Using TurboID-tagged KIAP3 combined with proteomics and light microscopy, we have identified additional proteins associated with the adhered flagellum, including multiple members of the Adhesion Related NTPase-like Domain (ARND) family, of which the canonical member is KIAP4, described here. Phylogenetic analysis of the ARND family showed it is conserved across the kinetoplastids, and we demonstrate that
                    Trypanosoma congolense
                    paralogs localize to the adhered flagellum in that parasite. Deletion of KIAP4 severely impaired haptomonad adhesion, with the mutant parasites unable to colonize the sand fly stomodeal valve. Our work provides details of the molecular machinery essential for vector colonization and shows that these proteins have a conserved function in other kinetoplastid parasites.
title_zh: 鉴定在利什曼原虫寄生虫-昆虫载体粘附中起重要作用的保守基因家族
abstract_zh:
病原体利用对组织和表面的粘附来避免清除、维持感染并促进传播。一个重要的例子是
                    利什曼原虫
                    寄生在其昆虫载体白蛉的口瓣上，白蛉对生命周期的进展很重要，并通过细胞骨架粘附复合物通过其鞭毛发生。虽然已知三种必需的动质体-昆虫粘附蛋白（KIAP），但粘附复合物的整体蛋白质组尚不清楚。使用 TurboID 标记的 KIAP3 结合蛋白质组学和光学显微镜，我们鉴定了与粘附鞭毛相关的其他蛋白质，包括粘附相关 NTP 酶样结构域 (ARND) 家族的多个成员，其中典型成员是 KIAP4，如下所述。 ARND 家族的系统发育分析表明它在动质体中是保守的，我们证明
                    刚果锥虫
                    旁系同源物定位于该寄生虫的粘附鞭毛。 KIAP4 的缺失严重损害了结合单胞菌的粘附，突变的寄生虫无法在白蛉的气道瓣上定植。我们的工作提供了载体定植所必需的分子机制的细节，并表明这些蛋白质在其他动质体寄生虫中具有保守的功能。

title: The backfiring effect of weak AI safety regulation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Recent policy proposals aim to improve the safety of general-purpose AI, but there is little understanding of the efficacy of different regulatory approaches. We present a strategic model that explores interactions between safety regulation, general-purpose AI technology creators, and domain specialists—those who adapt the technology for specific applications. Our analysis examines how regulatory measures targeting different parts of the AI development chain affect the outcome of this game. Our model assumes AI technology is characterized by two key attributes: safety and performance. The regulator first sets a minimum safety requirement that applies to one or both players. The general-purpose creator then invests in the technology, establishing its initial safety and performance levels. Next, domain specialists refine the AI for their use cases, updating the safety and performance levels and taking the product to market. Resulting revenue is shared between the specialist and generalist. Our analysis reveals two insights: first, weak safety regulation imposed predominantly on domain specialists can backfire. While it might seem logical to regulate AI use cases, our analysis shows that weak regulations targeting domain specialists alone can reduce safety in a large class of parameterizations. Second, in contrast to the previous finding, we observe that stronger, well-placed regulation can mutually benefit all players. When regulators impose appropriate safety standards on both general-purpose AI creators and domain specialists, the regulation can function as a commitment device, leading to safety and performance gains, surpassing what is achievable under no regulation or regulating only one player.
title_zh: 人工智能安全监管薄弱的适得其反效应
abstract_zh: 最近的政策提案旨在提高通用人工智能的安全性，但对不同监管方法的有效性知之甚少。我们提出了一个战略模型，探索安全监管、通用人工智能技术创造者和领域专家（那些使技术适应特定应用的人）之间的相互作用。我们的分析探讨了针对人工智能开发链不同部分的监管措施如何影响这场游戏的结果。我们的模型假设人工智能技术具有两个关键属性：安全性和性能。监管机构首先设定适用于一名或两名玩家的最低安全要求。然后，通用创建者投资该技术，建立其初始安全和性能水平。接下来，领域专家针对其用例完善人工智能，更新安全和性能级别并将产品推向市场。由此产生的收入由专家和通才共享。我们的分析揭示了两个见解：首先，主要针对领域专家的薄弱安全监管可能会适得其反。虽然监管人工智能用例似乎合乎逻辑，但我们的分析表明，仅针对领域专家的薄弱监管可能会降低一大类参数化的安全性。其次，与之前的发现相反，我们观察到更强有力、适当的监管可以使所有参与者互惠互利。当监管机构对通用人工智能创建者和领域专家施加适当的安全标准时，该法规可以充当承诺开发者

title: Shape instabilities of active epithelial domes under hydraulic stress: Growth, collapse, and oscillation
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Fluid-filled epithelial cavities arise in a wide range of biological contexts, from developmental lumens and embryonic cavities to epithelial domes formed by monolayer delamination. Yet how hydraulic pressure and adhesive rupture coordinate their dynamic shape changes remains poorly understood. Here, using Madin-Darby Canine Kidney (MDCK) epithelial domes as a model system, we combine live imaging with a minimal theoretical model to elucidate the mechanisms governing liquid dome shape dynamics. Our model integrates active ion transport, strain-stiffening tissue mechanics, and cell–cell adhesion rupture-healing kinetics. We identify five distinct dynamic phases: collapse, stable growth, growth-collapse, oscillation, and unbounded growth. These phases emerge from the competition between ion-pumping-induced hydraulic pressure and fracture of cell-substrate and cell–cell adhesions. Crucially, the hydraulic feedback between osmotic influx and rupture-mediated leakage produces self-sustained oscillations akin to stick–slip instabilities in fracture mechanics. Pharmacological experiments further validate the model’s predictions that active ion pumping and adhesion strength control both the observed phase transitions and the characteristics of oscillatory phase. Consistent with the model predictions, measuring the hydrostatic pressure via 3D traction force microscopy reveals that pressure increases with enhanced ion transport and cell-substrate adhesion, but decreases with reduced cell–cell adhesion. These findings establish hydraulic fracture as a central regulator of epithelial dome morphodynamics and suggest a physical mechanism that may contribute to lumen formation and stability in developing tissues.
title_zh: 液压应力下活性上皮圆顶的形状不稳定性：生长、塌陷和振荡
abstract_zh: 充满液体的上皮腔出现在广泛的生物环境中，从发育腔和胚胎腔到单层分层形成的上皮圆顶。然而，人们对液压和粘合剂破裂如何协调其动态形状变化仍知之甚少。在这里，我们使用 Madin-Darby 犬肾 (MDCK) 上皮穹顶作为模型系统，将实时成像与最小理论模型相结合，以阐明控制液体穹顶形状动力学的机制。我们的模型集成了主动离子传输、应变硬化组织力学和细胞间粘附破裂愈合动力学。我们确定了五个不同的动态阶段：崩溃、稳定增长、增长崩溃、振荡和无限增长。这些阶段是由离子泵引起的液压与细胞-基质断裂和细胞-细胞粘附之间的竞争产生的。至关重要的是，渗透流入和破裂介导的渗漏之间的水力反馈会产生类似于断裂力学中粘滑不稳定性的自持振荡。药理学实验进一步验证了模型的预测，即活性离子泵送和粘附强度控制观察到的相变和振荡相的特征。与模型预测一致，通过 3D 牵引力显微镜测量静水压表明，压力随着离子传输和细胞-基质粘附力的增强而增加，但随着细胞-细胞粘附力的减少而降低。这些发现确立了水力断裂作为上皮d的中央调节器

title: Gender pay gaps in the social sciences
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: We provide a longitudinal, multifield analysis of the gender pay gap in academia that directly links individual-level salaries to measures of scholarly productivity. Using administrative data from the ten campuses that comprise the University of California system, we combine detailed pay records with bibliometric data on publications and citations for faculty in five major social science fields. We find a raw gender pay gap of 23%, which decreases to 4.3% after controlling for field, campus, and cohort. Including controls for job title and scholarly productivity has little effect on the estimated gap, although they substantially increase explanatory power. A decomposition shows that 17% of the gap is unexplained, persisting across junior and senior faculty. We also find a large, persistent gender gap in publications, but no citation gap once output and career length are considered. Field-level analysis reveals that pay gaps are not universal: They persist in Business, Sociology, and Anthropology, but are absent in Economics, Political Science, and smaller social science fields. Our results suggest that pay transparency is insufficient to eliminate salary disparities and that more equal representation within the field is not a prerequisite for pay equity. Our study isolates the residual gap that remains unexplained by productivity or seniority, challenging the view that these factors fully account for gender pay differences. Taken together, our findings highlight the role of field-specific norms and institutional structures, offering directions to promote equitable compensation in academia.
title_zh: 社会科学领域的性别薪酬差距
abstract_zh: 我们对学术界的性别薪酬差距进行了纵向、多领域的分析，将个人工资与学术生产力的衡量标准直接联系起来。我们利用构成加州大学系统的十个校区的管理数据，将详细的薪资记录与五个主要社会科学领域教师的出版物和引用的文献计量数据结合起来。我们发现原始性别薪酬差距为 23%，在控制现场、校园和队列后，该差距降至 4.3%。包括对职称和学术生产力的控制对估计的差距影响不大，尽管它们大大增加了解释力。分解表明，17% 的差距是无法解释的，在初级和高级教师中都存在。我们还发现出版物中存在巨大且持续的性别差距，但一旦考虑到产出和职业长度，就不存在引用差距。领域层面的分析表明，薪酬差距并不普遍：它们在商业、社会学和人类学中持续存在，但在经济学、政治学和较小的社会科学领域中不存在。我们的结果表明，薪酬透明度不足以消除薪酬差距，并且该领域内更平等的代表性并不是薪酬公平的先决条件。我们的研究隔离了生产力或资历无法解释的剩余差距，挑战了这些因素完全解释性别薪酬差异的观点。总而言之，我们的研究结果强调了特定领域规范和制度结构的作用，为促进公平补偿提供了方向。

title: Quantitative guiding of developmental cell fate patterns using a dynamical landscape model
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
During development, cells gradually assume specialized fates via changes of transcriptional dynamics in thousands of genes. Landscape modeling approaches, which abstract from the underlying gene regulatory networks and reason in a low-dimensional phenotypic space, have been remarkably successful in explaining terminal fate outcomes. The success of these models also prompts their application toward inferring dynamic perturbations of multicellular patterning that alter cell fate outcomes in predictable ways, a task that is otherwise highly challenging due to the complex dynamics of the underlying gene circuits. Here, we accomplish this task by combining a landscape model for
                    Caenorhabditis elegans
                    vulval fate patterning with temporally controlled perturbations of EGF and Notch signaling in vivo using temperature-sensitive mutant alleles. We find that nonintuitive fate outcomes that emerge in combinations of these alleles at static temperature conditions through pathway epistasis are correctly predicted by the model. We then show that short pulses of signaling in these genetic backgrounds, delivered via temperature shifts, can be used to guide both the fraction of induced precursor cells and the specific fates they adopt with quantitative precision. Analysis of the underlying cellular landscapes indicates that cell fate guidance via pulses of signaling effectively redesigns the decision structure into one that has no equivalent in normal development, namely, a conversion of the three-way cell fate decision topology into two sequential binary fate decisions. Our results highlight the predictive power of landscape models and illustrate a method to quantitatively guide cell fate acquisition in a developmental context.
title_zh: 使用动态景观模型定量指导发育细胞命运模式
abstract_zh:
在发育过程中，细胞通过数千个基因转录动态的变化逐渐呈现出特殊的命运。景观建模方法从低维表型空间中的底层基因调控网络和推理中抽象出来，在解释最终命运结果方面非常成功。这些模型的成功还促使它们应用于推断多细胞模式的动态扰动，从而以可预测的方式改变细胞命运结果，而由于潜在基因回路的复杂动态，这项任务本来就极具挑战性。在这里，我们通过结合景观模型来完成这项任务
                    秀丽隐杆线虫
                    使用温度敏感突变等位基因在体内暂时控制 EGF 和 Notch 信号传导的外阴命运模式。我们发现，模型可以正确预测静态温度条件下这些等位基因组合通过途径上位性出现的非直观命运结果。然后，我们证明，通过温度变化传递的这些遗传背景中的短信号信号脉冲可用于指导诱导前体细胞的比例以及它们以定量精确度采取的特定命运。对底层细胞景观的分析表明，通过信号脉冲进行细胞命运引导有效地将决策结构重新设计为正常发育中没有的等效结构，即将三路细胞命运决策拓扑转换为两个连续的双向结构。

title: Assessing the feasibility of collective licensing of in-copyright works as training data for generative AI systems
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Copyright owners have sued several developers of large-scale generative AI systems for copyright infringement because of their uses of massive quantities of in-copyright works as training data for building AI models. Fair use will be the main defense against these charges. If fair use defenses succeed, developers will be free to continue to commercially exploit models already built on copyrighted data as well as to use these data to train new models or fine-tune existing ones. If copyright owners prevail, developers may be liable for billions of dollars of damages. Developers could also be enjoined from further model development on in-copyright works and even ordered to destroy models trained on infringing works. Numerous commentators have proposed collective licensing as a compromise solution to the copyright-training-data dilemma. Other commentators have questioned the feasibility of such a compromise. This article discusses several proposals for collective licensing to enable development of generative AI systems while providing some compensation to copyright owners. It assesses the complex normative, economic, and practical problems that must be addressed if such a regime is to become feasible. It discusses the implications of a licensing mandate not only for the large firms whose models are widely used today, but also for start-ups, research centers, and higher education developers of generative AI systems, as well as the general public.
title_zh: 评估版权作品集体许可作为生成人工智能系统训练数据的可行性
abstract_zh: 版权所有者已起诉几家大规模生成人工智能系统的开发商侵犯版权，因为他们使用大量版权作品作为构建人工智能模型的训练数据。合理使用将是针对这些指控的主要辩护理由。如果合理使用防御成功，开发人员将可以自由地继续商业利用已经建立在受版权保护的数据上的模型，以及使用这些数据来训练新模型或微调现有模型。如果版权所有者获胜，开发商可能需要承担数十亿美元的损失。开发者还可能被禁止对版权内的作品进行进一步的模型开发，甚至被勒令销毁使用侵权作品训练的模型。许多评论家提出集体许可作为解决版权-训练-数据困境的折衷解决方案。其他评论家质疑这种妥协的可行性。本文讨论了集体许可的几项提案，以促进生成式人工智能系统的开发，同时向版权所有者提供一些补偿。它评估了如果这样的制度变得可行就必须解决的复杂的规范、经济和实际问题。它讨论了许可授权的影响，不仅对模型如今被广泛使用的大公司，而且对初创企业、研究中心和生成人工智能系统的高等教育开发商以及公众都有影响。

title: Statutory construction and interpretation for AI
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: AI systems are increasingly governed by natural language rules, yet a key challenge arising from reliance on language remains underexplored: interpretive ambiguity. As in legal systems, ambiguity arises both from how these rules are written and how they are applied. But while legal systems use institutional safeguards to manage such ambiguity, such as transparent appellate review policing interpretive constraints, rule-based AI alignment pipelines lack comparable protections. Different interpretations of the same rule can lead to inconsistent model behavior. Drawing on U.S. legal theory, we identify key gaps in current rule-based alignment pipelines by examining how legal systems constrain ambiguity at both the rule creation and rule application steps. We then propose a computational framework that formalizes interpretive ambiguity as constrained entropy minimization and introduces two law-inspired mechanisms: 1) a rule refinement pipeline that minimizes interpretive disagreement by revising ambiguous rules (analogous to agency rulemaking or iterative legislative action), and 2) prompt-based interpretive constraints that reduce disagreement during rule application (analogous to legal canons that guide judicial discretion). We evaluate our framework on a 5,000-scenario subset of the WildChat dataset and show that both interventions significantly improve judgment consistency across a panel of reasonable interpreters. Our approach offers a step toward systematically managing interpretive ambiguity, an essential step for building more robust, law-following AI systems.
title_zh: 人工智能的法律解释
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统越来越多地受到自然语言规则的控制，但由于依赖语言而产生的一个关键挑战仍未得到充分探索：解释歧义。与法律体系一样，这些规则的编写方式和应用方式都产生了模糊性。但是，尽管法律体系使用制度保障措施来管理这种模糊性，例如透明的上诉审查监管解释性限制，但基于规则的人工智能协调管道缺乏类似的保护。对同一规则的不同解释可能会导致模型行为不一致。借鉴美国法律理论，我们通过研究法律体系如何限制规则创建和规则应用步骤中的模糊性，确定当前基于规则的协调流程中的关键差距。然后，我们提出了一个计算框架，将解释歧义形式化为约束熵最小化，并引入两种受法律启发的机制：1）规则细化管道，通过修改模糊规则（类似于机构规则制定或迭代立法行动）来最大限度地减少解释分歧，2）基于提示的解释约束，减少规则应用过程中的分歧（类似于指导司法自由裁量权的法律规范）。我们在 WildChat 数据集的 5,000 个场景子集上评估我们的框架，并表明这两种干预措施都显着提高了一组合理解释者的判断一致性。我们的方法为系统地管理解释歧义迈出了一步，这是构建更强大、更守法的人工智能系统的重要一步。

title: Synergistic action of different molecular mechanisms causes striking levels of insecticide resistance in the malaria vector Anopheles gambiae
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Intensifying insecticide resistance in the malaria vector
                    Anopheles gambiae
                    poses a serious threat to the progress achieved the last decades in reducing malaria deaths in Africa. The genetic basis of insecticide resistance is often complex, involving multiple genes and mutations. However, we still lack a clear understanding of how each mechanism contributes to overall resistance and how highly resistant phenotypes arise. In this study, we generated a suite of transgenic
                    An. gambiae
                    strains carrying either individual mechanisms or combinations that frequently co-occur in nature. We show that co-overexpression of different detoxification enzymes (CYP6P3, CYP6M2, CYP9K1, ABCH2, GSTE2, and COEAE6G), as well as the overexpression of detoxification enzymes in the presence of target site resistance mutations, can lead to substantially greater levels of resistance. Our findings suggest that increased resistance strength is a primary driver for selection of multimechanism resistance and are transformative for the scientific insight required to design robust molecular diagnostics for timely and reliable resistance detection in the field. We further show that P450 based resistance can constitute an Achilles heel for highly resistant mosquitoes, making them more vulnerable to proinsecticides; compounds that typically require P450 activation. Our results advance our understanding of the mechanistic basis of insecticide resistance and have important implications for the design and implementation of effective and evidence-based resistance management strategies.
title_zh: 不同分子机制的协同作用导致疟疾媒介冈比亚按蚊具有惊人的杀虫剂抗药性
abstract_zh:
疟疾媒介中杀虫剂耐药性的增强
                    冈比亚按蚊
                    对非洲过去几十年在减少疟疾死亡方面取得的进展构成严重威胁。杀虫剂抗性的遗传基础通常很复杂，涉及多个基因和突变。然而，我们仍然缺乏对每种机制如何导致总体耐药性以及高耐药性表型如何产生的清晰了解。在这项研究中，我们产生了一套转基因
                    安.冈比亚
                    携带单独机制或在自然界中经常同时出现的组合的菌株。我们发现，不同解毒酶（CYP6P3、CYP6M2、CYP9K1、ABCH2、GSTE2 和 COEAE6G）的共过表达，以及在靶位点抗性突变存在的情况下解毒酶的过表达，可以导致显着更高水平的抗性。我们的研究结果表明，增加的耐药强度是选择多机制耐药性的主要驱动力，并且对于设计强大的分子诊断以在现场及时可靠地检测耐药性所需的科学见解具有变革性。我们进一步表明，基于 P450 的耐药性可能构成高耐药性蚊子的致命弱点，使它们更容易受到杀虫剂前体的攻击；通常需要 P450 激活的化合物。我们的研究结果增进了我们对杀虫剂抗药性机制基础的理解，并对有效杀虫剂的设计和实施具有重要意义。

title: Race-conscious admissions algorithms and the law
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
In recent years, colleges and universities have begun to use machine learning (ML) systems to inform admissions decisions. Meanwhile, in the 2023 case
                    Students for Fair Admissions, Inc. v. President and Fellows of Harvard College
                    , the Supreme Court held that colleges and universities may not make admissions decisions “on the basis of race.” These parallel developments—the rise of ML in admissions and the fall of race-based affirmative action—will force educational institutions, and ultimately courts, to confront the difficult question of what it means for ML systems to differentiate “on the basis of race.” We begin by mapping the
                    Students for Fair Admissions
                    decision onto different uses of race in predictive AI. We distinguish between “first-order” and “second-order” race consciousness at both the training and predictive phases of machine learning, and we argue that each category of race consciousness raises distinct legal and normative issues. We go on to show that the
                    Students for Fair Admissions
                    decision potentially permits—and even endorses—certain forms of race consciousness. Our analysis is grounded in the observation that the process of developing ML-based systems enables policymakers to calibrate decision making algorithms much more precisely and explicitly in response to specific criticisms of race-conscious affirmative action.
title_zh: 具有种族意识的招生算法和法律
abstract_zh:
近年来，学院和大学已开始使用机器学习 (ML) 系统来为招生决策提供信息。同时，在 2023 年的情况下
                    学生公平招生公司诉哈佛大学校长和院士
                    最高法院认为，学院和大学不得“根据种族”做出招生决定。这些并行的发展——机器学习在招生中的兴起和基于种族的平权行动的衰落——将迫使教育机构，最终是法院，面对这样一个难题：机器学习系统“基于种族”进行区分意味着什么。我们首先绘制
                    公平招生的学生
                    决定种族在预测人工智能中的不同用途。我们在机器学习的训练和预测阶段区分了“一阶”和“二阶”种族意识，并且我们认为每一类种族意识都会引发不同的法律和规范问题。我们继续证明
                    公平招生的学生
                    决策可能允许——甚至认可——某些形式的种族意识。我们的分析基于这样的观察：开发基于机器学习的系统的过程使政策制定者能够更精确、更明确地校准决策算法，以回应对种族意识平权行动的具体批评。

title: Continuity and change in US legal tradition: Evidence from judicial citation communities
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Legal doctrine is often described as evolving case by case while preserving coherent legal traditions. We introduce a method for identifying and tracing such traditions by applying the Louvain community-detection algorithm to the complete U.S. federal judicial citation graph (1790–2024; 760,000 opinions linked by 8.3 million citations). The resulting citation communities are unsupervised, blind to court labels and topical taxonomies, yet they form meaningful empirical groupings: In validation exercises, they recover known institutional structure and capture coherent substantive and procedural approaches to law. Using these communities as empirical units, we study how legal traditions evolve and respond to legislative change. We show that the introduction of pivotal federal statutes shifts citation patterns toward newer precedent, indicating that legislation can disrupt established traditions and redirect the development of case law.
title_zh: 美国法律传统的连续性和变化：来自司法引文社区的证据
abstract_zh: 法律原则通常被描述为在保持连贯的法律传统的同时，逐案发展。我们引入了一种识别和追踪此类传统的方法，将 Louvain 社区检测算法应用于完整的美国联邦司法引用图（1790-2024 年；830 万次引用关联到 760,000 条意见）。由此产生的引文社区是不受监督的，对法院标签和主题分类法视而不见，但它们形成了有意义的经验分组：在验证练习中，它们恢复了已知的制度结构并捕获了连贯的实质性和程序性法律方法。我们以这些社区为实证单位，研究法律传统如何演变以及对立法变革的反应。我们表明，关键联邦法规的引入将引用模式转向更新的先例，这表明立法可以破坏既定的传统并重新引导判例法的发展。

title: There is no free benchmark: An institutional view of legal AI benchmarking
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Despite substantial excitement around the use of AI in law, little information exists on the performance and associated risks of the domain’s widely marketed tools. Recent work, for instance, has demonstrated the significant potential for “hallucinations”—wherein models make up facts, law, and precedent—leading Chief Justice Roberts to spotlight this risk in his annual report on the judiciary. We argue that there is a need for public AI benchmarking in law. First, relative to other AI application domains, the legal AI ecosystem lacks legibility—there is little information about the design and performance of many commercial legal AI systems. Legal AI has not benefited from the types of benchmarking that have catalyzed, measured, and informed AI innovation and responsible use in other domains. Second, we articulate the challenges of the institutional design of benchmarking. We illustrate how benchmarks can be captured, watered down, and abused. Careful institutional design around the why, who, what, and how of benchmarking will be critical to navigate difficult tradeoffs of transparency, objectivity, expertise, and resources. Third, addressing legal AI’s illegibility requires matching institutional models to available resources and constraints. Rather than advocating for a single “best” approach to benchmarking, we show how benchmarking strategies depend on available resources.
title_zh: 没有免费的基准：合法人工智能基准的机构观点
abstract_zh: 尽管人们对人工智能在法律中的使用感到非常兴奋，但有关该领域广泛销售的工具的性能和相关风险的信息却很少。例如，最近的工作证明了“幻觉”的巨大潜力——其中模型构成了事实、法律和先例——导致首席大法官罗伯茨在他的年度司法报告中强调了这一风险。我们认为有必要在法律上对公共人工智能进行基准测试。首先，相对于其他人工智能应用领域，法律人工智能生态系统缺乏易读性——许多商业法律人工智能系统的设计和性能信息很少。法律人工智能并没有从其他领域的基准测试类型中受益，而基准测试类型已经催化、衡量和通知了人工智能创新和负责任的使用。其次，我们阐明了标杆管理制度设计的挑战。我们说明了如何获取、淡化和滥用基准。围绕基准测试的原因、对象、内容和方式进行仔细的制度设计对于解决透明度、客观性、专业知识和资源之间的困难权衡至关重要。第三，解决法律人工智能的模糊性需要将制度模式与可用资源和约束相匹配。我们不是提倡单一的“最佳”基准测试方法，而是展示基准测试策略如何依赖于可用资源。

title: Legal infrastructure for transformative AI governance
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Most of our AI governance efforts focus on substance: What rules do we want in place? What limits or checks do we want to impose on AI development and deployment? But a key role for law is not only to establish substantive rules but also to establish legal and regulatory infrastructure to generate and implement rules. The transformative nature of AI calls especially for attention to building legal and regulatory frameworks. In this Perspective, I review three examples: the creation of registration regimes for frontier models; the creation of registration and identification regimes for autonomous agents; and the design of regulatory markets to facilitate a role for private companies to innovate and deliver AI regulatory services.
title_zh: 变革性人工智能治理的法律基础设施
abstract_zh: 我们的大部分人工智能治理工作都集中在实质内容上：我们想要制定什么规则？我们希望对人工智能的开发和部署施加哪些限制或检查？但法律的关键作用不仅是建立实质性规则，而且是建立法律和监管基础设施来制定和实施规则。人工智能的变革性质尤其需要关注建立法律和监管框架。在本视角中，我回顾了三个例子：建立前沿模型的注册制度；建立自主代理人的注册和身份识别制度；监管市场的设计，以促进私营公司创新和提供人工智能监管服务的作用。

title: Continuity in geometric intuition between humans and monkeys
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Geometric intuition is regarded as a hallmark of human intelligence. Humans hold a unique advantage in recognizing geometric shapes with Euclidean features (e.g., parallelism, symmetry) and have more sophisticated geometric concepts than nonhuman primates. A popular explanation for this human distinctiveness is that humans rely on discrete, symbolic features to encode geometric shapes, while other primates depend only on continuous perceptual features. The current study challenges this view. We used a match-to-sample task to test whether monkeys share geometric representations with humans. We found that monkeys combined high-level perceptual representations with abstract symbolic representations like humans, suggesting a graded, quantitative continuity in geometric intuition across species rather than a categorical, qualitative divide. Importantly, monkeys showed stronger reliance on symbolic features when processing rotated geometric shapes than preschoolers did with unrotated shapes, indicating that what appears to be symbolic representation may largely emerge from rotation-invariant encoding. These results challenge the hypothesis of human uniqueness in geometric intuition and suggest that its origins in humans are rooted in abstractions shared with primates.
title_zh: 人类和猴子之间几何直觉的连续性
abstract_zh: 几何直觉被认为是人类智力的标志。人类在识别具有欧几里得特征（例如平行性、对称性）的几何形状方面拥有独特的优势，并且比非人类灵长类动物拥有更复杂的几何概念。对人类这种独特性的一个流行解释是，人类依靠离散的象征性特征来编码几何形状，而其他灵长类动物仅依赖于连续的感知特征。目前的研究挑战了这一观点。我们使用样本匹配任务来测试猴子是否与人类共享几何表示。我们发现猴子将高级感知表征与人类一样的抽象符号表征结合起来，这表明跨物种的几何直觉存在分级的、定量的连续性，而不是分类的、定性的鸿沟。重要的是，与学龄前儿童处理未旋转的形状相比，猴子在处理旋转的几何形状时表现出对符号特征的更强依赖，这表明看似符号表示的东西可能很大程度上来自旋转不变的编码。这些结果挑战了人类在几何直觉方面具有独特性的假设，并表明其起源于人类，植根于与灵长类动物共有的抽象概念。

title: Severe floods increase long-term opioid overdose mortality
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: The relationship between climate disasters and substance use-related harms has been understudied. This study employed a mixed methods research design to assess the impact of severe floods on opioid overdose mortality and identify mechanisms driving this relationship. Drawing on opioid overdose death data from NCHS, presidential disaster declarations from FEMA, and severe storm event data from NOAA, we found severe floods in rural Appalachia led to a significant increase in county-level overdose mortality that persisted for a decade postflood. We then collected retrospective qualitative data from 17 stakeholders regarding the floods that occurred in Eastern Kentucky in July 2022. Interviews suggested this increase in overdose mortality was perpetuated by decreased access to treatment, recovery, and harm reduction services; increased trauma; increased instability; and persistent stigma around help-seeking. Due to the predicted continuation of these disasters, understanding their impact on substance use-related harms is essential to mitigating future damage.
title_zh: 严重洪水增加长期阿片类药物过量死亡率
abstract_zh: 气候灾害与物质使用相关危害之间的关系尚未得到充分研究。本研究采用混合方法研究设计来评估严重洪水对阿片类药物过量死亡率的影响，并确定驱动这种关系的机制。根据 NCHS 的阿片类药物过量死亡数据、FEMA 的总统灾难声明以及 NOAA 的严重风暴事件数据，我们发现阿巴拉契亚农村地区的严重洪水导致县级药物过量死亡率大幅上升，这种情况在洪水后持续了十年。然后，我们收集了 17 个利益相关者关于 2022 年 7 月肯塔基州东部发生的洪水的回顾性定性数据。采访表明，服药过量死亡率的上升是由于获得治疗、康复和减少伤害服务的机会减少而导致的；增加创伤；不稳定性增加；以及寻求帮助方面持续存在的耻辱。由于预计这些灾难将持续发生，了解其对药物使用相关危害的影响对于减轻未来的损害至关重要。

title: When children shape their families: Evocative effects analysis of 40,000 trios from the Norwegian Mother, Father and Child Cohort Study
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Family demographic behavior is often studied as a response to structural conditions or parental characteristics, yet children may themselves shape key family trajectories through evocative gene–environment correlations. This study is based on the Norwegian Mother, Father and Child Cohort Study (MoBa). By analyzing ~ 40,000 genotyped mother–father–child trios, we test whether children’s polygenic indices (PGIs) predict parents’ subsequent fertility, partnership dissolution, and transition to marriage. Accounting for parental PGIs, we found limited evidence for evocative effects across most traits. The exception was that higher child ADHD PGI predicted increased parental partnership dissolution (7% [CI = 2.9 to 11.8%] per SD), especially in families with daughters (11% [CI = 4.9 to 18%] per SD), higher socioeconomic status (15% [CI = 7.7 to 23.2%] per SD), and older maternal age at first birth (10% [CI = 3 to 17%] per SD). The main source of variation is the socioeconomic dimension where child-driven effects are stronger in higher-SES families. The study provides evidence for evocative gene–environment correlations in family demography, demonstrating the importance of child-to-parent effects in shaping family trajectories.
title_zh: 当孩子塑造他们的家庭时：挪威母亲、父亲和儿童队列研究中 40,000 名三人组的唤起效应分析
abstract_zh: 家庭人口行为通常被研究为对结构条件或父母特征的反应，但儿童本身可能通过令人回味的基因-环境相关性塑造关键的家庭轨迹。这项研究基于挪威母亲、父亲和儿童队列研究 (MoBa)。通过分析约 40,000 个经过基因分型的母父子三人组，我们测试了儿童的多基因指数 (PGI) 是否可以预测父母随后的生育能力、伴侣关系解除和婚姻过渡。考虑到父母的 PGI，我们发现大多数特征的唤起效应的证据有限。例外情况是，较高的儿童 ADHD PGI 预示着父母关系破裂会增加（每个 SD 为 7% [CI = 2.9 - 11.8%]），特别是在有女儿的家庭中（每个 SD 为 11% [CI = 4.9 - 18%]）、较高的社会经济地位（每个 SD 为 15% [CI = 7.7 - 23.2%]）以及母亲第一胎年龄较高（每个 SD 为 10% [CI = 3 - 17%]）。标准差）。差异的主要来源是社会经济维度，其中儿童驱动的影响在社会经济地位较高的家庭中更为强烈。该研究为家庭人口统计学中令人回味的基因-环境相关性提供了证据，证明了孩子对父母的影响在塑造家庭轨迹方面的重要性。

title: A phosphorylation cascade involving ZmSnRK2.10–ZmRIPK2–ZmWRKY38 attenuates drought response by derepressing ZmSUS2 in maize
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Drought stress severely limits crop productivity, with transcription factors (TFs) playing pivotal roles in plant adaptation. Here, we identify the maize TF ZmWRKY38 as a positive regulator of drought tolerance. CRISPR/Cas9-mediated knockout of
                    ZmWRKY38
                    increased plant sensitivity to drought compared with the wild type. We demonstrate that ZmWRKY38 binds to the promoter of the sucrose synthase gene
                    ZmSUS2
                    and represses its transcription. Conversely, ZmSUS2 functions as a negative regulator of drought tolerance, as
                    zmsus2
                    mutants displayed enhanced drought resistance. Moreover, we identified ZmRIPK2 (RPM1-induced protein kinase 2), a plasma membrane-localized receptor-like cytoplasmic kinase that also negatively regulates drought responses. Under abscisic acid (ABA) or drought stress, ZmSnRK2.10 phosphorylates and activates ZmRIPK2, triggering its partial translocation into the nucleus. Within the nucleus, ZmRIPK2 interacts with and phosphorylates ZmWRKY38, impairing its DNA-binding capacity and thereby alleviating transcriptional repression of
                    ZmSUS2
                    . Together, our results reveal a negative feedback loop in which ZmRIPK2-mediated phosphorylation of ZmWRKY38 fine-tunes the drought stress response through modulation of
                    ZmSUS2
                    expression. This mechanism illustrates how ABA signaling attenuates drought responses to balance stress adaptation with normal growth.
title_zh: 涉及 ZmSnRK2.10–ZmRIPK2–ZmWRKY38 的磷酸化级联通过解除玉米中 ZmSUS2 的抑制来减弱干旱反应
abstract_zh:
干旱胁迫严重限制了作物生产力，而转录因子（TF）在植物适应中发挥着关键作用。在这里，我们将玉米 TF ZmWRKY38 确定为耐旱性的正调节因子。 CRISPR/Cas9 介导的基因敲除
                    ZmWRKY38
                    与野生型相比，植物对干旱的敏感性增加。我们证明 ZmWRKY38 与蔗糖合酶基因的启动子结合
                    不锈钢SUS2
                    并抑制其转录。相反，ZmSUS2 作为耐旱性的负调节因子发挥作用，因为
                    泽姆斯苏2
                    突变体表现出增强的抗旱性。此外，我们还发现了 ZmRIPK2（RPM1 诱导蛋白激酶 2），一种质膜定位的受体样细胞质激酶，也能负调节干旱反应。在脱落酸 (ABA) 或干旱胁迫下，ZmSnRK2.10 磷酸化并激活 ZmRIPK2，触发其部分易位到细胞核中。在细胞核内，ZmRIPK2 与 ZmWRKY38 相互作用并使其磷酸化，损害其 DNA 结合能力，从而减轻 ZmWRKY38 的转录抑制
                    不锈钢SUS2
                    。总之，我们的结果揭示了一个负反馈循环，其中 ZmRIPK2 介导的 ZmWRKY38 磷酸化通过调节
                    不锈钢SUS2
                    表达。这一机制说明了 ABA 信号传导如何减弱干旱反应，以平衡胁迫适应与正常生长。

title: Active linking through narratives facilitates associative inference
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: In daily life, we often draw inferences about novel associations from prior experiences. This ability, associative inference, is thought to be a key process by which memory guides future behavior. Prior studies have typically instructed participants to use narratives or mental imagery to aid memory of object associations. However, these studies have not explicitly tested the role of narratives, leaving an important question: how crucial are narratives in associative inference, and what role might they play? We used a modified associative inference paradigm to answer these questions. Our design factorially combined two factors during associative encoding: use of narratives, and explicitly linking the two objects. Participants separately learned AB and BC object pairs within ABC triads using four sets of instructions: i) generate narratives to link objects together, ii) generate narratives for objects separately, iii) compare perceptual properties of two objects, and iv) describe perceptual properties of objects individually. We tested participants’ ability to infer AC associations as a function of encoding strategy. Across two experiments, using narratives to actively link objects produced a robust associative memory advantage that persisted across 1-day delay and remained substantial under more stringent retrieval conditions. This benefit was not attributable to a simple linking effect or to surface-level linguistic similarity between stories. A follow-up experiment revealed that this benefit did not generalize to perceptual memory for individual objects; instead, perceptual encoding facilitated perceptual object memory. These results reveal that deep, extended encoding emphasizing either narrativity or perceptual processing can benefit different aspects of retrieval.
title_zh: 通过叙述进行主动链接有助于联想推理
abstract_zh: 在日常生活中，我们经常从以前的经历中得出新的联想。这种能力，即联想推理，被认为是记忆引导未来行为的关键过程。先前的研究通常指示参与者使用叙述或心理意象来帮助记忆物体关联。然而，这些研究并没有明确检验叙事的作用，留下了一个重要的问题：叙事在联想推理中有多重要，它们可能扮演什么角色？我们使用修改后的联想推理范式来回答这些问题。我们的设计在关联编码过程中结合了两个因素：叙述的使用以及两个对象的明确链接。参与者使用四组指令分别学习 ABC 三元组中的 AB 和 BC 对象对：i）生成将对象链接在一起的叙述，ii）分别生成对象的叙述，iii）比较两个对象的感知属性，以及 iv）单独描述对象的感知属性。我们测试了参与者根据编码策略推断 AC 关联的能力。在两项实验中，使用叙事主动链接对象产生了强大的联想记忆优势，这种优势在 1 天的延迟中持续存在，并且在更严格的检索条件下仍然很重要。这种好处不能归因于简单的链接效应或故事之间表面语言的相似性。后续实验表明，这种好处并没有推广到单个物体的感知记忆。相反，感知

title: The unique Efg1 fungal virulence regulon in the catheterized bladder environment
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Urinary catheterization, a frequent procedure in hospitals, nursing homes, and other healthcare facilities, is a primary driver of nosocomial infections. The most common of these are catheter-associated urinary tract infections (CAUTIs), which often progress to severe complication, sepsis, and ultimately death. The fungus
                    Candida albicans
                    is a primary causative agent of CAUTIs; yet, its tissue-specific pathogenesis remains poorly understood, which complicates development of efficient treatments. While Efg1 is a known virulence driver in CAUTI, its specific downstream targets within the unique bladder environment have not been defined. Here, we identify and validate the
                    EFG1
                    regulon that is active during conditions that mimic the human catheterized bladder and, additionally, confirm the regulon by transcriptional profiling of catheters retrieved from patients with
                    C. albicans
                    infection. We found that this urine-specific signature is highly conserved in clinical samples, with Efg1-dependent genes being among the most robustly induced transcripts during active human infection. Furthermore, we characterized two of these key factors,
                    ECE1
                    and
                    EED1
                    , validating their roles in infection both in vitro in human urine and in vivo using a CAUTI mouse model. Elucidating this tissue-specific regulon offers a strategic roadmap for the development of targeted therapies to mitigate these ever-increasing life-threatening fungal infections.
title_zh: 插管膀胱环境中独特的 Efg1 真菌毒力调节子
abstract_zh:
导尿管是医院、疗养院和其他医疗机构的常见手术，是医院感染的主要驱动因素。其中最常见的是导管相关尿路感染 (CAUTI)，通常会进展为严重并发症、败血症，并最终导致死亡。真菌
                    白色念珠菌
                    是 CAUTI 的主要病原体；然而，其组织特异性发病机制仍知之甚少，这使得有效治疗的开发变得复杂。虽然 Efg1 是 CAUTI 中已知的毒力驱动因素，但其在独特膀胱环境中的具体下游目标尚未确定。在这里，我们识别并验证
                    EFG1
                    调节子在模拟人类插管膀胱的条件下活跃，此外，通过从患者体内取出的导管的转录谱来确认调节子
                    白色念珠菌
                    感染。我们发现这种尿液特异性特征在临床样本中高度保守，Efg1 依赖性基因是人类活跃感染期间最强烈诱导的转录本之一。此外，我们还描述了其中两个关键因素，
                    欧洲经济委员会1
                    和
                    EED1
                    ，使用 CAUTI 小鼠模型验证它们在体外人尿感染和体内感染中的作用。阐明这种组织特异性调节子为开发靶向疗法以减轻这些不断发生的问题提供了战略路线图。

title: Electrochemical lateral flow assay with ELISA-level performance for detecting plant diseases in East Africa
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Cassava brown streak disease (CBSD) threatens food security for millions in East Africa, yet its control remains limited by the absence of field-deployable molecular diagnostics. Here, we introduce ELLA (Electrochemical Lateral flow assay with Linked Analytics), a battery-free, smartphone-powered electrochemical lateral flow assay that delivers enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA)-grade protein detection directly in the field. ELLA integrates near-field communication, a single-chip potentiostat, metal-pin electrodes, and ferrocene-labeled nanoparticles into a fully disposable cassette, enabling quantitative immunoassays without optical instrumentation or centralized laboratory infrastructure. Validated across laboratory studies and extensive field trials in Tanzania, ELLA achieved 95% agreement with ELISA and 89% agreement with RT-qPCR, outperforming ELISA’s limit of detection while maintaining a material cost below US$1. By coupling molecular test results with cloud-linked analytics, we further trained DeepELLA, a smartphone-based image classification model that enables scalable surveillance from field-acquired leaf images. Together, these advances unify electrochemical sensing, digital connectivity, and AI-assisted interpretation, enabling portable, ELISA-level diagnostics for plant, environmental, and health monitoring in resource-limited regions.
title_zh: 具有 ELISA 水平性能的电化学侧流测定法用于检测东非的植物病害
abstract_zh: 木薯褐条病 (CBSD) 威胁着东非数百万人的粮食安全，但由于缺乏可现场部署的分子诊断技术，其控制仍然受到限制。在这里，我们介绍 ELLA（带 Linked Analytics 的电化学侧流分析），这是一种无需电池、由智能手机供电的电化学侧流分析，可直接在现场提供酶联免疫吸附分析 (ELISA) 级蛋白质检测。 ELLA 将近场通信、单芯片恒电位仪、金属针电极和二茂铁标记的纳米颗粒集成到一个完全一次性的盒中，无需光学仪器或集中实验室基础设施即可实现定量免疫测定。经过坦桑尼亚的实验室研究和广泛的现场试验验证，ELLA 与 ELISA 的一致性达到 95%，与 RT-qPCR 的一致性达到 89%，超越了 ELISA 的检测限，同时将材料成本保持在 1 美元以下。通过将分子测试结果与云连接分析相结合，我们进一步训练了 DeepELLA，这是一种基于智能手机的图像分类模型，可以对现场采集的叶子图像进行可扩展的监视。这些进步将电化学传感、数字连接和人工智能辅助解释统一起来，为资源有限地区的植物、环境和健康监测提供便携式、ELISA 级诊断。

title: Dietary DNA in municipal wastewater reveals signatures of wealth, immigration, and coastal proximity
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract:
Public health nutrition lacks scalable, objective tools for real-time dietary surveillance. We developed FoodSeq-FLOW (Food Landscape Observation in Wastewater), a genomic platform that sequences chloroplast
                    trnL
                    and mitochondrial 12SV5 DNA in municipal wastewater. Across 183 samples from 21 North Carolina wastewater treatment plants serving 2.1 million people, we detected 184 plant and 116 animal food taxa at a cost of <US $0.01 per person. Wastewater-derived dietary profiles correlated with paired individual stool dietary data (Spearman ρ = 0.64), and 98% of animal-derived sequences mapped to known food taxa. Temporal sampling revealed seasonal shifts in food taxa consistent with regional food availability patterns. Spatial analysis revealed community-level dietary signatures associated with per capita income and education, beer ingredient abundance with discretionary income, tropical fruits and pulses with foreign-born population size, and local seafood with coastal geography. FoodSeq-FLOW extends wastewater-based epidemiology from pathogens to diet, providing a scalable platform that existing global wastewater surveillance networks can deploy to inform nutrition policy and market analytics.
title_zh: 城市废水中的膳食 DNA 揭示了财富、移民和邻近沿海地区的特征
abstract_zh:
公共卫生营养缺乏可扩展、客观的实时饮食监测工具。我们开发了 FoodSeq-FLOW（废水中的食物景观观察），这是一个对叶绿体进行测序的基因组平台
                    tnL
                    以及城市废水中的线粒体 12SV5 DNA。我们从北卡罗来纳州 21 个废水处理厂（为 210 万人提供服务）的 183 个样本中检测到了 184 种植物和 116 种动物食品类群，每人成本不到 0.01 美元。废水来源的饮食概况与配对的个体粪便饮食数据相关（Spearman ρ = 0.64），并且 98% 的动物来源序列映射到已知的食物分类单元。时间采样揭示了食品分类群的季节性变化与区域粮食供应模式一致。空间分析揭示了社区层面的饮食特征与人均收入和教育程度的关系、啤酒原料丰富度与可自由支配收入的关系、热带水果和豆类与外国出生人口规模的关系、以及当地海鲜与沿海地理的关系。 FoodSeq-FLOW 将基于废水的流行病学从病原体扩展到饮食，提供了一个可扩展的平台，现有的全球废水监测网络可以部署该平台，为营养政策和市场分析提供信息。

title: Measuring disparate impact in human and machine decisions
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Empirical analyses have grown increasingly important in discrimination litigation with the greater availability of detailed data on individuals and decisions. A popular analytic strategy is to estimate disparities after adjusting for observed covariates, typically with a regression model, in hopes of ferreting out discriminatory intent. This approach, however, is ill-suited to auditing algorithms that are now commonly used to aid decisions, which typically do not include race or other legally protected factors as inputs. Motivated by legal understandings of disparate impact, we introduce an approach that aims to measure “unjustified” disparities in both human and machine decisions. Our method, which we call risk-adjusted regression, proceeds in three steps. In the first step, we combine all available information in a machine learning model to estimate the value, or inversely, the risk, of taking a certain action, such as approving a loan application or hiring a job candidate. Second, we measure disparities in decisions after adjusting for these risk estimates alone. Finally, in the third step, we assess the sensitivity of results to potential mismeasurement of risk. We demonstrate this approach on a detailed dataset of 2.2 million police stops of pedestrians in New York City, and show that traditional statistical tests of discrimination can substantially understate the magnitude of (risk-adjusted) racial disparities.
title_zh: 衡量人类和机器决策的不同影响
abstract_zh: 随着有关个人和决策的详细数据越来越多，实证分析在歧视诉讼中变得越来越重要。一种流行的分析策略是在调整观察到的协变量后估计差异，通常使用回归模型，以期找出歧视意图。然而，这种方法不适合现在常用来辅助决策的审核算法，这些算法通常不包括种族或其他受法律保护的因素作为输入。在对不同影响的法律理解的推动下，我们引入了一种方法，旨在衡量人类和机器决策中“不合理”的差异。我们的方法称为风险调整回归，分三个步骤进行。第一步，我们将机器学习模型中的所有可用信息结合起来，以估计采取某种行动（例如批准贷款申请或雇用求职者）的价值或相反的风险。其次，我们在单独调整这些风险估计后衡量决策的差异。最后，在第三步中，我们评估结果对潜在风险误测的敏感性。我们在纽约市 220 万次警察拦截行人的详细数据集上展示了这种方法，并表明传统的歧视统计测试可以大大低估（风险调整后的）种族差异的程度。

title: Particles of echovirus 18 open to release their genomes in vivo
source: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences: Keyword search for query
abstract: Enteroviruses cause a broad spectrum of human diseases, ranging from mild respiratory or gastrointestinal infections to severe neurological disorders such as aseptic meningitis and encephalitis. Enterovirus cell entry involves receptor-mediated endocytosis followed by destabilizing rearrangements of the virus capsid that enable genome release. However, the mechanism of enterovirus genome release has not been visualized in infected cells. Here, we used cryoelectron tomography and microscopy to image echovirus 18 (E18) entry into host cells and its interaction with the neonatal Fc receptor (FcRn). 30 min postinfection, endosomes and cytoplasm contained empty capsids missing one or several pentamers of capsid proteins, providing evidence that in vivo E18 releases its genome through capsid opening. In vitro, FcRn binding induced the expulsion of pocket factors from hydrophobic pockets in VP1, priming the virus for uncoating. The cryoelectron microscopy reconstruction of genome-containing particles of E18 inside infected cells did not reveal pocket factors, indicating that receptor binding triggers the same priming process during infection. We did not detect activated particles in infected cells, suggesting that these intermediates are short-lived and rapidly release their genomes in vivo. Our results identify capsid opening as the in vivo mechanism of echovirus 18 genome release, providing structural evidence for a process previously only inferred from in vitro experiments.
title_zh: 艾可病毒 18 的颗粒在体内开放并释放其基因组
abstract_zh: 肠道病毒引起多种人类疾病，从轻微的呼吸道或胃肠道感染到严重的神经系统疾病，如无菌性脑膜炎和脑炎。肠道病毒进入细胞涉及受体介导的内吞作用，然后是病毒衣壳的不稳定重排，从而使基因组释放。然而，肠道病毒基因组释放的机制尚未在受感染的细胞中显现出来。在这里，我们使用冷冻电子断层扫描和显微镜对埃可病毒 18 (E18) 进入宿主细胞及其与新生儿 Fc 受体 (FcRn) 的相互作用进行成像。感染后30分钟，内体和细胞质含有空衣壳，缺少衣壳蛋白的一个或多个五聚体，这提供了体内E18通过衣壳开放释放其基因组的证据。在体外，FcRn 结合诱导口袋因子从 VP1 的疏水口袋中排出，启动病毒脱壳。对受感染细胞内含有 E18 基因组的颗粒进行冷冻电镜重建，没有发现口袋因子，这表明受体结合在感染过程中触发了相同的启动过程。我们没有在受感染的细胞中检测到激活的颗粒，这表明这些中间体的寿命很短，并且会在体内迅速释放其基因组。我们的结果确定衣壳打开是埃可病毒18基因组释放的体内机制，为以前仅从体外实验推断的过程提供了结构证据。

title: Sr/Pb Alloying Stabilizes Wide‐Bandgap Perovskites for Durable Fully‐Textured Perovskite/Silicon Tandem Solar Cells
source: Wiley: Advanced Energy Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Double‐sided fully‐textured (3–5 µm) perovskite/silicon tandem solar cells (PS‐TSCs) emerge as a promising pathway for tandem photovoltaics due to their excellent optical management and low manufacturing costs. However, their commercialization is hindered by operational instability, largely attributable to ion migration within the wide‐bandgap perovskite top cell. Here, we report a B‐site cation alloying strategy employing strontium (Sr
                    2+
                    ) to enhance the stability of wide‐bandgap perovskites through local lattice engineering. Owing to its lower electronegativity and polarizability relative to lead (Pb
                    2+
                    ), Sr
                    2+
                    incorporation strengthens the metal‐halide bonding network, thereby forming a more rigid and ordered octahedral framework with weakened electron‐phonon coupling. The Sr/Pb alloyed perovskite films exhibit significantly enhanced stability under illumination and/or thermal stress. Fully‐textured PS‐TSCs incorporating this strategy achieve a power conversion efficiency of 31.66%. Importantly, encapsulated devices show less than 7% performance loss after more than 1391 h at maximum power point tracking, corresponding to a projected
                    T
                    80
                    lifetime of approximately 6785 h under continuous 1‐sun illumination. Under thermal aging at 65°C, devices further demonstrate a
                    T
                    90
                    lifetime exceeding 1100 h.
title_zh: Sr/Pb 合金可稳定宽带隙钙钛矿，用于耐用的全纹理钙钛矿/硅串联太阳能电池

title: Dramatic Enhancement of Thermoelectric Performance in Two‐Dimensional Materials Enabled by Nanoscroll Architecture
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Enabling autonomous operation in next‐generation nanosystems demands efficient on‐chip energy harvesting free from external power. Nanoscale thermoelectric generators are ideal platforms for this goal due to their ambient energy harvesting and scalability. Nevertheless, the thermoelectric performance of the constituent low‐dimensional materials is fundamentally limited by the complex coupling of electrical and thermal transport. This work proposes a simple geometric topology strategy that utilizes capillary forces to transform monolayer WS
                    2
                    nanoribbons into nanoscrolls, resulting in significantly improved thermoelectric performance. This unique architecture, combining global curvature with local multi‐layering, simultaneously activates two synergistic physical mechanisms: (1) the formation of local multi‐layer homojunctions significantly narrows the bandgap and reduces thermal activation energy, thereby boosting electrical conductivity by 1–2 orders of magnitude, and (2) curvature‐induced inhomogeneous stress fields effectively enhance phonon scattering, leading to a nearly 50% reduction in lattice thermal conductivity. Consequently, such synergistic modulation elevates the figure of merit (
                    ZT
                    ) at 273 K to 182 times that of pristine nanoribbons, successfully breaking traditional performance trade‐offs. This study validates geometric topology engineering as a generalizable design paradigm for unlocking the potential of two‐dimensional nanomaterials, paving the way for high‐performance, flexible micro/nano‐energy devices.
title_zh: 纳米卷轴结构显着增强二维材料的热电性能
abstract_zh:

                    ZT

title: A Metamaterial Buckling‐Assisted Surface‐Acoustic‐Wave Enabled Sensor (mBASES) for Versatile and Ultrasensitive Biomarker Detection
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Hydrogel metamaterials with programmable microarchitectures offer a promising route for converting molecular recognition into mechanical responses. However, efficiently transducing weak biomolecular perturbations into detectable signals without relying on molecular amplification remains a fundamental challenge. Here, we report a metamaterial Buckling‐Assisted Surface‐acoustic‐wave Enabled Sensor (mBASES), which introduces a structure‐triggered physical amplification mechanism by integrating bio‐crosslinked hydrogel metamaterials with a surface acoustic wave (SAW) device. Through competitive biomolecular recognition, target binding induces hydrogel swelling that is engineered to match the critical buckling threshold of the metamaterial. This instability‐enabled pattern transformation acts as an intrinsic mechanical gain element, converting weak molecular perturbations into amplified acoustic responses through coupled modulation of phononic transmission and hydrogel–SAW interactions. As a result, mBASES establishes a transduction pathway that links molecular recognition, hydrogel deformation, structural amplification, and ultimately acoustic readout. The platform enables rapid, label‐free detection across multiple biomolecular classes, including proteins, nucleic acids, and metabolites. Clinical validation further demonstrates femtomolar‐level detection of Herpes Simplex Virus (HSV) IgG and unamplified DNA in human serum within 5–15 min using a one‐step assay. By amplifying the transduction process rather than the target molecules, mBASES establishes a versatile biosensing strategy, providing a promising platform for point‐of‐care diagnostics.
title_zh: 用于多功能和超灵敏生物标志物检测的超材料屈曲辅助表面声波传感器 (mBASES)

title: 940 Nm Near‐Infrared Photosynapses Based on Sn─Pb Perovskite for Efficient Face Recognition
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Tin–lead perovskites offer great potentials for neuromorphic optoelectronics owing to their narrow bandgap and robust near‐infrared (NIR) absorption. However, high‐performance three‐terminal artificial synapses based on these materials remain scarce due to challenges in forming high‐quality semiconductor films. Here, we demonstrate a perovskite synaptic field‐effect transistor (FET) capable of efficient 940 nm sensing and neuromorphic modulation, enabled by uniform, high‐crystallinity FASn
                    0.8
                    Pb
                    0.2
                    I
                    3
                    thin films. A molecular additive, 1‐bromo‐4‐(methylsulfinyl)benzene (BMSB), precisely regulates crystallization, enlarges grains, and suppresses trap formation, thereby reducing ion migration and enhancing charge transport. The optimized devices achieve high hole mobility and an exceptional responsivity of 231 A W
                    −1
                    at 940 nm, marking the first demonstration of efficient 940 nm infrared photoresponse in three‐terminal perovskite artificial synapses. Benefiting from balanced ion‐electron coupling, the devices exhibit reliable synaptic behaviors, including excitatory postsynaptic currents, paired‐pulse facilitation, and learning–forgetting cycles. Integrated into a reservoir–computing framework, the synaptic FETs enable accurate NIR facial recognition, underscoring their potential for in‐sensor computing. This work establishes a molecular‐level strategy to harmonize ionic and electronic processes in Sn─Pb perovskites, advancing light‐programmable neuromorphic transistors for next‐generation intelligent NIR vision systems.
title_zh: 基于 Sn─Pb 钙钛矿的 940 Nm 近红外光突实现高效人脸识别

title: Charge‐Encoded Sidechains Enable Deterministic Ion Ingress and Memory Retention in Organic Electrochemical Synaptic Transistors
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Organic electrochemical synaptic transistors (OESTs) are promising building blocks for neuromorphic computing because they leverage volumetric ion–electron coupling to emulate synaptic plasticity. Here, we design sidechain‐engineered conjugated polyelectrolytes (CPE‐K, CPE‐Br, and CPE‐Zw) based on a cyclopenta‐[2,1‐b;3,4‐b]‐dithiophene‐alt‐4,7‐(2,1,3‐benzothiadiazole) (CPDT‐BT) donor–acceptor backbone and use them as channel materials in solid‐electrolyte‐gated OESTs. Spectroelectrochemical measurements demonstrate that cationic CPE‐Br achieves a higher and denser doping level than anionic CPE‐K and zwitterionic CPE‐Zw, enabled by efficient electrolyte ion diffusion throughout the polymer bulk. Temporal polaron transients monitored at 1200 nm reveal that cationic sidechains facilitate volumetric penetration of electrolyte anions to charge‐neutralize the positively doped backbone during electrochemical doping. In contrast, anionic sidechains favor rapid local self‐compensation through sidechain reorganization, accompanied by limited uptake of external anions. As a consequence, CPE‐Br‐based OESTs exhibit the highest transconductance, a superior
                    µC
                    *
                    figure of merit, pronounced hysteresis, and long‐term synaptic retention with extended long‐term potentiation decay times. Collectively, these results establish ionic sidechain engineering as an effective strategy for programming ion ingress, polaron memory, and retention characteristics in OESTs, providing a versatile platform for tailoring synaptic operation in neuromorphic devices.
title_zh: 电荷编码侧链在有机电化学突触晶体管中实现确定性离子进入和记忆保留
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    有机电化学突触晶体管（OEST）是神经形态计算的有前途的构建模块，因为它们利用体积离子-电子耦合来模拟突触可塑性。在这里，我们设计了基于环戊基-[2,1-b;3,4-b]-二噻吩-alt-4,7-(2,1,3-苯并噻二唑)（CPDT-BT）供体-受体主链的侧链工程共轭聚电解质（CPE-K、CPE-Br和CPE-Zw），并将它们用作固体电解质门控OEST中的通道材料。光谱电化学测量表明，由于电解质离子在整个聚合物本体中的有效扩散，阳离子 CPE-Br 比阴离子 CPE-K 和两性离子 CPE-Zw 实现了更高、更密集的掺杂水平。在 1200 nm 处监测的时间极化子瞬态表明，阳离子侧链有助于电解质阴离子的体积渗透，从而在电化学掺杂过程中对正掺杂主链进行电荷中和。相比之下，阴离子侧链有利于通过侧链重组进行快速局部自我补偿，同时外部阴离子的吸收有限。因此，基于 CPE-Br 的 OEST 表现出最高的跨导，
                    微克
                    *
                    品质因数、明显的滞后和长期突触保留以及延长的长期增强衰减时间。总的来说，这些结果确立了离子侧链工程作为 OEST 中离子进入、极化子记忆和保留特性编程的有效策略，提供了一个多功能平台。

title: A Self‐Oxygenating Wound‐Adaptive Stem Cell Encapsulation Platform for Chronic Wound Repair
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Stem cell‐based therapies hold substantial promise for the treatment of chronic wounds. However, limited clinical efficacy has frequently arisen not from inadequate cell potency, but from failure of current delivery paradigms to sustain cell survival and function within hostile host microenvironments. Here, we report a wound‐adaptive, self‐oxygenating stem cell encapsulation platform designed to overcome this delivery paradigm failure. The device embeds living stem cells within an immunoisolating hydrogel matrix conformally shaped to individual wound geometries and converts locally accumulated CO
                    2
                    into molecular O
                    2
                    , thereby providing an oxygen supply that preserves cellular metabolic activity in situ. Importantly, oxygenation in this system functions primarily to sustain cell viability rather than to directly oxygenate host tissue. Compared with conventional local or systemic delivery strategies, encapsulated cells exhibit markedly enhanced survival, persistence, and therapeutic function. Evaluation in diabetic rat and porcine wound models demonstrates accelerated resolution of inflammation, improved vascular maturation, and robust tissue regeneration. By reframing cell therapy as a problem of environment‐cell compatibility, this platform establishes a clinically translatable delivery paradigm for precision stem cell therapy in chronic wound repair.
title_zh: 用于慢性伤口修复的自氧化伤口适应性干细胞封装平台
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    基于干细胞的疗法为治疗慢性伤口带来了巨大的希望。然而，有限的临床疗效常常不是由于细胞效力不足而引起，而是由于当前的递送模式未能在敌对宿主微环境中维持细胞存活和功能。在这里，我们报告了一种伤口适应性、自充氧干细胞封装平台，旨在克服这种输送模式的失败。该装置将活干细胞嵌入免疫隔离水凝胶基质中，其形状与个体伤口几何形状一致，并转化局部积累的二氧化碳
                    2
                    转化为分子O
                    2
                    ，从而提供氧气供应，保持原位细胞代谢活动。重要的是，该系统中的氧合主要用于维持细胞活力，而不是直接给宿主组织供氧。与传统的局部或全身递送策略相比，封装细胞表现出显着增强的存活率、持久性和治疗功能。对糖尿病大鼠和猪伤口模型的评估表明，炎症消退速度加快，血管成熟度改善，组织再生能力强。通过将细胞治疗重新定义为环境与细胞相容性问题，该平台为慢性伤口修复中的精准干细胞治疗建立了临床可转化的递送范例。

title: PCET‐Inspired Nanoparticles Enable Paired Proton‐Electron Delivery to Restore Mitochondrial Electron Transport and Regenerate Bone During Aging
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Mitochondrial electron transport chain (ETC) dysfunction drives the accumulation of damaged mitochondria and bioenergetic insufficiency, contributing to cellular senescence and impaired tissue repair in aging. However, reconstituting ETC‐associated mitochondrial bioenergetics in situ to overcome this energy restriction remains challenging. In this study, a mitochondrial hydrogen‐supply system (EMHS) is developed that attenuates senescence‐associated phenotypes in the aged bone regenerative niche and promotes skeletal healing in aging via proton‐coupled electron transfer (PCET). It has been demonstrated that the active hydrogen generated by EMHS infiltrates mitochondria in senescent cells, enabling the paired delivery of proton–electron equivalents to restore ETC function. This mitochondrial functional recovery is accompanied by reduced mitochondrial reactive oxygen species (ROS) and improved oxidative phosphorylation (OXPHOS) capacity, which expands the functional mitochondrial pool. EMHS restores the osteogenic potential of bone marrow mesenchymal stem cells (BMSCs), enhances endothelial angiogenic capacity, and biases neutrophils toward a pro‐repair phenotype. Remarkably, following systemic administration, EMHS preferentially accumulates in bone and promotes bone‐vascular coupled regeneration in aged mice with bone defects. Overall, our findings introduce a small‐molecule drug‐free nanotherapeutic strategy that maintains a functional mitochondrial pool with potential to alleviate cellular aging and age‐related diseases.
title_zh: PCET 启发的纳米颗粒能够实现成对的质子电子传输，以恢复线粒体电子传输并在衰老过程中再生骨骼
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  线粒体电子传递链（ETC）功能障碍会导致受损线粒体的积累和生物能不足，从而导致细胞衰老和衰老过程中组织修复受损。然而，原位重建 ETC 相关线粒体生物能学以克服这种能量限制仍然具有挑战性。在这项研究中，开发了一种线粒体供氢系统（EMHS），该系统可以减弱衰老骨再生生态位中与衰老相关的表型，并通过质子耦合电子转移（PCET）促进衰老过程中的骨骼愈合。已经证明，EMHS 产生的活性氢可以渗透到衰老细胞的线粒体中，从而实现质子-电子等价物的成对传递，从而恢复 ETC 功能。这种线粒体功能恢复伴随着线粒体活性氧（ROS）的减少和氧化磷酸化（OXPHOS）能力的提高，从而扩大了功能性线粒体库。 EMHS 恢复骨髓间充质干细胞 (BMSC) 的成骨潜力，增强内皮血管生成能力，并使中性粒细胞偏向促修复表型。值得注意的是，全身给药后，EMHS 优先在骨骼中积累，并促进骨缺损老年小鼠的骨血管耦合再生。总体而言，我们的研究结果引入了一种小分子无药纳米治疗策略，该策略可维持功能性线粒体库，有可能减轻细胞衰老和年龄相关疾病。

title: Geometry‐Programmable Living Immunomaterials for Spatial Control of Innate Immune Signaling
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Spatial organization of immune ligands critically regulates cGAS–STING signaling by controling the nanoscale geometry that drives cooperative cGAS assembly and catalytic activity. Here we engineer geometry‐programmable DNA origami that precisely encodes double‐stranded DNA (dsDNA) valency and spacing to promote cooperative cGAS clustering and STING activation. Systematic architectural modulation identifies an optimal configuration within tested ranges, in which 60‐bp dsDNA ligands arranged with ∼16.3 nm periodicity induce approximately twofold stronger STING signaling than free dsDNA counterparts. We further integrate these origamis with the probiotic
                    Escherichia coli
                    Nissle 1917 via transporter‐mediated surface anchoring, forming a living immunomaterial interface for localized ligand presentation in colorectal tumors. In microsatellite‐stable colorectal cancer models, this biohybrid system drives robust intratumoral STING activation, promotes T‐cell‐inflamed immune remodeling, and suppresses tumor growth by ∼83.5% relative to controls. This work establishes a geometry‐programmable living immunomaterial translating nanoscale architectural design into spatially confined innate immune signaling.
title_zh: 用于先天免疫信号空间控制的几何可编程活体免疫材料
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    免疫配体的空间组织通过控制驱动协同 cGAS 组装和催化活性的纳米级几何结构来严格调节 cGAS-STING 信号传导。在这里，我们设计了几何可编程的 DNA 折纸，精确编码双链 DNA (dsDNA) 价和间距，以促进协同 cGAS 聚类和 STING 激活。系统的结构调制确定了测试范围内的最佳配置，其中以~16.3 nm周期性排列的60 bp dsDNA配体诱导的STING信号比游离dsDNA对应物强大约两倍。我们进一步将这些折纸与益生菌结合起来
                    大肠杆菌
                    Nissle 1917 通过转运蛋白介导的表面锚定，形成活的免疫材料界面，用于结直肠肿瘤中局部配体的呈现。在微卫星稳定结直肠癌模型中，这种生物混合系统驱动肿瘤内 STING 的强大激活，促进 T 细胞炎症免疫重塑，并相对于对照组抑制肿瘤生长约 83.5%。这项工作建立了一种几何可编程活体免疫材料，将纳米级建筑设计转化为空间受限的先天免疫信号。

title: Compliance for Resistance: The Intrinsic Extraordinary Isotropic Anti‐Fatigue Performance of Fish Bladder
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Fatigue failure remains a critical challenge for soft materials used in biomedical implants and soft robotics. Existing strategies, including stiff reinforcement and microstructural alignment, can suppress crack growth but often introduce anisotropy and poor resistance to multidirectional loading. In addition, a persistent orders‐of‐magnitude disparity remains between fracture toughness and fatigue threshold of synthetic soft materials. Here, the fish bladder of silver carp, characterized by a multilayered hierarchical fibrous architecture, is shown to exhibit extraordinary isotropic fatigue resistance (∼6000 J·m
                    −
                    2
                    ) approaching its fracture toughness. This behavior originates from a “compliance for resistance” mechanism that couples dynamic fiber straightening and rotation, sacrificial bond breakage and reassociation, and layer‐specific fiber reorientation with the resulting interfacial sliding to dissipate energy under cyclic loading. Guided by these principles, a biohybrid hydrogel is designed to reproduce this multiscale anti‐fatigue mechanism, achieving a high fatigue threshold (>3000 J·m
                    −
                    2
                    ) together with robust antifouling performance. These results uncover fundamental design principles of fatigue‐resistant biological soft tissues and provide a general strategy for engineering durable soft materials.
title_zh: 阻力顺应性：鱼鳔本质上非凡的各向同性抗疲劳性能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    对于生物医学植入物和软机器人技术中使用的软材料来说，疲劳失效仍然是一个严峻的挑战。现有的策略，包括刚性加固和微观结构对齐，可以抑制裂纹扩展，但通常会引入各向异性，并且对多向载荷的抵抗力较差。此外，合成软材料的断裂韧性和疲劳阈值之间仍然存在持续的数量级差异。在这里，鲢鱼的鱼鳔具有多层分级纤维结构，表现出非凡的各向同性疲劳抗力（∼6000 J·m
                    -
                    2
                    ）接近其断裂韧性。这种行为源于“阻力顺从”机制，该机制将动态纤维拉直和旋转、牺牲键断裂和重新结合、层特定纤维重新定向与由此产生的界面滑动相结合，以耗散循环载荷下的能量。在这些原则的指导下，生物混合水凝胶被设计来重现这种多尺度抗疲劳机制，实现高疲劳阈值（>3000 J·m
                    -
                    2
                    ）以及强大的防污性能。这些结果揭示了抗疲劳生物软组织的基本设计原理，并为工程耐用软材料提供了总体策略。

title: Upcycling Spent LiCoO2 with O2–O3 Intergrowth for Enhanced High‐Voltage Stability and Cycling Performance
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Direct regeneration is regarded as a next‐generation recycling strategy for spent lithium‐ion batteries (LIBs) owing to high element recovery and low energy consumption. However, limited by pristine design from 5–8 years ago, the simple recovery for spent LiCoO
                    2
                    (LCO) hardly induced the suitable electrochemical abilities for modern energy‐storage systems. Moreover, commercial LCO with conventional O3 phase inherently suffers from poor high‑voltage stability. Herein, using the fading traits of spent LCO as upcycling springboards, they are successfully regenerated toward fresh LCO with O2–O3 intergrown architecture through lattice reconstruction and ion‑exchange‑induced phase transformation. The O2‑phase content is precisely controlled by tailoring Li‑deficiency level of SLCO. Assisted by intertwined lattice dislocations, O2 and O3 phases are coherently interlocked, effectively alleviating lattice expansion and oxygen release. Meanwhile, the lowered energy band (1.359 eV) and diffusion energy barrier (0.375 eV) play important roles for energy‐storage abilities. The optimized material delivers a capacity of 223.3 mAh g
                    −1
                    at 0.1 C and retains 90.6% after 100 cycles at 1.0 C, outperforming commercial LCO. With a modified electrolyte, a capacity retention of 73.6% is achieved after 500 cycles at 5C. This work highlights the advantages of O2–O3 intergrown LCO and provides a promising upcycling route toward high‑performance cathodes.
title_zh: 利用 O2-O3 共生升级回收废 LiCoO2，以增强高压稳定性和循环性能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    由于元素回收率高、能耗低，直接再生被认为是废旧锂离子电池（LIB）的下一代回收策略。然而，受限于5-8年前的原始设计，废LiCoO的简单回收
                    2
                    （LCO）很难诱导出适合现代储能系统的电化学能力。此外，采用传统 O3 相的商用 LCO 本身就存在高压稳定性差的问题。在此，利用废 LCO 的褪色特性作为升级循环的跳板，通过晶格重建和离子交换诱导的相变，它们成功再生为具有 O2-O3 共生结构的新鲜 LCO。通过定制 SLCO 的缺锂水平来精确控制 O2 相含量。在交织的晶格位错的帮助下，O2 和 O3 相相干地互锁，有效地缓解晶格膨胀和氧释放。同时，降低的能带（1.359 eV）和扩散能垒（0.375 eV）对能量存储能力起着重要作用。优化后的材料容量为 223.3 mAh g
                    −1
                    在 0.1 C 下，在 1.0 C 下循环 100 次后保留率达 90.6%，优于商用 LCO。使用改进的电解质，在 5C 下循环 500 次后，容量保持率为 73.6%。这项工作凸显了 O2-O3 共生 LCO 的优势，并为高性能阴极提供了一条有前景的升级回收途径。

title: Harnessing the Orbital Hall Effect for Energy‐Efficient Magnetization Switching in the Room‐Temperature van der Waals Ferromagnet Fe3GaTe2
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    2D van der Waals (vdW) magnets provide new opportunities for spin–orbit torque magnetoresistive random‐access memory (SOT‐MRAM) due to their unique properties. Electrically manipulating the magnetization of vdW magnets is key to realizing 2D SOT‐MRAM, whereas conventional spin Hall materials such as heavy metals and topological insulators suffer from limitations in torque efficiency and energy consumption. Although recent studies show that the orbital Hall conductivity in light metals greatly exceeds the spin Hall conductivity, direct experimental demonstrations that the orbital Hall effect (OHE) can induce more energy‐efficient SOT switching than the spin Hall effect in vdW magnets remain scarce. Here, we utilize Cr as the orbital current source to efficiently manipulate the magnetization of the vdW ferromagnet Fe
                    3
                    GaTe
                    2
                    at room temperature. In the Fe
                    3
                    GaTe
                    2
                    /Pt (1.5 nm)/Cr (4.5 nm) trilayer structure, the orbital current originating from Cr is converted into the spin current via Pt, which then exerts a torque on Fe
                    3
                    GaTe
                    2
                    . Compared with control samples using 6 nm Pt as the spin current source, the switching current density in OHE‐based devices is reduced by ∼3.9 times, resulting in a ∼52% reduction in power consumption. This work presents the promising potential of harnessing orbital currents to realize energy‐efficient 2D SOT‐MRAM.

title: Photocatalytic Upcycling of Toxic Glyphosate Waste Into Compound Fertilizer for Corn Growth
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Glyphosate (GP), the most widely used herbicide worldwide, poses serious ecological and health risks due to its persistence and toxic degradation intermediates. Although semiconductor photocatalysis offers a promising remediation pathway, the interplay between degradation selectivity, the secondary utilization of products, and environmental sustainability remains poorly understood. Here, we present a facet‐dependent photocatalytic degradation of GP using bismuth oxybromide (BiOBr) nanosheets with dominant (001), (010), and (102) facets. Spectroscopic and theoretical analyses reveal that BiOBr‐(010) and BiOBr‐(102) achieve faster GP degradation via enhanced charge separation and dual adsorption of carboxyl and phosphate groups. However, they predominantly yield and accumulate aminomethylphosphonic acid (AMPA), a toxic and recalcitrant intermediate. In contrast, the (001) facet selectively cleaves the C─N bond in GP via stronger hole accumulation and higher AMPA affinity, producing NH
                    4
                    +
                    , NO
                    3
                    −
                    , PO
                    4
                    3−
                    , and CH
                    3
                    COOH. Importantly, the final products act as a compound fertilizer that can directly promote corn growth. These findings highlight the need to consider more than just degradation efficiency when designing photocatalysts, establishing a structure–function framework that prioritizes kinetic performance and crop growth‐promoting potential.
