title: Adaptive Redox Resistive Memory Programming for Efficient and Robust Class‐Incremental Learning
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Resistive memory (RM)‐based computing‐in‐memory (CiM) accelerators provide a promising platform for low‐power edge intelligence. However, practical edge AI requires not only efficient inference but also repeated model updates through class‐incremental learning (CiL). Implementing CiL on RM substrates exposes a critical material‐algorithm mismatch: the write‐intensive updates required by CiL are strongly affected by the stochastic programming of filamentary RM devices. Conventional fully programming (FP) mitigates this stochasticity by repeatedly programming and verifying each cell to a precise target conductance, but this exhaustive procedure incurs substantial energy consumption, latency, and device wear across successive CiL stages. Herein, we propose a hardware‐aware adaptive programming (AP) strategy that aligns CiL deployment with RM device physics. Microstructural and electrical analyzes reveal that the random spatial distribution of oxygen vacancies gives rise to unavoidable programming variability. Guided by this insight, AP does not attempt to eliminate intrinsic stochasticity through costly compensation. Instead, it updates only the most impactful weights to suppress accuracy loss caused by overall mapping errors, while leaving low‐impact weights unchanged. This converts large‐scale write‐verify operations into targeted updates of a minimal subset of cells, reducing programming overhead without requiring device or material optimization. Validated on a hybrid analog‐digital system with a 40 nm, 256 k RM‐based CiM core, AP reduces programming energy by 93.0% and programming cycles by more than 90% relative to FP during five‐stage CIFAR100 CiL, while achieving a final accuracy of 0.80, close to the 0.81 software baseline. For the more complex ShapeNet 3D point‐cloud recognition task across eight stages, AP achieves 92.3% energy savings with only a 0.03 accuracy loss. Moreover, AP improves robustness by reducing programming‐error‐induced accuracy degradation by 87.7% and 88.4% for the two tasks, respectively. This work bridges algorithmic update requirements and physical programming constraints, enabling robust and energy‐efficient lifelong learning on RM‐based CiM platforms.
title_zh: 自适应氧化还原电阻式存储器编程，实现高效、稳健的类增量学习
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  基于电阻存储器 (RM) 的内存计算 (CiM) 加速器为低功耗边缘智能提供了一个有前途的平台。然而，实用的边缘人工智能不仅需要高效的推理，还需要通过类增量学习（CiL）进行重复的模型更新。在 RM 基板上实现 CiL 暴露了一个关键的材料算法不匹配：CiL 所需的写入密集型更新受到丝状 RM 设备随机编程的强烈影响。传统的完全编程 (FP) 通过重复编程和验证每个单元以达到精确的目标电导来减轻这种随机性，但这种详尽的过程会在连续的 CiL 阶段中产生大量的能耗、延迟和设备磨损。在此，我们提出了一种硬件感知自适应编程 (AP) 策略，使 CiL 部署与 RM 设备物理保持一致。微观结构和电学分析表明，氧空位的随机空间分布导致了不可避免的编程变异性。在这一见解的指导下，美联社并不试图通过昂贵的补偿来消除内在的随机性。相反，它仅更新最有影响力的权重，以抑制整体映射错误导致的准确性损失，同时保持低影响力的权重不变。这将大规模写入验证操作转换为最小单元子集的有针对性的更新，从而减少编程开销，而无需设备或材料优化。 AP 在具有 40 nm、256 k RM 的 CiM 内核的混合模拟数字系统上进行了验证，减少了程序

title: Bridging Large‐Scale Manufacturability and Nanoscale Interfacial Chemistry in Lithium Metal Solid‐State Batteries
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    To address interfacial instability in Li metal all‐solid‐state batteries, protective interlayers have been adopted, yet most rely on coatings or noble metal additives incompatible with scalable manufacturing. Here, we report a nanosized red phosphorus–based interfacial design that enables autogenous chemo‐wetting upon contact with Li, spontaneously forming a Li
                    3
                    P‐rich interphase, referred to as the autogenous chemo‐wet interlayer. This reactive layer self‐regulates ionic transport and interfacial adhesion through in situ chemical conversion, producing uniform Li‐ion flux and well‐distributed interfacial current, thereby enabling stable plating and stripping at high current densities and reliable high‐rate solid‐state cycling. The chemo‐wetting mechanism is inherently compatible with roll‐to‐roll transfer printing and enables defect‐free lamination across large‐area electrodes. This coupled mechanical–electrochemical regulation underpins scalable fabrication of solid‐state electrodes, as demonstrated in 6 Ah‐class pouch cells. These discoveries bridge nanoscale interfacial reactivity with macroscale processability and present a step toward practical implementation toward high‐energy, large‐format solid‐state Li metal batteries.
title_zh: 连接锂金属固态电池的大规模可制造性和纳米级界面化学
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    为了解决锂金属全固态电池的界面不稳定性，人们采用了保护性中间层，但大多数依赖于与可规模化制造不兼容的涂层或贵金属添加剂。在这里，我们报告了一种基于纳米红磷的界面设计，该设计能够在与Li接触时实现自生化学润湿，自发形成Li
                    3
                    富磷中间相，称为自生化学湿中间层。该反应层通过原位化学转化来自我调节离子传输和界面粘附，产生均匀的锂离子通量和均匀分布的界面电流，从而实现高电流密度下稳定的电镀和剥离以及可靠的高速率固态循环。化学润湿机制本质上与卷对卷转移印刷兼容，并且能够在大面积电极上实现无缺陷层压。这种机械-电化学耦合调节为固态电极的可扩展制造奠定了基础，如 6 Ah 级软包电池所证明的那样。这些发现将纳米级界面反应性与宏观可加工性联系起来，并为高能、大型固态锂金属电池的实际实施迈出了一步。

title: Discrete Microdomain‐Bonded Binder Enables Mechanically Robust Micron‐Silicon Anodes in Lithium‐Ion Batteries
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Micron‐silicon (µSi) is a promising anode material for lithium‐ion batteries (LIBs) due to its low production cost, high tap density, and exceptional theoretical specific capacity. However, its practical application is severely limited by over 300% volume expansion during cycling. Developing advanced functional binders is therefore crucial to overcoming this bottleneck, where nearly all strategies rely on constructing continuous internal bonding networks via polymers or in‐situ crosslinked/polymerized binders. Herein, a novel bonding paradigm, discrete microdomain bonding (DMB), was proposed to tackle the huge volume expansion of µSi anodes. In this system, discretely distributed short‐chain binder molecules enable precise anchoring of µSi particles at the microdomain level through interfacial hydrogen bonds. By exploiting microdomain‐mediated dynamic adaptation mechanisms to accommodate substantial volume changes, µSi particles maintain excellent electrical contact throughout cycling, ensuring robust mechanical tolerance and extended lifespan. Consequently, µSi anodes integrated with the DMB binder exhibit a strikingly high initial coulombic efficiency (ICE) of 92.5% and a remarkable capacity of 2517.4 mAh g
                    −1
                    with 98.2% retention after 100 cycles at 0.5 A g
                    −1
                    . This work establishes the DMB paradigm as an effective strategy for stabilizing high‐capacity µSi anodes, providing a pathway for the development of durable and high‐performance LIB technologies.
title_zh: 离散微区键合粘合剂可在锂离子电池中实现机械坚固的微米硅阳极
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    微米硅（μSi）由于其生产成本低、振实密度高和出色的理论比容量而成为一种有前途的锂离子电池（LIB）负极材料。然而，其实际应用受到循环过程中超过300%的体积膨胀的严重限制。因此，开发先进的功能粘合剂对于克服这一瓶颈至关重要，几乎所有策略都依赖于通过聚合物或原位交联/聚合粘合剂构建连续的内部键合网络。在此，提出了一种新颖的键合范例，即离散微域键合（DMB），以解决μSi阳极的巨大体积膨胀问题。在该系统中，离散分布的短链粘合剂分子能够通过界面氢键在微域水平上精确锚定μSi颗粒。通过利用微域介导的动态适应机制来适应巨大的体积变化，μSi 颗粒在整个循环过程中保持良好的电接触，确保强大的机械耐受性和延长的使用寿命。因此，与 DMB 粘合剂集成的 µSi 负极表现出高达 92.5% 的初始库仑效率 (ICE) 和 2517.4 mAh g 的非凡容量
                    −1
                    0.5 A g 下 100 次循环后保留率为 98.2%
                    −1
                    。这项工作将DMB范式确立为稳定高容量μSi阳极的有效策略，为开发耐用和高性能LIB技术提供了途径

title: Indolicidin‐Decorated Photosensitizer for Enhanced Antibacterials and Accelerated Diabetic Wound Healing
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Diabetic wounds are difficult to heal due to infections caused by multidrug‐resistant bacteria. Although photodynamic therapy (PDT) and antimicrobial peptides (AMPs) have emerged as promising alternatives, each faces inherent limitations: PDT‐generated reactive oxygen species (ROS) have an extremely short lifespan (10–320 ns) and limited diffusion (10–55 nm), while AMPs are structurally unstable, potentially cytotoxic at high doses, and even induce bacterial resistance. To overcome these drawbacks, we developed a synergistic nanoplatform by integrating the AMP Indolicidin with the photosensitizer PTBT, further encapsulated within a thermosensitive F127 hydrogel (PTBT/I@F127). The system formed uniform, highly photosensitive nanoparticles in which Indolicidin, located on the outer surface, first disrupted bacterial membranes, facilitating the contact of PTBT with bacteria. Subsequently, abundant ROS were generated for rapidly killing bacteria under an 808‐nm laser irradiation, which effectively compensated for the limited diffusion of ROS and reinforced the antibacterial effect of Indolicidin before its degradation. In vitro, PTBT/I@F127 effectively killed methicillin‐resistant
                    Staphylococcus aureus
                    (MRSA) and
                    E. coli
                    with a remarkable synergy. In diabetic mice and pig models, wound healing rates reached 98% and 83%, respectively, with remarkable angiogenesis and collagen deposition, after receiving PTBT/I@F127. Transcriptomic analysis revealed that Wnt/β‐catenin signaling pathways were involved in promoting tissue regeneration, while inflammation‐associated signaling pathways, such as NF‐κB and IL‐17, were concurrently regulated, thereby alleviating inflammation and reshaping the immune microenvironment in infected wounds. Collectively, this PTBT/Indolicidin‐based thermosensitive hydrogel effectively eliminated resistant bacteria, mitigated inflammation, stimulated angiogenesis, and accelerated healing of infected diabetic wounds, offering a safe, controllable, and translationally promising therapeutic strategy.
title_zh: Indolicidin修饰的光敏剂可增强抗菌作用并加速糖尿病伤口愈合
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    由于多重耐药细菌引起的感染，糖尿病伤口难以愈合。尽管光动力疗法 (PDT) 和抗菌肽 (AMP) 已成为有前景的替代方案，但它们都面临着固有的局限性：PDT 产生的活性氧 (ROS) 寿命极短 (10-320 ns) 且扩散有限 (10-55 nm)，而 AMP 结构不稳定，高剂量时可能具有细胞毒性，甚至会诱发细菌耐药性。为了克服这些缺点，我们通过将 AMP Indolicidin 与光敏剂 PTBT 集成，开发了一种协同纳米平台，并进一步封装在热敏 F127 水凝胶 (PTBT/I@F127) 中。该系统形成均匀、高度光敏的纳米颗粒，其中位于外表面的 Indolicidin 首先破坏细菌膜，促进 PTBT 与细菌的接触。随后，在808 nm激光照射下产生丰富的ROS，快速杀死细菌，有效补偿了ROS有限的扩散，增强了Indolicidin降解前的抗菌效果。在体外，PTBT/I@F127 有效杀灭甲氧西林耐药菌
                    金黄色葡萄球菌
                    （耐甲氧西林金黄色葡萄球菌）和
                    大肠杆菌
                    具有显着的协同作用。在糖尿病小鼠和猪模型中，接受PTBT/I@F127后，伤口愈合率分别达到98%和83%，并有显着的血管生成和胶原沉积。转录组分析表明

title: Multispectral Synergistic Electrochromic Regulator With Triple Atmospheric Windows Selectivity for Global Building Energy Saving
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    As a growing contributor to global energy demand, building energy consumption is strongly constrained by the passive nature of conventional opaque building envelopes. Here, we design a tunable multispectral regulator based on an ITO/WO
                    3
                    /LiNbO
                    3
                    /NiO/ITO electrochromic all‐thin‐film stack. Through the ingenious device architecture of an asymmetric Fabry–Pérot cavity (F–P cavity), the regulator achieves multispectral positive synergistic modulation: in the cooling mode, it simultaneously reflects sunlight and exhibits selective high emissivity within the atmospheric windows; in the heating mode, it absorbs sunlight while maintaining low infrared emissivity. This design also extends effective modulation to the third atmospheric window (16–25 µm). Consequently, the device delivers synergistic and wide modulation with values of 0.52 and 0.64 in the solar (0.3–2.5 µm) and mid‑far infrared (2.5–25 µm) bands, respectively, enabling both summer cooling and winter heating. Outdoor testing in an arid desert climate validates effective thermal regulation, achieving a diurnal temperature difference of ∼5.5°C. With its adaptive regulation capability, the device is well‐suited for year‑round building energy saving. EnergyPlus simulations further reveal substantial annual energy savings, particularly for heating in cold regions (22.2 MJ/m
                    2
                    ). This work provides a monolithic tunable platform for synchronized multispectra regulation, paving the way for next‑generation intelligent thermal management systems.
title_zh: 具有三重大气窗口选择性的多光谱协同电致变色调节器，促进全球建筑节能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    作为全球能源需求的一个日益增长的贡献者，建筑能源消耗受到传统不透明建筑围护结构被动性质的强烈限制。在这里，我们设计了一种基于 ITO/WO 的可调谐多光谱调节器
                    3
                    /铌酸锂
                    3
                    /NiO/ITO电致变色全薄膜叠层。通过非对称法布里-珀罗腔（F-P腔）的巧妙器件架构，调节器实现了多光谱正协同调制：在冷却模式下，它同时反射阳光并在大气窗口内表现出选择性高发射率；在加热模式下，它吸收阳光，同时保持较低的红外发射率。该设计还将有效调制扩展到第三个大气窗口（16–25 µm）。因此，该设备可在太阳光 (0.3–2.5 µm) 和中远红外 (2.5–25 µm) 波段提供协同和宽调制，调制值分别为 0.52 和 0.64，从而实现夏季制冷和冬季供暖。在干旱沙漠气候下的户外测试验证了有效的热调节，实现了约 5.5°C 的昼夜温差。该装置具有自适应调节能力，非常适合全年建筑节能。 EnergyPlus 模拟进一步揭示了每年可节省的能源，特别是寒冷地区的供暖（22.2 MJ/m
                    2
                    ）。这项工作为同步多光谱提供了一个整体可调平台

title: Photoreforming and Photoelectroreforming of Waste‐Derived Feedstocks for Solar‐Driven Production of Fuels and Chemicals
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Photoreforming and photoelectroreforming have emerged as promising strategies for the solar‐driven valorization of waste‐derived feedstocks, offering a sustainable route to fuels and commodity chemicals. Unlike conventional thermochemical and biological processes, these photocatalytic and photoelectrocatalytic approaches operate under mild conditions, leveraging solar energy to activate complex organic substrates. Recent advances in artificial photosynthesis, including catalyst design, reaction engineering, and interfacial charge dynamics, have shown promise in improving selectivity and efficiency, yet fundamental challenges remain. Precise control over reaction pathways and suppression of undesirable side reactions remain difficult due to complex charge transfer kinetics, competing surface reactions, and limited stability under operational conditions. Addressing these challenges requires rational catalyst design to optimize charge transport, modulation of redox environments to enhance selectivity, and development of reactor architectures that maximize photon utilization and mass transfer efficiency. This review critically examines the mechanistic principles governing photocatalytic and photoelectrocatalytic waste valorization and discusses the central catalytic challenges. Finally, key challenges in process integration and scale‐up are assessed, and future directions are outlined for practical implementation of photoreforming in circular carbon and hydrogen systems.
title_zh: 用于太阳能驱动的燃料和化学品生产的废物原料的光重整和光电重整
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  光重整和光电重整已成为太阳能驱动的废物原料增值的有前途的策略，为燃料和商品化学品提供了可持续的途径。与传统的热化学和生物过程不同，这些光催化和光电催化方法在温和的条件下运行，利用太阳能来激活复杂的有机底物。人工光合作用的最新进展，包括催化剂设计、反应工程和界面电荷动力学，在提高选择性和效率方面显示出了希望，但基本挑战仍然存在。由于复杂的电荷转移动力学、竞争性表面反应以及操作条件下有限的稳定性，精确控制反应路径和抑制不良副反应仍然很困难。应对这些挑战需要合理的催化剂设计以优化电荷传输，调节氧化还原环境以提高选择性，以及开发最大化光子利用率和传质效率的反应器架构。这篇综述批判性地研究了光催化和光电催化废物增值的机械原理，并讨论了主要的催化挑战。最后，评估了工艺集成和放大过程中的关键挑战，并概述了循环碳和氢系统中光重整实际实施的未来方向。

title: π‐Conjugated Aligned Polar [CO3] Triangulars Synergizing Hydroxylation Enables Stress‐Enhanced Geometric–Electronic Asymmetries for Hydrogen Piezoevolution
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Piezocatalytic water splitting offers a sustainable route for hydrogen evolution, yet is challenged by weak polarity and slow charge separation kinetics under stress. Herein, we report strong polar hydroxylated Bi
                    2
                    O
                    2
                    CO
                    3
                    (BOC) synthesized scalably, characterized by noncentrosymmetric (NCS) planar triangular [CO
                    3
                    ] groups and surface hydroxyls, which applies as a robust piezocatalyst for hydrogen evolution. The aligned NCS planar [CO
                    3
                    ] triangulars in BOC enable oriented accumulation of dipole moments to produce strong spontaneous polarization, and the intrinsic delocalized
                    π
                    ‐electrons within these structural units construct a conjugation freeway that minimizes charge migration resistance. Further external mechanical stress triggers a highly anisotropic lattice response; specifically, compression along the
                    b
                    ‐axis induces extreme geometric and electronic asymmetries that amplify the interlayer internal electric field (IEF) for charge separation. When synergistically coupled with surface hydroxylation, this stress‐induced structural distortion significantly lowers the work function and interfacial kinetic barrier for electron escape. Consequently, the hydroxylated BOC catalyst achieves an ultrahigh piezocatalytic H
                    2
                    evolution rate of 3055 µmol·g
                    −1
                    ·h
                    −1
                    and a record mechanical‐to‐hydrogen (MTH) energy conversion efficiency of 0.31% in pure water. It also maintains robust H
                    2
                    evolution from real‐world aquatic matrices, including rainwater, seawater, and antibiotic wastewater. This work establishes a polar group design‐oriented paradigm for exploiting advanced piezocatalysts.
title_zh: π共轭对齐极性[CO3]三角形协同羟基化使氢压电演化的应力增强几何电子不对称性成为可能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    压电催化水分解为析氢提供了可持续的途径，但受到弱极性和压力下缓慢的电荷分离动力学的挑战。在此，我们报道了强极性羟基化Bi
                    2
                    氧
                    2
                    一氧化碳
                    3
                    （BOC）可扩展合成，其特征为非中心对称（NCS）平面三角形[CO
                    3
                    ]基团和表面羟基，可用作析氢的强大压电催化剂。对齐的 NCS 平面 [CO
                    3
                    ] BOC中的三角形能够定向积累偶极矩以产生强烈的自发极化，并且固有的离域
                    π
                    ‐这些结构单元内的电子构建了一条共轭高速公路，最大限度地减少了电荷迁移阻力。进一步的外部机械应力会引发高度各向异性的晶格响应；具体来说，沿着
                    乙

                    2

title: Overview of the KSTAR experiments and future plan
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The Korea Superconducting Tokamak Advanced Research (KSTAR) device has recently entered a new phase of operation following the installation of a tungsten mono-block divertor, providing a unique platform to investigate high-performance, long-pulse plasma scenarios for future reactors. The 2023–2024 experimental campaigns demonstrated significant progress in commissioning the tungsten divertor, developing plasma operation scenarios, and achieving real-time control. Comparative studies revealed increased core radiation losses and associated performance degradation relative to the carbon divertor environment. Alleviation strategies, such as optimized neutral beam injection timing, boron powder seeding, and impurity control through gas puffing, were shown to reduce tungsten accumulation and extend high-performance phases, including record H-mode operation exceeding 100 s. International collaboration enabled the first demonstration of high poloidal beta scenarios with an internal transport barrier on KSTAR. Advances in control included upgraded real-time resonant magnetic perturbation schemes and disruption forecasting. Furthermore, divertor detachment control using a new surrogate-model-based approach with real-time radiation imaging demonstrated active impurity and heat flux management. Supported by enhanced heating, current drive, and diagnostic systems, these achievements offer valuable insights into tungsten impurity behavior, transport physics, and control strategies for future reactors including ITER. Planned upgrades toward a full-tungsten wall and ITER-aligned real-time plasma control will further establish KSTAR as a leading experimental platform for developing operational scenarios required to achieve steady-state, burning plasma conditions.
title_zh: KSTAR实验概述和未来计划
abstract_zh: 韩国超导托卡马克先进研究（KSTAR）装置在安装钨整体偏滤器后最近进入了一个新的运行阶段，为研究未来反应堆的高性能、长脉冲等离子体场景提供了一个独特的平台。 2023-2024 年的实验活动证明了在调试钨偏滤器、开发等离子体操作场景和实现实时控制方面取得了重大进展。比较研究表明，相对于碳滤除器环境，核心辐射损失增加，相关性能下降。优化的中性束注入时间、硼粉晶种和通过充气控制杂质等缓解策略已被证明可以减少钨的积累并延长高性能阶段，包括创纪录的超过 100 秒的 H 模式运行。国际合作首次在 KSTAR 上演示了具有内部传输障碍的高极向β场景。控制方面的进步包括升级的实时谐振磁扰方案和干扰预测。此外，使用基于替代模型的新方法和实时辐射成像的偏滤器脱离控制证明了主动杂质和热通量管理。在增强的加热、电流驱动和诊断系统的支持下，这些成就为包括 ITER 在内的未来反应堆的钨杂质行为、输运物理和控制策略提供了宝贵的见解。计划升级为全钨墙和符合 ITER 的实时标准

title: Particle tracing simulation of W transport under electromagnetic perturbation of Li pellet-induced ELMs in EAST
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: A particle-tracing approach is employed to investigate the transport dynamics of W ions affected by electromagnetic perturbation produced by a Li pellet induced ELM in EAST. The electromagnetic perturbations from ELMs obtained from BOUT++ three-field simulations, are interpolated onto the grid using by particle tracing code as input for full-orbit simulation of W ions. It is found that a distribution of ions can be a good representative for the distribution of W ions with multiple but close charge states. The results reveal that the drift is the primary driving force for W ions transport during the ELM and that the perturbed electric field is a dominant determining factor. Further study on the effects of pellet deposition location indicates that pellets deposited on the pedestal top are more effective in expelling W ions from the core plasma region and screening W ions from influx. Radial velocity analysis indicates that ELM perturbations tend to increase the average velocity magnitude and diffusion coefficients of W ions. It is also observed that W ions have higher radial velocity magnitude as they approach the separatrix, which facilitates their expulsion from the boundary region. Simulations of discharge scenarios with W ions distributing at different initial poloidal locations reveal that those initially deposited on the low-field side are the most prone to the loss of W ions.
title_zh: EAST 中锂颗粒诱导 ELM 电磁扰动下 W 输运的粒子追踪模拟
abstract_zh: 采用粒子追踪方法来研究受 EAST 中锂颗粒诱导 ELM 产生的电磁扰动影响的 W 离子的输运动力学。从 BOUT++ 三场模拟中获得的 ELM 的电磁扰动，通过粒子追踪代码插值到网格上，作为 W 离子全轨道模拟的输入。研究发现，离子的分布可以很好地代表具有多个但接近的电荷态的W离子的分布。结果表明，漂移是 ELM 期间 W 离子输运的主要驱动力，而扰动电场是主要决定因素。对颗粒沉积位置影响的进一步研究表明，沉积在基座顶部的颗粒在从核心等离子体区域驱逐 W 离子和筛选 W 离子流入方面更有效。径向速度分析表明，ELM 扰动往往会增加 W 离子的平均速度幅度和扩散系数。还观察到，当 W 离子接近分界线时，它们具有更高的径向速度大小，这有利于它们从边界区域排出。对 W 离子分布在不同初始极向位置的放电情况的模拟表明，最初沉积在低场侧的那些最容易损失 W 离子。

title: Cryopump and fuelling location impacts on upstream density and detachment on MAST-Upgrade
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: A cryopump was installed in the MAST Upgrade (MAST-U) lower divertor at the start of its fourth scientific campaign (MU04) to enhance density control, detachment front management, and impurity removal, while expanding the operational space to lower-density regimes. The tightly baffled divertor chamber quasi-isolates the divertor neutral environment from the main chamber, enabling localised neutral pressure ( ) tuning via divertor fuelling and cryopump operation, with minimal impact on upstream plasma density. MU04 experiments and SOLPS-ITER simulations both confirm that activating the cryopump reduces the outer lower divertor by , while maintaining line-averaged density ( ) and midplane . The cryopump facilitates lower divertor , aiding plasma attachment and drawing the detachment front closer to the target. Modelling indicates a increase in upstream density required for rollover onset in both conventional divertor (CD) and super-X divertor (SXD) configurations, enabling a broader operational scan from attached conditions through detached to radiative collapse. Divertor fuelling exhibits a low fuelling efficiency ( of injected neutrals reach the separatrix), resulting in a weak scaling between upstream separatrix density and divertor neutral pressure ( ), consistent with observations on other devices. In contrast, main-chamber fuelling achieves substantially higher efficiency ( for LFS and up to for high-field side (HFS) fuelling) and yields a stronger density scaling (exponent ), reflecting the different plasma–neutral coupling pathways associated with the fuelling location. These findings demonstrate that the combined use of different fuelling locations and cryopumping provides complementary control of upstream density and divertor detachment, with direct relevance for exhaust optimisation in future fusion devices.
title_zh: 低温泵和加氢位置对 MAST-Upgrade 上游密度和脱离的影响
abstract_zh: 在第四次科学活动 (MU04) 开始时，在 MAST 升级 (MAST-U) 下部偏滤器中安装了低温泵，以增强密度控制、分离前管理和杂质去除，同时将操作空间扩展到较低密度区域。紧密挡板的偏滤器室将偏滤器中性环境与主室准隔离，通过偏滤器燃料和低温泵操作实现局部中性压力 ( ) 调节，对上游等离子体密度的影响最小。 MU04 实验和 SOLPS-ITER 模拟均证实，激活低温泵可减少外部下部偏滤器 ，同时保持线平均密度 ( ) 和中平面 。低温泵有助于降低偏滤器，帮助等离子体附着并将分离前沿拉近目标。建模表明，在传统偏滤器 (CD) 和超级 X 偏滤器 (SXD) 配置中，翻转开始所需的上游密度有所增加，从而能够实现从附着条件到分离到辐射塌陷的更广泛的操作扫描。偏滤器加料表现出较低的加料效率（注入的中性物质到达分界线），导致上游分界线密度和偏滤器中性压力之间的微弱缩放（ ），与其他设备上的观察结果一致。相比之下，主室燃料加注实现了显着更高的效率（对于 LFS 和高场侧 (HFS) 燃料加注），并产生更强的密度缩放（指数 ），反映了与燃料加注位置相关的不同等离子体-中性耦合路径。

title: The Divertor Tokamak Test facility research plan
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The Divertor Tokamak Test facility (DTT) is a device presently under construction at the ENEA site in Frascati (Italy) in the framework of a joint public/private partnership. It has been designed as a superconducting tokamak with breakeven class performance, with the main objective of developing credible solutions for heat and particle exhaust, a key challenge in view of future fusion reactors. This needs to be addressed in a core-edge integrated approach, to assess the compatibility of exhaust solutions with reactor relevant core performance. In this paper, an overview is provided of the DTT research plan, recently developed by an international team. It covers the DTT programmatic objectives, research strategy and expected scientific contributions connected with the device characteristics, not only in the key area of heat exhaust and edge plasma physics, but also on other subjects of high fusion relevance, such as MHD stability in high performance scenarios, transport and turbulence, energetic particle physics, validation of advanced theoretical developments, as well as tests of technological solutions for reactor relevant components.
title_zh: 偏滤器托卡马克测试设施研究计划
abstract_zh: 偏滤器托卡马克测试设施 (DTT) 是目前在意大利弗拉斯卡蒂 ENEA 基地在公私联合合作框架下建设的设备。它被设计为具有盈亏平衡级性能的超导托卡马克，其主要目标是开发可靠的热量和粒子排放解决方案，这是未来聚变反应堆面临的关键挑战。这需要通过堆芯边缘集成方法来解决，以评估排气解决方案与反应堆相关堆芯性能的兼容性。本文概述了国际团队最近制定的 DTT 研究计划。它涵盖了与器件特性相关的DTT计划目标、研究策略和预期科学贡献，不仅涉及排热和边缘等离子体物理的关键领域，还涉及其他与聚变高度相关的主题，例如高性能场景中的MHD稳定性、输运和湍流、高能粒子物理、先进理论发展的验证以及反应堆相关组件的技术解决方案的测试。

title: Exhaust operational space assessment for the European Volumetric Neutron Source (EU-VNS)
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The SOLPS-ITER edge plasma numerical model is employed to predict the exhaust operational space in a small-scale tokamak device currently being investigated as the proposed European Volumetric Neutron Source (EU-VNS) with large power-to-size ratio of . Previous work is extended by allowing krypton seeding to dissipate and redistribute heat instead of argon. The found finite operational space is limited by both, engineering limits for the peak heat-flux expected at the divertor plasma facing components , and at the same time requiring a low enough effective charge and high electron temperature in the core region to keep up the neutron wall load from beam-target fusion. With krypton seeding the operational space seems to be larger than with argon and at the same time the amount of tritium throughput can be halved compared to the previous study. The required total T-throughput rate is of the order and it is observed that pellet fuelling (neglecting any dynamics involved during the ablation phases) is deemed to be as efficient and required to fuel both the core density and the separatrix density at the same time. A positive correlation is found between the krypton enrichment in the divertor and the increase of upstream density effectively fuelled by pellets. A low level of , and the observation of the required Greenwald fraction of 50% to achieve this, is compatible with the predictions of the core plasma conditions for the current EU-VNS design point from ASTRA/METIS. Within the model assumptions made in SOLPS-ITER, the observation of a depression of the core electron temperature below 1 keV is critical to maintain the NWL as anticipated from the ASTRA/METIS simulations and thus potentially requires more ECRH power in EU-VNS driving the overall operating costs.
title_zh: 欧洲体积中子源 (EU-VNS) 的排气操作空间评估
abstract_zh: SOLPS-ITER 边缘等离子体数值模型用于预测目前正在研究的小型托卡马克装置的排气操作空间，该装置是拟议的欧洲体积中子源（EU-VNS），其功率尺寸比为 。之前的工作通过允许氪晶种代替氩气来消散和重新分配热量而得以扩展。所发现的有限操作空间受到以下两个方面的限制：偏滤器等离子体面对组件处预期的峰值热通量的工程限制，同时需要核心区域中足够低的有效电荷和高电子温度以保持束靶聚变的中子壁负载。使用氪晶种的操作空间似乎比使用氩气的要大，同时与之前的研究相比，氚的吞吐量可以减少一半。所需的总 T 吞吐量是一个数量级，并且观察到，颗粒燃料供给（忽略烧蚀阶段涉及的任何动态）被认为是有效的，并且需要同时为核心密度和分界线密度提供燃料。我们发现偏滤器中的氪富集度与由颗粒有效推动的上游密度的增加之间存在正相关关系。的低水平以及实现这一目标所需格林沃尔德分数为 50% 的观察结果与 ASTRA/METIS 对当前 EU-VNS 设计点的核心等离子体条件的预测一致。在 SOLPS-ITER 中所做的模型假设内，观察到核心电子温度下降

title: Recent advances in physics and applications of 3D magnetic fields on the J-TEXT tokamak
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: This paper summarizes recent experimental and theoretical progress achieved on the J-TEXT tokamak during the past two years, with an emphasis on the physics and applications of three-dimensional (3D) magnetic fields. Key hardware upgrades include a new ICRF system and the advanced 3D magnetic coil systems, consisting of the resonant magnetic perturbation (RMP) coils, the island divertor (ID) coils and the external rotational transform (ERT) coils. And these upgrades enable novel investigations into MHD instabilities, disruptions, transport, and divertor solutions. A major finding is the neoclassical tearing mode (NTM) triggered formation of electron internal transport barrier, where magnetic island nonlinearly interacts with turbulence to suppress transport and steepen core temperature gradients, and reveals a new mechanism for confinement improvement. Furthermore, internal kink mode driven neoclassical toroidal viscosity torque is identified as a key mechanism governing intrinsic rotation. The application of ERT coils successfully creates a Tokamak-Stellarator hybrid configuration, demonstrating complete suppression of NTMs and a 20% increase in stable plasma current. For boundary control, an ID configuration is established, reducing peak heat loads by ∼50% and enabling detachment via supersonic molecular beam injection fuelling. In disruption physics, synergetic control using RMP and O-point aligned electron cyclotron resonance heating efficiently suppresses locked modes and disruption, while low-n magnetic perturbations are capable of runaway electron suppression. Thermal quench timescale, estimated by a unified model with stochastic magnetic field and turbulence, matches experimental observations. Additionally, AI-driven disruption prediction frameworks, incorporating adaptive anomaly detection and cross-machine domain adaptation, are developed, with interpretability analyses linking predictions to physical mechanisms. Studies on turbulence and transport elucidate the role of electrode biasing, turbulence spreading on the edge cooling, density limit, while helium ash removal dynamics are also investigated. The unique up-down symmetric poloidal divertor configuration is measured and modelling to identify the electric field induced drift effect as a key driver for asymmetry, and hence target biasing is designed and experimentally studied for control these asymmetries. These collective advances in heating, 3D field control, stability, and AI forecasting provide critical solutions for managing plasma confinement and mitigating risks in future MCF devices.
title_zh: J-TEXT 托卡马克上 3D 磁场的物理学和应用的最新进展
abstract_zh: 本文总结了过去两年 J-TEXT 托卡马克装置取得的最新实验和理论进展，重点是三维（3D）磁场的物理和应用。关键硬件升级包括新的 ICRF 系统和先进的 3D 磁线圈系统，由谐振磁扰 (RMP) 线圈、岛偏滤器 (ID) 线圈和外部旋转变换 (ERT) 线圈组成。这些升级可以对 MHD 不稳定性、中断、传输和偏滤器解决方案进行新颖的研究。一项重大发现是新古典撕裂模式（NTM）触发了电子内部传输势垒的形成，其中磁岛与湍流非线性相互作用以抑制传输并使核心温度梯度变陡，并揭示了一种改善限制的新机制。此外，内部扭结模式驱动的新古典环形粘度扭矩被认为是控制固有旋转的关键机制。 ERT线圈的应用成功地创建了托卡马克-仿星器混合配置，证明了NTM的完全抑制以及稳定等离子体电流增加了20%。为了进行边界控制，建立了 ID 配置，将峰值热负荷减少约 50%，并通过超音速分子束注入燃料实现分离。在破坏物理学中，使用 RMP 和 O 点对齐电子回旋加速器共振加热的协同控制可有效抑制锁定模式和破坏，而低 n 磁扰动能够抑制失控电子。瑟玛

title: Experimental observation and integrated modelling of proton-beryllium fusion in He and D plasmas at JET
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: Validated integrated modelling of JET ITER-like wall experiments in which fusion performance is driven by reactions between fast ions and intrinsically present metal wall impurities is presented. A steady-state L-mode plasma with dominant proton-beryllium fusion and neutron yields of up to 6 10 is developed in He and D, via radiofrequency heating of a H minority. The fusion drive is unambiguously confirmed by the neutral particle analyser, fast ion loss detector, and -ray diagnostics. Experiments are analysed via an integrated modelling framework, developed to model the two-stage proton beryllium-fusion chain and produce high-fidelity fusion product source terms. The modelling chain comprises TRANSP and JETTO for plasma core modelling, LOCUST for full orbit product tracking and collisional slowing-down, DRESS to resolve two- and three-body fusion kinematics, and MCNP for neutron transport calculations. Modelling shows that the primary Be(p,n) B reaction is the dominant neutron emitter at naturally present concentrations of beryllium in these experiments. The yield contribution of secondary reactions between fusion products and beryllium, Be(d,n) B and Be( ,n) C, is found to be negligible. The proton-deuteron knock-on effect in D plasmas is modelled, which is calculated to contribute 25% to the total neutron yield. For both He and D discharges the total computed neutron rates match fission chamber (FC) measurements within the combined experimental and computational uncertainty, with an average discrepancy of 20%. Realistic proton-beryllium neutron sources are propagated through JET’s MCNP neutron transport model which shows that U FCs’ response is sensitive to p–Be source changes, with up to 10% variation compared to a D–D neutron source. We show that the high-energy tail of the fast proton minority can be studied with multi-foil neutron activation. The framework is also applied to the study of interactions between fast protons and boron impurities, of relevance to ITER. We calculate that in JET conditions a significant alpha source with DT-like energies could be generated through B(p, )2 fusion, and detected via -emission in secondary interactions between fast alphas and boron. The work represents an important step towards validating predictive integrated modelling capabilities for non-standard fusion reactions.
title_zh: JET He 和 D 等离子体中质子-铍聚变的实验观察和集成建模
abstract_zh: 提出了经过验证的类 JET ITER 壁实验的集成模型，其中聚变性能由快离子和固有存在的金属壁杂质之间的反应驱动。通过对 H 少数进行射频加热，在 He 和 D 中形成了一种稳态 L 模式等离子体，其主要是质子-铍聚变，中子产额高达 6·10。中性粒子分析仪、快速离子损失探测器和γ射线诊断明确地证实了聚变驱动。通过集成建模框架对实验进行分析，该框架旨在对两级质子铍聚变链进行建模并产生高保真聚变产物源项。建模链包括用于等离子体核心建模的 TRANSP 和 JETTO、用于全轨道产物跟踪和碰撞减速的 LOCUST、用于解析两体和三体聚变运动学的 DRESS 以及用于中子输运计算的 MCNP。建模表明，在这些实验中，在自然存在的铍浓度下，主要的 Be(p,n) B 反应是主要的中子发射体。聚变产物和铍、Be(d,n) B 和 Be( ,n) C 之间的二次反应对产率的贡献可以忽略不计。对 D 等离子体中的质子-氘核碰撞效应进行了建模，计算出其对总中子产额的贡献为 25%。对于 He 和 D 放电，计算出的总中子速率与实验和计算不确定性相结合的裂变室 (FC) 测量值相匹配，平均差异为 20%。现实的质子铍中子源通过

title: Spatiotemporal structure of edge harmonic oscillation and its role in ELM-free QH-mode at KSTAR
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: In Quiescent H-mode (QH-mode), edge-localized modes (ELMs) are naturally replaced by a low- edge harmonic oscillation (EHO), yet the self-regulating transport mechanism driven by the EHO remains insufficiently understood. Using high-spatiotemporal-resolution imaging diagnostics on KSTAR—electron cyclotron emission imaging and broadband electron cyclotron emission—we resolve the eigenmode structure of the EHO and elucidate its regulatory role in edge transport. The EHO is localized within the pedestal near the maximum pressure gradient, propagates in the ion-diamagnetic direction, and its radial envelope expands with increasing shear, suggesting that rotational shear is closely associated with the structural evolution of the EHO. Information-theoretic Transfer Entropy analysis identifies a distinct ‘dual-stabilization’ regulatory interaction pattern: the EHO is associated with enhanced outward energy transport to limit the pressure gradient, while the background shear flow is associated with preferential regulatory influence on the EHO saturation amplitude and energy flux. These results demonstrate that the QH-mode pedestal is sustained by a shear-associated regulation mechanism, where the coupling between rotational shear and mode structure appears closely linked to the sustained ELM-free state.
title_zh: KSTAR 边缘谐振的时空结构及其在无 ELM QH 模式中的作用
abstract_zh: 在静态 H 模式（QH 模式）中，边缘局域模式 (ELM) 自然地被低边缘谐波振荡 (EHO) 取代，但 EHO 驱动的自调节传输机制仍然没有得到充分理解。利用 KSTAR 的高时空分辨率成像诊断（电子回旋发射成像和宽带电子回旋发射成像），我们解析了 EHO 的本征模式结构，并阐明了其在边缘传输中的调节作用。 EHO 位于最大压力梯度附近的基座内，沿离子抗磁方向传播，其径向包络随着剪切力的增加而膨胀，表明旋转剪切与 EHO 的结构演化密切相关。信息论传递熵分析确定了一种独特的“双稳定”调节相互作用模式：EHO 与增强的向外能量传输以限制压力梯度相关，而背景剪切流与对 EHO 饱和幅度和能量通量的优先调节影响相关。这些结果表明，QH 模式基座由剪切相关调节机制维持，其中旋转剪切和模式结构之间的耦合似乎与持续的 ELM 无状态密切相关。

title: Space charge compensation and residual-field effects in negative-ion NBI beam transport through the drift section
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The beam transport process plays a crucial role in the design and realization of negative-ion-based neutral beam injection (N-NBI) systems for thermonuclear fusion. In particular, space charge compensation (SCC), where positive ions generated by collisions between negative ions and background gas mitigate space charge effects, serves as a critical mechanism influencing beam divergence and envelope evolution. In this work, the SCC process in N-NBI systems and its impact on beam transport are investigated using a 3D simulation model based on a Vlasov beam-tracing algorithm. Systematic simulations show that SCC evolution and downstream beam optics are jointly controlled by background gas pressure and beam energy, with higher pressure and higher energy strengthening SCC and mitigating divergence and envelope growth downstream of the extraction system. A key physical observation is that collisionless phase mixing drives the transverse velocity distribution of secondary ions toward a Maxwellian distribution, enabling an effective transverse ion temperature that quantitatively correlates with SCC degree. The residual electric field leaking downstream of the extraction system locally weakens SCC over a finite extent, producing negligible beam optics impact for the ITER-relevant case at pressures of and , but non-negligible transport sensitivity at under the same pressure range. These results provide new insight into the interplay between SCC, secondary-ion dynamics, and beam transport, with direct relevance to the modeling and optimization of high-energy NBI beamlines.
title_zh: 负离子 NBI 光束通过漂移部分传输时的空间电荷补偿和残余场效应
abstract_zh: 束流传输过程在用于热核聚变的负离子中性束注入（N-NBI）系统的设计和实现中起着至关重要的作用。特别是，空间电荷补偿（SCC），即负离子与背景气体碰撞产生的正离子减轻空间电荷效应，是影响光束发散和包络演变的关键机制。在这项工作中，使用基于 Vlasov 光束追踪算法的 3D 仿真模型研究了 N-NBI 系统中的 SCC 过程及其对光束传输的影响。系统模拟表明，SCC 演化和下游光束光学器件由背景气压和光束能量共同控制，较高的压力和较高的能量会增强 SCC，并减轻提取系统下游的发散和包络增长。一个关键的物理观察结果是，无碰撞相混合将二次离子的横向速度分布推向麦克斯韦分布，从而实现与 SCC 程度定量相关的有效横向离子温度。提取系统下游泄漏的残余电场在有限范围内局部削弱 SCC，在 和 压力下对 ITER 相关情况产生可忽略不计的光束光学影响，但在相同压力范围下产生不可忽略的输运灵敏度。这些结果为 SCC、二次离子动力学和束流传输之间的相互作用提供了新的见解，与高能 NBI 束线的建模和优化直接相关。

title: A gold nitrene for nitrogen-atom transfer chemistry
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: An elusive aura-nitrene has been captured in crystallo by the photochemical extrusion of N2 from a gold(III) azide complex. Computational investigations confirm a triplet ground state and its reactivity with O2, CO, aldehydes and alkynes establish gold as a viable platform for nitrene atom-transfer chemistry.
title_zh: 用于氮原子转移化学的金氮宾
abstract_zh: 通过光化学从叠氮化金络合物中挤出 N2，在晶体中捕获了难以捉摸的光环氮烯。计算研究证实了三线态基态及其与 O2、CO、醛和炔的反应性，使金成为氮烯原子转移化学的可行平台。

title: Non-Abelian statistics for bosonic symmetry-protected topological phases
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Symmetry-protected non-Abelian (SPNA) statistics opens new frontiers in quantum statistics and enriches the schemes for topological quantum computing. In this work, we propose a new paradigm of SPNA statistics in one-dimensional correlated bosonic symmetry-protected topological (SPT) phases and uncover exotic universal features from a systematic investigation. In particular, we show that for generic bosonic SPT phases described by real Hamiltonians, the SPNA statistics of topological zero modes fall into two distinct classes. The first class exhibits conventional braiding of hard-core bosonic zero modes. Furthermore, we discover a second class of unconventional braiding statistics characterized by a nonlinear transformation, featuring a fractionalization of the first class and reminiscent of the non-Abelian statistics of symmetry-protected Majorana pairs. The two distinct classes of statistics have topological origin in classifying non-Abelian Berry phases for braiding processes of real-Hamiltonian systems, distinguished by whether the holonomy involves a reflection operation. To illustrate, we focus on a specific bosonic SPT phase with particle-hole symmetry, and demonstrate that both classes of braiding statistics can be feasibly realized in tri-junctions with and without the aid of a controlled defect, respectively. Analytic and numerical results are given. We demonstrate how to encode logical qubits and implement both single- and two-qubit gates using the two classes of SPNA statistics. Finally, we propose feasible experimental schemes to observe these predictions and identify the parameter regimes for the high-fidelity braiding, paving the way for the experimental observation of our results in the near future.
title_zh: 玻色对称保护拓扑相的非阿贝尔统计
abstract_zh: 对称保护的非阿贝尔（SPNA）统计开辟了量子统计的新领域，并丰富了拓扑量子计算的方案。在这项工作中，我们在一维相关玻色对称保护拓扑（SPT）相中提出了 SPNA 统计的新范式，并通过系统研究揭示了奇异的普遍特征。特别是，我们表明，对于真实哈密顿量描述的通用玻色子 SPT 相，拓扑零模态的 SPNA 统计分为两个不同的类别。第一类展示了硬核玻色子零模式的传统编织。此外，我们发现了第二类非常规编织统计，其特征是非线性变换，其特征是第一类的分数化，让人想起对称保护马约拉纳对的非阿贝尔统计。这两类不同的统计数据在对实哈密尔顿系统的编织过程的非阿贝尔贝里相进行分类方面具有拓扑起源，通过完整学是否涉及反射运算来区分。为了说明这一点，我们重点关注具有粒子孔对称性的特定玻色子 SPT 相，并证明两类编织统计数据都可以分别在有或没有受控缺陷的帮助下在三结中实现。给出了分析和数值结果。我们演示了如何使用两类 SPNA 统计数据对逻辑量子位进行编码并实现单量子位门和双量子位门。最后，我们提出了可行的实验方案来观察这些预测，并且我

title: Posterior parietal cortex mediates rarity-induced decision bias
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Optimal decision-making under uncertainty is critical for survival, yet real-world decisions often deviate from optimality. Here, we report a rarity-induced bias in humans and mice, where rare events exert a stronger and more persistent impact on subsequent decisions than common events. Optogenetic manipulations reveal distinct, learning stage-specific roles of the posterior parietal cortex (PPC): in the naïve stage, PPC drives the rarity-induced bias and interferes with optimal decisions; in the expert stage, PPC becomes essential for stimulus-based decisions. In vivo recordings support these dynamic roles, showing that rare reward history bidirectionally modulates choice-selective PPC neurons to induce bias, while learning enhances stimulus-encoding of PPC neurons to promote optimal decisions. A data-inspired dual-agent model recapitulated the bias and learning process, and predicted PPC’s contribution to learning as confirmed by optogenetics. Our study uncovers a rarity-induced bias, and reveals PPC’s essential roles in mediating this bias and stimulus-based learning under uncertainty.
title_zh: 后顶叶皮层介导稀有性引起的决策偏差
abstract_zh: 不确定性下的最优决策对于生存至关重要，但现实世界的决策常常偏离最优性。在这里，我们报告了人类和小鼠中稀有性引起的偏差，其中稀有事件比常见事件对后续决策产生更强、更持久的影响。光遗传学操作揭示了后顶叶皮层 (PPC) 的独特的、学习阶段特定的作用：在幼稚阶段，PPC 会驱动稀有性引起的偏差并干扰最佳决策；在专家阶段，PPC 对于基于刺激的决策至关重要。体内记录支持这些动态作用，表明罕见的奖励历史双向调节选择选择性 PPC 神经元以诱导偏差，而学习增强 PPC 神经元的刺激编码以促进最佳决策。受数据启发的双智能体模型概括了偏差和学习过程，并预测了 PPC 对学习的贡献，这一点已得到光遗传学的证实。我们的研究揭示了稀有性引起的偏差，并揭示了 PPC 在调节这种偏差和不确定性下基于刺激的学习中的重要作用。

title: Don’t let AI steal all the joy: what scientists won’t give up to chatbots

title: Catalytic profiling of extracellular vesicles maps altered cancer metabolism
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Current technologies for measuring cancer metabolism have limited clinical utility, as they require invasive tissue sampling and lack analytical versatility. Here, we report a programmable nanotechnology platform that directly profiles extracellular vesicles (EVs) in patient biofluids to comprehensively capture metabolic alterations within the tumour milieu. This technology, termed atomically configured catalytic hybrids for profiling extracellular vesicle metabolites (ACTIVE), employs dual-matched biotic–abiotic nanohybrids based on defect-engineered transition-metal dichalcogenide peroxidase to catalytically quantify EV-associated metabolites. Each hybrid comprises a biomimetic peroxidase grown in situ on a metabolite-responsive biological oxidase. By spatially and energetically aligning their redox centres to enable direct electron transfer, these hybrids establish efficient tandem catalytic cascades that detect low-abundance metabolites in complex samples, achieving >30-times-higher catalytic efficiency than wild-type catalysts. In EV profiling applications, ACTIVE enables measurements in native biofluids (>103-fold improvement), captures a broad spectrum of metabolites (including their conversion dynamics) across EV subpopulations from diverse cellular systems and reflects dynamic changes in metabolic pathways during cellular reprogramming. In clinical specimens, using only 5 µl of native ascites fluid, ACTIVE reveals distinct metabolic reprogramming signatures within the tumour milieu, enabling stratification of patient prognosis.
title_zh: 细胞外囊泡的催化谱图改变了癌症代谢
abstract_zh: 目前用于测量癌症代谢的技术的临床实用性有限，因为它们需要侵入性组织采样并且缺乏分析多功能性。在这里，我们报告了一个可编程纳米技术平台，该平台可以直接分析患者生物液中的细胞外囊泡（EV），以全面捕获肿瘤环境内的代谢变化。这项技术被称为用于分析细胞外囊泡代谢物的原子配置催化混合体（ACTIVE），采用基于缺陷工程过渡金属二硫化物过氧化物酶的双匹配生物-非生物纳米混合体来催化量化 EV 相关代谢物。每个杂交体都包含在代谢物响应性生物氧化酶上原位生长的仿生过氧化物酶。通过在空间和能量上对齐其氧化还原中心以实现直接电子转移，这些杂化物建立了有效的串联催化级联，可检测复杂样品中的低丰度代谢物，实现比野生型催化剂高30倍以上的催化效率。在 EV 分析应用中，ACTIVE 能够在天然生物流体中进行测量（改进超过 103 倍），捕获来自不同细胞系统的 EV 亚群的广泛代谢物（包括其转化动态），并反映细胞重编程过程中代谢途径的动态变化。在临床样本中，仅使用 5 µl 天然腹水，ACTIVE 即可揭示肿瘤环境中独特的代谢重编程特征，从而能够对患者预后进行分层。

title: Assessing the industrial impact of an alternative lactide production method for polylactic acid manufacturing
source: Nature Chemical Engineering
abstract: ʟ-Lactide, the key precursor for polylactic acid (PLA) production, is industrially produced through a complex oligomerization–depolymerization sequence. Here we present a process combining lactic acid esterification with subsequent cyclic dimerization in a fixed-bed reactor using a silica-supported titania catalyst to convert gaseous lactate esters into ʟ-lactide, an approach that yields fewer chiral impurities. Using industrial-scale simulations supported by a detailed kinetic model of the dimerization reaction, we performed techno-economic and lifecycle analyses. The results demonstrate that the esterification–dimerization route increases ʟ-lactide productivity by 16%, reduces production costs by at least 10% (with a mean of 19% across multiple scenarios) and lowers CO2e emissions by 15% compared with conventional methods. When integrated into the full production chain, this process decreases PLA minimum selling prices by 18%. Total emissions are further reduced using PLA waste-derived esters, positioning this approach as a promising route for a circular PLA economy.
title_zh: 评估聚乳酸制造的替代丙交酯生产方法的工业影响
abstract_zh: ʟ-丙交酯是聚乳酸 (PLA) 生产的关键前体，在工业上通过复杂的低聚-解聚序列进行生产。在这里，我们提出了一种在固定床反应器中将乳酸酯化与随后的循环二聚相结合的方法，使用二氧化硅负载的二氧化钛催化剂将气态乳酸酯转化为丙交酯，这种方法产生较少的手性杂质。利用由二聚反应的详细动力学模型支持的工业规模模拟，我们进行了技术经济和生命周期分析。结果表明，与传统方法相比，酯化-二聚路线将β-丙交酯生产率提高了16%，生产成本降低了至少10%（多种情况下平均降低19%），二氧化碳当量排放量降低了15%。当集成到整个生产链中时，该流程可将 PLA 最低销售价格降低 18%。使用 PLA 废物衍生酯进一步减少了总排放量，使这种方法成为循环 PLA 经济的一条有前途的途径。

title: Pinning ångström-size solid ionic channels for rare-earth element separation
source: Nature Chemical Engineering
abstract: High-purity rare-earth elements are essential for modern technologies, yet current solvent extraction processes are energy-intensive and environmentally harmful because of inadequate selectivity and ligand toxicity. Although combining size exclusion and binding affinity can improve lanthanide separation, the role of long-range confinement remains underexplored. Here we report lanthanide separation in aqueous systems using extremely confined manganese oxide solid ionic channels with optimized layer spacing. Different lanthanides induce distinct solid-state phase transformations in manganese oxide, creating a strong driving force for separation. Two lanthanide groups, differing by ~1.4 Å in spacing, were identified and confirmed to be stable by density functional theory. The narrower confinement of heavier Group II lanthanides improves cross-group separation by increasing the dehydration barrier for lighter Group I lanthanides without inducing strong binding. We further developed a strategy to pin the confinement dimensions and enhance same-group separation, increasing enrichment factors for La–Nd and La–Pr pairs from 1.6 ± 0.1 and 1.5 ± 0.1 to 5.4 ± 0.1 and 4.2 ± 0.1, respectively.
title_zh: 用于稀土元素分离的固定埃尺寸固体离子通道
abstract_zh: 高纯度稀土元素对于现代技术至关重要，但由于选择性不足和配体毒性，当前的溶剂萃取工艺是能源密集型且对环境有害的。尽管尺寸排阻和结合亲和力的结合可以改善镧系元素的分离，但长程限制的作用仍未得到充分探索。在这里，我们报告了使用极其有限的氧化锰固体离子通道和优化的层间距在水性系统中分离镧系元素。不同的镧系元素在氧化锰中诱导不同的固态相变，为分离产生强大的驱动力。密度泛函理论鉴定出两个间距相差约 1.4 Å 的镧系元素基团并证实它们是稳定的。较重的 II 族镧系元素的较窄限制通过增加较轻的 I 族镧系元素的脱水势垒而改善了跨族分离，而不引起强结合。我们进一步开发了一种固定限制尺寸并增强同族分离的策略，将 La-Nd 和 La-Pr 对的富集因子分别从 1.6 ± 0.1 和 1.5 ± 0.1 增加到 5.4 ± 0.1 和 4.2 ± 0.1。

title: A photogenerated triplet aura-nitrene for gold-mediated nitrene transfer
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: The isolation and characterization of metal-stabilized, low-valent nitrogen species remain central challenges in advancing nitrogen-atom transfer chemistry. Although gold has emerged as a powerful catalyst in C–N bond formation, proposed mechanisms have consistently bypassed gold nitrenes as key intermediates—leaving their chemistry largely uncharted. Here we report the characterization of a bona fide aura-nitrene, formed via photochemical N2 extrusion from a gold(III) azide complex. In crystallo and solid-state analyses reveal a diverse reactivity landscape, including a nitrene-to-nitro transformation via O2 activation, intra- and intermolecular C–H bond activation, CO fixation and alkyne addition/sigmatropic rearrangement. Computational investigations confirm a triplet ground state, with the nitrene best described as a nitrogen-centred diradical σ-bonded to a formal gold(III) centre. These findings highlight the dual electrophilic and diradical character of gold(III) metallonitrenes and establish a conceptual framework for gold-mediated nitrogen-atom transfer beyond conventional mechanistic paradigms.
title_zh: 用于金介导氮烯转移的光生三重态光环-氮烯
abstract_zh: 金属稳定的低价氮物种的分离和表征仍然是推进氮原子转移化学的核心挑战。尽管金已成为 C-N 键形成的强大催化剂，但所提出的机制一直绕过金氮宾作为关键中间体，使其化学性质在很大程度上未知。在这里，我们报告了真正的光环氮烯的表征，它是通过光化学 N2 从叠氮化金络合物中挤出而形成的。在晶体和固态分析中，揭示了多种反应性景观，包括通过 O2 活化、分子内和分子间 C-H 键活化、CO 固定和炔加成/σ重排的氮烯到硝基的转化。计算研究证实了三重态基态，氮烯最好描述为以氮为中心的双自由基 σ 键合到正式的金（III）中心。这些发现突出了金（III）金属氮烯的双重亲电子和双自由基特征，并建立了超越传统机械范式的金介导的氮原子转移的概念框架。

title: A pathway to next-generation direct air capture using adsorbents
source: Joule
abstract: As extreme weather events become increasingly frequent, the urgency of carbon removal technologies is clear. Although direct air capture (DAC) holds the greatest promise for large-scale carbon removal, its deployment faces significant engineering hurdles. This review summarizes four key bottlenecks in DAC scale-up, covering contactor design, thermal management, water management, and system coupling. These are ultimately connected with one another by techno-economic analysis, which helps identify critical pathways to accelerate DAC toward its carbon capture goals.
title_zh: 使用吸附剂实现下一代直接空气捕获的途径
abstract_zh: 随着极端天气事件的日益频繁，除碳技术的紧迫性显而易见。尽管直接空气捕获（DAC）最有希望实现大规模碳去除，但其部署面临着重大的工程障碍。本综述总结了 DAC 放大的四个关键瓶颈，涵盖接触器设计、热管理、水管理和系统耦合。这些最终通过技术经济分析相互联系起来，这有助于确定加速 DAC 实现其碳捕获目标的关键途径。
