title: Ultra‐Low‐Threshold Laser Patterning of Graphene With a Modular Sulfonium Library for Programmable Work‐Function Engineering
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Achieving spatially resolved chemical functionalization on graphene lattices is essential for fabricating advanced two‐dimensional (2D) architectures. However, current covalent patterning strategies struggle to simultaneously minimize energy input for lattice preservation and offer the chemical versatility required for fine‐tuning the local doping state of the 2D lattice. Here, a modular diaryl‐sulfonium platform is developed for the ultra‐low‐threshold covalent patterning of monolayer graphene, further enabling substituent‐encoded pattern of local work‐function. Driven by a highly efficient, graphene‐mediated hot‐electron single‐electron transfer (SET) mechanism, this approach lowers activation barriers, enabling non‐destructive patterning with laser powers as low as 0.10 mW and irradiation time of a few seconds—orders of magnitude lower than conventional photon‐driven processes—thereby ensuring high pattern fidelity without thermal degradation. By incorporating a library of six chemically distinct σ‐bound substituents (including phenyl, fluorophenyl, trifluoroethyl, vinyl, phenylthiophenyl, and bromoethyl) onto a unified sulfonium scaffold, precise control over local work‐function can be achieved. Kelvin Probe Force Microscopy (KPFM) reveals a continuous, chemically tunable spectrum of surface potential shifts (ΔCPD from ∼30 to ∼300 mV). Combined with exceptional ambient stability and thermal erasability, this work offers a robust, energy‐efficient paradigm for chemically encoding reconfigurable 2D electronic landscapes.
title_zh: 使用模块化锍库对石墨烯进行超低阈值激光图案化，用于可编程功函数工程
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  在石墨烯晶格上实现空间分辨的化学功能化对于制造先进的二维（2D）结构至关重要。然而，当前的共价图案化策略很难同时最大限度地减少晶格保存的能量输入，并提供微调二维晶格局部掺杂状态所需的化学多功能性。在这里，开发了一种模块化二芳基锍平台，用于单层石墨烯的超低阈值共价图案化，进一步实现局部功函数的取代基编码图案。在高效石墨烯介导的热电子单电子转移 (SET) 机制的驱动下，这种方法降低了激活势垒，能够以低至 0.10 mW 的激光功率和几秒的照射时间（比传统光子驱动工艺低几个数量级）实现无损图案化，从而确保高图案保真度而不会发生热降解。通过将六种化学上不同的σ键取代基（包括苯基、氟苯基、三氟乙基、乙烯基、苯硫基苯基和溴乙基）合并到统一的锍支架上，可以实现对局部功函数的精确控制。开尔文探针力显微镜 (KPFM) 揭示了连续的、化学可调的表面电位变化谱（ΔCPD 从 ∼30 到 ∼300 mV）。结合卓越的环境稳定性和热可擦除性，这项工作为化学编码可重构二维电子景观提供了强大、节能的范例。

title: Electric Field‐Empowered Nanozymes: From Passive Adaptation to Active Precision Therapy
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  The clinical translation of nanozymes is hindered by the passive and uncontrollable catalytic properties, necessitating active and precise spatiotemporal regulation. Inspired by the electrostatic preorganization theory of efficient natural enzymes, this review provides a systematic analysis of electric field‐regulated nanozymes. Compared to conventional physical stimuli, this approach offers a tunable and complementary framework for active precise therapy. Diverse electrical input modes provide adaptable driving forces for precisely regulating nanozyme catalysis across various biomedical scenarios. Furthermore, at the atomic scale, the underlying mechanisms are elucidated, demonstrating how the electric field inputs optimize the d‐band center, surface charges, band structure, and active sites to promote substrate adsorption and lower reaction energy barriers, thereby enhancing the catalytic effect. To maximize electric field‐nanozyme coupling, design principles for a complete charge pathway are distilled: optimizing intrinsic field response, directional charge rectification, and achieving low‐loss transport. Subsequently, the applications of electric field‐regulated nanozymes in precision therapy are summarized, including on‐demand spatiotemporal activation, quantitative dosage regulation, and active microenvironment remodeling. Finally, this review highlights the immense potential of interdisciplinary integration in overcoming the biosafety and mechanism bottlenecks of this regulation strategy. These insights provide a new perspective for advancing electric field‐regulated nanozymes toward precision therapy.
title_zh: 电场赋能的纳米酶：从被动适应到主动精准治疗
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  纳米酶的临床转化受到被动且不可控的催化特性的阻碍，需要主动且精确的时空调节。受高效天然酶的静电预组织理论的启发，这篇综述对电场调节的纳米酶进行了系统分析。与传统的物理刺激相比，这种方法为主动精确治疗提供了可调节和补充的框架。多种电输入模式为在各种生物医学场景中精确调节纳米酶催化提供了适应性强的驱动力。此外，在原子尺度上，阐明了潜在的机制，展示了电场输入如何优化d带中心、表面电荷、能带结构和活性位点，以促进底物吸附并降低反应能垒，从而增强催化效果。为了最大化电场-纳米酶耦合，提炼出完整电荷路径的设计原则：优化固有场响应、定向电荷整流和实现低损耗传输。随后，总结了电场调节纳米酶在精准治疗中的应用，包括按需时空激活、定量剂量调节和主动微环境重塑。最后，这篇综述强调了跨学科整合在克服这一监管策略的生物安全和机制瓶颈方面的巨大潜力。这些见解为先进技术提供了新的视角

title: Nearest canonical equilibrium extraction for gyrokinetic simulations
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: We present a general method for constructing a physically consistent equilibrium from an arbitrary reference distribution. The method extracts the nearest canonical equilibrium by relaxing the reference state through an iterative diffusion process along unperturbed trajectories, converging to the orbit-averaged distribution without explicit orbit integration. As a result, the procedure is numerically robust near bounce points and across the trapped–passing boundary, while suitable preconditioning further accelerates convergence. Two applications of this algorithm are demonstrated. First, in an ion-temperature-gradient simulation with equilibrium updating, the extracted equilibrium enables the zonal component to be consistently absorbed into the background distribution, thereby preserving the perturbative ordering inherent to the framework and substantially relaxing the Courant–Friedrichs–Lewy stability constraint. At the same time, short-time turbulent transport levels remain in good agreement with those obtained using the conventional fixed-equilibrium benchmark. These results indicate the potential to perform transport-scale simulations at a computational cost comparable to that of methods, rather than full- approaches. Second, the extractor provides an efficient and accurate mapping of the post-saturation perturbation into constants-of-motion space , yielding an orbit-invariant representation that is well suited for reduced analysis and synthetic diagnostics.
title_zh: 用于回旋模拟的最近正则平衡提取
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种从任意参考分布构建物理一致平衡的通用方法。该方法通过沿着未扰动轨迹的迭代扩散过程放松参考状态来提取最近的正则平衡，收敛到轨道平均分布而无需显式轨道积分。因此，该过程在弹跳点附近和跨越捕获通过边界时具有数值鲁棒性，同时适当的预处理进一步加速了收敛。演示了该算法的两个应用。首先，在具有平衡更新的离子温度梯度模拟中，提取的平衡使区域分量能够一致地吸收到背景分布中，从而保留框架固有的微扰排序，并显着放松 Courant-Friedrichs-Lewy 稳定性约束。与此同时，短时湍流输运水平与使用传统固定平衡基准获得的水平仍然非常一致。这些结果表明，以与方法（而不是完整方法）相当的计算成本执行运输规模模拟的潜力。其次，提取器提供了后饱和扰动到运动常数空间的有效且准确的映射，产生非常适合简化分析和综合诊断的轨道不变表示。

title: Influences of high- Z dopant on the direct-drive implosion in the presence of non-local e...
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: High- elements, such as silicon (Si), are usually doped in the outer ablator in direct-drive inertial confinement fusion (ICF) to smooth the laser non-uniformity. However, their specific effects on the implosion performance are not well understood. In this article, the direct-drive implosions of targets with varying Si doping ratios (0%, 6.25%, 12.5%) are studied through 2D radiation hydrodynamic simulations, in which the non-local electron transport is considered. As the doping ratio increases, the inward electron heat flux is reduced, while the radiation temperature is enhanced. This leads to a 9.30% and 18.6% increase in the preheat fuel temperature for the two doped targets. Besides, the maximum perturbation amplitude is also decreased by 39.5% and 66.3%. Consequently, the stagnation hot spot pressure rises by 8.35% and 9.09%, and the stagnation areal density increases by 10.3% and 13.8%, respectively. These findings indicate that high- dopant can improve implosion performance through significant suppression of hydrodynamic instability, with the trade-off of enhanced preheating. Therefore, appropriately increasing the doping concentration may improve implosion performance. Above findings advance the understanding of high- dopant effects in direct-drive implosions and offer valuable insights for the design of ICF targets.
title_zh: 存在非局域电的情况下高 Z 掺杂剂对直接驱动内爆的影响
abstract_zh: 在直接驱动惯性约束聚变（ICF）中，通常在外部烧蚀体中掺杂硅（Si）等高元素，以平滑激光的不均匀性。然而，它们对内爆性能的具体影响尚不清楚。本文通过二维辐射流体动力学模拟研究了不同Si掺杂比例（0%、6.25%、12.5%）靶材的直接驱动内爆，其中考虑了非局域电子输运。随着掺杂比例的增加，向内电子热通量减少，而辐射温度升高。这导致两个掺杂靶材的预热燃料温度分别增加了 9.30% 和 18.6%。此外，最大扰动幅度也降低了39.5%和66.3%。滞点热点压力分别增加8.35%和9.09%，滞点面密度分别增加10.3%和13.8%。这些发现表明，高掺杂剂可以通过显着抑制流体动力学不稳定性来提高内爆性能，并以增强预热为代价。因此，适当提高掺杂浓度可以提高内爆性能。上述发现增进了对直接驱动内爆中高掺杂效应的理解，并为 ICF 靶材的设计提供了宝贵的见解。

title: AI-redesigned starting points and outcomes enhance protein evolution
source: Nature
abstract: Engineered or laboratory-evolved proteins often have suboptimal stability, activity or specificity. Here we applied artificial intelligence (AI)-based protein sequence design to address challenges in experimental enzyme evolution. Using the model ProteinMPNN, we redesigned three distinct botulinum neurotoxin (BoNT) proteases, generating variants with improved stability and full catalytic efficiency1. We hypothesized that redesigned enzymes may be more mutationally robust than their wild-type (WT) counterparts, and therefore may serve as better starting points to evolve new function. We performed side-by-side phage-assisted continuous evolution campaigns initiated with AI-redesigned proteases or with the corresponding WT proteases2. Evolving three distinct redesigned enzymes as starting points consistently yielded proteases with higher activity than evolving WT proteases in the same selection. Across four evolution campaigns, redesign conferred robustness that unlocked access to otherwise inaccessible highly functional sequences, confirmed by the inability of redesign-evolved mutations to function in WT enzyme backgrounds. When redesign raises fitness in sequence space local to the starting point, redesigned starting points adapt at a faster rate. Finally, we evolved both WT and AI-redesigned BoNT/E protease to selectively cleave the therapeutically relevant protein ataxin-2. Proteases evolved from the redesigned starting point reached higher catalytic efficiency and stability while minimizing native substrate cleavage, achieving more than 79-fold greater selected specificity for ataxin-2 than the best-performing variant evolved from WT BoNT/E. This study establishes a practical workflow using AI-redesigned starting points to evolve enzymes with improved properties compared with those evolved from natural proteins, with broad implications for protein science.
title_zh: 人工智能重新设计的起点和结果增强了蛋白质的进化
abstract_zh: 工程或实验室进化的蛋白质通常具有次优的稳定性、活性或特异性。在这里，我们应用基于人工智能（AI）的蛋白质序列设计来解决实验酶进化中的挑战。使用 ProteinMPNN 模型，我们重新设计了三种不同的肉毒杆菌神经毒素 (BoNT) 蛋白酶，生成了稳定性更高且催化效率更高的变体1。我们假设，重新设计的酶可能比野生型 (WT) 对应物在突变方面更稳健，因此可能作为进化新功能的更好起点。我们利用人工智能重新设计的蛋白酶或相应的 WT 蛋白酶发起并排的噬菌体辅助持续进化活动2。以三种不同的重新设计的酶为起点，不断产生比同一选择中进化的 WT 蛋白酶具有更高活性的蛋白酶。在四次进化活动中，重新设计赋予了鲁棒性，解锁了对其他方式无法访问的高功能序列的访问，这通过重新设计进化的突变无法在 WT 酶背景中发挥作用而得到证实。当重新设计提高了起始点局部序列空间的适应性时，重新设计的起始点会以更快的速度适应。最后，我们进化了 WT 和 AI 重新设计的 BoNT/E 蛋白酶，以选择性裂解治疗相关的蛋白质 ataxin-2。从重新设计的起点进化而来的蛋白酶达到了更高的催化效率和稳定性，同时最大限度地减少了天然底物的裂解，实现了超过 79 倍的选择特异性

title: When drought meets war trauma
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: The human consequences of armed conflict and climate change are often studied separately despite frequent co-occurrence of those events in fragile regions. A study now reveals a compounding effect of drought on post-traumatic stress from war, underlining the need for mental health services as a component of adaptation and humanitarian responses.
title_zh: 当干旱遇上战争创伤
abstract_zh: 尽管武装冲突和气候变化在脆弱地区经常同时发生，但武装冲突和气候变化对人类造成的后果往往被分开研究。现在的一项研究揭示了干旱对战争造成的创伤后应激的复合影响，强调了将心理健康服务作为适应和人道主义应对措施的一部分的必要性。

title: Culturalizing sustainability
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: Policy-makers and scientists dominate high-level sustainability debates but any decision that follows has consequences for ordinary people in their local communities and environments. We asked experts to reflect on the importance of embracing a culturally informed, bottom-up approach to the sustainability discourse and action.
title_zh: 培育可持续发展文化
abstract_zh: 政策制定者和科学家主导着高层可持续发展辩论，但随后的任何决定都会对当地社区和环境中的普通民众产生影响。我们请专家们反思在可持续发展讨论和行动中采用文化知情、自下而上方法的重要性。

title: Drought amplifies the psychological burden of war
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: The convergence of climate shocks and armed conflict poses a critical threat to human security and sustainable development. However, their joint impacts on human populations, particularly the erosion of psychosocial resilience, remain poorly quantified. Here, integrating georeferenced drought data from respondents’ pre-displacement regions with survey data from Syrian and Iraqi refugees (N = 3,751), we find that the association between war exposure and post-traumatic stress is stronger among those from more drought-affected areas of origin. Under severe drought conditions, the increase in post-traumatic stress associated with war exposure was more than twice as large as under average moisture conditions. This pattern is consistent with resilience corrosion, whereby climate-induced hardship may degrade mental health and weaken the adaptive capacities communities need to navigate future shocks. These findings support policy approaches that integrate mental health into climate adaptation and humanitarian response in settings shaped by overlapping crises.
title_zh: 干旱加剧战争心理负担
abstract_zh: 气候冲击和武装冲突的交织对人类安全和可持续发展构成严重威胁。然而，它们对人类的共同影响，特别是社会心理复原力的侵蚀，仍然难以量化。在这里，将受访者流离失所前地区的地理参考干旱数据与叙利亚和伊拉克难民的调查数据（N = 3,751）相结合，我们发现，对于来自受干旱影响较严重的原籍地区的人来说，战争经历与创伤后压力之间的关联更强。在严重干旱条件下，与战争相关的创伤后应激的增加是平均潮湿条件下的两倍多。这种模式与复原力腐蚀是一致的，即气候引起的困难可能会降低心理健康，并削弱社区应对未来冲击所需的适应能力。这些发现支持将心理健康纳入重叠危机环境中的气候适应和人道主义应对措施的政策方法。

title: Entanglements enable circular engineering plastics
source: Nature Materials
abstract: An entanglement-dominated design strategy combines dense physical chain entanglements with sparse trigger-cleavable covalent crosslinks. This strategy enables high-performance thermosets with generation-invariant regeneration, opening an avenue for circular engineering plastics.
title_zh: 缠结使圆形工程塑料成为可能
abstract_zh: 以纠缠为主导的设计策略将密集的物理链纠缠与稀疏的可触发裂解的共价交联相结合。这一策略使得高性能热固性材料具有世代不变的再生能力，为循环工程塑料开辟了一条道路。

title: The heart has a ‘little brain’ — and it protects against stress
source: Nature
abstract: A subset of cardiac neurons keep the heart from malfunctioning in stressed mice.
title_zh: 心脏有一个“小大脑”——它可以抵御压力
abstract_zh: 心脏神经元的一个子集可以防止应激小鼠的心脏出现故障。

title: Single-chain-water ultrafast transport in COF membrane for dual desalination and devolatilization
source: Chem
abstract: Obtaining clean water requires removing both salt and harmful volatiles—a dual challenge where conventional membranes fall short. This study engineers a synthetic membrane with tailored nanoscale channels that overcome this limitation. It achieves high rejection of salt and volatiles while permitting fast water flow. This is enabled by a unique phenomenon where water molecules line up in a single file to move rapidly through the sub-nanometer pores.
title_zh: COF膜中的单链水超快传输，用于双重脱盐和脱挥发分
abstract_zh: 获得清洁的水需要去除盐和有害挥发物，这是传统膜无法满足的双重挑战。这项研究设计了一种具有定制纳米级通道的合成膜，克服了这一限制。它可实现高盐分和挥发物的去除率，同时允许快速水流。这是通过一种独特的现象实现的，即水分子排成一列，快速穿过亚纳米孔隙。

title: Electronic-resonance enhanced molecule for perovskite solar cells
source: Nature
abstract: Self-assembly monolayers (SAMs), which anchor to transparent conductive oxide (TCO) substrate and form an interfacial molecular dipole to extract carriers from perovskite layer, has promoted a stepwise improvement in efficiency of perovskite solar cells (pero-SCs).1-5 However, the limited intrinsic bonding strength due to constrained electron density on coordination sites incurs SAMs desorption and compromises charge extraction under operational stressors, posing a notable challenge to their long-term stability.6,7 To address this, we design a SAM with donor-acceptor-donor (D-A-D) resonant molecular structure, in which the electronic resonance increases the negative charge density at the acceptor anchoring group, significantly strengthening the phosphonic acid-indium tin oxide (ITO) anchoring bond and preventing the SAM desorption during operation. The device applying D-A-D resonant SAM possesses remarkable operational stability with negligible decay under maximum-power-point tracking (MPPT) at 85±5 °C for 1,080 h, maintains >93% after 1,080 h under metal halide (MH) lamp illumination (100 mW cm−2, 4.4% UV inside) at 85±5 °C and also retains >98% after 720 repetitive thermal cycles between −40 °C and 85 °C. Concurrently, the resonance induced charge delocalization facilitates efficient carrier transport, realizing a certified power conversion efficiencies (PCEs) of 27.69% on 0.063 cm2 devices and 23.63% with aperture area of 15.64 cm2. The certified efficiency of 26.64% is also realized on flexible substrates (0.063 cm2), demonstrating the universality of this approach across different types of substrates.
title_zh: 用于钙钛矿太阳能电池的电子共振增强分子
abstract_zh: 自组装单层 (SAM) 锚定在透明导电氧化物 (TCO) 基板上并形成界面分子偶极子以从钙钛矿层中提取载流子，促进了钙钛矿太阳能电池 (pero-SC) 效率的逐步提高。1-5 然而，由于配位点上的电子密度受限，固有键合强度有限，导致 SAM 在操作压力下解吸并损害电荷提取，这对其长期发展构成了显着挑战。 6,7 为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种具有供体-受体-供体 (D-A-D) 共振分子结构的 SAM，其中电子共振增加了受体锚定基团处的负电荷密度，显着增强了膦酸-氧化铟锡 (ITO) 锚定键并防止 SAM 在操作过程中解吸。采用 D-A-D 谐振 SAM 的器件具有卓越的工作稳定性，在 85±5 °C 下最大功率点跟踪 (MPPT) 下运行 1,080 小时，衰减可忽略不计，在 85±5 °C 的金属卤化物 (MH) 灯照明（100 mW cm−2，内部 4.4% UV）下 1,080 小时后保持 >93%，并且在 720 次重复热后保持 >98%在−40 °C 和85 °C 之间循环。同时，谐振诱导的电荷离域促进了高效的载流子传输，在 0.063 cm2 器件上实现了 27.69% 的经认证功率转换效率 (PCE)，在孔径面积为 15.64 cm2 时实现了 23.63%。在柔性基板 (0.063 cm2) 上也实现了 26.64% 的认证效率，证明了这种方法的通用性

title: RNA synthesis and substrate analog inhibition in the CCHFV polymerase
source: Nature
abstract: The about 4000-residue L proteins from the Nairoviridae are the largest known viral polymerases, lacking global structural information and promising nucleotide analog (NA) inhibitors. Here we report structures of full-length Nairoviridae Crimean-Congo hemorrhagic fever virus (CCHFV) L including a 3.0-Å-resolution polymerase elongation complex that elucidates mechanisms of both early and late elongation stages. Large additions and insertions are found in all three major functional regions that contain the endonuclease, RNA-dependent RNA polymerase (RdRP), and cap-binding domain of CCHFV L, extending RNA binding paths on both sides of RdRP active site and creating interaction networks critical for virus replication as suggested by CCHFV minigenome assay data. NAs with ribose-2′-modifications identical to the hepatitis C drug sofosbuvir are found to specifically and efficiently inhibit CCHFV RdRP through immediate chain termination mechanism. Using sofosbuvir-hepatitis C virus RdRP system as the reference, the potency of these NAs is further demonstrated in competition assays in the presence of corresponding NTPs.
title_zh: CCHFV 聚合酶中的 RNA 合成和底物类似物抑制
abstract_zh: 来自内罗病毒科的约 4000 个残基的 L 蛋白是已知最大的病毒聚合酶，缺乏整体结构信息和有前途的核苷酸类似物 (NA) 抑制剂。在此，我们报告了全长内罗病毒科克里米亚-刚果出血热病毒 (CCHFV) L 的结构，包括 3.0 Å 分辨率的聚合酶延伸复合物，该复合物阐明了早期和晚期延伸阶段的机制。 CCHFV L 的所有三个主要功能区均含有核酸内切酶、RNA 依赖性 RNA 聚合酶 (RdRP) 和帽结合域，均发现大量添加和插入，延长了 RdRP 活性位点两侧的 RNA 结合路径，并创建了对病毒复制至关重要的相互作用网络，如 CCHFV 小基因组检测数据所示。具有核糖-2'-修饰的 NA 与丙型肝炎药物索磷布韦相同，被发现可通过立即链终止机制特异性、有效地抑制 CCHFV RdRP。使用索磷布韦-丙型肝炎病毒 RdRP 系统作为参考，这些 NA 的效力在相应 NTP 存在的竞争测定中得到进一步证明。

title: What counts as a moon? Huge ‘exosatellite’ sparks debate
source: Nature
abstract: Discovery of a distant Jupiter-mass object could pave the way for detection of exomoons — plus, a rare transmissible cancer found in catfish. Hear the biggest stories from the world of science | 22 July 2026
title_zh: 什么算月亮？巨大的“外卫星”引发争论
abstract_zh: 遥远木星质量天体的发现可能为探测外卫星铺平道路，此外，在鲶鱼中发现了一种罕见的传染性癌症。聆听科学界最伟大的故事 | 2026 年 7 月 22 日

title: The planktonic microbiome of the Great Barrier Reef
source: Nature
abstract: Large genome databases have markedly improved our understanding of marine microorganisms1,2,3,4,5. Although these resources have focused on prokaryotes, genomes from many dominant marine lineages, such as Pelagibacter and Prochlorococcus, are conspicuously underrepresented. Here we present the Great Barrier Reef Microbial Genomes Database (GBR-MGD), comprising 5,283 prokaryotic genomes obtained from Great Barrier Reef seawater samples using Nanopore and Illumina sequencing, including a collection of high-quality genomes of underrepresented groups. We show that standard short-read assemblies miss these populations owing to a combination of strain heterogeneity and low-GC-percentage sequencing bias. The GBR-MGD also comprises 20 chromosome-level picoeukaryote and 808,585 viral genomes, including a newly described clade of marine Crassvirales. We demonstrate the utility of the GBR-MGD to identify indicator taxa that can reliably predict the effects of reef management practices, such as the establishment of marine protected zones.
title_zh: 大堡礁的浮游微生物组
abstract_zh: 大型基因组数据库显着提高了我们对海洋微生物的了解1,2,3,4,5。尽管这些资源主要集中在原核生物上，但来自许多主要海洋谱系的基因组（例如海藻杆菌和原绿球藻）的代表性明显不足。在这里，我们介绍了大堡礁微生物基因组数据库 (GBR-MGD)，其中包含使用 Nanopore 和 Illumina 测序从大堡礁海水样本中获得的 5,283 个原核生物基因组，其中包括代表性不足群体的高质量基因组集合。我们表明，由于菌株异质性和低 GC 百分比测序偏差的结合，标准短读长组装会错过这些群体。 GBR-MGD 还包含 20 个染色体水平的超微核生物和 808,585 个病毒基因组，包括新描述的海洋 Crassvirales 进化枝。我们展示了 GBR-MGD 在识别指示类群方面的实用性，这些指示类群可以可靠地预测珊瑚礁管理实践（例如建立海洋保护区）的影响。

title: An isolable nitrene radical anion as a nucleophilic open-shell nitrogen synthon
source: Chem
abstract: Nitrenes are well-known reactive intermediates used to form a variety of nitrogen-containing molecules, but their reduced radical anions have remained inaccessible under ambient temperature. Here, a persistent nitrene can be converted into an isolable radical anion that features a non-Aufbau electronic configuration. This species acts as a nucleophilic nitrogen radical that forms new N–Se, N–Si, and N–C bonds under mild conditions.
title_zh: 作为亲核开壳氮合成子的可分离氮宾自由基阴离子
abstract_zh: 氮烯是众所周知的反应中间体，用于形成各种含氮分子，但它们的还原自由基阴离子在环境温度下仍然难以接近。在这里，持久性氮宾可以转化为具有非 Aufbau 电子构型的可分离自由基阴离子。该物种充当亲核氮自由基，在温和条件下形成新的 N-Se、N-Si 和 N-C 键。

title: Subtropical gyre expansion causes Southern Ocean salinification contrary to freshening predictions
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The “salty-gets-saltier, fresh-gets-fresher” paradigm predicts that an intensifying hydrological cycle should freshen the climatologically fresh Southern Ocean. Here we show the opposite: sea surface salinity increased at ~0.03 decade−1 across 40–50°S during 2004–2024, most coherently in the Pacific and Atlantic sectors. We attribute this salinification to the poleward expansion of the southern subtropical gyres, which advects saline subtropical water into latitudes of steepest meridional salinity gradient. The Subtropical and Subantarctic Fronts, tracked via the 35 and 34 isohalines, migrate poleward at unequal rates (–0.46° and –0.18° decade−1), narrowing the frontal corridor and sharpening the cross-frontal gradient. A mixed-layer budget shows that horizontal advection dominates the salinity trend, roughly tripling the opposing contribution from surface freshwater flux. Forced by poleward-intensifying westerlies and a positive Southern Annular Mode trend, this circulation-driven salinification demonstrates that ocean dynamics can override freshwater forcing, cautioning against interpreting salinity trends as direct fingerprints of the hydrological cycle.
title_zh: 副热带环流扩张导致南大洋盐化，与淡水更新的预测相反
abstract_zh: “咸的变得更咸，新鲜的变得更新鲜”范式预测，不断加强的水文循环将使气候清新的南大洋变得清新。在这里，我们展示了相反的情况：2004年至2024年期间，在40°S至50°S范围内，海面盐度增加了约0.03decade−1，其中太平洋和大西洋部分的增幅最为一致。我们将这种盐化归因于南亚热带环流向极地扩张，它将副热带咸水平流到经向盐度梯度最陡的纬度。通过35和34等盐线追踪的副热带和亚南极锋以不等的速率（–0.46°和–0.18°decade−1）向极地迁移，从而缩小了锋面走廊并锐化了锋面梯度。混合层预算表明，水平平流主导了盐度趋势，大约是地表淡水通量的相反贡献的三倍。在极地增强的西风和正向的南环模趋势的推动下，这种环流驱动的盐化表明海洋动力学可以超越淡水强迫，警告不要将盐度趋势解释为水文循环的直接指纹。

title: Background genetics and new mutations interact to direct cancer evolution
source: Nature
abstract: Rerunning tumour evolution in mice shows how cancer develops after DNA damage and reveals that background genetics and acquired mutations interact to shape genome stability and selection. This provides experimental evidence that genetic ancestry has an important role in setting the trajectory of cancer evolution. Studies of mice show that cancer dynamics depend on an interplay between the inherited genome and acquired mutations.
title_zh: 背景遗传学和新突变相互作用以指导癌症进化
abstract_zh: 重新运行小鼠肿瘤进化显示了 DNA 损伤后癌症如何发展，并揭示了背景遗传学和获得性突变相互作用以塑造基因组稳定性和选择。这提供了实验证据，证明遗传血统在设定癌症进化轨迹方面发挥着重要作用。对小鼠的研究表明，癌症动态取决于遗传基因组和获得性突变之间的相互作用。

title: Geomagnetic storms caused by solar wind might be more extreme than previously thought
source: Nature
abstract: The severity of geomagnetic storms — magnetic disturbances in Earth’s outer atmosphere — is widely understood to reach an upper limit as the strength of the solar wind increases. But this upper limit is an illusion that results from uncertainty in the measurement of solar-wind strength as the true value regresses towards the mean. Regression to the mean explains away the apparent limit to geomagnetic disturbances linked to strong solar winds.
title_zh: 太阳风引起的地磁风暴可能比之前想象的更加极端
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为，随着太阳风强度的增加，地磁风暴​​（地球外层大气中的磁扰动）的严重程度将达到上限。但这个上限是一种幻觉，是由于太阳风强度测量的不确定性造成的，因为真实值回归平均值。均值回归解释了与强太阳风相关的地磁扰动的明显限制。

title: Fly neurons carry a molecular ‘timestamp’ that encodes their birth order
source: Nature
abstract: A single-cell gene-expression atlas of the fly nerve cord mapped onto its wiring diagram has uncovered a simple shared gene-expression code. The code enables neurons to carry a molecular memory of the order of their birth from a parent cell, and shapes their diversity. The gene-expression code is shared across neurons born from all the stem cells that produce the fly central brain and nerve cord.
title_zh: 果蝇神经元携带一个分子“时间戳”，编码它们的出生顺序
abstract_zh: 果蝇神经索的单细胞基因表达图谱映射到其接线图上，揭示了一个简单的共享基因表达代码。该代码使神经元能够从母细胞中携带其出生顺序的分子记忆，并塑造其多样性。基因表达密码在产生果蝇中枢大脑和神经索的所有干细胞产生的神经元之间共享。

title: Three tips to avoid AI image mistakes in science
source: Nature
abstract: Artificial-intelligence tools can be useful for brainstorming and creating graphics, but they can introduce errors. If you’re going to use them, here’s how to avoid problems.
title_zh: 避免人工智能图像在科学中出现错误的三个技巧
abstract_zh: 人工智能工具对于集思广益和创建图形很有用，但它们可能会引入错误。如果您要使用它们，请按照以下方法避免出现问题。

title: AI identifies interactions in CRISPR complexes to improve specificity of DNA editing
source: Nature
abstract: AlphaFold3 predictions of the molecular contacts made by a genome-editing enzyme have been used to improve the enzyme’s selectivity for target DNA sequences.

abstract_zh: AlphaFold3 对基因组编辑酶产生的分子接触的预测已被用来提高酶对目标 DNA 序列的选择性。

abstract: Nature talks to five artists about their approaches to communicating science visually.

abstract: Artificial intelligence is a democratizing force for those without graphic-design experience, as long as it is used conscientiously.

abstract_zh: 对于那些没有图形设计经验的人来说，只要认真使用人工智能，它就是一股民主化的力量。

source: Nature
abstract: Newfound fame has proved to be stellar for some astronauts but harder for others. Will NASA’s popular crew need some space?

title: A radical approach to making C-glycoside molecules
source: Nature
abstract: A platform for synthesizing highly desirable C-glycoside molecules from sugar has been developed that uses glycosyl sulfonyl hydrazides as readily accessible free-radical precursors. The strategy enables targeted formation of carbon–carbon bonds across carbohydrate scaffolds and with specificity for the desired 3D arrangement of atoms. A class of diabetes drug could be easier to make using this synthetic route.
title_zh: 制造 C-糖苷分子的激进方法
abstract_zh: 已经开发出一种从糖合成高度理想的 C-糖苷分子的平台，该平台使用糖基磺酰肼作为易于获得的自由基前体。该策略能够在碳水化合物支架上有针对性地形成碳-碳键，并具有所需的原子 3D 排列的特异性。使用这种合成路线可以更容易地制造一类糖尿病药物。

title: Genetic background sets the trajectory of experimental cancer evolution
source: Nature
abstract: Human cancers are heterogeneous1. Dissecting how germline genetic variation and environmental factors shape tumour evolution using human datasets is limited by inherent diversity in genetic backgrounds2 and environmental exposures3,4,5. Here, to overcome these limitations, we re-ran early tumour evolution hundreds of times in diverged inbred mouse strains, generating matched histology and whole-genome and transcriptome sequences. The sex, environment and carcinogenic exposures were all controlled, and the study design allowed us to capture genetic variation comparable with that observed across human populations while exploiting the nested hierarchical structure of strain–litter–animal–tumour relationships. Our analyses reveal that epistatic interactions between genetic background and acquired somatic mutations result in population-specific disease progression, including choice of driver mutations, occurrence of whole-genome duplication and subclonal selection dynamics that mirror both cancer susceptibility and tumour growth rate. Even modest genetic divergence, comparable with that found across human ancestry groups, can strikingly alter selection pressures during cancer development to shape both cancer risk and the trajectory of tumour evolution.
title_zh: 遗传背景决定了实验性癌症进化的轨迹
abstract_zh: 人类癌症具有异质性1。使用人类数据集剖析种系遗传变异和环境因素如何影响肿瘤进化受到遗传背景2和环境暴露3、4、5固有多样性的限制。在这里，为了克服这些限制，我们在不同的近交系小鼠品系中重新进行了早期肿瘤进化数百次，生成匹配的组织学以及全基因组和转录组序列。性别、环境和致癌暴露均受到控制，研究设计使我们能够捕获与在人群中观察到的遗传变异相当的遗传变异，同时利用菌株-幼仔-动物-肿瘤关系的嵌套层次结构。我们的分析表明，遗传背景和获得性体细胞突变之间的上位相互作用导致人群特异性疾病进展，包括驱动突变的选择、全基因组重复的发生以及反映癌症易感性和肿瘤生长速率的亚克隆选择动态。即使是与人类祖先群体中发现的微小遗传差异相比，也可以显着改变癌症发展过程中的选择压力，从而影响癌症风险和肿瘤进化轨迹。

title: Subnuclear genome compartmentalization controls bivalent chromatin activity
source: Nature
abstract: The nuclear genome is spatially organized into a three-dimensional architecture by physical association of large chromosomal domains with subnuclear compartments including the nuclear lamina at the radial periphery and nuclear speckles within the nucleoplasm1,2,3,4,5. However, how higher-order spatial genome architecture regulates human development has been overlooked, and the interplay between chromatin state and subnuclear genome compartmentalization is poorly understood. Here we generate high-resolution maps of genomic interactions with the lamina and speckles in cells of the neurogenic lineage isolated from mid-gestational human cortex, identifying an intimate association between subnuclear genome compartmentalization, chromatin state and transcription. During cortical neurogenesis, subnuclear genome compartmentalization is extensively remodelled, relocating hundreds of neuronal genes from the lamina to speckles, including key neurodevelopmental genes bivalent for trimethylation of histone H3 at Lys27 (H3K27me3) and Lys4 (H3K4me3). At the lamina, bivalent genes have exceptionally low expression, and relocation to speckles enhances resolution of bivalent chromatin to H3K4me3 monovalency and increases transcription more than eightfold. We further demonstrate that proximity to the nuclear periphery—not the presence of H3K27me3—maintains the lowly expressed, poised state of bivalent genes embedded in the lamina. We find that the repressive environment of the lamina is associated with spatial segregation of the transcriptional elongation machinery from the nuclear periphery. Our results establish a paradigm in which knowing the spatial location of a gene is necessary for understanding its epigenomic regulation.
title_zh: 亚核基因组区室化控制二价染色质活性
abstract_zh: 通过大染色体结构域与亚核区室（包括径向外围的核层和核质内的核斑点）的物理关联，核基因组在空间上组织成三维结构1,2,3,4,5。然而，高阶空间基因组结构如何调节人类发育却被忽视，并且染色质状态和亚核基因组区室化之间的相互作用也知之甚少。在这里，我们生成了基因组与从妊娠中期人类皮质中分离的神经源性谱系细胞中的层和斑点相互作用的高分辨率图，确定了亚核基因组区室化、染色质状态和转录之间的密切关联。在皮质神经发生过程中，亚核基因组区室化被广泛重塑，将数百个神经元基因从椎板重新定位到斑点，包括组蛋白 H3 Lys27 (H3K27me3) 和 Lys4 (H3K4me3) 三甲基化二价的关键神经发育基因。在核纤层，二价基因的表达量极低，并且重新定位到斑点可增强二价染色质向 H3K4me3 单价的分辨率，并使转录增加八倍以上。我们进一步证明，靠近核外围（而不是 H3K27me3 的存在）维持了嵌入核纤层中的二价基因的低表达、平衡状态。我们发现核层的抑制环境与转录延伸机制与核外围的空间隔离有关。

title: CRISPR–Cas regulates expression of embedded anti-phage defence systems
source: Nature
abstract: Bacteria utilize diverse defence systems to protect against harmful foreign DNA such as bacteriophages1,2, but how these systems coordinate with each other remains poorly understood. Here we uncover CRISIS (CRISPR-supervised immune system), a widespread regulatory paradigm whereby type I CRISPR–Cas loci embed and transcriptionally modulate diverse innate defences. Small non-canonical CRISPR RNA (crRNA)-like RNAs guide the I-C CRISPR-associated complex for antiviral defence (Cascade) effector complex to inhibit promoters of diverse immune cassettes—including composite multi-system clusters—enabling their basal expression for antiviral activity while mitigating fitness costs associated with hyperactivation, such as host growth impairment or exclusion of beneficial plasmids. When CRISPR–Cas is compromised by mutation or anti-CRISPR proteins, there is a burst in transcription of these embedded defence systems, leading to higher-level innate immunity at the expense of host fitness. Together, adaptive CRISPR–Cas systems orchestrate diverse innate immune systems into a layered defence network, comprising a prokaryotic ‘immunity guard’ strategy.
title_zh: CRISPR-Cas调节嵌入式抗噬菌体防御系统的表达
abstract_zh: 细菌利用不同的防御系统来防御有害的外来DNA，例如噬菌体1,2，但这些系统如何相互协调仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们发现了 CRISIS（CRISPR 监督免疫系统），这是一种广泛的调节范式，I 型 CRISPR-Cas 位点嵌入并转录调节多种先天防御。小型非经典 CRISPR RNA (crRNA) 样 RNA 引导 I-C CRISPR 相关抗病毒防御复合物 (Cascade) 效应复合物抑制多种免疫盒的启动子（包括复合多系统簇），使其基础表达具有抗病毒活性，同时减轻与过度激活相关的适应性成本，例如宿主生长损伤或有益质粒的排除。当 CRISPR-Cas 受到突变或抗 CRISPR 蛋白的损害时，这些嵌入式防御系统的转录会爆发，从而导致更高水平的先天免疫，但代价是宿主的适应性。自适应 CRISPR-Cas 系统将不同的先天免疫系统整合到一个分层的防御网络中，包括原核“免疫卫士”策略。

title: Tertiary lymphoid structures harbour stem-like tumour-specific T cells
source: Nature
abstract: Tertiary lymphoid structures (TLSs) are associated with improved responses to immune checkpoint blockade across solid tumours1,2, but how they impact the phenotypic properties of tumour-specific T cells remains unclear. Here we found, across 24 treatment-naive renal cell carcinoma (RCC) tumours, that TLS-containing tumours are more heavily infiltrated by exhausted CD8+ T cells and have a reduced terminal exhaustion transcriptional program compared with TLS− tumours. Specificity screening of 554 T cell clonotypes expanded within the microenvironment of 6 RCC tumours revealed 82 TCRs that were reactive against tumour cells and/or RCC antigens. A subset of tumour-specific T cell clonotypes (12%) was enriched within TLSs, and these expressed an increased program of stem-like progenitor exhaustion, associated with favourable anti-tumour immunity. However, in 60 independent RCC tumours, macrophages within tumour margins of TLS-containing tumours had an inferred immunosuppressive phenotype and were colocalized with exhausted putative tumour-reactive T cells in a subgroup that was further analysed, therefore supporting this mode of immune evasion as a counterbalance to T cell immune pressure. Our data reveal that TLSs are reservoirs of tumour-specific T cells with stem-like progenitor features that could be leveraged by T cell immunotherapies.
title_zh: 三级淋巴结构含有干细胞样肿瘤特异性 T 细胞
abstract_zh: 三级淋巴结构 (TLS) 与实体瘤中免疫检查点阻断反应的改善相关1,2，但它们如何影响肿瘤特异性 T 细胞的表型特性仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现，在 24 个未经治疗的肾细胞癌 (RCC) 肿瘤中，与 TLS− 肿瘤相比，含有 TLS 的肿瘤被耗尽的 CD8+ T 细胞更严重地浸润，并且末端耗尽转录程序减少。对 6 个 RCC 肿瘤微环境中扩展的 554 个 T 细胞克隆型进行特异性筛选，发现 82 个 TCR 对肿瘤细胞和/或 RCC 抗原有反应。肿瘤特异性 T 细胞克隆型的子集 (12%) 在 TLS 中富集，它们表达了增加的干细胞样祖细胞耗竭程序，与良好的抗肿瘤免疫相关。然而，在 60 个独立的 RCC 肿瘤中，含有 TLS 的肿瘤肿瘤边缘内的巨噬细胞具有推断的免疫抑制表型，并且与进一步分析的亚组中耗尽的假定肿瘤反应性 T 细胞共定位，因此支持这种免疫逃避模式作为 T 细胞免疫压力的平衡。我们的数据显示，TLS 是肿瘤特异性 T 细胞的储存库，具有干细胞样祖细胞特征，可用于 T 细胞免疫疗法。

title: Prior therapy defines mutation profiles in childhood cancer at relapse
source: Nature
abstract: Children with cancer develop many short- and long-term side-effects of treatment1, but the amount of DNA damage associated with chemotherapy exposure is unclear2. Here we used mutational signatures to measure this damage using whole-genome-sequenced tumours from a multi-institutional cohort for which therapy dose and total exposure were uniformly collected3,4,5. Chemotherapy and radiotherapy were the only exogenous mutagens in relapsed childhood tumours and were often the dominant source of DNA alteration. Compared with treatment-naive tumours, post-therapy cancers carried nearly three times the number of private signatures, and two times the total burden of somatic mutations. Further, the mutagenic effects of different chemotherapies varied. Platinum-based therapies, for which we more than doubled the number of associated signatures, led to the highest number of variants in most patients. Using therapy exposure dates to track when therapy-associated mutations become detectable, we defined a minimum threshold for platinum-associated mutations to emerge. Remarkably, more than one-third of tumours treated with platinum drugs displayed detectable platinum signatures within one year. This work provides genomic evidence for the critical mutagenic effects of chemotherapy in childhood cancer, as a specific driver of tumour evolution. These data highlight opportunities for treatment de-escalation and the future possibility of tracking resistant clones before expansion.
title_zh: 先前的治疗确定了儿童癌症复发时的突变谱
abstract_zh: 患有癌症的儿童会出现许多短期和长期的治疗副作用1，但与化疗暴露相关的 DNA 损伤量尚不清楚2。在这里，我们使用突变特征来测量这种损害，使用来自多机构队列的全基因组测序肿瘤，统一收集治疗剂量和总暴露量3,4,5。化疗和放疗是复发性儿童肿瘤中唯一的外源诱变剂，并且往往是 DNA 改变的主要来源。与未经治疗的肿瘤相比，治疗后的癌症携带的私人特征数量几乎是其三倍，体细胞突变总负担是其两倍。此外，不同化疗的致突变作用也不同。我们将铂类疗法的相关特征数量增加了一倍以上，导致大多数患者出现了最高数量的变异。使用治疗暴露日期来跟踪治疗相关突变何时可检测到，我们定义了铂相关突变出现的最低阈值。值得注意的是，超过三分之一的用铂类药物治疗的肿瘤在一年内表现出可检测到的铂特征。这项工作为化疗对儿童癌症的关键诱变作用（作为肿瘤进化的特定驱动因素）提供了基因组证据。这些数据强调了治疗降级的机会以及未来在扩展之前追踪耐药克隆的可能性。

title: Extension of Tian Shan along a nascent shear zone
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Our understanding of the dynamics of mountain belt growth is hampered by the lack of high-resolution kinematic observations spanning entire orogenic belts. This is particularly the case for the structurally complex and nascent Tian Shan plateau. Here we use 8 years of Sentinel-1 data across 2 million square kilometres of the Tian Shan to show that the mountain range is extending along its strike, predominantly by rotating along a northeast-trending distributed shear zone. This zone is conjugate to the range strike but aligned with fast axes of shear-wave splitting measurements and a band of strike-slip earthquakes. We interpret this broad zone of shear as resulting from the clockwise rotation of the indenting Tarim Basin, which drives the northeast-to-east motion of the part of the Tian Shan southeast of the cryptic shear zone. Conjugate strike-slip components on numerous basin-bounding faults within the Tian Shan likely facilitate this escape. The present-day vertical deformation of Tian Shan results from a mix of tectonic, climatic, and anthropogenic forcings, with uplift of the highest peak facilitated by thrust along a south-dipping Nalati fault that could be promoted by deglaciation.
title_zh: 天山沿新生剪切带延伸
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏跨越整个造山带的高分辨率运动学观测，我们对山地带生长动态的理解受到阻碍。对于结构复杂且新生的天山高原来说尤其如此。在这里，我们使用了 8 年在天山 200 万平方公里范围内的 Sentinel-1 数据来显示山脉正在沿着其走向延伸，主要是沿着东北走向的分布剪切带旋转。该区域与距离走向共轭，但与剪切波分裂测量的快轴和走滑地震带对齐。我们将这个广泛的剪切带解释为塔里木盆地顺时针旋转的结果，该旋转驱动了神秘剪切带东南部天山部分的东北向东运动。天山内众多盆地边界断层上的共轭走滑成分可能促进了这种逃逸。天山现今的垂直变形是构造、气候和人为强迫综合作用的结果，其中最高峰的隆起是由沿南倾那拉提断层的逆冲推动的，而冰川消融可能会促进这一逆冲。

title: Lengthened autumn growing season contributes substantially to Earth’s greening
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Terrestrial ecosystems have become greener over the years through two different processes: increasing maximum greenness or extending growing season. The integrated signal of these two processes has resulted in a persistent increase in Earth’s greenness, which serves as key evidence of contemporary global change. However, it remains unclear which process has predominantly driven Earth’s greening, as the mechanisms underlying increased maximum greenness and growing season extension are distinct. Here, we decompose long-term satellite greenness observations and quantify the respective contributions of maximum greenness and growing season length to Earth’s greening. We find that greening in non-forest areas is dominated by increased maximum greenness induced by elevated carbon dioxide and land use change, while greening in extra-tropical forests is primarily driven by growing season extension, particularly a lengthened autumn growing season associated with climate change and elevated carbon dioxide. This substantial contribution of autumn phenology to global greening is not captured by current dynamic global vegetation models, which typically attribute greening to increased maximum greenness. Our study provides a critical process-based examination of global greenness change and highlights the key role of autumn phenology in driving Earth’s greening.
title_zh: 秋季生长季节的延长大大促进了地球的绿化
abstract_zh: 多年来，陆地生态系统通过两个不同的过程变得更加绿色：增加最大绿度或延长生长季节。这两个过程的综合信号导致地球绿色度持续增加，这是当代全球变化的关键证据。然而，目前尚不清楚哪个过程主要推动了地球的绿化，因为最大绿化增加和生长季节延长的机制是不同的。在这里，我们分解了长期的卫星绿化观测结果，并量化了最大绿化度和生长季节长度各自对地球绿化的贡献。我们发现，非森林地区的绿化主要是由于二氧化碳升高和土地利用变化引起的最大绿化度增加，而温带森林的绿化主要是由生长季节延长驱动的，特别是与气候变化和二氧化碳升高相关的秋季生长季节延长。当前的动态全球植被模型并未捕捉到秋季物候对全球绿化的重大贡献，该模型通常将绿化归因于最大绿化度的增加。我们的研究对全球绿化变化进行了基于关键过程的检查，并强调了秋季物候在推动地球绿化方面的关键作用。

title: Daily briefing: Can the world finally eradicate polio?
source: Nature
abstract: Some researchers think the current eradication strategy is outdated. Plus, goats hurt their brains when they butt heads and what scientist will never hand over to AI.
title_zh: 每日简报：世界最终能根除脊髓灰质炎吗？
abstract_zh: 一些研究人员认为目前的根除策略已经过时。另外，山羊撞头时会伤害大脑，而科学家永远不会将这一点交给人工智能。

title: Cygnus X-3: A variable petaelectronvolt γ-ray source
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: We report the discovery of variable γ-rays up to petaelectronvolt (PeV; $\rm 1 \, PeV = 10^{15} \, eV$) from Cygnus X-3, an iconic X-ray binary. The γ-ray signal was detected with a statistical significance of approximately 10σ by the Large High Altitude Air Shower Observatory (LHAASO). Its intrinsic spectral energy distribution, extending from 0.06 PeV to 3.7 PeV, shows a pronounced rise toward 1 PeV after accounting for γ-γ absorption by the cosmic microwave background radiation. We find variability on month-long timescales at a significance of 8.6σ, coinciding with a high state of the GeV γ-ray flux detected by the Fermi-LAT. This, together with a 3.2σ evidence for orbital modulation, suggests that the PeV γ-rays originate within, or in close proximity to, the binary system itself. The observed energy spectrum and temporal modulation can be naturally explained by γ-ray production through hadronic processes in the innermost region of the relativistic jet, where protons are accelerated to tens of PeV energies.
title_zh: Cygnus X-3：可变拍电子伏特 γ 射线源
abstract_zh: 我们报告从标志性 X 射线双星天鹅座 X-3 发现了高达千万亿电子伏特 (PeV; $\rm 1 \, PeV = 10^{15} \, eV$) 的可变 γ 射线。大型高空空气簇射天文台（LHAASO）检测到的γ射线信号具有大约10σ的统计显着性。其固有光谱能量分布从 0.06 PeV 延伸到 3.7 PeV，在考虑了宇宙微波背景辐射的 γ-γ 吸收后，显示出向 1 PeV 的显着上升。我们发现一个月时间尺度上的变异性显着性为 8.6σ，与费米 LAT 检测到的 GeV γ 射线通量的高态一致。这与轨道调制的 3.2σ 证据一起表明，PeV γ 射线起源于双星系统本身或非常接近双星系统本身。观测到的能谱和时间调制可以自然地用相对论射流最内部区域的强子过程产生的γ射线来解释，在该区域质子被加速到数十PeV能量。

title: Aggregation affords productive photocatalysis
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Organic photocatalysis offers a promising route for solar-to-chemical energy conversion, yet excited-state deactivation, particularly upon aggregation, often limits efficiencies. Now, supramolecular dye polymers exploit aggregation, through excited-state confinement and molecular rigidification, for improved photochemical reactivity.
title_zh: 聚集提供高效的光催化作用
abstract_zh: 有机光催化为太阳能到化学能的转化提供了一条有前途的途径，但激发态失活，特别是在聚集时，通常会限制效率。现在，超分子染料聚合物通过激发态限制和分子刚性来利用聚集来提高光化学反应性。

title: A versatile strategy for oligonucleotide functionalization via on-support phosphitylation
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Chemically modified nucleic acids such as antisense oligonucleotides, small interfering RNA and CRISPR guide RNA have emerged as transformative modalities in modern medicine, providing new strategies for the treatment of genetic and metabolic disorders, viral infections and cancer. However, their application is limited by challenges related to intracellular delivery and targeting, advances in which would benefit from a broader range of methods for chemical functionalization. Here we describe a streamlined approach using inexpensive, bench-stable alcohols or nucleosides that enables site-selective modification at the 5′ and 3′ termini and at internal sites of synthetic oligonucleotides. Our strategy offers a conceptually straightforward solution to this problem through the in situ generation of phosphoramidites on the solid-supported oligonucleotide. The methodology displays high coupling efficiency, high functional-group compatibility with azides, amines and thiols, and efficient recovery of excess alcohols/monomers, thus offering a robust platform for advancing and diversifying therapeutic oligonucleotide modification.
title_zh: 通过支持物磷酸化实现寡核苷酸功能化的通用策略
abstract_zh: 反义寡核苷酸、小干扰RNA和CRISPR指导RNA等化学修饰核酸已成为现代医学的变革方式，为治疗遗传和代谢紊乱、病毒感染和癌症提供了新策略。然而，它们的应用受到与细胞内递送和靶向相关的挑战的限制，这些进展将受益于更广泛的化学功能化方法。在这里，我们描述了一种使用廉价、实验室稳定的醇或核苷的简化方法，该方法能够在合成寡核苷酸的 5' 和 3' 末端以及内部位点进行位点选择性修饰。我们的策略通过在固体支持的寡核苷酸上原位生成亚磷酰胺，为该问题提供了概念上简单的解决方案。该方法显示出高偶联效率、与叠氮化物、胺和硫醇的高官能团相容性以及过量醇/单体的有效回收，从而为推进和多样化治疗性寡核苷酸修饰提供了强大的平台。

title: Highly chemoselective access to alkyl-sulfur compounds via N2 extrusion of alkyl hydrazines
source: Nature Chemistry
abstract: Sulfur(VI)-containing functional groups, such as sulfonamides, sulfinates and sulfonyl fluorides, are ubiquitous in pharmaceuticals, where they confer unique physicochemical properties that enhance metabolic stability, solubility and bioactivity across diverse therapeutic areas. Despite their prevalence, synthetic access to alkyl-sulfur(VI) derivatives remains fragmented, often requiring multi-step sequences from scarce precursors or harsh conditions that limit functional-group tolerance and scalability. Here we report a unified platform that enables divergent synthesis of alkyl-sulfur(VI) compounds from abundant, unactivated feedstocks including ketones, alcohols, amines and other structurally complex molecules. Central to this method is the use of alkyl hydrazines (or their sulfonylated derivatives) as practical radical precursors. Upon simple thermal activation, these hydrazines undergo efficient homolysis to generate alkyl radicals under mild and operationally simple conditions, without the need for photocatalysts, expensive metals or reagents and elaborate setups. Over 70 sulfur-containing molecules are synthesized, including direct functionalization of complex natural products without resorting to protecting group chemistry.
title_zh: 通过烷基肼的 N2 挤出高度化学选择性地获得烷基硫化合物
abstract_zh: 含硫 (VI) 的官能团，如磺酰胺、亚磺酸盐和磺酰氟，在药物中普遍存在，它们赋予独特的理化性质，可增强不同治疗领域的代谢稳定性、溶解度和生物活性。尽管其普遍存在，但烷基硫 (VI) 衍生物的合成仍然是碎片化的，通常需要从稀缺的前体或限制官能团耐受性和可扩展性的恶劣条件中进行多步骤序列。在这里，我们报告了一个统一的平台，可以从丰富的未活化原料（包括酮、醇、胺和其他结构复杂的分子）中分离合成烷基硫（VI）化合物。该方法的核心是使用烷基肼（或其磺酰化衍生物）作为实用的自由基前体。经过简单的热活化，这些肼在温和且操作简单的条件下进行有效的均解，产生烷基自由基，无需光催化剂、昂贵的金属或试剂以及复杂的装置。合成了 70 多种含硫分子，包括复杂天然产物的直接官能化，无需借助保护基化学。

title: Achieving accelerated electrochemical kinetics in lithium–sulfur batteries by regulating the asymmetry factor g of chiral catalysts
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Manipulating electron spin is an effective approach to enhancing the activity of catalysts. However, progress remains limited by the lack of stable and universally strategies. Here, we report an innovative strategy to regulate the spin state of Co3O4 that relies on the chiral-induced spin selectivity effect, whereby modulation of the chiral asymmetric factor g through an external magnetic field enables elucidation of its intrinsic correlation with catalytic performance. The experimental results demonstrate that chiral Co3O4 nanoparticles used as separator modifiers in lithium–sulfur batteries exhibits superior performance compared to achiral Co3O4. Moreover, we demonstrate a linear positive correlation between the g factor of chiral nanoparticles and the catalytic performance. Theory calculations reveal that the improved electrochemical performance primarily arises from an upshift of the Co d band center, which effectively regulates interfacial charge transfer kinetics. These findings provide guidance for the rational design of Li–S catalysts through electron spin engineering.
title_zh: 通过调节手性催化剂的不对称因子 g 实现锂硫电池的加速电化学动力学
abstract_zh: 操纵电子自旋是增强催化剂活性的有效方法。然而，由于缺乏稳定和普遍的战略，进展仍然受到限制。在这里，我们报告了一种调节 Co3O4 自旋状态的创新策略，该策略依赖于手性诱导的自旋选择性效应，通过外部磁场调节手性不对称因子 g 能够阐明其与催化性能的内在相关性。实验结果表明，与非手性 Co3O4 相比，手性 Co3O4 纳米粒子用作锂硫电池隔膜改性剂表现出更优越的性能。此外，我们证明了手性纳米颗粒的 g 因子与催化性能之间存在线性正相关。理论计算表明，电化学性能的改善主要源于Co d带中心的上移，这有效地调节了界面电荷转移动力学。这些发现为通过电子自旋工程合理设计Li-S催化剂提供了指导。

title: Composition-engineered intrinsic stability in 2D perovskite optoelectronic synapses for neuromorphic vision
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Operational instability remains a key obstacle for halide perovskites in neuromorphic optoelectronics, where sustained and reproducible photoresponses are required for in-sensor computing. Here we report vapor-phase growth of composition-tunable two-dimensional (2D) inorganic perovskites, CsxRb1−xPbBr3 (0 ≤ x ≤ 1), and show that A-site cation alloying provides an effective route to simultaneously improve optical performance and structural robustness. By mapping the full Cs-Rb compositional space, we identify a narrow intermediate regime (x ≈ 0.8) where lattice strain is minimized and defect formation is suppressed. Perovskites in this regime exhibit substantially enhanced resistance to moisture, thermal stress, and ion migration compared with either end member. These stability gains translate directly to device operation, enabling broadband photodetectors with fast response, high reproducibility, and long-term durability. Using the optimized Cs0.81Rb0.19PbBr3 composition, we further demonstrate optoelectronic synaptic devices that reproduce key synaptic functions, including paired-pulse facilitation (PPF) and light-programmable synaptic weights. Integrated into a spiking neural network (SNN), the devices enable real-time fire detection with 85% accuracy while maintaining stable performance over seven days. This work establishes composition-engineered 2D inorganic perovskites as a robust platform for neuromorphic vision and energy-efficient in-sensor computing.
title_zh: 用于神经形态视觉的二维钙钛矿光电突触的成分工程内在稳定性
abstract_zh: 操作不稳定性仍然是卤化物钙钛矿在神经形态光电子学中的一个主要障碍，其中传感器内计算需要持续且可重复的光响应。在这里，我们报告了成分可调的二维（2D）无机钙钛矿 CsxRb1−xPbBr3 (0 ≤ x ≤ 1) 的气相生长，并表明 A 位阳离子合金化提供了同时提高光学性能和结构鲁棒性的有效途径。通过绘制完整的 Cs-Rb 组成空间，我们确定了一个狭窄的中间区域 (x ≈ 0.8)，其中晶格应变最小化，缺陷形成受到抑制。与任一端部成员相比，该状态下的钙钛矿表现出显着增强的耐湿气、热应力和离子迁移能力。这些稳定性增益直接转化为设备操作，使宽带光电探测器具有快速响应、高再现性和长期耐用性。使用优化的 Cs0.81Rb0.19PbBr3 组合物，我们进一步展示了能够重现关键突触功能的光电突触装置，包括配对脉冲促进（PPF）和光可编程突触权重。这些设备集成到尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 中，能够以 85% 的准确度实现实时火灾检测，同时在 7 天内保持稳定的性能。这项工作将成分工程的二维无机钙钛矿建立为神经形态视觉和节能传感器内计算的强大平台。

title: Thermal evaporation routes for perovskite photovoltaics, from fundamentals to integration
source: Joule
abstract: Thermal evaporation offers a solvent-free route for constructing perovskite solar cells and tandem stacks with controlled film growth, interfaces, and layer thickness. This review explains how co-evaporation, sequential evaporation, and hybrid vapor-based processing support multilayer and large-area integration. It identifies source stability, deposition rate, material utilization, and large-area uniformity as key hurdles for translating efficient devices into scalable modules.
title_zh: 钙钛矿光伏的热蒸发路线，从基础到集成
abstract_zh: 热蒸发为构建具有受控薄膜生长、界面和层厚度的钙钛矿太阳能电池和串联堆叠提供了一种无溶剂途径。本综述解释了共蒸发、顺序蒸发和混合蒸汽处理如何支持多层和大面积集成。它将源稳定性、沉积速率、材料利用率和大面积均匀性视为将高效设备转化为可扩展模块的关键障碍。

title: Regional drivers and contributors to changes in life expectancy across Asia
source: Nature
abstract: Life expectancy in Asia has increased substantially since 1990, but the gains have varied considerably across regions and countries. The main causes and risk factors have been identified, highlighting regions in which preventable deaths are concentrated. The patterns of increases and decreases in life expectancy across Asia reveal the factors that contributed to these changes.
title_zh: 亚洲预期寿命变化的区域驱动因素和贡献者
abstract_zh: 自 1990 年以来，亚洲的预期寿命大幅提高，但不同地区和国家的增幅差异很大。主要原因和风险因素已经确定，突出显示了可预防死亡集中的地区。亚洲各地预期寿命增加和减少的模式揭示了导致这些变化的因素。

title: High-resolution full-colour displays from cracking-assisted transfer printing of quantum dot light-emitting diodes
source: Nature Electronics
abstract: Environmentally friendly, full-colour displays based on quantum dot light-emitting diodes have been limited by the difficulty of patterning quantum dots at high resolution. A cracking-assisted transfer printing method enables ultra-high-resolution patterning of cadmium-free red, green and blue quantum dot nanopixels, paving the way for full-colour active-matrix displays with an extremely wide colour gamut.
title_zh: 通过量子点发光二极管的裂解辅助转移印刷实现高分辨率全彩显示器
abstract_zh: 基于量子点发光二极管的环保全彩显示器由于难以以高分辨率对量子点进行图案化而受到限制。一种裂纹辅助转移印刷方法能够实现无镉红、绿、蓝量子点纳米像素的超高分辨率图案化，为具有极宽色域的全彩有源矩阵显示器铺平了道路。

title: Nanoscale additive manufacturing of metals, alloys, and metal oxides
source: Nature Reviews Materials
abstract: Nanoscale metallic systems exhibit distinct material properties from their bulk counterparts, which can be amplified by nanoarchitecting complex 3D shapes to exploit emergent structure–property relationships. Advances in nanoscale additive manufacturing techniques have enabled freeform 3D nanostructuring of a broad library of metallic systems, including pure metals, multicomponent alloys, and metal oxides. These methods can be broadly divided into optical printing, which uses two-photon lithography with metallic precursors, and physical deposition methods, which use confined electrochemical or physical deposition. The beneficial properties of the resulting nanostructured metallic systems facilitate next-generation designs for various applications including nanostructured metamaterials with exceptional mechanical properties; microrobots and nanorobots capable of efficient propulsion and manoeuvrability in confined fluids; hierarchically structured electrocatalytic cells with enhanced reaction kinetics; and photonic metamaterials with deep subwavelength features that can precisely control light–matter interactions. This Review outlines metallic nanoscale additive manufacturing techniques and emergent applications. We also discuss future opportunities and challenges, including design of multimaterial devices, pathways to scalability and integration with other nanomanufacturing techniques, providing a roadmap towards widespread implementation of 3D nanoscale metallic systems.
title_zh: 金属、合金和金属氧化物的纳米级增材制造
abstract_zh: 纳米级金属系统表现出与块状金属系统不同的材料特性，可以通过纳米结构复杂的 3D 形状来放大这些特性，以利用新兴的结构-特性关系。纳米级增材制造技术的进步使得广泛的金属系统库能够实现自由形式的 3D 纳米结构，包括纯金属、多组分合金和金属氧化物。这些方法可大致分为光学印刷（使用金属前体的双光子光刻）和物理沉积方法（使用受限电化学或物理沉积）。由此产生的纳米结构金属系统的有益特性有利于各种应用的下一代设计，包括具有卓越机械性能的纳米结构超材料；微型机器人和纳米机器人能够在受限流体中高效推进和机动；具有增强反应动力学的分层结构电催化电池；以及具有深亚波长特征的光子超材料，可以精确控制光与物质的相互作用。本综述概述了金属纳米级增材制造技术和新兴应用。我们还讨论了未来的机遇和挑战，包括多材料设备的设计、可扩展性的途径以及与其他纳米制造技术的集成，为广泛实施 3D 纳米级金属系统提供了路线图。
