title: Encoding Biological Selectivity Through Positional Isomerism of Phosphindole Oxide AIEgens for Targeted Photodynamic Therapy
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Discriminating biological targets via their intrinsic biophysical signatures offers a promising alternative to classical lock‐and‐key recognition, yet remains constrained by simplistic design. Herein, we present a programmable molecular strategy that leverages configurational isomerism on a phosphindole oxide (PIO) scaffold as a decisive variable for encoding biological selectivity. Strategic substitution at geometrically defined positions generates isomeric pairs with distinct conformational preferences, aqueous self‐assembly behaviors, and surface electrostatic landscapes. These isomer‐dependent divergences translate into sharply differentiated biological staining patterns. One isomer enables selective labeling of cancer over normal mammalian cells and preferential engagement with bacterial versus mammalian cells, while its counterpart functions as a broad‐spectrum staining agent. By integrating with the inherent photodynamic activity of the PIO framework, we achieve effective tumor suppression and accelerated healing of infected wounds in vivo with favorable biosafety. This work establishes positional isomerism as a generalizable design dimension for encoding biophysical selectivity, providing molecular‐level guidance for next‐generation theranostic and precision medicine platforms.
title_zh: 通过氧化膦吲哚 AIEgens 的位置异构编码生物选择性，用于靶向光动力治疗
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  通过其内在的生物物理特征来区分生物目标，为经典的锁钥匙识别提供了一种有前途的替代方案，但仍然受到简单化设计的限制。在此，我们提出了一种可编程分子策略，利用氧化膦吲哚（PIO）支架上的构型异构作为编码生物选择性的决定性变量。几何定义位置的策略取代产生具有不同构象偏好、水自组装行为和表面静电景观的异构体对。这些异构体依赖性差异转化为截然不同的生物染色模式。一种异构体能够比正常哺乳动物细胞选择性地标记癌症，并比哺乳动物细胞优先与细菌结合，而其对应物则充当广谱染色剂。通过与PIO框架固有的光动力活性相结合，我们实现了有效的肿瘤抑制和加速体内感染伤口的愈合，并具有良好的生物安全性。这项工作将位置异构建立为编码生物物理选择性的通用设计维度，为下一代治疗诊断和精准医学平台提供分子水平的指导。

title: Twist Engineering of Photonic Crystal Cavities for Ultralow‐Threshold Continuous‐Wave WS2 Nanolasers at Room Temperature
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Owing to their dangling‐bond‐free surfaces and strong excitonic effects, monolayer transition‐metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) hold promise for ultra‐low‐threshold heterogeneously integrated nanolasers. However, despite extensive demonstrations of TMD‐based nanolasers, further reduction of the lasing threshold is hindered by the challenge of simultaneously achieving an ultra‐small mode volume and an ultra‐high quality (Q) factor in conventional optical cavities. Moreover, the dielectric interfaces of these cavities induce strong dielectric screening and defect‐assisted nonradiative exciton recombination, both of which severely suppress exciton emission in monolayer TMDs. Here, we overcome these fundamental limitations by employing the air modes in a twisted lattice nanocavity. By twisting two finite‐sized hexagonal photonic crystal structures in a single layer of SiN
                    
                      x
                    
                    thin film, we introduce a radial, quasi‐continuous gradient in the air‐filling fraction, thereby forming a radially graded bandgap. This graded bandgap acts as concentric mirrors that tightly confine Bloch modes at the
                    K
                    ‐point, yielding air modes with extreme field confinement in the air and ultra‐high Q factors. By integrating a monolayer WS
                    2
                    with the twisted lattice SiN
                    
                      x
                    
                    nanocavity, we experimentally achieve a record‐low lasing threshold of 0.03 W/cm
                    2
                    at room temperature. Our work establishes a versatile platform for advanced two‐dimensional (2D) semiconductor light sources.

title: Dynamic Polymers Based on Coordination Bonds
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Dynamic polymers have attracted extensive attention in recent years due to their unique roles in intelligent, responsive and sustainable materials. Based on the reversibility and high tunability, the metal–ligand coordination bond is demonstrated to be effective for constructing various dynamic polymers, including self‐healing, recyclable, shape‐memory, responsive, and adaptive materials. With the assistance of functional metal ions or ligands, dynamic polymers within coordination bonds can exhibit diverse functions such as luminescence, magnetism, catalysis, conductivity, and dielectrics for applications. In this study, the recent development and achievements in coordination‐based dynamic polymers are presented. The advantages of coordination bonds in designing dynamic polymers are highlighted, and the functions and applications of each dynamic polymer are summarized. Finally, we discuss the current challenges and provide an outlook on the opportunities and promising directions for the future development of the dynamic polymers based on coordination bonds.
title_zh: 基于配位键的动态聚合物
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  动态聚合物由于其在智能、响应性和可持续材料中的独特作用，近年来引起了广泛的关注。基于可逆性和高可调性，金属-配体配位键被证明可有效构建各种动态聚合物，包括自修复、可回收、形状记忆、响应性和适应性材料。在功能性金属离子或配体的帮助下，配位键内的动态聚合物可以表现出多种功能，例如发光、磁性、催化、导电和介电等应用。在这项研究中，介绍了基于配位的动态聚合物的最新发展和成就。重点介绍了配位键在动态聚合物设计中的优势，总结了各种动态聚合物的功能和应用。最后，我们讨论了当前的挑战，并展望了基于配位键的动态聚合物未来发展的机遇和有前景的方向。

title: Chemical‐Sensing Catheters for Long‐Term and Personalized Therapeutic Management
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Long‐term intravenous catheterization is vital for delivering chemotherapy to cancer patients and parenteral nutrition to those with intestinal failure, but it inevitably leads to complications, including metabolic disorders, bloodstream infection, liver injury, and kidney injury. Clinical monitoring methods show notable delays, while real‐time blood monitoring devices fail to ensure long‐term stability in vivo. Here, we present a chemical‐sensing catheter that integrates multiple analyte sensors, including creatinine, taurocholic acid, bilirubin, and taurine, for real‐time monitoring of complications in patients receiving long‐term chemotherapy or parenteral nutrition in situ. The design of the metalgel preserves signal integrity through 1 million bending deformations, and a dual‐network molecularly imprinted polymer suppresses in vivo performance degradation, enabling stable long‐term operation of the chemical‐sensing catheter over a 3 month implantation period. In chemotherapy and parenteral nutrition applications, early monitoring of liver and kidney injury, combined with prognostic intervention, mitigates risks such as bile stasis, hepatitis, and hepatic steatosis. With the integration of machine learning analysis of multimodal sensor data, this technology provides early prediction of complications and establishes a new paradigm for personalized therapeutic management.
title_zh: 用于长期和个性化治疗管理的化学感应导管
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  长期静脉置管对于癌症患者的化疗和肠衰竭患者的肠外营养至关重要，但它不可避免地会导致并发症，包括代谢紊乱、血流感染、肝损伤和肾损伤。临床监测方法存在明显的延迟，而实时血液监测设备无法确保体内长期稳定性。在这里，我们提出了一种化学传感导管，集成了多种分析物传感器，包括肌酐、牛磺胆酸、胆红素和牛磺酸，用于实时监测接受长期化疗或原位肠外营养的患者的并发症。金属凝胶的设计可通过 100 万次弯曲变形保持信号完整性，双网络分子印迹聚合物可抑制体内性能下降，从而使化学传感导管能够在 3 个月的植入期内长期稳定运行。在化疗和肠外营养应用中，早期监测肝肾损伤，结合预后干预，可以减轻胆汁淤滞、肝炎和肝脂肪变性等风险。通过集成多模态传感器数据的机器学习分析，该技术提供了并发症的早期预测，并为个性化治疗管理建立了新的范例。

title: Controlled Synthesis and Interfacial Bonding of Hexagonal Diamond/Wurtzite Boron Nitride Covalent Heterostructures
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Heterostructures, mediated by either weak van der Waals (vdW) coupling or chemical bonding at the heterointerface, can compensate for the inherent shortcomings of individual components and achieve exotic properties through their effective integration. The isoelectronic diamond and boron nitride (BN) can present both cubic and wurtzite polymorphs and hence prospectively form diverse heterostructures. However, synthesizing the metastable hexagonal diamond/wurtzite BN (HD/wBN) covalent heterostructures and clarifying the interfacial chemical bonds remain great challenges, despite considerable effort. In this study, we have demonstrated the direct synthesis of high‐quality HD/wBN covalent heterostructures via structural transformation of graphite/hBN vdW heterostructures under high pressure and high temperature. Raman and structural characterizations evidently confirmed the sharp HD/wBN heterointerface with both C─B and C─N bonds, attributed to inversion domain boundaries within the wBN phase. The mapped pressure‐temperature diagram exhibited the confined window required for HD/wBN heterostructures. Our work provides a viable pathway to prepare various covalent heterostructures through synergistic phase transitions and opens new opportunities for exploring their pronounced properties.
title_zh: 六方金刚石/纤锌矿氮化硼共价异质结构的控制合成与界面键合
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  由弱范德华（vdW）耦合或异质界面化学键介导的异质结构可以补偿单个组分的固有缺陷，并通过它们的有效集成获得奇异的特性。等电子金刚石和氮化硼（BN）可以呈现立方体和纤锌矿多晶型，因此有望形成不同的异质结构。然而，尽管付出了巨大的努力，合成亚稳态六方金刚石/纤锌矿BN（HD/wBN）共价异质结构并澄清界面化学键仍然是巨大的挑战。在这项研究中，我们证明了通过高压高温下石墨/六方氮化硼vdW异质结构的结构转变，可以直接合成高质量的HD/wBN共价异质结构。拉曼和结构表征明显证实了具有 C─B 和 C─N 键的尖锐 HD/wBN 异质界面，归因于 wBN 相内的反转域边界。映射的压力-温度图显示了 HD/wBN 异质结构所需的受限窗口。我们的工作提供了通过协同相变制备各种共价异质结构的可行途径，并为探索其显着特性开辟了新的机会。

title: From Lab to Fab: Path Forward for Multi‐Scale Design of Industrial Anion Exchange Membrane Electrolyzers
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Anion exchange membrane water electrolysis (AEMWE) has emerged as a pivotal pathway bridging laboratory‐scale research to large‐scale hydrogen production. Nevertheless, its commercialization is constrained by multi‐scale failure mechanisms that operate across scales ranging from atoms to entire systems, including catalyst dissolution and reconstruction, degradation of the three‐phase interface with membrane electrode assemblies, corrosion of bipolar plates, and uneven stack assembly. This review systematically investigates the failure behaviors of AEM electrolyzers across multiple scales and introduces a collaborative design strategy spanning from the atomic to the system level. By integrating innovative membrane‐electrode architectures, biomimetic flow‐field designs, and advanced intelligent control systems, we establish a full‐chain optimization scheme spanning materials, devices, and systems that simultaneously improves current density, durability, and dynamic response. Emphasizing the critical roles of in situ characterization and artificial intelligence in elucidating failure mechanisms and enabling predictive control. This review also provides a systematic multi‐scale design blueprint and a technical pathway for transitioning AEMWE from laboratory‐scale prototypes (“Lab”) to gigawatt‐scale fabrication facilities (“Fab”). Ultimately, it aims to facilitate the adoption of AEMWE as an efficient and reliable industrial solution for the green hydrogen economy.
title_zh: 从实验室到工厂：工业阴离子交换膜电解槽多尺度设计的前进之路
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  阴离子交换膜水电解（AEMWE）已成为连接实验室规模研究和大规模制氢的关键途径。然而，其商业化受到多尺度失效机制的限制，这些失效机制涉及从原子到整个系统的各个尺度，包括催化剂溶解和重构、膜电极组件三相界面的退化、双极板的腐蚀以及不均匀的堆组装。本综述系统地研究了 AEM 电解槽在多个尺度上的失效行为，并引入了从原子级到系统级的协作设计策略。通过集成创新的膜电极架构、仿生流场设计和先进的智能控制系统，我们建立了涵盖材料、器件和系统的全链优化方案，同时提高了电流密度、耐用性和动态响应。强调原位表征和人工智能在阐明故障机制和实现预测控制方面的关键作用。本综述还提供了系统的多尺度设计蓝图以及将 AEMWE 从实验室规模原型（“Lab”）过渡到千兆瓦规模制造设施（“Fab”）的技术途径。最终，它的目标是促进 AEMWE 作为绿色氢经济高效可靠的工业解决方案的采用。

title: Unveiling Transition Dipole Moment Anisotropy and Symmetry Breaking Mechanism in Wurtzite Nitride Toward Polarization‐Sensitive Ultraviolet Detection
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Polarization detection in shortwave spectrum using wurtzite wide‐bandgap semiconductors remains challenging due to the isotropic limitations of conventional polar crystal planes. Nonpolar planes offer a promising route, yet the underlying physical mechanism is unclear. Here, we establish a direct correlation between crystallographic polarity and anisotropic photoresponse on nonpolar a‐plane GaN, demonstrating an intrinsic polarization‐sensitive photodetection scheme. Crystal‐field‐induced valence band splitting yields distinct transition dipole moments from heavy‐hole and crystal field split‐off bands to the conduction band minimum, enabling selective absorption for light polarized perpendicular or parallel to the c‐axis. Using the nonpolar plane of GaN, electron transition probability between the heavy‐hole band and conduction band minimum for polarization perpendicular to the c‐axis is selectively enhanced, governing polarization‐angle‐dependent absorption. Our device achieves a high dichroic ratio of 3.79 (318% higher than c‐plane) and an ultrafast response speed of 1.7 µs at 10 V, surpassing conventional polar‐plane architectures and prior polarization‐sensitive detectors. Furthermore, by introducing an oxygen injection layer to strategically break lattice symmetry, anisotropic charge density distribution around oxygen atoms further enhances the dichroic ratio. Exceptional polarization discrimination is validated in single‐pixel polarized imaging and intensity/polarization binary‐channel optical communication encryption. This work establishes a material‐intrinsic paradigm for high‐sensitivity polarization detection, offering new perspectives for multidimensional optoelectronics.
title_zh: 揭示纤锌矿氮化物中的跃迁偶极矩各向异性和对称性破缺机制，实现偏振敏感的紫外检测
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  由于传统极性晶面的各向同性限制，使用纤锌矿宽带隙半导体进行短波光谱的偏振检测仍然具有挑战性。非极位面提供了一条有希望的路线，但其潜在的物理机制尚不清楚。在这里，我们在非极性 a 平面 GaN 上建立了晶体极性和各向异性光响应之间的直接相关性，展示了固有的偏振敏感光电检测方案。晶体场引起的价带分裂产生从重空穴和晶体场分裂带到导带最小值的明显跃迁偶极矩，从而能够选择性吸收垂直或平行于 c 轴的偏振光。利用 GaN 的非极性平面，垂直于 c 轴的极化的重空穴带和导带最小值之间的电子跃迁概率被选择性地增强，从而控制与极化角度相关的吸收。我们的器件实现了 3.79 的高二向色比（比 c 平面高 318%）和 10 V 下 1.7 µs 的超快响应速度，超越了传统的极平面架构和先前的偏振敏感探测器。此外，通过引入氧注入层来策略性地打破晶格对称性，氧原子周围的各向异性电荷密度分布进一步增强了二色性比。卓越的偏振辨别能力在单像素偏振成像和强度/偏振二元通道光通信加密中得到了验证。这项工作建立了

title: Solvent‐Anchored Electrolyte Enables Stable Operation of 600 Wh Kg−1 Lithium Metal Pouch Cells Under High‐Voltage
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Lithium metal batteries (LMBs) are regarded as promising candidates for next‐generation high‐energy‐density storage systems. However, their practical application is severely hindered by rapid performance degradation under high‐voltage and lean‐electrolyte conditions. Constructing an anion‐enriched solvation structure to generate an inorganic‐rich solid electrolyte interphase (SEI) is critical for ensuring the stable operation of lithium metal batteries. Herein, a novel anion‐enrichment strategy is proposed by introducing a rigid cationic species (F‐TEDA
                    +
                    ) as a molecular anchoring additive to design a solvent‐anchored electrolyte (SAE). F‐TEDA
                    +
                    anchors solvent molecules via strong ion–dipole interactions, enabling the formation of an anion‐enriched solvation structure comparable to that of high‐concentration electrolytes, even at an ultralow additive dosage and conventional salt concentration. Notably, the rigid molecular framework of F‐TEDA
                    +
                    endows it with excellent electrochemical stability, allowing persistent regulation of the solvation structure during long‐term cycling. As a result, a 14.2 Ah Li‖Ni95 pouch cell reaches 615.3 Wh kg
                    −1
                    and retains 91.4% capacity after 70 cycles at 4.5 V. This work proposes a nonconsumable solvation regulation strategy, providing a new avenue for the development of high‐voltage, high‐energy‐density lithium metal batteries.
title_zh: 溶剂锚定电解质使 600 Wh Kg−1 锂金属软包电池在高压下稳定运行
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    锂金属电池（LMB）被认为是下一代高能量密度存储系统的有希望的候选者。然而，它们的实际应用受到高电压和贫电解质条件下性能快速下降的严重阻碍。构建富含阴离子的溶剂化结构以生成富含无机物的固体电解质界面（SEI）对于确保锂金属电池的稳定运行至关重要。在此，通过引入刚性阳离子物质（F-TEDA
                    +
                    ）作为分子锚定添加剂来设计溶剂锚定电解质（SAE）。 F-泰达
                    +
                    通过强离子-偶极相互作用锚定溶剂分子，即使在超低添加剂剂量和常规盐浓度下，也能形成与高浓度电解质相当的富含阴离子的溶剂化结构。值得注意的是，F-TEDA 的刚性分子框架
                    +
                    赋予其优异的电化学稳定性，允许在长期循环过程中持续调节溶剂化结构。结果，14.2 Ah Li‖Ni95 软包电池达到 615.3 Wh kg
                    −1
                    在4.5 V下循环70次后容量仍保持在91.4%。这项工作提出了一种非消耗性溶剂化调节策略，为高电压、高能量密度锂金属电池的开发提供了新途径。

title: Parity‐Anomaly Quantum Anomalous Hall State in Mechanically Assembled Topological Insulator/Magnet Heterostructures
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    The family of quantized anomalous Hall effects provides remarkable electronic properties—for example, current flow perpendicular to the voltage and, in some cases, dissipationless edge states even with zero applied magnetic field,
                    B
                    —but their development is limited by their realization only at very low temperatures. The state of the art in magnetically‐doped topological insulators (TIs) currently allows quantized Hall conductivities to persist up to temperatures of several Kelvin. An alternative approach, proximity‐coupled TI/magnet heterostructures made using a chemically separate magnet, has up until now been more limited, with Hall quantization either completely absent or present only below 100 mK at
                    B
                    = 0. Here, we demonstrate one in the family of quantized anomalous Hall effects, the parity anomaly state (with Hall conductivity
                    e
                    2
                    /2h) at temperatures up to 10 K in TI/magnet bilayers made by mechanical assembly of van der Waals layers. This represents an enhancement by a factor of 100 compared to previous proximity‐coupled heterostructures grown by deposition.
title_zh: 机械组装拓扑绝缘体/磁体异质结构中的宇称反常量子反常霍尔态
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    量子化反常霍尔效应系列提供了显着的电子特性，例如，垂直于电压的电流，在某些情况下，即使施加的磁场为零，也能产生无耗散的边缘态，
                    乙
                    ——但它们的发展受到限制，因为它们只能在非常低的温度下实现。目前，磁掺杂拓扑绝缘体 (TI) 的最新技术允许量子化霍尔电导率在高达几个开尔文的温度下持续存在。另一种方法是使用化学上分离的磁体制成的邻近耦合 TI/磁体异质结构，但迄今为止仍受到更多限制，霍尔量子化要么完全不存在，要么仅在 100 mK 以下
                    乙
                    = 0。在这里，我们展示了量子化反常霍尔效应家族中的一种，即奇偶校验反常态（霍尔电导率
                    e
                    2
                    /2h）在温度高达 10 K 的 TI/磁体双层中通过机械组装范德华层制成。与之前通过沉积生长的邻近耦合异质结构相比，这意味着增强了 100 倍。

title: Thermally Independent Interfacial Reconstruction for Phase‐Pure n = 1 2D Perovskites With Mixed‐Orientation Surface Architecture
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  
                    Two‐dimensional (2D) perovskites are widely employed to enhance the efficiency and stability of perovskite solar cells (PSCs); however, their formation typically relies on thermal annealing, which can degrade the underlying three‐dimensional (3D) perovskite and lead to poorly defined phases. In addition, their intrinsically low out‐of‐plane conductivity imposes a trade‐off between improved stability and efficient charge transport. Here, a thermally independent interfacial reconstruction strategy is reported to enable the phase‐selective formation of phase‐pure
                    n
                    = 1 2D perovskites without thermal activation. This approach suppresses thermally induced degradation and prevents the formation of higher‐n or mixed‐phase intermediates. The resulting 2D perovskite exhibits a mixed‐orientation architecture, comprising domains parallel and tilted relative to the underlying 3D lattice. This structural configuration simultaneously enables effective surface passivation and ion‐blocking while maintaining efficient vertical charge transport, thereby overcoming the stability‐transport trade‐off. As a result, the optimized PSCs achieve a champion efficiency of 26.61% and retain over 98% of their initial performance after 2000 h of continuous maximum power point tracking. In contrast, the control devices exhibit inferior efficiency and accelerated degradation under identical conditions. This work establishes a nonthermal pathway to reconcile stability and charge transport in perovskite optoelectronics.
title_zh: 具有混合取向表面结构的纯相 n = 1 二维钙钛矿的热独立界面重构
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  
                    二维（2D）钙钛矿被广泛用于提高钙钛矿太阳能电池（PSC）的效率和稳定性；然而，它们的形成通常依赖于热退火，这会降解底层的三维（3D）钙钛矿并导致不明确的相。此外，它们本质上较低的面外电导率需要在提高稳定性和有效电荷传输之间进行权衡。在这里，报道了一种与热无关的界面重建策略，以实现相纯相的选择性形成
                    n
                    = 1 没有热激活的 2D 钙钛矿。这种方法抑制热诱导降解并防止形成高n或混合相中间体。由此产生的 2D 钙钛矿表现出混合取向的结构，包括相对于底层 3D 晶格平行和倾斜的域。这种结构配置同时实现了有效的表面钝化和离子阻挡，同时保持有效的垂直电荷传输，从而克服了稳定性与传输的权衡。结果，优化的 PSC 实现了 26.61% 的冠军效率，并在 2000 小时的连续最大功率点跟踪后保留了 98% 以上的初始性能。相比之下，控制装置在相同条件下表现出较差的效率和加速的退化。这项工作建立了一种非热途径来协调钙钛矿光电子学的稳定性和电荷传输。

title: Emerging Multimodal Artificial Sensory Fusion Paradigms Toward Advanced Embodied Intelligence
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  In the endeavor of embodied intelligence to connect the digital world and physical reality, artificial multimodal sensory fusion has emerged as a cornerstone for endowing agents with robust perception and natural interaction capabilities. Specifically, multisensory fusion constructs a biomimetic sensing framework capable of parallel acquisition and processing of multi‐source information. Such architectures augment information perception and ensure higher decision‐making reliability within complex environments. However, a systematic review of this rapidly evolving field is noticeably absent. This review bridges this gap by providing a comprehensive analysis of various multimodal sensory fusion approaches. We introduce the configurations of multimodal sensory fusion, as well as the operating mechanisms of sensors and artificial synapses. In particular, various biomimetic multimodal fusion paradigms are critically analyzed, such as visual‐tactile and visual‐olfactory fusion, with detailed discussions of their device structure and fusion mechanisms. These multisensory fusion systems show great potential in various application fields. Finally, the emerging opportunities are discussed and outlined. By highlighting the critical potential of multimodal sensing fusion, this review aims to inspire further research on fusion strategies and practical applications, facilitating the evolution of embodied intelligence toward more human level.
title_zh: 新兴的多模态人工感官融合范式迈向高级具身智能
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  在体现智能连接数字世界和物理现实的努力中，人工多模态感知融合已成为赋予智能体强大的感知和自然交互能力的基石。具体来说，多感官融合构建了一个能够并行获取和处理多源信息的仿生传感框架。这种架构增强了信息感知并确保复杂环境中更高的决策可靠性。然而，对这个快速发展的领域的系统回顾却明显缺失。本综述通过对各种多模态感觉融合方法的全面分析来弥补这一差距。我们介绍了多模态感觉融合的配置，以及传感器和人工突触的操作机制。特别是，对各种仿生多模态融合范式进行了批判性分析，例如视觉-触觉和视觉-嗅觉融合，并详细讨论了它们的设备结构和融合机制。这些多感官融合系统在各个应用领域显示出巨大的潜力。最后，讨论并概述了新出现的机会。通过强调多模态传感融合的关键潜力，本综述旨在激发对融合策略和实际应用的进一步研究，促进具身智能向更人类水平的发展。

title: Influence of magnetic shear on kinetic ballooning modes and electromagnetic stellarator turbulence
source: Nuclear Fusion - latest papers
abstract: The influence of magnetic shear on kinetic ballooning modes (KBMs) and electromagnetic turbulence is reported in the Wendelstein 7-X (W7-X) and Heliotron-J (H-J) stellarators. Gyrokinetic simulations at finite normalized plasma pressure reveal that sub-threshold KBMs (stKBMs) are present in all configurations, i.e. KBMs that are resonantly destabilized far below the iMHD limit. A reduced KBM model shows that boosting magnetic shear and weakening bad curvature stabilizes (st)KBMs in stellarator geometry. In nonlinear simulations, instead of undergoing nonlinear electromagnetic stabilization, turbulent fluxes in W7-X increase with when stKBMs are destabilized. Lower-magnetic-shear configurations of W7-X are found to produce lower transport, due to the generation of stronger zonal flows. In H-J, turbulent fluxes reduce with —despite hosting stKBMs—due to a boosted zonal-flow response at higher . This highlights the importance of accounting for both linear and nonlinear dynamics when aiming to improve reactor performance.
title_zh: 磁剪切对动力气球模式和电磁仿星器湍流的影响
abstract_zh: Wendelstein 7-X (W7-X) 和 Heliotron-J (H-J) 仿星器中报道了磁剪切对动能气球模式 (KBM) 和电磁湍流的影响。有限标准化等离子体压力下的回旋动力学模拟表明，亚阈值 KBM (stKBM) 存在于所有配置中，即远低于 iMHD 极限的共振失稳 KBM。简化的 KBM 模型表明，增强磁剪切和减弱不良曲率可以稳定仿星器几何结构中的 (st)KBM。在非线性模拟中，当 stKBM 失稳时，W7-X 中的湍流通量会增加，而不是经历非线性电磁稳定。研究发现，W7-X 的低磁剪切配置会产生较低的传输，因为会产生更强的层流。在 H-J 中，尽管存在 stKBM，湍流通量仍会减少，因为较高的层流响应会增强。这凸显了在提高反应堆性能时考虑线性和非线性动力学的重要性。

title: Low-temperature oxide-ion conduction in Aurivillius-type ((Na0.5Bi0.5)n–1TinO3n)(Bi2O2) phases
source: Nature Energy
abstract: Solid oxide-ion conductors are key functional materials in high-temperature (>500 °C) electrochemical energy technologies, such as solid oxide fuel cells. Operating these devices at lower temperatures could simplify system design, reduce degradation and broaden material options, but few conductors exhibit sufficient ion mobility in this regime. Here we report a family of oxide-ion conductors based on ((Na0.5Bi0.5)n–1TinO3n)(Bi2O2) (where n = 4, 5, 7 and 8) Aurivillius-type thin films with promising low-temperature performance. These Aurivillius phases, characterized by periodic bismuth oxide layers and a tetragonally distorted Na0.5Bi0.5TiO3 lattice, establish well-defined periodic fast ion-conducting channels allowing ionic conductivity of 0.025 S cm−1 at 350 °C. Combining atomic-scale electron ptychography imaging with first-principles calculations, we attribute these intriguing properties to localized lattice stretching and the unique dual-ion conduction pathways induced by the specific bismuth oxide intercalation. Based on this design, we constructed fuel cells that achieve a maximum power density of 0.726 W cm−2 at 400 °C, showing promising potential for technological applications.
title_zh: Aurivilius 型 ((Na0.5Bi0.5)n–1TinO3n)(Bi2O2) 相中的低温氧化物离子传导
abstract_zh: 固体氧化物离子导体是高温（>500°C）电化学能源技术（例如固体氧化物燃料电池）中的关键功能材料。在较低温度下操作这些设备可以简化系统设计，减少退化并扩大材料选择，但很少有导体在这种情况下表现出足够的离子迁移率。在这里，我们报告了一系列基于 ((Na0.5Bi0.5)n–1TinO3n)(Bi2O2)（其中 n = 4、5、7 和 8）Aurivillius 型薄膜的氧化物离子导体，具有良好的低温性能。这些 Aurivilius 相以周期性氧化铋层和四方扭曲的 Na0.5Bi0.5TiO3 晶格为特征，建立了明确的周期性快速离子传导通道，在 350 °C 时离子电导率达到 0.025 S cm−1。将原子级电子叠层成像与第一原理计算相结合，我们将这些有趣的特性归因于局部晶格拉伸和特定氧化铋插层引起的独特双离子传导路径。基于此设计，我们构建的燃料电池在 400 °C 时实现了 0.726 W cm−2 的最大功率密度，显示出良好的技术应用潜力。

title: High-entropy-inspired multi-principal single-atom materials
source: Chem
abstract: Multi-principal single-atom materials (MPSAMs) are inspired by the compositional complexity of high-entropy materials and the site-specific control of single-atom catalysis. This perspective conceptualizes key terminology, examines how high-entropy principles shape atomically dispersed designs, and critically assesses strategies to control atomic arrangements. The discussion explores how MPSAMs support cooperative functions across multiple metal sites within a confined space, enabling reactivity and selectivity unattainable with conventional SAMs. Challenges and future outlooks for entropy-informed catalyst design are further outlined.
title_zh: 高熵启发的多主元单原子材料
abstract_zh: 多主元单原子材料（MPSAM）的灵感来自于高熵材料的组成复杂性和单原子催化的位点特异性控制。这种观点概念化了关键术语，研究了高熵原理如何塑造原子分散的设计，并批判性地评估了控制原子排列的策略。讨论探讨了 MPSAM 如何支持有限空间内多个金属位点的协作功能，从而实现传统 SAM 无法实现的反应性和选择性。进一步概述了熵信息催化剂设计的挑战和未来前景。

title: Van der Waals surface reconstruction for oriented epitaxial growth of two-dimensional metallic oxides
source: Nature Materials
abstract: Hybrid integration of two-dimensional single-crystalline metal oxides, including semiconductors, dielectrics, ferroelectrics and ferromagnetics, with silicon circuits enables functionalities such as spintronics and neuromorphic and quantum computing, forming a key part of the ‘More-than-Moore’ roadmap. However, synthesizing two-dimensional metal oxide single-crystal films has remained challenging. Here we report a van der Waals surface reconstruction of mica for the general large-scale, unidirectional growth of two-dimensional metal oxides (where M = Co, Fe, Ni, Mn) and their doped counterparts, which seamlessly coalesce into single-crystalline films. Quantum mechanics calculations reveal that reconstructing mica’s oxygen atomic plane is critical for achieving the single-crystal epitaxy of these two-dimensional metal oxides. As an example, centimetre-scale two-dimensional Fe-doped CoO single-crystalline films were grown and exhibit room-temperature ferromagnetic semiconductor properties with a high Curie temperature of up to 430 K. These results demonstrate the power of this synthesis strategy, enabling the exploration of two-dimensional metal oxides for quantum physics and spintronics devices.
title_zh: 二维金属氧化物定向外延生长的范德华表面重构
abstract_zh: 二维单晶金属氧化物（包括半导体、电介质、铁电体和铁磁体）与硅电路的混合集成可实现自旋电子学、神经形态和量子计算等功能，形成“超越摩尔”路线图的关键部分。然而，合成二维金属氧化物单晶薄膜仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们报告了云母的范德华表面重建，用于二维金属氧化物（其中M = Co、Fe、Ni、Mn）及其掺杂对应物的一般大规模单向生长，它们无缝地聚结成单晶薄膜。量子力学计算表明，重建云母的氧原子平面对于实现这些二维金属氧化物的单晶外延至关重要。例如，生长了厘米级二维 Fe 掺杂 CoO 单晶薄膜，并表现出室温铁磁半导体特性，居里温度高达 430 K。这些结果证明了这种合成策略的强大功能，使得探索用于量子物理和自旋电子学器件的二维金属氧化物成为可能。

title: Research priorities for addressing global absorbent hygiene product waste
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: A major, yet largely unrecognized, source of plastic waste is absorbent hygiene products, which include child diapers, adult incontinence products and period products. These products contain substantial amounts of plastic, are materially complex and are socially engrained in essential hygiene and healthcare practices. Here we analyse the research priorities to create sustainable systems for absorbent hygiene product provision. The analysis is global and interdisciplinary in scope, addressing nuances in high- and low-income settings, and bringing together behaviour, material, technology, policy and economic challenges. We identify important opportunities for scientists to help avert the unfolding absorbent hygiene product crisis.
title_zh: 解决全球吸收性卫生产品废物问题的研究重点
abstract_zh: A major, yet largely unrecognized, source of plastic waste is absorbent hygiene products, which include child diapers, adult incontinence products and period products. These products contain substantial amounts of plastic, are materially complex and are socially engrained in essential hygiene and healthcare practices.在这里，我们分析了创建吸收性卫生产品供应可持续系统的研究重点。 The analysis is global and interdisciplinary in scope, addressing nuances in high- and low-income settings, and bringing together behaviour, material, technology, policy and economic challenges.我们为科学家找到了帮助避免正在发生的吸收性卫生产品危机的重要机会。

title: On the relevance of post-growth in China
source: Nature Sustainability
abstract: Post-growth refers to approaches prioritizing human well-being and ecological sustainability over gross domestic product expansion as a primary objective of economic policy. While it is widely discussed in the global north and generally targeted at high-income countries, its relevance to China remains underexplored and largely absent from academic discourse. This Perspective discusses China’s position in a possible global post-growth transition and explores convergence and difference between post-growth principles and development priorities in China. We consider how China’s concepts of ‘high-quality development’ and ‘ecological civilization’ could integrate post-growth principles, and vice versa. Understanding China’s context is crucial for a collaborative, effective approach to sustainability and global equity.
title_zh: 论中国后增长的相关性
abstract_zh: 后增长是指将人类福祉和生态可持续性置于国内生产总值扩张之上，作为经济政策的首要目标。虽然它在北半球国家得到了广泛讨论，并且通常针对高收入国家，但它与中国的相关性仍未得到充分探讨，并且在学术讨论中基本上不存在。本视角讨论了中国在可能的全球后增长转型中的地位，并探讨了后增长原则与中国发展重点之间的异同。我们考虑中国的“高质量发展”和“生态文明”理念如何与后增长原则相结合，反之亦然。了解中国的国情对于采取有效的协作方式实现可持续发展和全球公平至关重要。

title: Mafic-ultramafic igneous rocks as a source of reactive phosphorus for the origin of life
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Phosphite and pyrophosphate—reduced and polymerized forms of phosphorus—may have played a central role in prebiotic chemistry owing to their higher reactivity and solubility, yet their geological sources remain uncertain. Here we show that mafic–ultramafic rocks on the early Earth could have provided a sustained source of reactive phosphorus through seafloor weathering. Rock analyses from 15 localities reveal phosphite comprising up to 7%, 24%, 17%, and 0.6% of total phosphorus in olivine separates, peridotite, komatiite, and basalt, respectively, while pyrophosphate accounts for up to 5% and 0.4% in komatiite and basalt. Box-model calculations indicate phosphite concentrations reaching up to 1 µM in the deep ocean and up to 67 µM in lakes under low-UV conditions. We suggest that reactive phosphorus released from mafic–ultramafic rocks could have fuelled prebiotic phosphorylation and supplied phosphate to emerging life on Earth, a process that may also enhance the habitability of other planetary bodies.
title_zh: 镁铁质-超镁铁质火成岩作为生命起源的活性磷来源
abstract_zh: 亚磷酸盐和焦磷酸盐（磷的还原形式和聚合形式）由于其较高的反应性和溶解度，可能在生命起源化学中发挥着核心作用，但它们的地质来源仍然不确定。在这里，我们表明，早期地球上的镁铁质-超镁铁质岩石可能通过海底风化提供了活性磷的持续来源。 15 个地点的岩石分析显示，橄榄石分离物、橄榄岩、科马提岩和玄武岩中，亚磷酸盐含量分别高达 7%、24%、17% 和 0.6%，而焦磷酸盐在科马提岩和玄武岩中的含量分别高达 5% 和 0.4%。盒模型计算表明，在低紫外线条件下，深海中的亚磷酸盐浓度高达 1 µM，湖泊中的亚磷酸盐浓度高达 67 µM。我们认为，镁铁质-超镁铁质岩石释放的活性磷可能促进了生命前的磷酸化，并为地球上的新兴生命提供磷酸盐，这一过程也可能增强其他行星体的宜居性。

title: One-pot synthesis of a long-chain metal-backboned polymer
source: National Science Review Advance Access
abstract: Metal-backboned polymers, featuring backbones composed exclusively of metal atoms interconnected by consecutive metal–metal bonds, have been proposed as a new class of materials for promising applications in optics, electronics, and magnetics; however, they remain unavailable for synthesis. Taking advantage of the long-range aurophilic attraction of gold, we report a straightforward one-pot synthesis method to fabricate metal-backboned polymers. This strategy achieves a degree of polymerization exceeding 50 and stable chain integrity in solution, providing a concise and efficient route for their production. Systematic structural characterizations revealed a one-dimensional Au backbone with continuous Au–Au bonds stabilized by quasi-covalent bonding in synergy with ligand protection. The resulting gold-backboned polymer (GBP) exhibits typical polymer behaviors, including the glass transition temperature and film-forming ability. In addition, GBP exhibits effective electron delocalization, semiconducting properties, and long-wavelength phosphorescence, with a preliminary electroluminescent fiber device demonstrating its potential in flexible optoelectronics. This study establishes a general and efficient route for the synthesis of metal-backboned polymers.
title_zh: 长链金属主链聚合物的一锅法合成
abstract_zh: 金属主链聚合物的主链仅由通过连续金属-金属键互连的金属原子组成，已被提议作为一类新型材料，在光学、电子和磁学方面具有广阔的应用前景。然而，它们仍然无法用于合成。利用金的长程亲金吸引力，我们报告了一种简单的一锅合成方法来制造金属支撑聚合物。该策略实现了超过50的聚合度和溶液中稳定的链完整性，为其生产提供了简洁高效的路线。系统的结构表征揭示了具有连续 Au-Au 键的一维 Au 主链，通过准共价键与配体保护的协同作用稳定。所得金主链聚合物（GBP）表现出典型的聚合物行为，包括玻璃化转变温度和成膜能力。此外，GBP还表现出有效的电子离域、半导体特性和长波长磷光，初步的电致发光光纤器件展示了其在柔性光电子学方面的潜力。这项研究为金属主链聚合物的合成建立了一条通用且有效的路线。

title: Intact-film orthogonal 2D X-ray diffraction mapping for crystallographic homogeneity evaluation in perovskite solar modules
source: Joule
abstract: Kim et al. developed an orthogonal 2D X-ray diffraction mapping technique for non-destructive structural characterization of large-area intact perovskite modules. The platform enables simultaneous spatial visualization of crystallinity, crystal orientation, and residual strain across entire films, revealing how structural homogeneity governs scalable, high-efficiency module fabrication.
title_zh: 用于评估钙钛矿太阳能模块晶体均匀性的完整薄膜正交 2D X 射线衍射图
abstract_zh: 金等人。开发了一种正交二维 X 射线衍射绘图技术，用于大面积完整钙钛矿模块的无损结构表征。该平台能够同时空间可视化整个薄膜的结晶度、晶体取向和残余应变，揭示结构均匀性如何控制可扩展、高效的模块制造。

title: Dynamic delocalization of stress in brittle battery positive electrode active materials by shape-memory polymer nanocoating
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Stress-induced fractures are recognized as a primary cause of degradation in a wide range of positive electrode active materials during battery operation. However, the state-of-the-art mechanistic understanding and strategy development often overlook the brittle nature of these materials, as well as the dynamic and localized characteristics of mechanical stress during the charge and discharge cycles of the cell. Here we present a shape-memory polymer nanocoating method using initiated chemical vapour deposition to dynamically delocalize concentrated stresses in various positive electrode active materials, including Ni-rich layered oxides with different Ni contents and LiFePO4. Fracture simulations and surface-to-bulk physicochemical characterizations collectively show that the balanced stiffness and deformability of the shape-memory polymer nanocoating on the positive electrode material effectively mitigate stress gradients and the consequent surface reconstruction, chemical heterogeneity and intergranular cracking during battery operation. In particular, when a polymeric nanocoated nickel-rich layered oxide positive electrode active material (90 at% of Ni) is tested in non-aqueous lithium metal coin cell configuration at 25 °C, the cells can be consistently charged and discharged over long cycles at moderate (for example, 1,000 cycles at 400 mA g−1) and high (for example, 500 cycles at 1 A g−1) specific currents.
title_zh: 通过形状记忆聚合物纳米涂层实现脆性电池正极活性材料应力的动态离域化
abstract_zh: 应力引起的断裂被认为是电池运行过程中各种正极活性材料降解的主要原因。然而，最先进的机械理解和策略开发往往忽视了这些材料的脆性本质，以及电池充电和放电循环期间机械应力的动态和局部特征。在这里，我们提出了一种形状记忆聚合物纳米涂层方法，使用引发的化学气相沉积来动态地离域各种正极活性材料中的集中应力，包括不同镍含量的富镍层状氧化物和LiFePO4。断裂模拟和表面到本体的物理化学表征共同表明，正极材料上形状记忆聚合物纳米涂层的平衡刚度和变形能力有效减轻了电池运行过程中的应力梯度以及随之而来的表面重构、化学不均匀性和晶间裂纹。特别是，当聚合物纳米涂层富镍层状氧化物正极活性材料（90 at%的Ni）在25°C的非水锂金属纽扣电池配置中进行测试时，电池可以在中等比电流（例如，400 mA g-1下1,000个循环）和高比电流（例如，1 A g-1下500个循环）长循环下持续充电和放电。

title: Immunostimulatory lipogel implant enhances cancer immunotherapy
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Cancer stem-like cells contribute to innate tumour immunoresistance and an immunosuppressive tumour microenvironment, leading to poor responses to immune checkpoint inhibitors. Chemotherapeutic agents can elicit tumour immunogenicity by inducing immunogenic cell death to reinforce the therapeutic efficacies of immune checkpoint inhibitors, but suffer from inefficient immunogenic cell death activation in highly resistant cancer stem-like cells. Here we report an immunostimulatory lyotropic liquid-crystal-based lipogel for localized co-delivery of all-trans retinoic acid, a differentiation-inducing drug, and doxorubicin, an immunogenic-cell-death-inducing chemotherapeutic agent with distinct release kinetics. The lipogel is tailored to release the combinatorial drugs in a differential and sustained manner, which fulfils the requirement for enhanced drug synergism in promoting the immunogenic cell death of cancer stem-like cells. Local implantation of the immunostimulatory lipogel elicits an antitumour immune response that is further augmented by an immune checkpoint inhibitor to suppress tumour growth and metastasis, as well as to prevent post-surgical recurrence in murine models of high-stemness tumours.
title_zh: 免疫刺激脂质凝胶植入物增强癌症免疫治疗
abstract_zh: 癌症干细胞样细胞有助于先天性肿瘤免疫抵抗和免疫抑制肿瘤微环境，导致对免疫检查点抑制剂的反应不佳。化疗药物可以通过诱导免疫原性细胞死亡来引发肿瘤免疫原性，以增强免疫检查点抑制剂的治疗效果，但在高度耐药的癌症干细胞样细胞中，免疫原性细胞死亡激活效率较低。在这里，我们报道了一种基于免疫刺激溶致液晶的脂质凝胶，用于局部共同递送全反式视黄酸（一种分化诱导药物）和多柔比星（一种具有不同释放动力学的免疫原性细胞死亡诱导化疗剂）。脂质凝胶经过定制，以差异化和持续的方式释放组合药物，满足增强药物协同作用以促进癌症干细胞样细胞的免疫原性细胞死亡的要求。免疫刺激脂质凝胶的局部植入会引发抗肿瘤免疫反应，免疫检查点抑制剂进一步增强该反应，以抑制肿瘤生长和转移，并防止高干细胞肿瘤小鼠模型的术后复发。

title: Magnetic brightening and nanoscale imaging of spin-polarized helical edge modes in ZrTe5
source: Nature Nanotechnology
abstract: Efficient charge transport remains a fundamental challenge for nanoelectronic devices, as their performance is constrained by high dissipation and the impedance mismatch between high-frequency signal sources and nanoscale circuit interfaces. Although topologically protected helical edge modes offer a dissipationless and backscattering-resilient alternative, achieving nanoscale control over these modes requires direct visualization of their spatial electrodynamics, especially under high-frequency operation. Here, by utilizing cryogenic magneto-infrared scattering-type scanning near-field optical microscopy (cm-IR-sSNOM), we image spin-polarized helical edge channels in ZrTe5 at the nanoscale, revealing magnetic-field-induced brightening as a high-frequency electrodynamic signature of robust topological edge modes. Operating at 1.8 K and under a magnetic field of up to 5 T, we observe the emergence of edge-state polarizability at infrared frequencies that is notably resilient to the magnetic gaps that typically quench d.c. and microwave edge transport. Our results reveal a topological ‘two-lane’ spatial reorganization in which an external magnetic field induces a spin-population imbalance between counterpropagating edge modes. Favoured helical branches are confined against physical boundaries to activate a net infrared near-field contrast. This electrodynamic response scales linearly with the number of atomic layers, which confirms that individual layers in ZrTe5 preserve their discrete quantum spin Hall identities. These findings may be useful for developing topological spintronic devices, as the magnetic infrared tunability of helical edge channels provides a pathway for low-loss nanoscale interconnects and high-speed information processing.
title_zh: ZrTe5 中自旋极化螺旋边缘模式的磁增亮和纳米级成像
abstract_zh: 高效的电荷传输仍然是纳米电子器件的基本挑战，因为它们的性能受到高耗散以及高频信号源和纳米级电路接口之间的阻抗不匹配的限制。尽管拓扑保护的螺旋边缘模式提供了无耗散和反向散射弹性的替代方案，但实现对这些模式的纳米级控制需要直接可视化其空间电动力学，特别是在高频操作下。在这里，通过利用低温磁红外散射型扫描近场光学显微镜（cm-IR-sSNOM），我们在纳米尺度上对 ZrTe5 中的自旋偏振螺旋边缘通道进行成像，揭示了磁场引起的增亮作为稳健拓扑边缘模式的高频电动特征。在 1.8 K 和高达 5 T 的磁场下工作，我们观察到红外频率下边缘态极化率的出现，该极化率对通常淬灭直流的磁隙具有显着的弹性。和微波边缘传输。我们的结果揭示了拓扑“双车道”空间重组，其中外部磁场引起反向传播边缘模式之间的自旋布居不平衡。有利的螺旋分支被限制在物理边界上，以激活净红外近场对比度。这种电动响应与原子层数呈线性关系，这证实了 ZrTe5 中的各个层保留了其离散的量子自旋霍尔特性。这些发现可能有助于发展拓扑自旋

abstract: A shift from nomadic lifestyles could have triggered linguistic diversity before it then declined rapidly.

title: In situ mapping of late-stage biomechanical coordination during clathrin-mediated endocytosis
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Clathrin-mediated endocytosis (CME) requires precise coordination between membrane deformation and force-generating protein assemblies, yet how these forces are dynamically organized in living cells remains poorly defined. Using multi-dimensional single particle tracking (SPT), we indirectly visualize the mechanical motions of individual clathrin-coated pits during the late stages of CME. We uncover a temporally ordered sequence of rotational behaviors that reflect distinct modes of membrane remodeling preceding vesicle scission. While dynamin-dependent in-plane twisting is a common feature of productive CME events, an additional out-of-plane rotational deformation, hereafter referred to as a “swing” motion, is selectively observed at a subset of endocytic sites that recruit actin. This mechanical heterogeneity correlates with differences in membrane deformation and scission efficiency, rather than representing an obligatory step in CME. By capturing these force-generating transitions in situ and under physiological conditions, our work provides a dynamic, biophysical framework for understanding how endocytic protein machines remodel membranes in living cells.
title_zh: 网格蛋白介导的内吞作用过程中后期生物力学协调的原位绘图
abstract_zh: 网格蛋白介导的内吞作用（CME）需要膜变形和产生力的蛋白质组装之间的精确协调，但这些力如何在活细胞中动态组织仍不清楚。使用多维单粒子跟踪（SPT），我们间接地可视化了 CME 后期各个网格蛋白包被的凹坑的机械运动。我们发现了一个按时间顺序排列的旋转行为序列，反映了囊泡分裂之前膜重塑的不同模式。虽然依赖于动力的面内扭曲是生产性 CME 事件的一个共同特征，但在招募肌动蛋白的内吞位点的子集上选择性地观察到额外的面外旋转变形（以下称为“摆动”运动）。这种机械异质性与膜变形和分裂效率的差异相关，而不是 CME 中的强制性步骤。通过在原位和生理条件下捕获这些力产生的转变，我们的工作提供了一个动态的生物物理框架，用于理解内吞蛋白机器如何重塑活细胞中的膜。

title: Rising stars of mathematics awarded prestigious 2026 Fields Medal
source: Nature
abstract: Two of the four are the first Chinese-born winners of the prize since 1982.
title_zh: 数学新星荣获 2026 年菲尔兹奖
