title: RHOT1/2-driven mitochondrial membrane vesicles confer tumor-homing selectivity and enable in situ cancer vaccination
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The development of in situ tumor vaccines has been limited by the lack of delivery systems with precise tumor selectivity. Here, we show that mitochondria from cancer-associated fibroblasts (CAFs) exhibit an efficient tumor-homing property. We find that enrichment of the RHOT1/2 complex on the mitochondria mediates selective uptake by cancer cells through ITSN1-dependent clathrin endocytosis. Using this insight, we engineer RHOT1/2-enriched mitochondrial outer membranes into nanoscale vesicles (RMNPs) that preserve this intrinsic targeting capacity. In multiple mouse cancer models, RMNPs loaded with an immune-stimulating agent (TLR7/8 agonist) and gold nanoparticles enable photothermal therapy, which releases tumor antigens and activates antigen-presenting cells. This generates strong CD8⁺ T cell responses and long-lasting protection against tumor rechallenge. These findings reveal a fundamental organelle-based mechanism of selective intercellular targeting and establish a mechanism-driven platform with translational potential for cancer immunotherapy, highlighting how natural cellular and molecular biology can be harnessed for precision medicine.
title_zh: RHOT1/2驱动的线粒体膜囊泡赋予肿瘤归巢选择性并实现原位癌症疫苗接种
abstract_zh: 原位肿瘤疫苗的开发因缺乏具有精确肿瘤选择性的递送系统而受到限制。在这里，我们证明来自癌症相关成纤维细胞（CAF）的线粒体表现出有效的肿瘤归巢特性。我们发现线粒体上 RHOT1/2 复合物的富集通过 ITSN1 依赖性网格蛋白内吞作用介导癌细胞的选择性摄取。利用这一见解，我们将富含 RHOT1/2 的线粒体外膜设计成纳米级囊泡 (RMNP)，以保留这种内在的靶向能力。在多种小鼠癌症模型中，装载有免疫刺激剂（TLR7/8 激动剂）和金纳米粒子的 RMNP 可以实现光热疗法，释放肿瘤抗原并激活抗原呈递细胞。这会产生强烈的 CD8⁺ T 细胞反应和针对肿瘤再次攻击的持久保护。这些发现揭示了基于细胞器的选择性细胞间靶向的基本机制，并建立了具有癌症免疫治疗转化潜力的机制驱动平台，强调了如何利用自然细胞和分子生物学进行精准医疗。

title: Structure-based design of stable recombinant hepatitis C virus E1E2 heterodimers
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Hepatitis C virus (HCV) affects 47 million people and causes 239,000 deaths annually, yet no vaccine is on the horizon. Generating a stable native-like mimic of the envelope complex E1E2, the only target for known neutralizing antibodies, is an important aim for HCV vaccine development. Starting from a recombinant E1E2 design that utilizes a leucine zipper for proper folding, we used an iterative structure-based design approach to engineer antigens with at least 100-fold stronger binding to conformational antibodies and increased thermal stability. These new E1E2 designs facilitate production of native-like E1E2 antigens based on strains from different HCV genotypes and enable the generation of a recombinant E1E2 antigen design that lacks the immunogenic leucine zipper. A cryo-EM structure of one of the stabilized E1E2 antigens in complex with neutralizing antibody AT1211 provides atomic-level insights into an atypical epitope on the E2 subunit. Finally, immunogenicity studies in rabbits with adjuvanted E1E2 proteins show that immunogen stabilization alone does do not enhance serum neutralization breadth, but that removing the leucine zipper does increase homologous serum neutralization.
title_zh: 基于结构的稳定重组丙型肝炎病毒E1E2异二聚体的设计
abstract_zh: 丙型肝炎病毒 (HCV) 每年影响 4700 万人，导致 239,000 人死亡，但目前还没有疫苗问世。生成包膜复合物 E1E2 的稳定的类似天然的模拟物（已知中和抗体的唯一靶标）是 HCV 疫苗开发的一个重要目标。从利用亮氨酸拉链进行正确折叠的重组 E1E2 设计开始，我们使用基于迭代结构的设计方法来设计抗原，使其与构象抗体的结合强度至少增强 100 倍，并提高热稳定性。这些新的 E1E2 设计有助于基于不同 HCV 基因型的菌株生产类似天然的 E1E2 抗原，并能够生成缺乏免疫原性亮氨酸拉链的重组 E1E2 抗原设计。稳定的 E1E2 抗原之一与中和抗体 AT1211 复合的冷冻电镜结构提供了对 E2 亚基上非典型表位的原子水平了解。最后，在带有佐剂的 E1E2 蛋白的兔子中进行的免疫原性研究表明，单独的免疫原稳定并不能增强血清中和广度，但去除亮氨酸拉链确实会增加同源血清中和。

title: Characterization and evolutionary history of novel SARS-CoV-2-related viruses in bats from Cambodia
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Circulating bat coronaviruses present a significant pandemic threat, yet our understanding of their genetic diversity and evolutionary dynamics remains limited. Over 3 years, we sampled 1,462 bats in Cambodia’s Steung Treng province, identifying extensive and diverse coronaviruses co-circulation. Using metatranscriptomic and amplicon sequencing, we generated 33 complete sarbecovirus genomes sequences, revealing novel lineages that cluster into four distinct groups, each associated with different Rhinolophus bat species. Our analysis highlights rapid migration and recombination of sarbecovirus lineages over short distances and timescales. Of note, the receptor-binding domains of two novel viral groups exhibit high similarity to SARS-CoV-2, and pseudovirus assays confirmed the ability of this spike protein to mediate entry into cells expressing human ACE2, suggesting a potential zoonotic risk. The observed genetic diversity underscores the urgent need for continuous surveillance to identify high-risk animal-to-human interfaces and inform pandemic preparedness.
title_zh: 柬埔寨蝙蝠中新型 SARS-CoV-2 相关病毒的特征和进化史
abstract_zh: 循环的蝙蝠冠状病毒构成了重大的大流行威胁，但我们对其遗传多样性和进化动态的了解仍然有限。三年多来，我们对柬埔寨斯东丁省的 1,462 只蝙蝠进行了采样，发现了广泛且多样的冠状病毒共循环。利用宏转录组学和扩增子测序，我们生成了 33 个完整的 sarbecovirus 基因组序列，揭示了新的谱系，这些谱系分为四个不同的组，每个组与不同的菊头蝠物种相关。我们的分析强调了 sarbecovirus 谱系在短距离和时间范围内的快速迁移和重组。值得注意的是，两种新型病毒群的受体结合域与 SARS-CoV-2 表现出高度相似性，并且假病毒检测证实了这种刺突蛋白能够介导进入表达人类 ACE2 的细胞，这表明存在潜在的人畜共患风险。观察到的遗传多样性强调了持续监测的迫切需要，以识别高风险的动物与人类接触并为大流行做好准备。

title: Deciphering the initiation pathway of CagT4SS assembly by in vitro reconstitution of subcomplexes
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Cag type IV secretion system (CagT4SS) mediates the translocation of diverse substrates and is critical for the Helicobacter pylori pathogenesis. Its assembly is initiated by the central cylinder comprising CagX, CagY and CagM, however, the order and detailed mechanism remain unclear. Here, we characterize their respective self-oligomerizing properties and in vitro reconstitute subcomplexes that recapitulate features of the native nanomachine. By integrating multiple biophysical analyses, the structures, binding kinetics and conformational dynamics of assembly intermediates are shown. The assembly begins with self-oligomerization of CagX, followed by CagY association to form a stable periplasmic ring complex (PRC). CagM is subsequently coupled with CagX through multimerization of dimers, with CagY enhancing both the stability and cooperativity of its association. Our findings show the spatial and temporal nature of the assembly process, in particular the significance of PRC substructure, providing mechanistic insights into the biogenesis of bacterial T4SSs beyond static models.
title_zh: 通过子复合物的体外重建破译CagT4SS组装的起始途径
abstract_zh: Cag IV 型分泌系统 (CagT4SS) 介导多种底物的易位，对于幽门螺杆菌的发病机制至关重要。其组装是由由CagX、CagY和CagM组成的中央圆柱体启动的，然而，其顺序和详细机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们表征了它们各自的自寡聚特性，并在体外重建了概括天然纳米机器特征的子复合物。通过整合多种生物物理分析，显示了组装中间体的结构、结合动力学和构象动力学。组装过程首先是 CagX 的自身寡聚化，然后是 CagY 缔合，形成稳定的周质环复合物 (PRC)。随后，CagM 通过二聚体多聚化与 CagX 偶联，CagY 增强了其结合的稳定性和协同性。我们的研究结果显示了组装过程的空间和时间性质，特别是 PRC 子结构的重要性，为静态模型之外的细菌 T4SS 的生物发生提供了机制见解。

title: Deletion of ARPKD-associated Pkhd1 gene in mice results in decreased Tfap2b expression and eye abnormalities
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Genome-wide association studies report single nucleotide polymorphisms (SNPs) in the PKHD1-TFAP2B genomic interval are associated with primary open-angle glaucoma (POAG) but do not distinguish the causal gene. While neural crest cell (NCC)-specific Tfap2b inactivation causes anterior segment dysgenesis (ASD) and congenital glaucoma (CG), PKHD1 mutations cause autosomal recessive polycystic kidney disease. We now show that Pkhd1del3-67/del3-67 mice also exhibit CG and ASD. Integrating genetic, epigenetic, bioinformatic and developmental analyses, we show that Pkhd1del3-67/del3-67 mice lack Tfap2b and AP-2β expression in a subset of periocular mesenchymal cells at E13.5 and its derivatives. Our data suggest the Pkhd1del3-67 deletion disrupts features of the Pkhd1-Tfap2b genomic architecture essential for Tfap2b cell-specific function. Consistent with this model, Pkhd1del3-67/+;Tfap2bko/+mice develop ASD and lack Tfap2b and AP-2β in relevant cell-types. Our results suggest POAG-associated SNPs at this complex locus may impact disease risk by altering TFAP2B regulatory landscapes, providing a mechanistic link and highlighting regulatory complexity of disease-associated regions.
title_zh: 小鼠中 ARPKD 相关 Pkhd1 基因的缺失导致 Tfap2b 表达减少和眼睛异常
abstract_zh: 全基因组关联研究报告 PKHD1-TFAP2B 基因组区间中的单核苷酸多态性 (SNP) 与原发性开角型青光眼 (POAG) 相关，但未区分致病基因。神经嵴细胞 (NCC) 特异性 Tfap2b 失活会导致眼前节发育不全 (ASD) 和先天性青光眼 (CG)，而 PKHD1 突变会导致常染色体隐性遗传性多囊肾病。我们现在证明 Pkhd1del3-67/del3-67 小鼠也表现出 CG 和 ASD。综合遗传、表观遗传、生物信息学和发育分析，我们发现 Pkhd1del3-67/del3-67 小鼠在 E13.5 及其衍生物的眼周间充质细胞子集中缺乏 Tfap2b 和 AP-2β 表达。我们的数据表明 Pkhd1del3-67 缺失破坏了 Tfap2b 细胞特异性功能所必需的 Pkhd1-Tfap2b 基因组结构的特征。与该模型一致，Pkhd1del3-67/+；Tfap2bko/+ 小鼠出现 ASD，且相关细胞类型中缺乏 Tfap2b 和 AP-2β。我们的结果表明，这个复杂位点上的 POAG 相关 SNP 可能通过改变 TFAP2B 调控景观、提供机制联系并强调疾病相关区域的调控复杂性来影响疾病风险。

title: A dual-receptor checkpoint primes enterovirus D68 for respiratory cell entry
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: MFSD6 is a newly identified receptor that mediates the invasion of respiratory cells by enterovirus D68 (EV-D68), a non-polio enterovirus that causes severe respiratory disease and poliomyelitis-like illness in children. Here, we report near-atomic-resolution cryo-electron microscopy (cryo-EM) structures of historical and contemporary AFM-associated EV-D68 strains, together with their complexes bound to the third extracellular loop of MFSD6 (MFSD6-L3). These structures uncover a previously unrecognized “binary gating switch” mechanism of virus-receptor engagement that differs from the reported model. In this mechanism, the N200-V208 segment of MFSD6, carrying a glycosylated Asn207, inserts into one capsomer, whereas the sialyl-Gal-terminated glycan of MFSD6 engages an adjacent capsomer. Neu5Ac binding induces conformational rearrangements that expel the pocket factor, destabilize the virion, and prime infection. Functional analyses further define the contributions of the receptor-contacting residues and glycans to viral attachment and entry. Together, our findings refine the molecular basis of EV-D68 recognition of MFSD6 and reveal a glycan-mediated dual-lock mechanism that may enhance receptor specificity, prevent premature uncoating, and ensure productive infection only upon engagement of the correct host receptor. These results provide broader insight into enterovirus tropism and establish a framework for structure-guided antiviral design.
title_zh: 双受体检查点启动肠道病毒 D68 进入呼吸道细胞
abstract_zh: MFSD6 是一种新发现的受体，可介导肠道病毒 D68 (EV-D68) 对呼吸道细胞的侵袭，这是一种非脊髓灰质炎肠道病毒，可导致儿童严重呼吸道疾病和脊髓灰质炎样疾病。在这里，我们报告了历史和当代 AFM 相关 EV-D68 菌株的近原子分辨率冷冻电子显微镜 (cryo-EM) 结构，以及它们与 MFSD6 第三个细胞外环 (MFSD6-L3) 结合的复合物。这些结构揭示了一种以前未被识别的病毒-受体结合的“二元门控开关”机制，该机制与报道的模型不同。在此机制中，携带糖基化 Asn207 的 MFSD6 的 N200-V208 片段插入一个壳粒，而 MFSD6 的唾液酸-Gal 封端的聚糖则与相邻的壳粒接合。 Neu5Ac 结合会诱导构象重排，从而排出袋因子、破坏病毒粒子的稳定性并引发感染。功能分析进一步确定了受体接触残基和聚糖对病毒附着和进入的贡献。总之，我们的研究结果完善了 EV-D68 识别 MFSD6 的分子基础，并揭示了聚糖介导的双锁机制，该机制可以增强受体特异性，防止过早脱壳，并确保只有在与正确的宿主受体结合时才能进行有效感染。这些结果提供了对肠道病毒趋向性的更广泛的了解，并为结构引导的抗病毒设计建立了框架。

title: Real-time photoactivated SRS imaging enables spatiotemporally controlled nitroxyl release and therapeutic guidance in vivo
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Quantitatively tracking the dynamics of reactive species in vivo with reliable spatiotemporal resolution is essential yet challenging, as it provides critical insights into physiological mechanisms, optimizes drug delivery, and advances precision medicine. Herein, leveraging stimulated Raman scattering (SRS) for in vivo quantification, this work develops a series of versatile photoactivable scaffolds that efficiently generate equivalent amounts of reactive nitroxyl (HNO) and cyano-azobenzene with high photoconversion efficiency (95.1%) and fast reaction dynamics (t1/2 = 3.97–33.56 s). Upon photoinduction, the cyano-azobenzene serves as a sensitive SRS imaging reporter, enabling precise monitoring of HNO release with high spatial resolution. Moreover, the modularly designed scaffolds ensure tuneable reaction kinetics and distinct vibrational fingerprints (2224–2245 cm−1) for multiplexed SRS imaging, along with specified organelle-targeting capabilities. By tracking the photo-release of HNO in living cells and zebrafish using SRS imaging, we uncover kinetic lags in photo-triggered HNO, confirming its distinct spatiotemporal dynamics in complex living systems. Furthermore, this study monitors the therapeutic process of photoactivated HNO in a zebrafish model of heart failure using SRS, providing a robust strategy for quantifying reactive species in native biological environments.
title_zh: 实时光激活 SRS 成像可实现时空控制硝酰基释放和体内治疗指导
abstract_zh: 以可靠的时空分辨率定量跟踪体内活性物质的动态至关重要，但也具有挑战性，因为它可以提供对生理机制的重要见解，优化药物输送并推进精准医学。在此，利用受激拉曼散射（SRS）进行体内定量，这项工作开发了一系列多功能光活化支架，可有效产生等量的反应性硝酰基（HNO）和氰基偶氮苯，具有高光转换效率（95.1%）和快速反应动力学（t1/2 = 3.97–33.56 s）。在光诱导作用下，氰基偶氮苯充当敏感的 SRS 成像报告分子，能够以高空间分辨率精确监测 HNO 的释放。此外，模块化设计的支架确保了多重 SRS 成像的可调节反应动力学和独特的振动指纹 (2224–2245 cm−1)，以及特定的细胞器靶向能力。通过使用 SRS 成像跟踪活细胞和斑马鱼中 HNO 的光释放，我们发现了光触发 HNO 的动力学滞后，证实了其在复杂生命系统中独特的时空动力学。此外，本研究使用 SRS 监测斑马鱼心力衰竭模型中光活化 HNO 的治疗过程，为量化本地生物环境中的活性物质提供了强有力的策略。

title: Multi-subunit collaboration enables Smc5/6 to function as a composite SUMO E3 complex
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The SUMO E3 enzymes control the efficiency and specificity of protein SUMOylation, providing regulatory means for many cellular processes. While most SUMO E3s fulfill their roles as single proteins, the conserved Nse2 E3 is an obligatory subunit of the genome-protecting complex Smc5/6. How the Smc5/6 complex functions in SUMOylation and the roles of its non-SUMO E3 subunits in this process remain to be elucidated. Here we examine the budding yeast Smc5/6 in SUMOylation reactions and in cellular SUMOylation assays. Biochemical data show that DNA stimulates Smc5/6’s E3 activity by fostering enzyme and substrate proximity. Mutational analyses reveal that four non-SUMO E3 subunits utilize their DNA-binding abilities to support this stimulation. Moreover, ATP binding by SMC subunits favors SUMOylation by enhancing Smc5/6 association with DNA and chromatin and by enabling conformational changes. Our findings thus provide evidence for a specialized DNA- and ATP-stimulated composite SUMO E3 complex that uses inter-subunit collaboration to achieve efficient SUMOylation in genome regulation.
title_zh: 多子单元协作使 Smc5/6 能够作为复合 SUMO E3 复合物发挥作用
abstract_zh: SUMO E3 酶控制蛋白质 SUMO 化的效率和特异性，为许多细胞过程提供调节手段。虽然大多数 SUMO E3 作为单一蛋白质发挥其作用，但保守的 Nse2 E3 是基因组保护复合物 Smc5/6 的必需亚基。 Smc5/6 复合物如何在 SUMO 化过程中发挥作用以及其非 SUMO E3 亚基在此过程中的作用仍有待阐明。在这里，我们在 SUMO 化反应和细胞 SUMO 化测定中检查出芽酵母 Smc5/6。生化数据表明，DNA 通过促进酶和底物的接近来刺激 Smc5/6 的 E3 活性。突变分析表明，四个非 SUMO E3 亚基利用其 DNA 结合能力来支持这种刺激。此外，SMC 亚基结合的 ATP 通过增强 Smc5/6 与 DNA 和染色质的关联以及实现构象变化而有利于 SUMOylation。因此，我们的研究结果为专门的 DNA 和 ATP 刺激的复合 SUMO E3 复合物提供了证据，该复合物利用亚基间协作来实现基因组调控中的有效 SUMO 化。

title: Growing firms and carbon intensity: Do environmental taxation policy and green technological innovation ecosystems matter?
source: ScienceDirect Publication: Energy Policy
title_zh: 成长型企业和碳强度：环境税收政策和绿色技术创新生态系统重要吗？

title: Sugar import suppresses Klebsiella pneumoniae Mucoidy in a cAMP-CRP-dependent manner
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Hypervirulent Klebsiella pneumoniae (hvKp) causes severe invasive infections in community and hospital settings, often originating from gut colonization. Capsular polysaccharide (CPS) and its associated features are a key hvKp virulence factor. Altering CPS properties, such as mucoidy, in response to environmental cues enhances K. pneumoniae fitness. While several physical and nutrient cues influence mucoidy, the molecular mechanisms by which host-relevant signals, such as sugars, regulate mucoidy remain undefined. Here, we show that sugar import, not catabolism, broadly suppresses hvKp mucoidy through cAMP-CRP signaling and downregulation of the mucoidy regulator, rmpD. This sugar-dependent regulation is conserved across multiple hvKp strains. Although non-mucoid hvKp associate with gut mucin and epithelial cells at a greater frequency, both hypermucoid and non-mucoid states show reduced fitness for gut colonization. Our findings support that sugars are a key mucoidy regulatory cue and that the dynamic regulation of mucoidy contributes to efficient gut colonization by hvKp.
title_zh: 糖输入以 cAMP-CRP 依赖性方式抑制肺炎克雷伯菌粘液
abstract_zh: 高毒力肺炎克雷伯菌 (hvKp) 在社区和医院环境中引起严重的侵袭性感染，通常源自肠道定植。荚膜多糖 (CPS) 及其相关特征是 hvKp 的关键毒力因子。根据环境提示改变 CPS 特性（例如粘液性）可增强肺炎克雷伯菌的适应性。虽然一些物理和营养因素会影响粘液，但宿主相关信号（例如糖）调节粘液的分子机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们发现糖输入（而不是分解代谢）通过 cAMP-CRP 信号传导和粘液调节剂 rmpD 的下调广泛抑制 hvKp 粘液。这种糖依赖性调节在多种 hvKp 菌株中都是保守的。尽管非粘液 hvKp 与肠道粘蛋白和上皮细胞相关的频率较高，但高粘液状态和非粘液状态都显示出肠道定植的适应性降低。我们的研究结果支持糖是关键的粘液调节线索，并且粘液的动态调节有助于 hvKp 的有效肠道定植。

title: Structural inequality shapes the daily rhythm of stationarity and mobility
source: Scientific community and society : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Human mobility exhibits rhythmic patterns that shape economic activity, social interactions, and access to essential services. Yet, while prior studies focus on spatial movement, the temporal structure of people’s stationarity—the act of dwelling—remains underexplored. Here, we introduce the Stationarity Sinusoidal Stability (STASIS) model to quantify the daily pulse of physical presence. Using three parameters—range, phase angle, and baseline—we show that majority-Black census block groups (CBGs) have smaller daily stationarity ranges, later activity peaks, and lower average home-presence baselines than majority-White and majority-Hispanic CBGs. The Rhythm Stability Index further indicates greater variability in activity timing among CBGs with higher proportions of Black residents, and this variability is associated with CBG-level economic precarity. Using COVID-19 as a stress test, our findings show that temporal stability in daily mobility rhythms differs across CBGs with different racial and Hispanic-origin compositions.
title_zh: 结构性不平等塑造了固定性和流动性的日常节奏
abstract_zh: 人员流动呈现出影响经济活动、社会互动和获得基本服务的节奏模式。然而，虽然先前的研究集中在空间运动，但人们静止性的时间结构（居住行为）仍然没有得到充分探索。在这里，我们引入平稳正弦稳定性 (STASIS) 模型来量化物理存在的每日脉动。使用范围、相位角和基线这三个参数，我们发现黑人占多数的人口普查区块组 (CBG) 比白人和西班牙裔占多数的人口普查区块组 (CBG) 具有更小的每日平稳性范围、更晚的活动峰值以及更低的平均家庭存在基线。节奏稳定性指数进一步表明，黑人居民比例较高的 CBG 之间的活动时间变异性更大，并且这种变异性与 CBG 水平的经济不稳定相关。使用 COVID-19 作为压力测试，我们的研究结果表明，具有不同种族和西班牙裔血统的 CBG 的每日流动节律的时间稳定性有所不同。

title: Polymorphic IGLV6-57 AL amyloid fibrils and features of a shared folding pathway
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Immunoglobulin light chain (AL) amyloidosis is a systemic disorder caused by the misfolding and aggregation of free immunoglobulin light chains (LCs) secreted by abnormal plasma cells. The resulting amyloid fibrils deposit in multiple organs, leading to progressive dysfunction and increased morbidity and mortality. Despite recent advances, the molecular determinants of LC aggregation and their effect on phenotypic variability are not fully defined. Structural characterization of ex-vivo fibrils provides insights into the underlying amyloidogenic processes that may affect the downstream pathogenesis. Here, we report cryo-electron microscopy structures of cardiac AL amyloid fibrils derived from an IGLV6-57 light chain. The fibrils display two distinct morphologies composed of single and double protofilaments, each adopting a previously unobserved fold. Comparison with previously reported AL fibril structures reveals that while individual mutations can alter the local conformation, IGLV6-57-derived fibrils share conserved structural motifs that may underlie common aggregation pathways. These findings expand the disease structural landscape and highlight sequence-dependent yet structurally constrained mechanisms of LC fibril formation.
title_zh: 多态性 IGLV6-57 AL 淀粉样原纤维和共享折叠途径的特征
abstract_zh: 免疫球蛋白轻链（AL）淀粉样变性是一种由异常浆细胞分泌的游离免疫球蛋白轻链（LC）错误折叠和聚集引起的全身性疾病。由此产生的淀粉样原纤维沉积在多个器官中，导致进行性功能障碍并增加发病率和死亡率。尽管最近取得了进展，但 LC 聚集的分子决定因素及其对表型变异的影响尚未完全确定。离体原纤维的结构表征提供了对可能影响下游发病机制的潜在淀粉样蛋白形成过程的见解。在这里，我们报告了源自 IGLV6-57 轻链的心脏 AL 淀粉样原纤维的冷冻电镜结构。原纤维表现出两种不同的形态，由单原丝和双原丝组成，每一种都采用以前未观察到的折叠。与之前报道的 AL 原纤维结构的比较表明，虽然个体突变可以改变局部构象，但 IGLV6-57 衍生的原纤维共享保守的结构基序，这些基序可能是共同聚集途径的基础。这些发现扩展了疾病的结构景观，并强调了 LC 原纤维形成的序列依赖性但结构受限的机制。

title: Spatial transcriptomics reveals distinct cell type dynamics following opioid dependence in female mice with the common human μ-opioid receptor variant Oprm1 A118G
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Opioid Use Disorder (OUD) is a complex neuropsychiatric condition shaped by multiple factors including genetics. The A118G single-nucleotide polymorphism (rs1799971) in the µ-opioid receptor gene (OPRM1) has been associated with heightened risk for opioid and other substance dependencies, but the molecular basis of this effect remains unclear. Importantly, mice with the orthologous SNP, Oprm1 A112G, recapitulate many of the divergent behavioral responses to opioids documented in humans with the same variant. To probe how these variants influence opioid dependence at a cellular and molecular level, we performed single-nucleus spatial transcriptomic analyses of cell-type composition and cell-state/transcriptional programs in Oprm1 A112G mice with and without morphine dependence. A key discovery from our study is that opioid-induced changes in cell type transcriptomic states varied markedly by genotype. Specifically, transcriptomic alterations during opioid dependence were reflected more prominently in glial populations rather than in neurons specifically in the Oprm1 GG mice. By combining gene co-expression, pathway activity, and network remodeling across cell types and regions, we link Oprm1-driven genetic risk to anatomically organized shifts in glial, neuronal, and network function, defining the molecular basis of opioid dependence shaped by genetic background.
title_zh: 空间转录组学揭示了具有常见人类 μ-阿片受体变体 Oprm1 A118G 的雌性小鼠阿片依赖后不同的细胞类型动态
abstract_zh: 阿片类药物使用障碍 (OUD) 是一种复杂的神经精神疾病，由包括遗传在内的多种因素影响。 µ-阿片受体基因 (OPRM1) 中的 A118G 单核苷酸多态性 (rs1799971) 与阿片类药物和其他物质依赖性风险增加有关，但这种效应的分子基础仍不清楚。重要的是，具有直系同源 SNP Oprm1 A112G 的小鼠重现了具有相同变体的人类对阿片类药物的许多不同行为反应。为了探讨这些变异如何在细胞和分子水平上影响阿片类药物依赖，我们对有或没有吗啡依赖的 Oprm1 A112G 小鼠的细胞类型组成和细胞状态/转录程序进行了单核空间转录组分析。我们研究的一个关键发现是，阿片类药物诱导的细胞类型转录组状态的变化因基因型而异。具体来说，阿片类药物依赖过程中的转录组变化在神经胶质细胞群中更为突出，而不是在神经元中，特别是在 Oprm1 GG 小鼠中。通过结合跨细胞类型和区域的基因共表达、通路活性和网络重塑，我们将 Oprm1 驱动的遗传风险与神经胶质、神经元和网络功能的解剖组织变化联系起来，定义了遗传背景形成的阿片类药物依赖的分子基础。

title: cellGeometry: ultra-fast single-cell deconvolution of bulk RNA-Seq using a geometric solution
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Single-cell analysis has rapidly expanded to produce cell atlases encompassing all human tissues. However, computational methods to deconvolute bulk samples using single-cell reference data have failed to keep pace with the increasing data size. Here we present cellGeometry, which uses non-negative geometric deconvolution (NGD), an intuitive vector projection method featuring non-negative matrix regularisation. Using matrix operations, cellGeometry scales to massive datasets and is ultrafast. Benchmarked using simulations from single-cell/nucleus RNA-Seq datasets with >3 million cells, cellGeometry is more accurate than existing methods and more robust against noise simulating different sequencing chemistries. It identifies outlying residual genes which may unveil pathogenic changes in gene expression and the presence of cell types absent from the reference. cellGeometry’s flexible architecture allows merging of single-cell reference signatures to expand the range of cell types being deconvoluted. Validated against real bulk RNA blood and tissue samples, cellGeometry produces more accurate and realistic results.
title_zh: cellGeometry：使用几何解决方案对批量 RNA 测序进行超快速单细胞反卷积
abstract_zh: 单细胞分析已迅速扩展到产生涵盖所有人体组织的细胞图谱。然而，使用单细胞参考数据对大量样本进行解卷积的计算方法未能跟上不断增加的数据量的步伐。在这里，我们介绍 cellGeometry，它使用非负几何反卷积（NGD），这是一种具有非负矩阵正则化功能的直观矢量投影方法。使用矩阵运算，cellGeometry 可以扩展到海量数据集，并且速度超快。 cellGeometry 使用来自超过 300 万个细胞的单细胞/核 RNA-Seq 数据集的模拟进行基准测试，比现有方法更准确，并且对模拟不同测序化学的噪声更稳健。它识别出外围的残留基因，这些基因可能揭示基因表达的致病变化以及参考中不存在的细胞类型的存在。 cellGeometry 灵活的架构允许合并单细胞参考签名，以扩大解卷积的细胞类型范围。 cellGeometry 已针对真实的大量 RNA 血液和组织样本进行验证，可产生更准确、更真实的结果。

title: FAIMS-GPF XL-MS: crosslinking-mass spectrometry based on gas-phase fractionation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Protein-protein interactions (PPIs) underpin nearly all cellular processes; therefore, mapping PPI and protein-protein association networks is critical for understanding how biological systems function in health and disease. However, many functionally relevant PPIs are transient and mediated by weak affinity interactions, making them challenging to detect. Using chemical cross-linking together with mass spectrometry (XL-MS) has emerged as an important category of methods for mapping PPIs, including those that are more dynamic and transient. However, XL-MS workflows face limitations which hinder their routine use, especially in proteomic platforms. Here, to address these limitations, we develop a XL-MS workflow based on gas-phase fractionation (GPF) using high-field asymmetric waveform ion mobility spectrometry (FAIMS). Our optimized FAIMS-GPF XL-MS protocols exhibit improved performance when handling both low-complexity samples, such as purified Cdk7-Activating Kinase (CAK) heterotrimer, and high-complexity cross-linked HeLa lysates. In HeLa lysate, we identify 1269 cross-links accounting for 213 PPIs without any in-solution fractionation, starting from less than 20 µg of sample. The method also proves effective for analyzing low-abundance, high-complexity samples such as spliceosomes. Here we show that FAIMS-GPF enhances the detection of cross-linked peptides and improves PPI coverage, thus offering a scalable, high-sensitivity solution for XL-MS integration with structural biology and functional proteomics applications.
title_zh: FAIMS-GPF XL-MS：基于气相分馏的交联质谱法
abstract_zh: 蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用 (PPI) 是几乎所有细胞过程的基础；因此，绘制 PPI 和蛋白质-蛋白质关联网络对于了解生物系统如何在健康和疾病中发挥作用至关重要。然而，许多功能相关的 PPI 是短暂的，并且由弱亲和力相互作用介导，这使得它们难以检测。将化学交联与质谱 (XL-MS) 结合使用已成为绘制 PPI 谱图的一类重要方法，包括那些更具动态性和瞬态性的方法。然而，XL-MS 工作流程面临限制，阻碍了其日常使用，尤其是在蛋白质组平台中。在这里，为了解决这些限制，我们使用高场不对称波形离子迁移谱 (FAIMS) 开发了基于气相分级 (GPF) 的 XL-MS 工作流程。我们优化的 FAIMS-GPF XL-MS 方案在处理低复杂性样品（例如纯化的 Cdk7 激活激酶 (CAK) 异三聚体）和高复杂性交联 HeLa 裂解物时表现出改进的性能。在 HeLa 裂解物中，我们从不到 20 µg 的样品开始，在没有任何溶液内分级的情况下识别出 1269 个交联，占 213 个 PPI。该方法还被证明对于分析低丰度、高复杂性样品（例如剪接体）是有效的。在这里，我们展示了 FAIMS-GPF 增强了交联肽的检测并提高了 PPI 覆盖率，从而为 XL-MS 与结构生物学和功能蛋白质组学应用的集成提供了可扩展的高灵敏度解决方案。

title: IDBac: an open-access web platform to identify bacteria and analyze relationships in culture collections using MALDI-TOF mass spectrometry
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: The identification and analysis of bacteria is central to the microbiological sciences. While gene sequencing methods have been the standard to achieve this, use of MALDI-TOF mass spectrometry (MS), particularly in clinical microbiology, can provide high-throughput identification to the subspecies level. However, biotyping has yet to be adopted outside of clinical settings due to the lack of a centralized public database of MS protein signatures that would facilitate isolate identification via spectral comparison. Further, most current MALDI MS data analysis platforms lack meaningful ways to compare properties from large numbers of bacterial isolates. Herein we present the IDBac web platform, a crowd-sourced central knowledgebase of protein MS signatures spanning seven bacterial phyla. Accompanying the knowledgebase is analysis infrastructure to identify unknown isolates, probe relationships within culture collections using metadata integration, and visualize specialized metabolite differences within groups of closely related bacteria. To highlight this utility and encourage wide community contribution, examples of each are presented.
title_zh: IDBac：一个开放访问的网络平台，用于使用 MALDI-TOF 质谱识别细菌并分析培养物保藏中的关系
abstract_zh: 细菌的鉴定和分析是微生物科学的核心。虽然基因测序方法已成为实现这一目标的标准，但使用 MALDI-TOF 质谱 (MS)，特别是在临床微生物学中，可以提供亚种水平的高通量鉴定。然而，生物分型尚未在临床环境之外得到采用，因为缺乏 MS 蛋白特征的集中式公共数据库，无法通过光谱比较来促进分离株识别。此外，大多数当前的 MALDI MS 数据分析平台缺乏有意义的方法来比较大量细菌分离株的特性。在此，我们介绍了 IDBac 网络平台，这是一个涵盖七个细菌门的蛋白质 MS 特征的众包中央知识库。伴随知识库的是分析基础设施，用于识别未知分离株，使用元数据集成探测培养物保藏中心内的关系，并可视化密切相关的细菌群体内的专门代谢差异。为了强调这种实用性并鼓励广泛的社区贡献，提供了每个示例。

title: TDP-43 promotes allergen-induced inflammation and influenza A virus replication in airway epithelium
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Current targeted therapeutics for asthma focus on the T2 immune response, providing symptomatic management without addressing the issues of recurrence. Identifying key pathophysiological determinants in airway epithelium enables novel therapeutics to prevent asthma recurrence. Here we demonstrate that TDP-43, as the master regulator of RNA metabolism, is induced in airway epithelial cells by host allergen exposure and promotes asthmatic airway responses through dampening nonsense-mediated decay (NMD) by modulating UPF1 expression, resulting in accumulation of pathogenic and NMD-sensitive transcripts including CHRM1 encoding receptor that transduces the signaling of vagally-derived neurotransmitter acetylcholine. TDP-43 also facilitates airway influenza A virus replication. Intranasal application of lipid nanoparticles carrying antisense oligonucleotides targeting TDP-43 effectively reduce asthma-like pathologies in mice. Our findings indicate that targeting airway TDP-43 is therapeutically possible for asthma and influenza A virus infection-complicated asthma exacerbations.
title_zh: TDP-43 促进过敏原诱导的炎症和甲型流感病毒在气道上皮中的复制
abstract_zh: 目前哮喘的靶向治疗侧重于 T2 免疫反应，提供症状管理，但不解决复发问题。识别气道上皮中关键的病理生理学决定因素可以开发出预防哮喘复发的新疗法。在这里，我们证明TDP-43作为RNA代谢的主要调节因子，在气道上皮细胞中被宿主过敏原暴露诱导，并通过调节UPF1表达来抑制无义介导的衰变（NMD），从而促进哮喘气道反应，导致致病性和NMD敏感转录物的积累，包括转导迷走神经源性神经递质乙酰胆碱信号传导的CHRM1编码受体。 TDP-43 还促进气道甲型流感病毒复制。鼻内应用携带靶向 TDP-43 的反义寡核苷酸的脂质纳米颗粒可有效减少小鼠的哮喘样病变。我们的研究结果表明，针对气道 TDP-43 在治疗哮喘和甲型流感病毒感染并发哮喘加重方面是可能的。

title: Dyscoordination of thalamic reticular spindles is associated with social memory deficits in mice and humans with autism spectrum disorder
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Social memory, the ability to recognize and remember conspecifics, is frequently impaired in psychiatric disorders such as autism, yet the underlying mechanisms remain unclear. We examined the role of sleep spindles across non-rapid eye movement sleep in social memory consolidation, focusing on the sensory thalamic reticular nucleus (sTRN). Here we show that impaired spindles were associated with defective social memory. Through pharmacological/optogenetic manipulations and optical Ca2+ recordings, we demonstrated that parvalbumin-positive neurons in the sTRN (sTRNPvalb) are essential for sleep spindle generation, mediated by the sTRNPvalb–ventroposteromedial (VPM) thalamic nucleus circuit. Increasing the activity of the sTRNPvalb–VPM pathway could rescue impaired spindles and social memory deficits in Neuroligin 2 mutant mice. Moreover, we developed machine learning-based models to predict autism in children based on spindle eigenvalues. These findings underscore the critical role of spindles in social memory, suggesting spindles may serve as candidate diagnostic markers.
title_zh: 丘脑网状纺锤体的协调障碍与患有自闭症谱系障碍的小鼠和人类的社会记忆缺陷有关
abstract_zh: 社会记忆，即识别和记忆同种事物的能力，在自闭症等精神疾病中经常受到损害，但其潜在机制仍不清楚。我们研究了睡眠纺锤波在非快速眼动睡眠中在社会记忆巩固中的作用，重点关注感觉丘脑网状核（sTRN）。在这里，我们发现纺锤体受损与社会记忆缺陷有关。通过药理学/光遗传学操作和光学 Ca2+ 记录，我们证明 sTRN (sTRNPvalb) 中的小白蛋白阳性神经元对于由 sTRNPvalb-腹后内侧 (VPM) 丘脑核回路介导的睡眠纺锤波生成至关重要。增加 sTRNPvalb-VPM 通路的活性可以挽救 Neuroligin 2 突变小鼠的纺锤体受损和社会记忆缺陷。此外，我们开发了基于机器学习的模型，根据主轴特征值预测儿童自闭症。这些发现强调了纺锤体在社会记忆中的关键作用，表明纺锤体可以作为候选诊断标志物。

title: Synnovation and confluence explain disparities in species richness across the Andes and Hengduan-Himalaya Mountains
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Mountain regions harbor extraordinary biodiversity, yet the mechanisms underlying this pattern remain unclear. Here we use the phylogenetically and geographically replicated radiations of Berberis (barberries) in the Andes and Hengduan–Himalaya Mountains (HHM) to test how functional trait innovations, orogeny, and climate change influenced the buildup of species richness in each region. In barberries (Berberis), the successive evolution of deciduousness and small, densely-veined leaves enabled the lineage to take advantage of expanding alpine and subalpine habitats in the HHM during the Miocene. The resulting pulse in the origin of new species contrasts with the more modest rate of species accumulation in the Andes, where barberry species remained evergreen and the availability of high-elevation habitats was more limited. In this study, the phylogeny of barberries exemplifies context-dependent macroevolutionary dynamics, in which intrinsic innovations and extrinsic ecological opportunities interacted to generate exceptional plant diversity in a mountain hotspot.
title_zh: 同步更新和融合解释了安第斯山脉和横断喜马拉雅山脉物种丰富度的差异
abstract_zh: 山区拥有非凡的生物多样性，但这种模式背后的机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们利用安第斯山脉和横断-喜马拉雅山脉（HHM）中小檗（小檗）的系统发育和地理复制辐射来测试功能性状创新、造山运动和气候变化如何影响每个地区物种丰富度的积累。在小檗中，落叶和小而密脉的叶子的连续进化使得该谱系能够利用中新世期间HHM中不断扩大的高山和亚高山栖息地。由此产生的新物种起源的脉冲与安第斯山脉的物种积累速度形成鲜明对比，安第斯山脉的伏牛花物种保持常绿，高海拔栖息地的可用性更加有限。在这项研究中，小檗的系统发育例证了环境依赖的宏观进化动力学，其中内在的创新和外在的生态机会相互作用，在山区热点地区产生了特殊的植物多样性。

title: Direct lipid interactions control SARS-CoV-2 M protein conformational dynamics and virus assembly
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: M is the most abundant structural membrane protein in coronaviruses and is essential for the formation of infectious virus particles. SARS-CoV-2 M adopts two conformations, Mshort and Mlong, and regulated transition between states is hypothesized to coordinate viral assembly and budding. However, the factors that regulate M conformation and roles for each state are unknown. Here, we discover a direct M-sphingolipid interaction that controls M conformational dynamics, interaction with other structural proteins, and virus assembly. We show M binds Golgi-enriched anionic lipids including ceramide-1-phosphate (C1P). Molecular dynamics simulations show C1P interaction promotes a long to short transition and energetically stabilizes Mshort. Cryo-EM structures show C1P specifically binds Mshort at a conserved site bridging transmembrane and cytoplasmic regions. Disrupting Mshort-C1P interaction alters M subcellular localization, reduces colocalization with Spike and E, and reduces virus-like particle formation and cell entry. Together, these results show endogenous signaling lipids regulate M structure and support a model in which Mshort is stabilized in the early endomembrane system to organize other structural proteins prior to viral budding.
title_zh: 直接脂质相互作用控制 SARS-CoV-2 M 蛋白构象动力学和病毒组装
abstract_zh: M是冠状病毒中最丰富的结构膜蛋白，对于感染性病毒颗粒的形成至关重要。 SARS-CoV-2 M 采用两种构象：Mshort 和 Mlong，并且假设状态之间的调节转变是为了协调病毒组装和出芽。然而，调节 M 构象和每种状态的作用的因素尚不清楚。在这里，我们发现了一种直接的 M-鞘脂相互作用，可以控制 M 构象动力学、与其他结构蛋白的相互作用以及病毒组装。我们发现 M 与富含高尔基体的阴离子脂质结合，包括 1-磷酸神经酰胺 (C1P)。分子动力学模拟表明，C1P 相互作用促进了长向短的转变，并在能量上稳定了 Mshort。冷冻电镜结构显示 C1P 在桥接跨膜和细胞质区域的保守位点特异性结合 Mshort。破坏 Mshort-C1P 相互作用会改变 M 亚细胞定位，减少与 Spike 和 E 的共定位，并减少病毒样颗粒的形成和细胞进入。总之，这些结果表明内源信号脂质调节 M 结构并支持 Mshort 在早期内膜系统中稳定以在病毒出芽之前组织其他结构蛋白的模型。

title: High-Strength, Self-Sensing Multiphase Hydrogels for Load-Bearing Actuation and Logical Human–Machine Interaction
source: Nano-Micro Letters
abstract: Stimuli-responsive shape-changing hydrogels are the most competitive candidates for artificial muscles, electronic skins, and soft robotics. However, existing actuating hydrogels often suffer a trade-off between actuation performance and mechanical strength, which greatly limits their application prospects as actuators under external force loads. Here, we adopt a cascade polymerization strategy to successively introduce electrical sensing and mechanically enhanced polymer network phases into sponge-like PNIPAM hydrogels to achieve PNIPAM-based photothermal-responsive actuating hydrogels with fast response, high strength, and self-sensing performance. The as-prepared hydrogel actuator can execute rapid actuation missions even under external loading far exceeding its own mass and generate differentiated electrical sensing signals according to the magnitude of the external load. Based on the corresponding relationship between the mass of the load and the actuation behavior (such as "0/1" encoding), we develop a novel material-based binary information encoding system. Furthermore, by manufacturing logic gates to analyze differentiated feedback sensing signals and integrating them with Internet of Things technology, a closed-loop logic control system is established for remote logic-based interactive communication. This study fills the gap of traditional hydrogels in load-bearing actuation and complex interactive applications and opens up a new direction for the next generation of smart soft materials. Highlights:1 The cascade polymerization synergistic toughening mechanism overcomes the problem of mutual constraints between "mechanical strength and response speed" of traditional hydrogels and realizes load-bearing actuation.2 The “mass–deformation” dynamic coding law was established, enabling a hydrogel-based 0/1 binary information encoding system derived from mechanical actuation responses.3 Actuation–perception integrated logic-gate units were developed to enable intelligent soft robotics through a closed-loop “light-triggered actuation–signal feedback–logic processing–robotic action” control system.
title_zh: 用于承载驱动和逻辑人机交互的高强度、自感知多相水凝胶
abstract_zh: 刺激响应变形水凝胶是人造肌肉、电子皮肤和软机器人领域最具竞争力的候选材料。然而，现有的驱动水凝胶经常在驱动性能和机械强度之间进行权衡，这极大地限制了它们作为外力负载下的驱动器的应用前景。在这里，我们采用级联聚合策略，将电传感和机械增强的聚合物网络相相继引入海绵状PNIPAM水凝胶中，以实现具有快速响应、高强度和自传感性能的基于PNIPAM的光热响应驱动水凝胶。所制备的水凝胶致动器即使在远远超过其自身质量的外部载荷下也可以执行快速致动任务，并根据外部载荷的大小产生差异化的电传感信号。基于负载质量和驱动行为之间的对应关系（例如“0/1”编码），我们开发了一种新颖的基于材料的二进制信息编码系统。此外，通过制造逻辑门来分析差异化的反馈传感信号，并将其与物联网技术相结合，建立闭环逻辑控制系统，用于基于逻辑的远程交互通信。该研究填补了传统水凝胶在承载驱动和复杂交互应用方面的空白，为下一代智能软材料开辟了新方向。亮点：1 级联聚合协同增韧机理全面

title: Mechanisms of MCM2–7 helicase activation and initial DNA melting at near base-pair resolution
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: During eukaryotic DNA replication initiation, inactive MCM2–7 double-hexamers assembled at replication origins must be converted into two active CMG helicases, yet how this transition is coupled to origin DNA unwinding in vivo remains unclear. Here, we identify a DNA-bound intermediate with an extended genomic footprint that forms during helicase activation. Genome-wide mapping of initial strand separation reveals that DNA unwinding initiates near the N-terminal interface of opposing MCM2–7 hexamers. At these sites, the origin DNA exhibits a conserved AT-rich/GC-rich/AT-rich sequence architecture centred under the helicase complex, which is associated with an elevated DNA melting probability. We further show that restricting hexamer splitting delays release of the Cdc45-loading factor Sld3, demonstrating that mechanical transitions during helicase activation are tightly coupled to complex disassembly. Finally, we provide in vivo evidence that single-stranded DNA is ejected through a specialised DNA exit gate at the Mcm2/5 interface during helicase activation, which is dispensable for ongoing DNA synthesis. Together, these findings establish a mechanistic framework for how replication origins are remodelled to initiate DNA replication and reveal key intermediates and DNA transactions during helicase activation.
title_zh: MCM2-7 解旋酶激活和近碱基对分辨率下初始 DNA 熔解的机制
abstract_zh: 在真核 DNA 复制起始过程中，在复制起点组装的非活性 MCM2-7 双六聚体必须转化为两个活性 CMG 解旋酶，但这种转变如何与体内原点 DNA 解旋耦合仍不清楚。在这里，我们鉴定了一种 DNA 结合中间体，其在解旋酶激活过程中形成，具有扩展的基因组足迹。初始链分离的全基因组图谱表明，DNA 解旋起始于相对的 MCM2-7 六聚体的 N 端界面附近。在这些位点，原始 DNA 表现出以解旋酶复合物为中心的保守的富含 AT/富含 GC/富含 AT 的序列结构，这与 DNA 解链概率的升高相关。我们进一步表明，限制六聚体分裂会延迟 Cdc45 负载因子 Sld3 的释放，证明解旋酶激活过程中的机械转变与复杂的分解紧密耦合。最后，我们提供了体内证据，表明在解旋酶激活过程中，单链 DNA 通过 Mcm2/5 界面处的专门 DNA 出口门排出，这对于正在进行的 DNA 合成是必不可少的。总之，这些发现为如何重塑复制起点以启动 DNA 复制并揭示解旋酶激活过程中的关键中间体和 DNA 事务建立了一个机制框架。

title: Key role of continental inorganic halogens in the evolution of global air quality
source: Earth and environmental sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Halogen (chlorine, bromine, and iodine) species actively interact with other atmospheric constituents such as nitrogen oxides, organic gases, and ozone. Previous field observations confirmed the ubiquitous existence of halogens in various environments and modeling simulations quantified halogen impacts on air pollutants at present time. However, the abundance and impacts of continental inorganic halogens (CIH) on global air quality throughout history remain unexplored. Here, we present a global inventory of CIH emissions from anthropogenic and biomass-burning sources from 1970 to 2015, with average fluxes of 4302, 207, and 98 kt/yr for chlorine, bromine, and iodine, respectively, representing ~15%, 5-10%, and ~3% of the corresponding global short-lived chlorine, bromine, and iodine emissions. Incorporating these emissions into a global chemistry-climate model reveals a substantial increase ( > 50%) in inorganic halogen levels over continents, helping to reproduce the observed halogen levels. Our results also suggest substantial effects of CIH on air pollutant concentrations with significant spatio-temporal variations, e.g., the largest perturbations in nitrogen oxides and secondary aerosols migrating from Europe and North America in the 1980s-1990s, to East Asia in the 2000s, then to South Asia in the 2010s, suggesting a movement of CIH-associated air quality impact hotspots from the developed regions to the developing areas. This study highlights the under-appreciated role of halogen chemistry in air quality and its evolution in the recent four decades and calls for attention to the potential CIH impacts in emerging regions where field observations are not yet available.
title_zh: 大陆无机卤素在全球空气质量演变中的关键作用
abstract_zh: 卤素（氯、溴和碘）与氮氧化物、有机气体和臭氧等其他大气成分发生积极的相互作用。先前的现场观察证实了卤素在各种环境中普遍存在，并且建模模拟量化了目前卤素对空气污染物的影响。然而，历史上大陆无机卤素 (CIH) 的丰度及其对全球空气质量的影响仍未得到探索。在这里，我们列出了 1970 年至 2015 年人为和生物质燃烧来源的 CIH 排放清单，其中氯、溴和碘的平均通量分别为 4302、207 和 98 kt/年，分别占相应全球短期氯、溴和碘排放量的约 15%、5-10% 和约 3%。将这些排放纳入全球化学气候模型显示各大洲无机卤素水平大幅增加（> 50%），有助于重现观测到的卤素水平。我们的研究结果还表明，CIH对空气污染物浓度的显着影响具有显着的时空变化，例如，氮氧化物和二次气溶胶的最大扰动在1980年代至1990年代从欧洲和北美迁移到2000年代东亚，然后在2010年代迁移到南亚，这表明与CIH相关的空气质量影响热点从发达地区向发展中地区移动。这项研究强调了卤素化学在空气质量中未被充分认识的作用及其近四十年来的演变，并呼吁关注

title: Mechanism of persister formation in response to nitrogen starvation
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Bacterial resistance to antibiotics is a major problem, but most chronic infections that are recalcitrant to therapy are caused by drug-susceptible pathogens. This paradox is explained by the presence of a small population of quiescent persister cells that are tolerant of killing by antibiotics. Persisters typically have a decreased level of ATP, and diminished activity of antibiotic targets. This leads to persister tolerance of antibiotics that kill by corrupting their targets. We reasoned that starvation for nutrients that do not affect the energy level may represent an additional general mechanism of persister formation. In a culture of E. coli experiencing nitrogen starvation, persister levels sharply rise without a change in ATP. Here we show that PyrBI, a key enzyme in nitrogen assimilation and de novo nucleotide synthesis, is largely responsible for persister formation under nitrogen-limiting conditions. Tracking individual cells in a mother machine shows that persisters have low levels of PyrBI. Similarly, PyrBI is low in persisters present in a biofilm. Overexpression of PyrBI quenches the noise in its expression, decreasing persistence. Starvation for other essential nutrients could similarly induce persistence, with stochastic fluctuation in persister gene expression serving as a general mechanism of persister formation.
title_zh: 响应氮饥饿的持久形成机制
abstract_zh: 细菌对抗生素的耐药性是一个主要问题，但大多数难以治疗的慢性感染是由药物敏感的病原体引起的。这种悖论的解释是存在一小群能够耐受抗生素杀死的静止细胞。持续存在者的 ATP 水平通常会降低，抗生素靶标的活性也会降低。这导致了对抗生素的持久耐受性，这些抗生素通过破坏其靶标而导致死亡。我们推断，对不影响能量水平的营养物质的饥饿可能代表了持久物形成的另一种一般机制。在经历氮饥饿的大肠杆菌培养物中，持续存在的水平急剧上升，而 ATP 没有变化。在这里，我们发现 PyrBI 是氮同化和从头核苷酸合成的关键酶，在氮限制条件下对持久细胞的形成负有主要责任。跟踪母机中的单个细胞表明，持久性细胞的 PyrBI 水平较低。类似地，PyrBI 生物膜中存在的持久物含量较低。 PyrBI 的过度表达会消除其表达中的噪音，从而降低持久性。对其他必需营养素的饥饿同样可以诱导持久性，持久性基因表达的随机波动是持久性形成的一般机制。

title: Concept2Brain: an AI model for predicting neurophysiological responses to text and pictures
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Evolving methods rooted in artificial intelligence (AI) offer new opportunities for linking human behavior and experience to brain function. Here, we introduce the Concept2Brain model, a deep network designed to generate synthetic electrophysiological responses to semantic/emotional information conveyed through pictures or text. Leveraging AI solutions like CLIP from OpenAI, the model generates a representation of a stimulus and maps it into an electrophysiological latent space. We demonstrate that this openly available resource generates synthetic neural responses that closely resemble those observed empirically. The Concept2Brain model is provided as a web service tool for creating open and reproducible EEG datasets by predicting brain responses to any semantic concept or picture. Beyond its practical applications, it also paves the way for AI-driven brain activity modeling, offering new possibilities for studying how the brain represents the world.
title_zh: Concept2Brain：用于预测对文本和图片的神经生理反应的人工智能模型
abstract_zh: 植根于人工智能 (AI) 的不断发展的方法为将人类行为和经验与大脑功能联系起来提供了新的机会。在这里，我们介绍 Concept2Brain 模型，这是一个深层网络，旨在针对通过图片或文本传达的语义/情感信息生成综合电生理反应。该模型利用 OpenAI 的 CLIP 等人工智能解决方案，生成刺激的表示并将其映射到电生理学潜在空间中。我们证明，这种公开可用的资源产生的合成神经反应与经验观察到的反应非常相似。 Concept2Brain 模型作为 Web 服务工具提供，用于通过预测大脑对任何语义概念或图片的反应来创建开放且可重复的 EEG 数据集。除了实际应用之外，它还为人工智能驱动的大脑活动建模铺平了道路，为研究大脑如何代表世界提供了新的可能性。

title: The Nigella damascena genome provides insights into transposable element-driven genomic gigantism and trait evolution
source: Biological sciences : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Giant genomes, generally dominated by transposable elements (TEs), have evolved repeatedly in angiosperms. The role of TEs in the evolution of giant genomes, however, remains largely unclear. Here, by ancestral genome size reconstruction, whole-genome sequencing, and comparative genomic and transcriptomic analyses, we reveal the processes, drivers, and consequences of genomic gigantism in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). We find that the giant diploid genome of Nigella damascena (10.84 Gb, ~35 times that of columbine) has evolved from an ~1.46 Gb ancestral genome by persistent TE accumulation over 60 million years. TE insertions in genic regions have generated genes with ultra-long introns or altered coding sequences, as well as Nigella-specific TE-derived genes, collectively accounting for ~20% of protein-coding genes in the N. damascena genome. TE-mediated regulatory changes and gene duplications/losses likely underpin the evolution of elaborate petals, fused carpels, and specialized secondary metabolites in N. damascena. These findings reveal how TEs drive genomic gigantism and shape specialized traits, advancing our understanding of genome size evolution.
title_zh: Nigella damascena 基因组提供了对转座元件驱动的基因组巨人症和性状进化的见解
abstract_zh: 巨大的基因组通常以转座元件（TE）为主，在被子植物中反复进化。然而，TE 在巨型基因组进化中的作用仍不清楚。在这里，通过祖先基因组大小重建、全基因组测序以及比较基因组和转录组分析，我们揭示了毛茛科（毛茛科）基因组巨型化的过程、驱动因素和后果。我们发现，Nigella damascena 的巨大二倍体基因组（10.84 Gb，约为耧斗碱的 35 倍）是通过 6000 万年的持续 TE 积累从约 1.46 Gb 的祖先基因组进化而来的。基因区域中的 TE 插入产生了具有超长内含子或改变的编码序列的基因，以及黑种草特异性 TE 衍生基因，总共占大马士革黑种草基因组中蛋白质编码基因的约 20%。 TE 介导的调控变化和基因重复/丢失可能是大马士革猪笼草复杂花瓣、融合心皮和专门次级代谢产物进化的基础。这些发现揭示了 TE 如何驱动基因组巨型化并塑造特殊性状，增进我们对基因组大小进化的理解。

title: Disproportionate exposure to extreme floods in historically redlined U.S. communities
source: Scientific community and society : Nature Communications subject feeds
abstract: Extreme floods and historical public policies both leave lasting impacts. We analyzed flood exposure across the neighborhoods of 202 US cities historically assessed for lending risk by the Home Owners’ Loan Corporation on a scale from ‘best (A) to ‘hazardous’ (D). Using high-resolution flood modeling and dasymetric population mapping, we found that D-graded neighborhoods bear a disproportionate flood burden in roughly three-quarters of cities. This inequality follows a systematic gradient: A- and B-graded neighborhoods are underrepresented in the flooded population, C-graded neighborhoods are proportionately represented, and D-graded neighborhoods are overrepresented. A greater fraction of D-graded residents are exposed to the 100-yr flood (6.4%) than A-graded residents to the 1000-yr flood (5.9%) with the gap widening at higher-magnitude floods. Flood disparities are most pronounced in the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic regions, aligning with the historical concentration of industrial labor and redlined neighborhoods along waterways. However, we find that proximity to waterways alone does not explain the observed inequality: flood disparities persist even among neighborhoods far from major rivers and coasts, implicating infrastructure deficits as a compounding factor. Neighborhoods marked as ‘hazardous’ nearly a century ago remain disproportionately vulnerable today, underscoring the need for equitable urban planning.
title_zh: 美国历史上的红线社区遭受极端洪水的比例过高
abstract_zh: 极端洪水和历史公共政策都会留下持久的影响。我们分析了 202 个美国城市社区的洪水风险，历史上由房主贷款公司按照从“最佳”(A) 到“危险”(D) 的等级进行贷款风险评估。利用高分辨率洪水模型和测绘人口测绘，我们发现大约四分之三的城市中 D 级社区承受着不成比例的洪水负担。这种不平等遵循系统梯度：A 级和 B 级社区在洪水人口中所占比例不足，C 级社区所占比例较高，而 D 级社区所占比例过高。遭受100年一遇洪水的D级居民（6.4%）比遭受1000年一遇洪水的A级居民（5.9%）要多，而且在更高强度的洪水中，差距会扩大。洪水差异在中西部和中大西洋地区最为明显，这与历史上工业劳动力的集中和水道沿线的红线社区一致。然而，我们发现，仅靠近水道并不能解释所观察到的不平等：即使在远离主要河流和海岸的社区中，洪水差异也持续存在，这意味着基础设施赤字是一个复合因素。近一个世纪前被标记为“危险”的社区如今仍然极其脆弱，这凸显了公平城市规划的必要性。

title: Step geometry–guided growth of rhombohedral graphene
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Rhombohedral (ABC)–stacked graphene has emerged as a platform for exploring correlated and topological physics. However, its large-scale, pure-phase synthesis has been hindered by intrinsic thermodynamic metastability and kinetic instability. In this work, we introduce a step geometry–guided epitaxial strategy to deterministically control interlayer slip, enabling the synthesis of pure-phase rhombohedral graphene. Using this approach, we obtained pure (phase purity > 99%) rhombohedral graphene with an area reaching 160 micrometers by 80 micrometers and thickness ranging from ~15 layers to ~120 nanometers. The resulting samples establish the first comprehensive reference dataset of Raman fingerprints and intrinsic band structures from few-layer films to ~200-layer bulk. Electronic transport measurements reveal a layer-antiferromagnetic state and the quantum anomalous Hall effect, enabling scalable exploration of next-generation quantum science and technology applications.
title_zh: 阶梯几何引导菱面体石墨烯的生长
abstract_zh: 菱面体（ABC）堆叠石墨烯已成为探索相关物理和拓扑物理的平台。然而，其大规模纯相合成受到固有的热力学亚稳定性和动力学不稳定性的阻碍。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种阶梯几何引导的外延策略来确定性地控制层间滑移，从而能够合成纯相菱面体石墨烯。使用这种方法，我们获得了纯（相纯度> 99%）菱形石墨烯，其面积达到160微米×80微米，厚度范围从~15层到~120纳米。由此产生的样品建立了第一个全面的拉曼指纹和本征能带结构参考数据集，从几层薄膜到约 200 层块体。电子输运测量揭示了层状反铁磁态和量子反常霍尔效应，从而能够对下一代量子科学和技术应用进行可扩展的探索。

title: Crush-resistant air sacs allow insect larvae to exploit aquatic habitats at extreme depth
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
The absence of aquatic insects from pelagic marine habitats has been attributed to their air-filled tracheal respiratory system, which could implode at depth while undertaking diel vertical migrations to escape predatory fish. However, we found that the aquatic larvae of the lake fly
                    Chaoborus edulis
                    in Lake Malawi have modified their tracheal system into reinforced buoyancy-regulating air-filled sacs, allowing them to escape predatory fish by undertaking these migrations well over 200 meters deep into the lake’s anoxic hypolimnion during the day. The crush depth of their air sacs increases with each instar, with final instars resisting implosion at depths greater than half a kilometer. Contrary to expectations, these insects adapt to the extreme hydrostatic pressures of deep-water habitats, allowing them to coexist with pelagic fish.
title_zh: 抗压气囊使昆虫幼虫能够利用极深的水生栖息地
abstract_zh:
远洋海洋栖息地中没有水生昆虫的原因是它们的气管呼吸系统充满空气，在进行昼夜垂直迁徙以逃避掠食性鱼类时，该系统可能会在深处内爆。然而我们发现湖里的水生幼虫飞来飞去
                    美味豆豉
                    马拉维湖的鱼类将其气管系统改造为增强型浮力调节充气囊，使它们能够在白天迁徙到湖中缺氧的低层水深 200 米深处，以逃避掠食性鱼类的追捕。它们气囊的挤压深度随着每个龄期的增加而增加，最后的龄期可以在超过半公里的深度抵抗内爆。与预期相反，这些昆虫适应了深水栖息地的极端静水压力，使它们能够与中上层鱼类共存。

title: Spatially resolving the cone of reaction for a single molecule
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Collisions of atoms and molecules are required for bond formation and are thus key to any chemical reaction. Their outcome is determined by the collision energy, relative orientation, and impact parameter of the reactants. Collision studies in the gas phase have shown that energies are easily controlled, whereas it is difficult to steer the molecular orientations and completely impossible to control the impact parameter. Here, we study the collision of individual molecules at a surface where each involved compound is imaged before and after collision by scanning tunneling microscopy, allowing precise control of orientations and impact parameter. We observe that the molecules must collide in a narrow cone of reaction and that surface atom displacements can enable a reaction even for disfavored pathways.
title_zh: 空间解析单个分子的反应锥
abstract_zh: 原子和分子的碰撞是键形成所必需的，因此是任何化学反应的关键。它们的结果由反应物的碰撞能量、相对方向和冲击参数决定。气相碰撞研究表明，能量很容易控制，但很难控制分子方向，并且完全不可能控制碰撞参数。在这里，我们研究了表面上单个分子的碰撞，通过扫描隧道显微镜对碰撞前后的每个涉及的化合物进行成像，从而可以精确控制方向和冲击参数。我们观察到分子必须在狭窄的反应锥体中碰撞，并且表面原子位移甚至可以在不利的路径下发生反应。

title: Late-stage functionalization with strain-release warheads enables tunable covalent inhibition
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Covalent inhibition continues to gain momentum as a strategy for selective protein modulation in both therapeutic and chemical biology contexts. Covalent reactive groups (CRGs) typically engage nucleophilic residues such as cysteine, resulting in targeted protein inactivation. However, common electrophiles such as acrylamides often suffer from nonselective reactivity, leading to off-target effects and toxicity. To overcome these limitations, we developed a modular sulfur(IV) reagent platform for the mild, late-stage installation of sulfonyl- and sulfonimidoyl-bicyclobutane motifs with complete cysteine selectivity. This methodology enables access to diverse sulfur(VI) CRGs with tunable strain-release reactivity. Incorporation into US Food and Drug Administration–approved covalent inhibitors demonstrated effective bioisosteric replacement of acrylamides and the potential of strain-release CRGs for selective protein targeting. Preclinical studies in mice have validated this approach, highlighting its promise for next-generation covalent drug design.
title_zh: 应变释放弹头的后期功能化可实现可调节的共价抑制
abstract_zh: 共价抑制作为治疗和化学生物学背景下选择性蛋白质调节的策略继续获得动力。共价反应基团 (CRG) 通常与半胱氨酸等亲核残基结合，导致目标蛋白质失活。然而，常见的亲电子试剂（例如丙烯酰胺）通常会发生非选择性反应，导致脱靶效应和毒性。为了克服这些限制，我们开发了一种模块化硫 (IV) 试剂平台，用于磺酰基和磺酰亚氨基双环丁烷基序的温和后期安装，具有完全的半胱氨酸选择性。该方法能够获得具有可调应变释放反应性的多种硫 (VI) CRG。纳入美国食品和药物管理局批准的共价抑制剂，证明了丙烯酰胺的有效生物等排替代以及菌株释放 CRG 用于选择性蛋白质靶向的潜力。小鼠临床前研究验证了这种方法，凸显了其对下一代共价药物设计的前景。

title: The global biogeography of passerine songs
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Although bird songs are classic models for understanding the evolution of vocal communication, their global diversity has long made the development of a unifying framework challenging. By analyzing the acoustic architecture of songs from more than 3000 passerine species worldwide, we show that this acoustic space can be structured around eight elemental motifs. The differential use of these motifs is driven by a combination of species’ biological traits (social organization, morphology, and mating system) and the physics of sound propagation. In tropical rainforests, environmental filtering for transmission efficiency favors structurally simple motifs, such as flat whistles. Conversely, in temperate regions, where high population densities facilitate close-range communication and short breeding seasons intensify sexual selection, the balance shifts toward complex, information-rich motifs, such as ultrafast trills, despite their susceptibility to acoustic degradation. Ultimately, the global geography of birdsong reflects a spatially varying equilibrium between physical environmental constraints and the biological drive for complex communication.
title_zh: 雀形目鸟类鸣叫的全球生物地理学
abstract_zh: 尽管鸟鸣声是理解声音交流进化的经典模型，但它们的全球多样性长期以来使得统一框架的开发充满挑战。通过分析全球 3000 多种雀形目鸟类歌曲的声学结构，我们表明该声学空间可以围绕八个基本主题构建。这些主题的不同使用是由物种的生物特征（社会组织、形态和交配系统）和声音传播物理学的结合驱动的。在热带雨林中，传输效率的环境过滤有利于结构简单的图案，例如平口哨。相反，在温带地区，人口密度高有利于近距离交流，而繁殖季节短则加强了性选择，平衡转向复杂、信息丰富的主题，例如超快颤音，尽管它们容易受到声学退化的影响。最终，鸟鸣的全球地理反映了物理环境限制和复杂交流的生物驱动力之间的空间变化平衡。

title: Invasive species’ environmental impacts are more severe in the Global South
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Invasive alien species (IAS) are a major threat to biodiversity, yet their impact distribution remains poorly understood. Global biodiversity assessments suggest the highest impacts in wealthy countries of the Global North, but this is only inferred from IAS numbers, reflecting research bias. Using a new global database of standardized impact measures, we calculated average impact severity per country and found that it is higher in the Global South despite more than twice as many reports in the Global North. Weak governance and limited management capacity are the main drivers of high impact severity. Emerging economies with rapid economic growth but poor governance are particularly vulnerable. Failure to recognize the Global South as facing the highest IAS impacts diverts attention away from the most threatened regions.
title_zh: 入侵物种对南半球的环境影响更为严重
abstract_zh: 外来入侵物种 (IAS) 是生物多样性的主要威胁，但对其影响分布仍知之甚少。全球生物多样性评估表明，北半球富裕国家的影响最大，但这只是根据 IAS 数据推断的，反映了研究偏差。我们使用标准化影响衡量指标的新全球数据库计算了每个国家的平均影响严重程度，发现尽管全球北方的报告数量是南方国家的两倍多，但全球南方的影响严重程度更高。治理薄弱和管理能力有限是造成严重影响的主要原因。经济快速增长但治理不善的新兴经济体尤其容易受到影响。如果不认识到南半球面临着最严重的外来入侵影响，就会转移人们对受威胁最严重地区的注意力。

title: The rise and fall of language diversity through the Holocene
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Characterizing the factors that have shaped linguistic diversity is fundamental for understanding human history, culture, and cognition. In this study, we combined statistical and social computational modeling, ethnographic data, and paleodemographic inference to model trajectories of global linguistic diversity. Before the onset of plant and animal domestication, the number of languages was smaller than it is today (4500 to 6000 compared with 7500). Subsequent increases in global population precipitated increased linguistic diversity. We uncovered a linguistic “golden age” with tens of thousands of languages 3000 to 1000 years ago. Great loss of linguistic diversity did not begin with recent colonial expansion but as multinational empires first spread along with their languages, pathogens, and cultures. Thus, extinction has likely played a much greater role in shaping linguistic and cultural diversity than previously thought.
title_zh: 全新世语言多样性的兴衰
abstract_zh: 描述塑造语言多样性的因素对于理解人类历史、文化和认知至关重要。在这项研究中，我们结合了统计和社会计算模型、人种学数据和古人口学推断来模拟全球语言多样性的轨迹。在动植物驯化出现之前，语言的数量比现在少（从 7500 种到 4500 到 6000 种）。随后全球人口的增加促进了语言多样性的增加。我们发现了3000至1000年前的一个拥有数万种语言的语言“黄金时代”。语言多样性的巨大丧失并不是从最近的殖民扩张开始的，而是随着多民族帝国首先连同其语言、病原体和文化一起传播而开始的。因此，灭绝在塑造语言和文化多样性方面发挥的作用可能比之前想象的要大得多。

title: University science in the US needs a coherent plan
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: The Trump administration continues to degrade America’s scientific establishment, causing widespread harm to the country’s broader interests and well-being. Last week, the Association of American Universities reported that graduate student enrollment in major research universities, which award half of all doctorate degrees in the United States, is down 15% compared to a year ago. And no wonder, considering the effect of recent immigration policies that deter international students and the financial uncertainties that universities are facing given the unpredictable nature of federal funding. The ability to support new doctoral students depends heavily on research grants, and any responsible administrator would be cautious about making commitments to students they can’t keep. This is discouraging to the scientific community but should be alarming to everyone.
title_zh: 美国的大学科学需要一个连贯的计划
abstract_zh: 特朗普政府继续削弱美国的科学机构，对国家更广泛的利益和福祉造成广泛损害。上周，美国大学协会报告称，主要研究型大学的研究生入学率比一年前下降了 15%，这些大学授予美国一半的博士学位。考虑到最近阻碍国际学生的移民政策的影响，以及考虑到联邦资金的不可预测性，大学所面临的财务不确定性，也就不足为奇了。支持新博士生的能力在很大程度上取决于研究资助，任何负责任的管理者都会对向他们无法兑现的学生做出承诺持谨慎态度。这令科学界感到沮丧，但也应该引起所有人的警惕。
