title: Back reaction of the untwisting solar corona scars sunspots
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The evolution of magnetic fields in the tenuous solar corona is predominantly governed by the motions of the underlying dense photosphere. Despite this, coronal magnetic restructuring driven by magnetic reconnection between interacting coronal fields can sometimes react backward to change photospheric magnetic fields. However, the mechanism of reactions remains undetermined. Here, we report the discovery of a back-reaction phenomenon: The untwisting of coronal loops that become twisted during reconnection in an eruption results in enhanced currents at the boundary of their footpoint away from the eruption, manifesting as the growth of a sunspot scar. It is revealed to arise from the Alfvénic reverse transfer of magnetic twist from the corona to the lower atmosphere, through joint space observations and a magnetohydrodynamic simulation. These findings provide a viable and quantitative interpretation for the majority of puzzling photospheric changes associated with coronal mass ejections and/or flares and warn for unexpected magnetic field evolutions in sunspots and starspots.
title_zh: 解开的日冕疤痕太阳黑子的反向反应
abstract_zh: 脆弱的日冕中磁场的演化主要受底层致密光球层运动的控制。尽管如此，由相互作用的日冕场之间的磁重联驱动的日冕磁重组有时会发生反向反应，从而改变光球磁场。然而，反应机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们报告了逆反应现象的发现：在喷发中重新连接期间扭曲的日冕环的解开导致远离喷发的足点边界处的电流增强，表现为太阳黑子疤痕的生长。通过联合空间观测和磁流体动力学模拟，发现它是由从日冕到低层大气的磁扭曲的阿尔夫尼克逆向转移引起的。这些发现为与日冕物质抛射和/或耀斑相关的大多数令人费解的光球变化提供了可行的定量解释，并警告太阳黑子和星黑子中意外的磁场演化。

title: Single-cell multiomics and chromatin structure reveal gene-regulatory dynamics in heart failure
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Heart failure is a leading cause of morbidity and mortality, yet gene-regulatory mechanisms driving cell type–specific pathologic responses remain undefined. Here, we present the cell type–resolved transcriptomes, chromatin accessibility, histone modifications, and chromatin organization of 13 nonfailing and 23 failing human hearts across all cardiac chambers. Integrative analyses revealed dynamic changes in cell type composition, gene-regulatory programs, and chromatin organization, particularly in cardiomyocytes and fibroblasts. Mapping cell type–specific enhancer-gene interactions from these analyses enabled the illumination of likely causal genetic contributors to heart failure from genetic association data. Together, these findings provide multimodal gene-regulatory maps of the human heart in health and disease, offering a framework for designing precise, cell type–targeted therapies for treating heart failure.
title_zh: 单细胞多组学和染色质结构揭示心力衰竭的基因调控动态
abstract_zh: 心力衰竭是发病和死亡的主要原因，但驱动细胞类型特异性病理反应的基因调控机制仍不清楚。在这里，我们展示了 13 个正常和 23 个衰竭人类心脏所有心室的细胞类型解析转录组、染色质可及性、组蛋白修饰和染色质组织。综合分析揭示了细胞类型组成、基因调控程序和染色质组织的动态变化，特别是在心肌细胞和成纤维细胞中。从这些分析中绘制细胞类型特异性增强子基因相互作用图谱，可以从遗传关联数据中阐明可能导致心力衰竭的遗传因素。总之，这些发现提供了人类心脏在健康和疾病中的多模式基因调控图谱，为设计精确的、针对细胞类型的心力衰竭治疗方法提供了框架。

title: Single-cell multiomics connects 3D genome and transcriptome alterations in Alzheimer’s disease
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Alzheimer’s disease (AD) disrupts brain function through cell type–specific transcriptomic and epigenomic alterations, yet the contribution of three-dimensional (3D) genome organization to AD remains poorly understood. We applied GAGE-seq (genome architecture and gene expression by sequencing) to jointly profile gene expression and 3D chromatin structure in single cells from postmortem brain tissue from AD patients and age-matched individuals without AD, revealing chromatin reorganization linked to cell type–specific dysregulation. Integrations with spatial transcriptomics and chromatin accessibility data uncovered altered niches reflecting genome compartment remodeling and regulatory element reorganization. Hicformer, a deep learning framework, showed that 3D genome features are essential for predicting disease-relevant, cell type–specific gene expression changes. Our results establish higher-order chromatin alterations as a component of AD-associated molecular pathology, providing a multiscale view of transcriptional regulation and 3D genome organization in neurodegeneration.
title_zh: 单细胞多组学将阿尔茨海默病的 3D 基因组和转录组改变联系起来
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 通过细胞类型特异性转录组和表观基因组改变破坏大脑功能，但三维 (3D) 基因组组织对 AD 的贡献仍知之甚少。我们应用 GAGE-seq（基因组结构和基因表达测序）联合分析 AD 患者和年龄匹配的非 AD 个体死后脑组织中单细胞的基因表达和 3D 染色质结构，揭示与细胞类型特异性失调相关的染色质重组。与空间转录组学和染色质可及性数据的整合发现了反映基因组区室重塑和调控元件重组的改变的生态位。 Hicformer 是一个深度学习框架，它表明 3D 基因组特征对于预测与疾病相关的细胞类型特异性基因表达变化至关重要。我们的结果将高阶染色质改变确定为 AD 相关分子病理学的一个组成部分，提供了神经退行性变中转录调控和 3D 基因组组织的多尺度视图。

title: What lies beyond the Fields Medal?
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
title_zh: 菲尔兹奖之外还有什么？

title: Epigenetic and 3D genome reprogramming during the aging of the human hippocampus
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Changes in gene expression have been observed in the aging human brain, but our understanding of the underlying regulatory mechanisms remains limited. To unravel these complexities, we analyzed single-nucleus gene expression, chromatin accessibility, DNA methylation, and three-dimensional (3D) chromatin architecture from human hippocampal tissues spanning the adult lifespan. We identified both linear and nonlinear dynamic gene regulatory programs during aging. Between the ages of 50 to 75, embryonic yolk sac–derived microglia were depleted and replaced by cells resembling peripheral blood monocyte–derived microglia. Hippocampal astrocytes decreased substantially with age, including those regulating synaptic transmission. Across cell types, 3D genome architecture underwent global erosion. Our analysis provides insights for how altered gene regulatory programs promote cell type–specific aging phenotypes in the human brain.
title_zh: 人类海马衰老过程中的表观遗传和 3D 基因组重编程
abstract_zh: 在衰老的人脑中观察到基因表达的变化，但我们对潜在调节机制的理解仍然有限。为了阐明这些复杂性，我们分析了跨越成人寿命的人类海马组织的单核基因表达、染色质可及性、DNA 甲基化和三维 (3D) 染色质结构。我们确定了衰老过程中的线性和非线性动态基因调控程序。在 50 至 75 岁之间，胚胎卵黄囊来源的小胶质细胞被耗尽，并被类似于外周血单核细胞来源的小胶质细胞的细胞所取代。海马星形胶质细胞随着年龄的增长而大幅减少，包括那些调节突触传递的星形胶质细胞。在不同的细胞类型中，3D 基因组结构经历了整体侵蚀。我们的分析为改变基因调控程序如何促进人脑中细胞类型特异性的衰老表型提供了见解。

title: Westerly induced precipitation increase drives near-surface ground ice gain on the Tibetan Plateau despite warming
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Near-surface ground ice loss is a key sign of permafrost degradation under global warming, dictating ground destabilization and carbon feedback. However, recent field evidence suggests that ground ice may locally accumulate, while the driving mechanisms remain unclear. Leveraging borehole ground ice observations, a physics-based permafrost model, and satellite-based ground deformation data, we identify an anomalous ice increase at the active layer bottom despite climate warming across the interior Tibetan Plateau, occupying 35% of plateau’s permafrost area. Strengthened westerlies have enhanced precipitation, supplying additional soil moisture that refreezes at the active layer bottom and drives this unexpected ice gain. Freeze-thaw process associated with the accumulated ice amplifies ground deformation, destabilizing permafrost landscapes and threatening socioeconomic activities. This anomalous ice gain in permafrost regions, together with the Karakoram anomalous glacier mass increase, represents a divergent cryospheric ice gain against global ice loss under climate warming, highlighting that rapid precipitation increase may locally outweigh temperature in driving cryosphere evolution on the Tibetan Plateau.
title_zh: 尽管气候变暖，西风引起的降水增加仍导致青藏高原近地表冰的增加
abstract_zh: 近地表地面冰损失是全球变暖下永久冻土退化的一个关键迹象，决定了地面不稳定和碳反馈。然而，最近的现场证据表明，地面冰可能会局部积聚，但其驱动机制仍不清楚。利用钻孔地面冰观测、基于物理的永久冻土模型和基于卫星的地面变形数据，我们发现，尽管青藏高原内陆气候变暖，但活动层底部的冰异常增加，占高原永久冻土面积的35%。加强的西风带增加了降水，提供了额外的土壤水分，这些水分在活动层底部重新冻结并推动了这种意想不到的冰增加。与积冰相关的冻融过程会加剧地面变形，破坏永久冻土景观的稳定并威胁社会经济活动。永久冻土区的异常冰量增加，加上喀喇昆仑冰川质量的异常增加，代表了气候变暖下冰冻圈冰量增加与全球冰损失的不同，这凸显出降水的快速增加可能局部超过了推动青藏高原冰冻圈演化的温度。

title: Catalytic asymmetric synthesis of inherently chiral tricyclic diazepinones: Access to (+)-telenzepine
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Molecules with inherent chirality, which stems from their overall conformation rather than local stereogenic centers, present a notable synthetic challenge. This is especially evident for bioactive, saddle-shaped tricyclic diazepinones, whose conformational flexibility has hampered asymmetric synthesis. Herein, we address this issue through a late-stage organocatalytic asymmetric N-H alkylation strategy. By introducing torsional strain via strategic N-H functionalization, we lock the molecular chiral conformation and enable direct synthesis of diverse enantioenriched tricyclic diazepinones from prochiral precursors. The modular nature of this approach is demonstrated through the kinetic resolution of racemic substrates, as well as in, to our knowledge, the first enantioselective synthesis and absolute configuration confirmation of the drug molecule (+)-telenzepine.
title_zh: 催化不对称合成固有手性三环二氮杂酮：获得 (+)-替仑西平
abstract_zh: 具有固有手性的分子源于其整体构象而不是局部立体中心，提出了显着的合成挑战。这对于具有生物活性的鞍形三环二氮杂酮类化合物尤其明显，其构象灵活性阻碍了不对称合成。在此，我们通过后期有机催化不对称 N-H 烷基化策略解决了这个问题。通过策略性 N-H 官能化引入扭转应变，我们锁定了分子手性构象，并能够从前手性前体直接合成各种对映体富集的三环二氮杂酮。这种方法的模块化性质通过外消旋底物的动力学拆分以及据我们所知的药物分子 (+)-替仑西平的首次对映选择性合成和绝对构型确认得到了证明。

title: Core-shell particle engineering overturns conventional purity-corrosion dependence in Mg alloys
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Magnesium (Mg) alloys offer high weight-saving potential for transportation technologies; however, their use remains constrained by poor corrosion resistance, which is strongly dependent on alloy purity. The presence of impurities, such as iron (Fe), severely degrades the corrosion resistance of Mg alloys. Herein, we present an alloy design strategy that substantially improves the corrosion resistance, even when using low-purity Mg. Our method produces core-shell particles, where an Fe-rich core is encapsulated by an Fe-depleted shell embedded in the Mg matrix. This shell acts as a local microscavenger that isolates the core and suppresses impurity-triggered corrosion, resulting in corrosion resistance achievable only when using ultrahigh-purity Mg. This approach provides a practical pathway for the development of high-performance Mg alloys without relying on costly purification.
title_zh: 核壳颗粒工程颠覆了镁合金中传统的纯度-腐蚀依赖性
abstract_zh: 镁 (Mg) 合金为运输技术提供了巨大的减重潜力；然而，它们的使用仍然受到耐腐蚀性差的限制，而耐腐蚀性很大程度上取决于合金的纯度。铁 (Fe) 等杂质的存在会严重降低镁合金的耐腐蚀性。在此，我们提出了一种合金设计策略，即使使用低纯度镁，也能显着提高耐腐蚀性。我们的方法产生核壳颗粒，其中富含铁的核被嵌入镁基体中的贫铁壳封装。该壳充当局部微清除剂，隔离核心并抑制杂质引发的腐蚀，从而实现只有使用超高纯镁才能实现的耐腐蚀性。这种方法为开发高性能镁合金提供了一条实用途径，无需依赖昂贵的纯化。

title: Strain-specific epistasis shapes fitness landscapes of APOBEC3G antagonism by HIV-1 Vif proteins
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Host immune factors shape viral evolution. The HIV-1 viral infectivity factor (Vif) protein counteracts host Apolipoprotein B Messenger RNA Editing Enzyme Catalytic Polypeptide–like 3 (A3G) to ensure productive infection. Using deep mutational scanning across two divergent HIV-1 Vif proteins, we systematically mapped and compared the mutational landscapes governing Vif antagonism of A3G. These high-resolution fitness maps reveal core principles of host-virus coevolution. Most missense mutations were strongly deleterious, reflecting pervasive purifying selection. However, several highly conserved Vif residues at binding interfaces with A3G, RNA, and core-binding factor β exhibited unexpected mutational tolerance, indicating structural flexibility at these sites. Comparative analysis revealed that strain-specific epistasis dictates Vif-A3G interactions, including adaptive changes at the Vif-A3G interface. Further analysis uncovered notable temporal epistasis, whereby initially adaptive Vif mutations critical for antagonizing hominoid A3G subsequently exhibited reduced fitness. Thus, structural robustness permits adaptation, while epistasis imposes constraints on Vif’s ability to maintain A3G antagonism while remaining responsive to new evolutionary pressures.
title_zh: 菌株特异性上位性塑造了 HIV-1 Vif 蛋白对 APOBEC3G 拮抗作用的适应度
abstract_zh: 宿主免疫因素影响病毒进化。 HIV-1 病毒感染因子 (Vif) 蛋白可对抗宿主载脂蛋白 B 信使 RNA 编辑酶催化多肽样 3 (A3G)，以确保有效感染。通过对两种不同的 HIV-1 Vif 蛋白进行深度突变扫描，我们系统地绘制并比较了控制 A3G 的 Vif 拮抗作用的突变图谱。这些高分辨率的适应度图揭示了宿主病毒共同进化的核心原理。大多数错义突变具有很强的毒性，反映出普遍存在的纯化选择。然而，与 A3G、RNA 和核心结合因子 β 结合界面上的几个高度保守的 Vif 残基表现出意想不到的突变耐受性，表明这些位点的结构灵活性。比较分析表明，菌株特异性上位决定了 Vif-A3G 相互作用，包括 Vif-A3G 界面的适应性变化。进一步的分析发现了显着的时间上位性，最初对拮抗类人猿 A3G 至关重要的适应性 Vif 突变随后表现出适应性下降。因此，结构稳健性允许适应，而上位性则限制了 Vif 维持 A3G 拮抗作用同时保持对新进化压力的反应的能力。

title: Dopamine D2 receptors bypass canonical signaling to directly tune NMDA receptor function and aversive learning
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Dopamine D2 receptors (D2Rs) modulate reward learning and aversive behaviors, with dysfunction linked to addiction and psychiatric disorders. D2Rs regulate behavior through modulation of striatal glutamatergic transmission, yet how D2Rs control postsynaptic glutamate signaling remains poorly understood. Using molecular tools to selectively disrupt heteromeric interactions while preserving canonical signaling, we show that physical coupling between D2Rs and GluN2B-containing
                    N
                    -methyl-
                    d
                    -aspartate (NMDA) receptors in nucleus accumbens medium spiny neurons enables D2Rs to suppress NMDA receptor function independent of canonical G protein and arrestin signaling. This modulation was input specific, occurred at thalamic but not cortical synapses converging on the same neurons, constrained long-term potentiation, and, within the medial ventral nucleus accumbens, facilitated aversive learning. These findings reveal that D2Rs can bypass second messenger systems to tune glutamatergic transmission through receptor-receptor interactions, providing a mechanism by which dopamine selectively gates specific glutamatergic inputs to control striatal plasticity and behavioral adaptation.
title_zh: 多巴胺 D2 受体绕过经典信号传导直接调节 NMDA 受体功能和厌恶学习
abstract_zh:
多巴胺 D2 受体 (D2R) 调节奖励学习和厌恶行为，其功能障碍与成瘾和精神疾病有关。 D2R 通过调节纹状体谷氨酸传递来调节行为，但 D2R 如何控制突触后谷氨酸信号传导仍知之甚少。使用分子工具选择性破坏异聚相互作用，同时保留规范信号传导，我们表明 D2R 和含 GluN2B 之间的物理耦合
                    氮
                    -甲基-
                    d
                    伏隔核中型多棘神经元中的天冬氨酸 (NMDA) 受体使 D2R 能够独立于经典 G 蛋白和抑制蛋白信号传导来抑制 NMDA 受体功能。这种调节是输入特异性的，发生在丘脑但不是皮质突触，聚集在相同的神经元上，限制了长期增强，并且在内侧腹侧伏隔核内，促进了厌恶性学习。这些发现表明，D2R 可以绕过第二信使系统，通过受体-受体相互作用来调节谷氨酸能传递，从而提供一种机制，多巴胺可以选择性地门控特定谷氨酸能输入，从而控制纹状体可塑性和行为适应。

title: Biohybrid chiral materials for an ultralight reconfigurable flying robot
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Structural handedness plays a key role in governing various motions in animals and plants, especially for rotational motion and aerodynamic response in flying systems. However, harnessing handedness in artificial materials to enable dynamic, wireless control of untethered miniature flyers remains largely unexplored. Here, we report a feather-polymer hybrid chiral flyer that achieves light-controlled airborne motion. The device integrates natural afterfeathers with a light-responsive actuator synthesized via photopolymerization of azobenzene-functionalized groups, enabling programmable and reversible photomechanical actuation. The handedness of the flyer arises from actuator-induced torsion, while optical modulation of aerodynamic drag allows controlled spinning and altitude adjustment under steady airflow. We demonstrate independent control of multiple untethered flyers and midair collection through vortex-induced aggregation. Computational fluid dynamics simulations reveal asymmetric pressure gradients that are associated with the direction of rotation, while localized low-airflow regions facilitate aerial trapping. These findings introduce a strategy for programmable, wireless ultralight flyers, bridging natural structures and synthetic actuators toward intelligent airborne systems.
title_zh: 用于超轻可重构飞行机器人的生物混合手性材料
abstract_zh: 结构惯用手在控制动物和植物的各种运动中起着关键作用，特别是对于飞行系统中的旋转运动和空气动力学响应。然而，利用人造材料中的惯用手来实现对不受束缚的微型飞行器的动态、无线控制在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在这里，我们报告了一种羽毛聚合物混合手性飞行物，可实现光控空中运动。该器件将天然后羽毛与通过偶氮苯官能团光聚合合成的光响应致动器集成在一起，从而实现可编程和可逆的光机械致动。飞行器的惯用手由致动器引起的扭转产生，而空气动力阻力的光学调制允许在稳定气流下控制旋转和高度调整。我们展示了通过涡流引起的聚集对多个不受束缚的传单和空中收集的独立控制。计算流体动力学模拟揭示了与旋转方向相关的不对称压力梯度，而局部低气流区域有利于空中捕获。这些发现引入了一种可编程、无线超轻型飞行器的策略，将自然结构和合成执行器与智能机载系统连接起来。

title: The legacy of privilege: Social inheritance reverses sex differences in reproductive inequality in the spotted hyena
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
title_zh: 特权的遗产：社会继承扭转了斑鬣狗生殖不平等的性别差异
abstract_zh:
女性和男性生殖成功率的不平等塑造了自然选择和性选择。对于有性繁殖的物种，达尔文-贝特曼范式预测雄性比雌性存在更大的生殖不平等。导致人类和其他动物生殖不平等的一个机制是特权的社会继承。在这里，我们证明这种机制可以扭转生殖不平等中的男性偏见。使用跨越八代斑点鬣狗的 29 年数据集（
                    番红花
                    ），在这个物种中，社会地位和特权是从母亲那里继承的，我们发现，按年估算，女性的生殖不平等程度低于男性，但女性的生殖不平等在几代人中增长得更为强烈，从而迅速扭转了对女性的性别偏见。我们的研究结果表明，特权的社会继承（i）是生殖不平等中性别差异的强大驱动因素，（ii）可以解释为什么女性在某些物种中更具竞争力。我们概述了生殖不平等如何影响女性和男性的生殖策略、性内竞争和遗传进化。

title: The bombardment history on the lunar farside revealed by 40Ar/39Ar geochronology of Chang’e-6 impact melt rocks
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The reconstruction of the lunar bombardment history is pivotal to understanding the evolution of Earth-Moon system. So far, it heavily depends on geochronological studies of lunar nearside samples but lacks direct sample constraints from the lunar farside. Here, we present 28 single-clast
                    40
                    Ar/
                    39
                    Ar ages of impact melt rocks returned by the Chang’e-6 mission. They reveal impact events spanning from ∼4.33 to ∼1.13 billion years (Ga). In particular, three melt clasts date to ∼4.16 Ga, consistent with the recent dating of the Apollo basin, and only two ages fall at 4.0 to 3.7 Ga. The presence of older ages (>4.0 Ga) and lack of predominant age around ∼3.9 Ga suggest that the lunar farside bombardment was not dominated by a cataclysmic spike but by a smooth long-term decline punctuated by later impacts.
title_zh: 嫦娥六号撞击熔岩40Ar/39Ar年代学揭示的月球背面轰击历史
abstract_zh:
重建月球轰击历史对于理解地月系统的演化至关重要。到目前为止，它在很大程度上依赖于月球近侧样本的地质年代学研究，但缺乏来自月球背面的直接样本约束。在这里，我们展示了28个单块
                    40
                    氩气/
                    39
                    嫦娥六号任务返回的撞击融化岩石年龄。它们揭示了从~4.33年到~11.3亿年（Ga）的撞击事件。特别是，三个熔体碎屑的年代为~4.16 Ga，与阿波罗盆地最近的测年一致，只有两个年龄落在4.0至3.7 Ga。较老的年龄（>4.0 Ga）的存在和~3.9 Ga左右的主要年龄的缺乏表明，月球背面轰击并不是由灾难性的尖峰主导，而是由后来的撞击所打断的平稳的长期下降所主导。

title: From cracks to informed circularity: Mechanics-guided decisions via high-throughput in situ failure analysis of recycled plastics
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Materials under real-world conditions are subjected to coupled mechanical and chemical stressors, yet current testing platforms cannot capture their combined effects on material behavior and failure, particularly when multiple specimens are required for robust measurements. This limitation is acute for recycled materials, whose performance cannot be inferred from a few conventional tests. Here, we introduce an in situ, high-throughput photoelasticity platform for multispecimen testing under controlled chemical conditions with full-field stress visualization. Using recycled polyethylene terephthalate (rPET) as a model system under simultaneous loading and varying pH, we reveal earlier onset of crack propagation and shorter lifetimes compared to virgin PET and quantify mechanochemical process zone expansion from ∼0.08 to ∼0.25 millimeters before failure. Extending these findings to landfill geotextiles, a growing application of rPET, we show that alkaline degradation erodes rPET environmental and economic advantages over virgin PET above pH 9. This integrated workflow, linking instrumentation to mechanistic insights to sustainability-informed decision-making, can accelerate the deployment of emerging, circular materials.
title_zh: 从裂纹到知情的循环：通过再生塑料的高通量原位失效分析进行力学指导的决策
abstract_zh: 现实条件下的材料会受到机械和化学应力的耦合作用，但当前的测试平台无法捕获它们对材料行为和失效的综合影响，特别是当需要多个样本进行稳健测量时。对于回收材料来说，这种限制非常严重，其性能无法从一些常规测试中推断出来。在这里，我们介绍了一个原位、高通量光弹性平台，用于在受控化学条件下进行多样本测试，并具有全场应力可视化。使用回收的聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯 (rPET) 作为同时加载和变化 pH 条件下的模型系统，我们发现与原始 PET 相比，裂纹扩展更早发生，寿命更短，并量化了失效前机械化学加工区域从 ∼0.08 毫米扩大到 ∼0.25 毫米。将这些研究结果扩展到垃圾填埋场土工织物（rPET 的日益增长的应用）中，我们发现碱降解会削弱 rPET 相对于 pH 值高于 9 的原始 PET 的环境和经济优势。这种集成工作流程将仪器与机械见解与可持续发展决策联系起来，可以加速新兴循环材料的部署。

title: Scalable nanofocusing heterojunctions for raptor-inspired on-chip vision perception
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Biological visual systems provide a blueprint for intelligent perception in complex dynamic environments. Inspired by the optical role of retinal oil droplets in raptor vision, we report a plasmonic nanofocusing synaptic array (PNSA) for bioinspired visual sensing and motion perception. The pivotal design is a wafer-scale Au@MoS
                    2
                    core-shell heterojunction that enhances light concentration like the retinal oil droplets of raptors. Leveraging strong localized surface plasmon resonance in the Au core and efficient hot-carrier generation in the MoS
                    2
                    shell, the PNSA exhibits an ultrafast relaxation time of 2.2 ms, corresponding to a theoretical refresh rate of ∼450 Hz. Uniform 2-inch wafer-scale fabrication enables a 32 × 32 optoelectronic synaptic array with 100% yield and only 2.2% device-to-device variation. The array supports 5-bit optical programming and generates temporally encoded motion representations that achieve 98.95% accuracy in motion-direction classification after 10 training epochs. This work establishes a scalable materials platform for bioinspired visual sensing, offering a promising route toward on-chip vision perception.
title_zh: 可扩展的纳米聚焦异质结，用于受猛禽启发的片上视觉感知
abstract_zh:
生物视觉系统为复杂动态环境中的智能感知提供了蓝图。受视网膜油滴在猛禽视觉中的光学作用的启发，我们报告了一种用于仿生视觉传感和运动感知的等离子体纳米聚焦突触阵列（PNSA）。关键设计是晶圆级 Au@MoS
                    2
                    核壳异质结可以像猛禽的视网膜油滴一样增强光集中。利用 Au 核中的强局域表面等离子体共振和 MoS2 中的高效热载流子生成
                    2
                    壳中，PNSA 表现出 2.2 ms 的超快弛豫时间，对应于~450 Hz 的理论刷新率。均匀的 2 英寸晶圆级制造可实现 32 × 32 光电突触阵列，良率达 100%，器件间差异仅为 2.2%。该阵列支持 5 位光学编程，并生成时间编码的运动表示，在 10 个训练周期后，运动方向分类的准确率达到 98.95%。这项工作为仿生视觉传感建立了一个可扩展的材料平台，为片上视觉感知提供了一条有前途的途径。

title: Human body single-cell atlas of three-dimensional genome organization and DNA methylation
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: Higher-order chromatin structure and DNA methylation are critical for gene regulation, but how these vary across the human body remains unclear. We performed multiomic profiling of three-dimensional (3D) genome structure and DNA methylation for 86,689 single nuclei across 16 tissues, identifying 35 major and 206 cell subtypes. We revealed extensive changes in CG and non-CG methylation across cell types and characterized 3D chromatin structure at an unprecedented cellular resolution. Extensive discrepancies exist between cell types delineated by DNA methylation and genome structure, which indicates that the role of distinct epigenomic features in maintaining cell identity may vary by lineage. This study expands our understanding of the diversity of DNA methylation and chromatin structure and offers a reference for exploring gene regulation in human health and disease.
title_zh: 人体单细胞三维基因组组织和DNA甲基化图谱
abstract_zh: 高阶染色质结构和 DNA 甲基化对于基因调控至关重要，但这些在人体中如何变化仍不清楚。我们对 16 个组织中的 86,689 个单核进行了三维 (3D) 基因组结构和 DNA 甲基化的多组学分析，鉴定了 35 种主要细胞亚型和 206 种细胞亚型。我们揭示了跨细胞类型的 CG 和非 CG 甲基化的广泛变化，并以前所未有的细胞分辨率表征了 3D 染色质结构。由 DNA 甲基化和基因组结构划分的细胞类型之间存在广泛的差异，这表明不同的表观基因组特征在维持细胞身份方面的作用可能因谱系而异。该研究拓展了我们对DNA甲基化和染色质结构多样性的认识，为探索人类健康和疾病中的基因调控提供参考。

title: Quantifying subsurface fracture damage in glaciers using fiber-optic seismology
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Crevassing critically controls glacier stability. Crevasses can penetrate deep into a glacier or ice shelf, promoting calving, ice avalanches, and even sudden catastrophic ice shelf collapse. Yet quantifying subsurface fracture damage remains largely unquantified. Here, we show how distributed acoustic sensing technology can quantify subsurface fracture damage in unprecedented detail at an alpine glacier. We first demonstrate that seismic anisotropy can quantify fracture extent. We also study crevasse icequake failure mechanisms, which fail predominantly via tensile opening. Icequake-derived crevasse opening is consistent with anisotropy-derived estimates (∼8% of total ice volume), suggesting that damage is dominated by fracture rather than melt. These results establish a scalable approach for monitoring subsurface ice damage that complements existing satellite surface observations. Applications range from monitoring the stability of alpine glaciers that pose a risk to alpine communities to providing foundations for assessing subsurface fracture extent at globally pertinent ice sheets and ice shelves.
title_zh: 使用光纤地震学量化冰川的地下断裂损伤
abstract_zh: 裂缝对冰川的稳定性起着至关重要的作用。裂缝可以深入冰川或冰架，促进崩解、冰崩，甚至突然发生灾难性的冰架崩塌。然而，量化地下断裂损伤在很大程度上仍然是未量化的。在这里，我们展示了分布式声学传感技术如何以前所未有的细节量化高山冰川的地下裂缝损伤。我们首先证明地震各向异性可以量化断裂程度。我们还研究裂缝冰震破坏机制，其主要通过拉伸张开而破坏。冰震产生的裂缝张开与各向异性产生的估计一致（约占总冰体积的 8%），表明损害主要是破裂而不是融化。这些结果建立了一种可扩展的监测地下冰损害的方法，补充了现有的卫星表面观测。应用范围包括监测对高山群落构成风险的高山冰川的稳定性，以及为评估全球相关冰盖和冰架的地下断裂程度提供基础。

title: Fast expansion and slow contraction of the ITCZ in response to CO2 forcing
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The Intertropical Convergence Zone (ITCZ) strongly shapes tropical rainfall and global circulation, yet its response to carbon dioxide (CO
                    2
                    ) forcing remains uncertain. Climate models project a long-term narrowing of the ITCZ under warming, but recent decades instead show a poleward expansion linked to eastern tropical Pacific cooling. Using a 30-member ensemble of abruptly quadrupled CO
                    2
                    experiments, we identify a two-phase evolution: a fast expansion over the first decade, driven by basin-wide relative cooling in the equatorial Pacific, followed by a slow contraction as equatorial warming strengthens. Applying this framework to a 1%-per-year CO
                    2
                    scenario reveals that the slow phase dominates only after ∼80 years, when the CO
                    2
                    levels more than double relative to preindustrial, suggesting that present-day conditions are still dominated by the fast response. This potentially reconciles recent ITCZ expansion with long-term projections of contraction, underscoring the importance of accounting for timescale-dependent processes when interpreting past trends and projecting near-term climate change.
title_zh: ITCZ 响应二氧化碳强迫的快速扩张和缓慢收缩
abstract_zh:
热带辐合带 (ITCZ) 强烈影响热带降雨和全球环流，但它对二氧化碳 (CO
                    2
                    ）强迫仍然不确定。气候模型预测，在变暖的情况下，ITCZ 会长期缩小，但近几十年来，却显示出与东热带太平洋变冷有关的向极地扩张。使用由 30 名成员组成的突然四倍 CO 的整体
                    2
                    通过实验，我们确定了一个两阶段的演变：在赤道太平洋盆地范围相对变冷的推动下，在第一个十年中快速扩张，随后随着赤道变暖的加强而缓慢收缩。将此框架应用于每年 1% 的 CO
                    2
                    情景表明，慢相仅在约 80 年后才占主导地位，此时 CO
                    2
                    相对于工业化前的水平增加了一倍多，这表明当今的情况仍然以快速反应为主。这可能会协调最近的 ITCZ 扩张与长期收缩预测，强调在解释过去趋势和预测近期气候变化时考虑时间尺度相关过程的重要性。

title: High-precision time-domain parallelism photonic computing
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Artificial intelligence (AI) compute demands outstrip electronic hardware scaling, creating a critical “AI compute gap.” Photonic computing promises speed, low latency, and parallelism yet faces bottlenecks in core array scalability and optoelectronic bandwidth efficiency. We propose a time-domain parallelism (TDP) computing architecture that temporally multiplexes compact cores, enabling large-scale convolutional operations while optimizing bandwidth efficiency. Supporting this framework, we develop indium tin oxide (ITO)–based photonic devices demonstrating a record 9-bit dynamic reconfigurability at 60 kilohertz and a 3-decibel bandwidth of 311 kilohertz. These devices feature compact phase shifter lengths (
                    L
                    π
                     = 20 micrometers) and exceptional endurance (>10
                    10
                    cycles with <0.1-decibel extinction ratio degradation). Validation of the TDP system using a 2 × 2 ITO photonic array achieves an accuracy of 84.91% on Fashion-MNIST classification, comparable to the full-precision (FP32) software baseline (84.66%) and outperforming a 5-bit benchmark (71.94%). Notably, the system maintains this high-fidelity performance while operating at 1694 frames per second. This work establishes a scalable pathway toward energy-efficient photonic computing for AI workloads.
title_zh: 高精度时域并行光子计算
abstract_zh:
人工智能 (AI) 计算需求超过了电子硬件扩展，从而造成了严重的“AI 计算差距”。光子计算承诺速度、低延迟和并行性，但在核心阵列可扩展性和光电带宽效率方面面临瓶颈。我们提出了一种时域并行（TDP）计算架构，该架构可在时间上复用紧凑型核心，从而实现大规模卷积运算，同时优化带宽效率。为了支持这一框架，我们开发了基于氧化铟锡 (ITO) 的光子器件，展示了创纪录的 60 kHz 的 9 位动态可重构性和 311 kHz 的 3 分贝带宽。这些器件具有紧凑的移相器长度（
                    L
                    π
                     = 20 微米）和卓越的耐用性（>10
                    10
                    消光比降低 <0.1 分贝的循环）。使用 2 × 2 ITO 光子阵列验证 TDP 系统在 Fashion-MNIST 分类上的准确度达到 84.91%，与全精度 (FP32) 软件基准 (84.66%) 相当，并且优于 5 位基准 (71.94%)。值得注意的是，该系统在以每秒 1694 帧的速度运行时保持了这种高保真性能。这项工作为人工智能工作负载建立了一条实现节能光子计算的可扩展途径。

title: MoCl5-mediated dual-track regulation unlocks high-voltage ether-based quasi-solid-state electrolytes
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
In situ–polymerized 1,3-dioxolane (DOL) electrolytes offer a promising route to quasi-solid-state lithium metal batteries (QSSLMBs), yet their limited oxidative tolerance and unstable electrode interfaces restrict high-voltage operation. Here, a simulation-guided dual-track regulation strategy uses MoCl
                    5

                    5

                    +

                    5

                    −2

title_zh: MoCl5介导的双轨调节解锁高压醚基准固态电解质
abstract_zh:
原位聚合的1,3-二氧戊环（DOL）电解质为准固态锂金属电池（QSSLMB）提供了一条有前途的途径，但其有限的氧化耐受性和不稳定的电极界面限制了高电压运行。这里，模拟引导的双轨调节策略使用 MoCl

title: Turbulent-centrifugal-spun ceramic aerogels with elemental difference maximization design for thermal protection over 2000 K in air
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Thermal protection under ultrahigh temperatures in air remains very challenging due to the severe volume shrinkage and strength degradation induced by rapid grain growth in oxide ceramics, which can potentially lead to catastrophic thermal runaway. Here, we report an elemental difference maximization design of medium-entropy (La
                    0.5
                    Y
                    0.5
                    )
                    2
                    Zr
                    2
                    O
                    7
                    fibrous aerogels made by a large-scale and low-cost turbulent-centrifugal spinning method to effectively suppress the grain growth under ultrahigh temperatures over 2000 K in air. The resulting aerogels show an ultrafine grain size of only 405.8 nm, a small volume shrinkage (<3%), and a large strength increase (>26%) after long-term ultrahigh temperature exposure, as well as an ultralow thermal conductivity of 101.1 mW m
                    −1
                     K
                    −1
                    at 1273 K and reliable protection performance over 2000 K in air. This work not only establishes a set of fundamental considerations for material design of ceramic aerogels but also promotes large-scale fabrication and practical application of such aerogels for thermal protection under extreme conditions.
title_zh: 湍流离心纺陶瓷气凝胶，具有元素差异最大化设计，可在空气中提供超过 2000 K 的热防护
abstract_zh:
由于氧化物陶瓷晶粒快速生长导致严重的体积收缩和强度下降，可能导致灾难性的热失控，因此空气中超高温下的热防护仍然非常具有挑战性。在这里，我们报告了中熵的元素差异最大化设计（La
                    0.5
                    是
                    0.5
                    ）
                    2
                    锆
                    2
                    氧
                    7
                    采用大规模、低成本的湍流离心纺丝方法制备的纤维气凝胶，可有效抑制空气中2000 K以上超高温下的晶粒生长。所得气凝胶表现出仅405.8 nm的超细晶粒尺寸，长期超高温暴露后体积收缩小（<3%）和较大的强度增加（>26%），以及101.1 mW m的超低导热系数
                    −1
                     K
                    −1
                    在 1273 K 温度下工作，在空气中超过 2000 K 时具有可靠的防护性能。这项工作不仅为陶瓷气凝胶的材料设计建立了一套基本考虑因素，而且促进了此类气凝胶在极端条件下热防护的大规模制造和实际应用。

title: Curiosity-driven development of action and language in robots through self-exploration
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Infants acquire language with generalization from minimal experience, whereas large language models require billions of training tokens. What underlies efficient development in humans? We investigated this problem through experiments wherein robotic agents learn to perform actions associated with imperative sentences (e.g., push red cube) via curiosity-driven self-exploration. Our approach amortizes active inference using Q-learning, enabling intrinsically motivated developmental learning. The simulations reveal key findings corresponding to observations in developmental psychology. (i) Generalization improves markedly as the scale of compositional elements increases. (ii) Curiosity-driven exploration enables faster learning. (iii) Rote pairing of sentences and actions precedes compositional generalization. (iv) Exception handling induces U-shaped developmental performance, a pattern like representational redescription in child language learning. These results suggest that curiosity-driven active inference accounts for how intrinsically motivated sensorimotor-linguistic learning supports scalable compositional generalization and exception handling in humans and artificial agents.
title_zh: 通过自我探索好奇心驱动机器人动作和语言的发展
abstract_zh: 婴儿从最少的经验中获得泛化语言，而大型语言模型需要数十亿个训练标记。人类高效发展的基础是什么？我们通过实验研究了这个问题，其中机器人代理通过好奇心驱动的自我探索学习执行与祈使句（例如推红色立方体）相关的动作。我们的方法使用 Q-learning 分摊主动推理，从而实现内在动机的发展性学习。模拟揭示了与发展心理学观察相对应的关键发现。 (i) 随着组成元素规模的增加，泛化能力显着提高。 (ii) 好奇心驱动的探索可以加快学习速度。 (iii) 句子和动作的死记硬背先于组合概括。 (iv) 异常处理会导致 U 型发展表现，这种模式类似于儿童语言学习中的表征重新描述。这些结果表明，好奇心驱动的主动推理解释了内在动机的感觉运动语言学习如何支持人类和人工智能体的可扩展的组合概括和异常处理。

title: A 3D genome atlas of human tonsil and the role of loop extrusion in B cell somatic hypermutation
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract: B cell maturation within the germinal center tissue microenvironment involves immunoglobulin gene diversification by somatic hypermutation (SHM). How three-dimensional (3D) genome architecture influences SHM is not fully understood. We leveraged sequencing-based and image-based 3D genomics and transcriptomics to map single-cell 3D genome organization and gene expression across cell types and states in human tonsils and in B cell lymphoma cell lines. These analyses revealed trajectories of compartment, looping, and nuclear position changes during the B cell immune response and activation of SHM. Targeted protein degradation of cohesin component RAD21 revealed its contribution to enabling SHM. Our results provide a single-cell 3D genome atlas of human tonsil cells and outline the links between the chromatin loop extrusion machinery and SHM.
title_zh: 人类扁桃体 3D 基因组图谱以及环挤压在 B 细胞体细胞超突变中的作用
abstract_zh: 生发中心组织微环境中的 B 细胞成熟涉及通过体细胞超突变 (SHM) 实现的免疫球蛋白基因多样化。三维 (3D) 基因组结构如何影响 SHM 尚不完全清楚。我们利用基于测序和基于图像的 3D 基因组学和转录组学来绘制人类扁桃体和 B 细胞淋巴瘤细胞系中跨细胞类型和状态的单细胞 3D 基因组组织和基因表达。这些分析揭示了 B 细胞免疫反应和 SHM 激活过程中区室、循环和核位置变化的轨迹。粘连蛋白成分 RAD21 的靶向蛋白质降解揭示了其对实现 SHM 的贡献。我们的结果提供了人类扁桃体细胞的单细胞 3D 基因组图谱，并概述了染色质环挤出机制和 SHM 之间的联系。

title: The AGO2 adaptor LIMD1 expands the functional and evolutionary reach of microRNA targeting
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: MicroRNA (miRNA) silencing is classically ascribed to RNA-sequence rules that guide Argonaute 2 (AGO2) targeting. Using chimeric eCLIP and complementary analyses in CRISPR-edited human lung epithelial cells, we show that efficient miRNA targeting also depends on the AGO2 adaptor-scaffold LIMD1. In LIMD1-deficient cells, AGO2 binds more miRNAs, but each AGO2-miRNA engages fewer transcripts and sites, reducing occupancy and halving both the breadth and depth of targeting. LIMD1 dependence is most pronounced for poorly conserved, weakly seed-paired sites that nonetheless form stable duplexes. LIMD1 deficiency alters AGO2 footprints and derepresses oncogenic targets inversely correlated with LIMD1 expression in lung adenocarcinoma. Thus, LIMD1 modifies the outcome of sequence-defined interactions that would otherwise be infrequent, unstable, or unproductive, revealing an adaptor-governed layer of posttranscriptional regulation beyond RNA-sequence rules.
title_zh: AGO2 适配器 LIMD1 扩展了 microRNA 靶向的功能和进化范围
abstract_zh: MicroRNA (miRNA) 沉默通常归因于指导 Argonaute 2 (AGO2) 靶向的 RNA 序列规则。使用嵌合 eCLIP 和 CRISPR 编辑的人肺上皮细胞中的互补分析，我们表明有效的 miRNA 靶向还取决于 AGO2 适配器支架 LIMD1。在LIMD1缺陷的细胞中，AGO2结合更多的miRNA，但每个AGO2-miRNA结合较少的转录本和位点，从而减少占用并使靶向的广度和深度减半。 LIMD1 依赖性对于保守性差、种子配对弱但仍形成稳定双链体的位点最为明显。 LIMD1 缺陷会改变 AGO2 足迹并抑制与肺腺癌中 LIMD1 表达呈负相关的致癌靶标。因此，LIMD1 修改了序列定义的相互作用的结果，否则这些相互作用将是不频繁、不稳定或无效的，从而揭示了超出 RNA 序列规则的转录后调控的适配器控制层。

title: You are when you eat: How food synchronizes liver clocks
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Food ingestion synchronizes liver circadian gene expression via hormone and nutrient regulation of the mTOR pathway.
title_zh: 当你吃东西时你就是：食物如何同步肝脏时钟
abstract_zh: 食物摄入通过 mTOR 通路的激素和营养调节来同步肝脏昼夜节律基因表达。

title: Silkworm cultivation predating the Silk Road in southern Central Asia (2000 BCE)
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Historical narratives hold that sericulture originated in China and spread along the Silk Road roughly two millennia ago. In questioning this assumption, we conducted micromorphological and proteomics analyses on three cocoons recovered from the Sapalli Tepe (approximately 2000 to 1500 BCE) site in Uzbekistan. We identified them as
                    Bombyx mori
                    , directly dated to 1940 to 1765 cal. BCE, representing the earliest remains of
                    Bombyx
                    cocoons. We further report the earliest mulberry (
                    Morus
                    sp.) charcoal fragments from Central Asia, attesting to mulberry-
                    Bombyx
                    sericulture in the Oxus nearly 2000 years earlier than previously documented. We highlight that early silkworms and mulberry trees may have been introduced to Central Asia along the southern slope of the Himalayas, although other routes could also plausibly explain the observed pattern. This multidisciplinary research rewrites the enigmatic history of early sericulture and its globalization.
title_zh: 中亚南部丝绸之路之前的蚕业种植（公元前 2000 年）
abstract_zh:
历史叙述认为，蚕桑起源于中国，并在大约两千年前沿着丝绸之路传播。为了质疑这一假设，我们对从乌兹别克斯坦 Sapalli Tepe（大约公元前 2000 年至 1500 年）遗址回收的三个茧进行了微形态学和蛋白质组学分析。我们将他们识别为
                    家蚕
                    ，直接追溯到 1940 年至 1765 年。公元前，代表了最早的遗迹
                    家蚕
                    茧。我们进一步报道了最早的桑树（
                    桑属
                    sp.）来自中亚的木炭碎片，证明了桑树-
                    家蚕
                    阿姆河地区养蚕的历史比之前记载的要早近2000年。我们强调，早期的蚕和桑树可能是沿着喜马拉雅山南坡引入中亚的，尽管其他路线也可以合理地解释观察到的模式。这项多学科研究改写了早期蚕桑及其全球化的神秘历史。

title: Distinct roles of COPI proteins attenuated in cell senescence
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: In senescent cells, functional alterations in organelles like mitochondria and lysosomes are well characterized, but senescence-associated changes in Golgi function are not. An RNA interference screen revealed that silencing subunits of the coatomer protein I (COPI) complex, critical for intracellular transport involving the Golgi, reduced extracellular vesicle uptake. In proliferating WI-38 fibroblasts, silencing COPI constituents COPA, COPB1, COPB2, or COPD induced ATF4 production and disrupted autophagy, apoptosis, and cytokine signaling, all hallmarks of impaired Golgi–to–endoplasmic reticulum transport, while silencing COPI constituents COPG1, COPE, or COPZ1 altered the production of extracellular matrix proteins. Furthermore, individual COPI proteins associated with Golgi and endosomal proteins, supporting roles in vesicular trafficking. In senescent WI-38 fibroblasts, silencing COPI proteins did not elicit these phenotypes. Our findings underscore the distinct, multifunctional actions of individual COPI proteins and their key roles in intracellular homeostatic transport networks that become attenuated during senescence.
title_zh: COPI 蛋白在细胞衰老中的独特作用减弱
abstract_zh: 在衰老细胞中，线粒体和溶酶体等细胞器的功能变化已得到很好的表征，但与衰老相关的高尔基体功能变化却没有得到很好的表征。 RNA 干扰筛选显示，对涉及高尔基体的细胞内运输至关重要的外壳蛋白 I (COPI) 复合物的亚基沉默，会减少细胞外囊泡的摄取。在增殖的WI-38成纤维细胞中，沉默COPI成分COPA、COPB1、COPB2或COPD会诱导ATF4产生，并破坏自噬、细胞凋亡和细胞因子信号传导，这些都是高尔基体到内质网运输受损的标志，而沉默COPI成分COPG1、COPE或COPZ1会改变细胞外基质蛋白的产生。此外，各个 COPI 蛋白与高尔基体和内体蛋白相关，在囊泡运输中发挥支持作用。在衰老的 WI-38 成纤维细胞中，沉默 COPI 蛋白不会引发这些表型。我们的研究结果强调了各个 COPI 蛋白独特的多功能作用及其在衰老过程中减弱的细胞内稳态运输​​网络中的关键作用。

title: mTOR signaling contributes to system-driven rhythmic gene expression in mouse liver
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Rhythmic gene expression is essential to the daily organization of biological processes. While cycling transcriptomes are regulated by circadian clocks present in nearly every cell, accumulating evidence indicates that they can also be initiated by rhythmic food-driven systemic signals independently of circadian clocks. The underlying mechanisms remain however largely unknown. Here, we show that signaling through the nutrient-sensing kinase mechanistic target of rapamycin (mTOR) is both necessary and sufficient to mediate food-driven hepatic rhythmic gene expression, rhythmic regulation of the liver metabolome, and endoplasmic reticulum stress response. Acute inhibition of mTOR before the active phase desynchronizes the phase of mTOR-driven rhythmic genes without affecting clock-controlled rhythmic genes, indicating that alignment of rhythmic mTOR activity to the circadian cycle is critical for overt cycling transcriptomes. These findings may explain how misalignment between clock and systemic signals contributes to disease and underscore the use of mTOR inhibitors for resynchronizing system-driven rhythms and alleviating circadian rhythm disorders.
title_zh: mTOR 信号传导有助于小鼠肝脏中系统驱动的节律性基因表达
abstract_zh: 有节奏的基因表达对于生物过程的日常组织至关重要。虽然循环转录组受到几乎每个细胞中存在的生物钟的调节，但越来越多的证据表明，它们也可以由独立于生物钟的有节奏的食物驱动的系统信号启动。然而，其根本机制仍然很大程度上未知。在这里，我们表明，通过雷帕霉素营养感应激酶机制靶标（mTOR）发出的信号对于介导食物驱动的肝脏节律性基因表达、肝脏代谢组的节律性调节和内质网应激反应是必要且充分的。在活性阶段之前急性抑制 mTOR 会使 mTOR 驱动的节律基因的相位去同步，而不影响时钟控制的节律基因，表明节律 mTOR 活性与昼夜节律周期的对齐对于明显循环转录组至关重要。这些发现可以解释时钟和系统信号之间的失调如何导致疾病，并强调使用 mTOR 抑制剂来重新同步系统驱动的节律并缓解昼夜节律紊乱。

title: Yersiniabactin-producing adherent-invasive Escherichia coli exploit host glycolysis to drive macrophage HIF-1α stabilization
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
The siderophore yersiniabactin (Ybt) produced by a subset of intestinal adherent-invasive
                    Escherichia coli
                    (AIEC) drive intestinal fibrosis in murine model of Crohn’s disease (CD). This is linked to the Ybt-induced disruption of host metal homeostasis and activation of the hypoxia-inducible factor 1–alpha (HIF-1α) in macrophages. Elevated glycolytic activity has been documented in both intestinal tissues and macrophages from patients with CD, indicating that metabolic reprogramming is a characteristic feature of the disease. Here, we show that HIF-1α stabilization by Ybt
                    +
                    AIEC requires active host glycolysis. This effect is independent of
                    Hif1a
                    transcription and lipopolysaccharide stimulation and is not solely explained by intracellular bacterial load but instead relies on host metabolic activity. Mechanistically, Ybt
                    +
                    AIEC activated the Akt-mTOR pathway to support HIF-1α translation. Inhibition of glycolysis suppressed this signaling axis, reducing HIF-1α translation and nuclear localization. Given the association between Ybt
                    +
                    AIEC and fibrosis in CD, these findings suggest that targeting host glycolysis may limit AIEC-driven macrophage HIF-1α activation and fibrotic progression in CD patients.
title_zh: 产生耶尔森菌素的粘附侵袭性大肠杆菌利用宿主糖酵解来驱动巨噬细胞 HIF-1α 稳定
abstract_zh:
铁载体耶尔森菌素 (Ybt) 由肠道粘附侵袭性细菌的子集产生
                    大肠杆菌
                    （AIEC）在克罗恩病（CD）小鼠模型中驱动肠道纤维化。这与 Ybt 诱导的宿主金属稳态破坏和巨噬细胞中缺氧诱导因子 1-α (HIF-1α) 的激活有关。 CD 患者的肠道组织和巨噬细胞中糖酵解活性升高，表明代谢重编程是该疾病的一个特征。在这里，我们证明了 Ybt 对 HIF-1α 的稳定作用
                    +
                    AIEC 需要活跃的宿主糖酵解。该效应独立于
                    Hif1a
                    转录和脂多糖刺激，并且不仅仅由细胞内细菌负荷来解释，而是依赖于宿主代谢活动。从机械上讲，Ybt
                    +
                    AIEC 激活 Akt-mTOR 通路来支持 HIF-1α 翻译。糖酵解的抑制抑制了该信号轴，减少了 HIF-1α 翻译和核定位。鉴于 Ybt 之间的关联
                    +
                    AIEC 和 CD 中的纤维化，这些研究结果表明，针对宿主糖酵解可能会限制 AIEC 驱动的巨噬细胞 HIF-1α 激活和 CD 患者的纤维化进展。

title: Visualization of stepwise derepression of TFIIH in global genome nucleotide excision repair
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Nucleotide excision repair (NER) is a crucial DNA repair pathway that is orchestrated by transcription factor IIH (TFIIH) in eukaryotic cells. TFIIH is a multifunctional complex that contains two DNA helicase/DNA translocase subunits and a kinase module, different subsets of which act in NER, transcription initiation, and cell cycle control. To ensure fidelity despite multifunctionality, the DNA helicase activity of TFIIH is autoinhibited in its free form or when the factor engages in transcription initiation. While the release of the kinase module has been identified as a key step in TFIIH activation, the molecular mechanisms controlling this step and concomitant structural changes in TFIIH are incompletely understood. Here, we determine high-resolution structures of three NER intermediates that visualize how TFIIH arrives at sites of DNA damage in an autoinhibited state and how autoinhibition is released via previously undescribed intermediates. These findings contribute to a mechanistic understanding of human DNA repair.
title_zh: 全球基因组核苷酸切除修复中 TFIIH 逐步去抑制的可视化
abstract_zh: 核苷酸切除修复 (NER) 是真核细胞中由转录因子 IIH (TFIIH) 协调的重要 DNA 修复途径。 TFIIH 是一种多功能复合物，包含两个 DNA 解旋酶/DNA 转位酶亚基和一个激酶模块，其中不同的子集在 NER、转录起始和细胞周期控制中发挥作用。尽管具有多功能性，但为了确保保真度，TFIIH 的 DNA 解旋酶活性在其游离形式或参与转录起始时会受到自动抑制。虽然激酶模块的释放已被确定为 TFIIH 激活的关键步骤，但控制该步骤的分子机制以及 TFIIH 中伴随的结构变化尚不完全清楚。在这里，我们确定了三种 NER 中间体的高分辨率结构，这些中间体可视化 TFIIH 如何在自抑制状态下到达 DNA 损伤位点，以及如何通过先前未描述的中间体释放自抑制。这些发现有助于对人类 DNA 修复机制的理解。

title: Distinct thymic pDC populations promote tumor immune tolerance through complementary mechanisms
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Thymic central tolerance is crucial for preventing autoimmunity, but its contribution to tumor immune evasion remains poorly understood. Here, we demonstrate that plasmacytoid dendritic cells (pDCs) in the thymus have two distinct subsets, accumulating in the thymus of tumor-bearing mice, contributing to immune tolerance through clonal deletion of tumor-specific T cells and reducing newly generated T cells. Mechanistically, common dendritic cell progenitor-derived pDCs (CDP-pDCs) capture tumor antigens and migrate to the thymus in a CCR9-dependent manner, where they present these antigens to induce clonal deletion of tumor-specific T cells. Concurrently, tumor progression inhibits T cell generation by promoting the accumulation of common lymphoid progenitor–derived pDCs (CLP-pDCs) within the thymus, which further produce type I interferon to alter thymic function. CCR9 deficiency prevents thymic accumulation of both pDCs, enhancing antitumor immunity and reducing tumor growth. Our findings reveal a previously unrecognized mechanism by which tumors hijack the physiological system to establish central tolerance against peripheral antigens, thereby promoting tolerance against themselves.
title_zh: 不同的胸腺pDC群体通过互补机制促进肿瘤免疫耐受
abstract_zh: 胸腺中枢耐受对于预防自身免疫至关重要，但其对肿瘤免疫逃避的贡献仍知之甚少。在这里，我们证明胸腺中的浆细胞样树突状细胞（pDC）有两个不同的亚群，在荷瘤小鼠的胸腺中积累，通过克隆删除肿瘤特异性T细胞并减少新生成的T细胞来促进免疫耐受。从机制上讲，常见的树突状细胞祖细胞衍生的 pDC (CDP-pDC) 捕获肿瘤抗原并以 CCR9 依赖性方式迁移到胸腺，在那里它们呈递这些抗原以诱导肿瘤特异性 T 细胞的克隆删除。同时，肿瘤进展通过促进胸腺内共同淋巴祖源性 pDC (CLP-pDC) 的积累来抑制 T 细胞生成，从而进一步产生 I 型干扰素以改变胸腺功能。 CCR9 缺陷可阻止两种 pDC 的胸腺积聚，从而增强抗肿瘤免疫力并减少肿瘤生长。我们的研究结果揭示了一种以前未被认识的机制，通过该机制，肿瘤劫持生理系统以建立针对外周抗原的中枢耐受性，从而促进针对自身的耐受性。

title: S1P receptor 1 signaling reduces arterial thrombosis via up-regulation of endothelial thrombomodulin expression
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Sphingosine-1-phosphate (S1P) is a key mediator in the cardiovascular system with controversial effects on coagulation. We hypothesized that S1P reduces platelet adhesion and thrombus formation by up-regulating endothelial thrombomodulin (TM), an antithrombotic protein. S1P increased endothelial TM expression via S1P receptor 1 and phosphoinositide 3-kinase signaling. S1P reduced platelet adhesion on endothelial cells in flow-chamber experiments. In the absence of endothelial cells, S1P did not affect platelet activation. In mice, S1P enhanced endothelial TM expression and decreased in vivo arterial thrombus formation but did not change bleeding time. Conversely, sphingosine kinase 1–deficient mice with low S1P concentrations showed reduced endothelial TM expression and enhanced thrombus formation, reversible by TM treatment. In line with this, in an all-comer cohort of 74 patients with cardiovascular disease, higher S1P concentrations were associated with lower circulating thrombin concentrations. In conclusion, S1P inhibited thrombus formation in an endothelium- and TM-dependent manner. This might be a therapeutic target in prevention of thrombus formation without enhancing bleeding risk.
title_zh: S1P 受体 1 信号通过上调内皮血栓调节蛋白表达减少动脉血栓形成
abstract_zh: 1-磷酸鞘氨醇 (S1P) 是心血管系统中的关键介质，对凝血功能的影响存在争议。我们假设 S1P 通过上调内皮血栓调节蛋白 (TM)（一种抗血栓蛋白）来减少血小板粘附和血栓形成。 S1P 通过 S1P 受体 1 和磷酸肌醇 3 激酶信号传导增加内皮 TM 表达。在流室实验中，S1P 减少血小板在内皮细胞上的粘附。在没有内皮细胞的情况下，S1P 不影响血小板活化。在小鼠中，S1P 增强内皮 TM 表达并减少体内动脉血栓形成，但不改变出血时间。相反，鞘氨醇激酶 1 缺陷且 S1P 浓度较低的小鼠表现出内皮 TM 表达减少和血栓形成增强，通过 TM 治疗可逆转。与此相一致的是，在 74 名心血管疾病患者的全部队列中，较高的 S1P 浓度与较低的循环凝血酶浓度相关。总之，S1P 以内皮和 TM 依赖性方式抑制血栓形成。这可能是预防血栓形成而不增加出血风险的治疗目标。

title: Engineered probiotic Bifidobacterium for tumor-targeted pancreatic cancer therapy
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract:
Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) presents a substantial challenge due to its resistance to cancer treatments. This limited efficacy is, in part, attributed to the immunosuppressive tumor microenvironment (TME), which impairs effector T (T
                    eff
                    ) cell activity. Interleukin-2 (IL-2) is a key cytokine for T cell activation, but its therapeutic use is limited by a short half-life, systemic toxicity, and regulatory T (T
                    reg
                    ) activation. To address this limitation, we engineered
                    Bifidobacterium longum
                    , a probiotic obligate anaerobe that selectively colonizes the TME, to continuously secrete Super-mutant IL-2 (SumIL-2), an engineered IL-2 variant that preferentially activates T
                    eff
                    cells over T
                    reg
                    cells, thereby delivering SumIL-2 selectively to the tumor (BifidoSumIL-2). Systemic administration of BifidoSumIL-2 significantly suppressed tumor growth in both subcutaneous tumors and orthotopic PDAC in mice, inducing an improved T
                    eff
                    /T
                    reg
                    ratio. Combining BifidoSumIL-2 with chemotherapy, radiation, and immunotherapy further restrained orthotopic PDAC growth, highlighting its therapeutic potential for difficult-to-treat cancers like PDAC.
title_zh: 用于肿瘤靶向胰腺癌治疗的工程益生菌双歧杆菌
abstract_zh:
胰腺导管腺癌（PDAC）由于其对癌症治疗的耐药性而提出了巨大的挑战。这种有限的功效部分归因于免疫抑制肿瘤微环境 (TME)，它损害了效应 T (T
                    有效值
                    ）细胞活性。白介素 2 (IL-2) 是 T 细胞激活的关键细胞因子，但其治疗用途受到半衰期短、全身毒性和调节性 T 细胞 (T
                    注册
                    ）激活。为了解决这个限制，我们设计了
                    长双歧杆菌
                    ，一种益生菌专性厌氧菌，选择性地定殖于 TME，持续分泌超突变体 IL-2 (SumIL-2)，这是一种工程化的 IL-2 变体，优先激活 TME
                    有效值
                    细胞超过T
                    注册
                    细胞，从而选择性地将 SumIL-2 递送至肿瘤 (BifidoSumIL-2)。全身给予 BifidoSumIL-2 显着抑制小鼠皮下肿瘤和原位 PDAC 的肿瘤生长，从而改善 T
                    有效值
                    /T
                    注册
                    比率。将 BifidoSumIL-2 与化疗、放疗和免疫疗法相结合，进一步抑制了原位 PDAC 的生长，突显了其对 PDAC 等难以治疗的癌症的治疗潜力。

title: Wnt and Nodal asymmetries stratify mouse laterality phenotypes in the absence of node flow
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Left-right symmetry breaking in mice is considered to occur via node leftward fluid flow. The molecular cascade within the node has been reconstructed at high resolution; however, its importance for organogenesis remains poorly understood. Here, we show in mutants for the motile cilium component CCDC40 that 70% of mice develop normal situs at birth despite abrogation of node flow. The discrete morphospace output, including situs inversus totalis and heterotaxy with left isomerism, supports an innovative model of symmetry breaking, in which node flow only biases asymmetry orientation, while a distinct mechanism, potentially self-amplifying, generates it. Longitudinal, quantitative, and paired transcriptomic analyses uncover the molecular signature of laterality clusters, highlighting WNT in addition to NODAL pathways. We identify asymmetry of cardiopulmonary progenitors, the disruption of which is associated with combined heart and lung defects in mutants. Functional pharmacological perturbation reinforces the importance of WNT, besides the node, in the establishment of asymmetry.
title_zh: 在没有节点流的情况下，Wnt 和 Nodal 不对称性对小鼠偏侧性表型进行分层
abstract_zh: 小鼠的左右对称性破缺被认为是通过节点向左的流体流动而发生的。节点内的分子级联已以高分辨率重建；然而，它对器官发生的重要性仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们在运动纤毛成分 CCDC40 的突变体中显示，尽管节点流被废除，但 70% 的小鼠在出生时发育出正常位置。离散形态空间输出，包括逆位和左异构异位，支持对称破缺的创新模型，其中节点流仅偏置不对称方向，而一种可能自我放大的独特机制生成它。纵向、定量和配对转录组分析揭示了偏侧性簇的分子特征，除了 NODAL 通路外还突出了 WNT。我们确定了心肺祖细胞的不对称性，其破坏与突变体中的心脏和肺联合缺陷有关。除了节点之外，功能性药理学扰动强化了 WNT 在建立不对称性方面的重要性。

title: Dose-dependent sensitivity of human three-dimensional chromatin to a heart disease–linked transcription factor
source: AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
abstract:
Dosage-sensitive transcription factors (TFs) underlie altered gene regulation in human developmental disorders, and cell type–specific gene regulation is linked to the reorganization of three-dimensional (3D) chromatin during cellular differentiation. In this work, we show dose-dependent regulation of chromatin organization by the congenital heart disease (CHD)–linked, lineage-restricted TF TBX5 in human cardiomyocyte differentiation. Genome organization, including compartments, topologically associated domains, and chromatin loops, was sensitive to reduced
                    TBX5
                    dosage in a human model of CHD, with variations in response across individual cells. Cohesin binding was reduced at TBX5-bound enhancer elements in a TBX5 dose-dependent manner, providing a potential mechanism for disrupted loop formation. These results highlight the importance of lineage-restricted TF dosage in cell type–specific 3D chromatin dynamics, suggesting a mechanism for TF-dependent disease.
title_zh: 人类三维染色质对心脏病相关转录因子的剂量依赖性敏感性
abstract_zh:
剂量敏感转录因子 (TF) 是人类发育障碍中基因调控改变的基础，而细胞类型特异性基因调控与细胞分化过程中三维 (3D) 染色质的重组有关。在这项工作中，我们展示了人类心肌细胞分化中与先天性心脏病 (CHD) 相关、谱系限制的 TF TBX5 对染色质组织的剂量依赖性调节。基因组组织，包括区室、拓扑相关域和染色质环，对减少的敏感
                    TBX5
                    人类冠心病模型中的剂量，不同细胞的反应存在差异。 TBX5 结合增强子元件处的粘连蛋白结合以 TBX5 剂量依赖性方式减少，为破坏环形成提供了潜在机制。这些结果强调了谱系限制的 TF 剂量在细胞类型特异性 3D 染色质动力学中的重要性，提示了 TF 依赖性疾病的机制。

title: HiC2Self: Self-supervised denoising for bulk and single-cell Hi-C contact maps
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Hi-C is a chromosome conformation capture assay used to study three-dimensional (3D) genome organization. Single-cell Hi-C technologies now enable the examination of 3D chromatin organization in individual cells, although these approaches often suffer from low-coverage libraries and data sparsity. Here, we introduce HiC2Self, a self-supervised framework for denoising Hi-C contact maps that requires only low-coverage data as input. HiC2Self reconstructs key structures such as topologically associating domains (TADs) and significant loops from bulk libraries, including cell-type-specific Hi-C structures, without the generalization challenges faced by supervised models. HiC2Self can also accurately reconstruct significant loops from Micro-C data at 1-kilobase resolution. When applied to single-nucleus methyl-3C data, HiC2Self successfully reconstructs local TAD structures around specific genes at 10-kilobase resolution with as few as 50 cells. Last, HiC2Self enables the examination of single-cell structures at 50-kilobase resolution in individual cells of the same cell type. HiC2Self thus provides a general tool for denoising bulk, pseudobulk, and single-cell 3D contact maps to enable downstream analyses.
title_zh: HiC2Self：批量和单细胞 Hi-C 接触图的自监督去噪
abstract_zh: Hi-C 是一种染色体构象捕获测定，用于研究三维 (3D) 基因组组织。单细胞 Hi-C 技术现在能够检查单个细胞中的 3D 染色质组织，尽管这些方法经常受到库覆盖率低和数据稀疏的困扰。在这里，我们介绍 HiC2Self，一种用于对 Hi-C 接触图进行去噪的自监督框架，仅需要低覆盖率数据作为输入。 HiC2Self 可重建关键结构，如拓扑关联域 (TAD) 和来自批量库的重要循环，包括细胞类型特异性的 Hi-C 结构，而不会遇到监督模型面临的泛化挑战。 HiC2Self 还可以以 1 kb 分辨率从 Micro-C 数据中准确重建重要循环。当应用于单核甲基 3C 数据时，HiC2Self 成功地用少至 50 个细胞以 10 kb 分辨率重建了特定基因周围的局部 TAD 结构。最后，HiC2Self 能够以 50 kb 分辨率检查相同细胞类型的单个细胞中的单细胞结构。因此，HiC2Self 提供了一种通用工具，用于对批量、伪批量和单细胞 3D 接触图进行去噪，以实现下游分析。

title: Single-cell chromatin state transitions during epigenetic memory formation
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Repressive chromatin modifications compact chromatin and mediate heritable gene silencing, but how structural changes quantitatively relate to epigenetic memory remains unclear. Using targeted recruitment of the KRAB repressor to induce H3K9me3 at a reporter gene, combined with single-molecule 3D chromatin imaging, we show that irreversible silencing is associated with large-scale chromatin compaction across tens of kilobases. In contrast, histone deacetylation produces reversible silencing without such compaction. Despite substantial single-cell heterogeneity, average compaction at the end of silencing quantitatively predicts epigenetic memory weeks after KRAB removal. Here, memory arises not through stable H3K9me3 domains but rather through a dynamic handoff in which H3K9me3 is gradually lost and replaced by DNA methylation. Stochastic simulations recapitulating these dynamics suggest that compaction enhances read-write feedback to promote this transition. Similar compaction is observed at endogenous loci during differentiation and fate commitment, suggesting that spatial organization may be predictive of epigenetic memory in other systems.
title_zh: 表观遗传记忆形成过程中的单细胞染色质状态转变
abstract_zh: 抑制性染色质修饰会压缩染色质并介导可遗传基因沉默，但结构变化如何与表观遗传记忆定量相关仍不清楚。通过定向招募 KRAB 阻遏蛋白在报告基因处诱导 H3K9me3，并结合单分子 3D 染色质成像，我们发现不可逆沉默与数十千碱基的大规模染色质压缩相关。相反，组蛋白脱乙酰化会产生可逆沉默，而无需这种压缩。尽管存在显着的单细胞异质性，但沉默结束时的平均压缩定量预测了 KRAB 去除后几周的表观遗传记忆。在这里，记忆不是通过稳定的 H3K9me3 结构域产生的，而是通过动态切换产生的，其中 H3K9me3 逐渐丢失并被 DNA 甲基化取代。概括这些动态的随机模拟表明，压缩增强了读写反馈以促进这种转变。在分化和命运决定过程中，在内源基因座上观察到类似的压缩，这表明空间组织可能可以预测其他系统中的表观遗传记忆。

title: Neuromorphic tissues: Soft biomolecular networks for brain-inspired temporal computing
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Brains achieve extraordinary efficiency in processing temporal information through dense interconnectivity and recurrent feedback among neurons. Inspired by this principle, we introduce neuromorphic tissues—soft biomolecular networks comprising cell-sized aqueous compartments interconnected by lipid membranes containing voltage-gated ion channels. When a compartment is electrically stimulated by current injection, the membranes separating it from neighboring compartments polarize until channel activation occurs, transiently transforming the interface into a conductive synapse that couples adjacent nodes. These dynamics generate intrinsic physical recurrence, enabling the network to encode, propagate, and reconstruct time-dependent signals without external feedback circuitry. Experiments and modeling demonstrate nonlinear, fading-memory, and recurrent dynamics characteristic of reservoir computing, enabling accurate prediction of nonlinear and chaotic sequences such as NARMA-10 and the Lorenz attractor. This work suggests that spatial interconnectivity can enhance the computational capabilities of physical reservoirs and highlights soft, self-assembled materials as a promising platform for implementing such interconnected systems.
title_zh: 神经形态组织：用于受大脑启发的时间计算的软生物分子网络
abstract_zh: 大脑通过神经元之间的密集互连和循环反馈在处理时间信息方面实现了非凡的效率。受这一原理的启发，我们引入了神经形态组织——软生物分子网络，由细胞大小的水室组成，通过含有电压门控离子通道的脂质膜互连。当隔室受到电流注入的电刺激时，将其与相邻隔室分开的膜会极化，直到发生通道激活，从而将界面短暂地转变为耦合相邻节点的导电突触。这些动力学产生内在的物理重现，使网络能够编码、传播和重建与时间相关的信号，而无需外部反馈电路。实验和建模证明了储层计算的非线性、衰落记忆和循环动力学特性，能够准确预测非线性和混沌序列，例如 NARMA-10 和洛伦兹吸引子。这项工作表明，空间互连可以增强物理储层的计算能力，并强调软自组装材料作为实现此类互连系统的有前景的平台。

title: Eukaryotic-like microtubules and dynamic instability of Asgard archaeal tubulins
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Eukaryotic cells change their shapes, actively segregate their DNA, and contain membrane networks, facilitated by a complex cytoskeleton containing actin filaments, microtubules made from tubulin, and other components. These filaments have ancient evolutionary origins because actin- and tubulin-like proteins form prokaryotic cytoskeletons in archaea and bacteria. Bona fide eukaryotic F-actin can be traced back to crenarchaea and Asgard archaea, which are the closest known relatives of eukaryotes. A possible Asgard archaeal origin of microtubules was suggested recently with the discovery of a lokiarchaeon containing AtubAB mini microtubules that share architectural features with their eukaryotic counterparts. Using phylogenetic analyses of metagenomic data, here we report the broad occurrence of tubulins in Asgard archaea. Biochemical and structural analyses showed that one of our previously unidentified heimdallarchaeial AtubAB tubulin pairs forms four-protofilament mini microtubules that show dynamic instability and are inhibited by the tubulin drug maytansine. Our work raises the possibility that microtubule architecture and dynamics evolved in Asgard archaea prior to eukaryogenesis.
title_zh: Asgard 古菌微管蛋白的类真核微管和动态不稳定性
abstract_zh: 真核细胞改变其形状，主动分离其 DNA，并包含膜网络，这是由包含肌动蛋白丝、微管蛋白制成的微管和其他成分的复杂细胞骨架促进的。这些丝具有古老的进化起源，因为肌动蛋白和微管蛋白样蛋白在古细菌和细菌中形成原核细胞骨架。真正的真核 F-肌动蛋白可以追溯到 crenarchaea 和 Asgard 古菌，它们是已知的真核生物最接近的亲戚。最近发现了一种含有 AtubAB 微型微管的 Lokiarchaeon，该微管与真核生物具有相同的结构特征，因此提出了微管可能起源于 Asgard 古菌。通过对宏基因组数据的系统发育分析，我们报告了微管蛋白在 Asgard 古细菌中的广泛存在。生化和结构分析表明，我们之前未鉴定的海姆达尔古菌 AtubAB 微管蛋白对之一形成四原丝微型微管，该微管表现出动态不稳定性并被微管蛋白药物美登素抑制。我们的工作提出了微管结构和动力学在真核发生之前在阿斯加德古细菌中进化的可能性。

title: LPA/LPAR signaling drives temporomandibular disorders–like pain through regulating the expression and sensitization of PIEZO2
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Temporomandibular disorders (TMD) pain is the most common orofacial pain with limited effective treatments. Here, we observed elevated lysophosphatidic acid (LPA), a bioactive lipid, in blood, trigeminal ganglion (TG), and peri-temporomandibular joint (TMJ) tissues in mouse models of TMD-like pain induced by TMJ inflammation or masseter muscle injury. Notably, LPA levels were also elevated in TMD patients’ blood and positively correlated with their pain intensity. LPA receptors (LPAR) 1 and 3 were expressed in mouse and human TG neurons and upregulated in TMD-like pain models. Inhibition or knockout of LPAR1 or LPAR3 attenuated TMD-like pain, while LPA injection into the TMJ or masseter muscle evoked pain. Furthermore, we demonstrated that LPA/LPAR signaling upregulates and sensitizes PIEZO2, a mechanosensitive ion channel, in TG neurons via extracellular signal-regulated kinase (ERK). Specific deletion or inhibition of PIEZO2 and suppression of ERK activation in TG neurons mitigated TMD-like pain. These findings suggest that LPA/LPAR signaling drives TMD-like pain via PIEZO2, offering potential therapeutic targets.
title_zh: LPA/LPAR 信号传导通过调节 PIEZO2 的表达和敏化驱动颞下颌疾病样疼痛
abstract_zh: 颞下颌关节紊乱 (TMD) 疼痛是最常见的口面部疼痛，有效的治疗方法有限。在这里，我们在由 TMJ 炎症或咬肌损伤引起的 TMD 样疼痛模型中观察到血液、三叉神经节 (TG) 和颞下颌关节周围 (TMJ) 组织中的溶血磷脂酸 (LPA)（一种生物活性脂质）升高。值得注意的是，TMD 患者血液中的 LPA 水平也升高，并且与疼痛强度呈正相关。 LPA 受体 (LPAR) 1 和 3 在小鼠和人类 TG 神经元中表达，并在 TMD 样疼痛模型中上调。抑制或敲除 LPAR1 或 LPAR3 可减轻 TMD 样疼痛，而将 LPA 注射到 TMJ 或咬肌中则会引发疼痛。此外，我们证明 LPA/LPAR 信号通过细胞外信号调节激酶 (ERK) 上调 TG 神经元中的 PIEZO2（一种机械敏感离子通道）并使其敏感。特异性删除或抑制 TG 神经元中的 PIEZO2 以及抑制 ERK 激活可减轻 TMD 样疼痛。这些发现表明 LPA/LPAR 信号通过 PIEZO2 驱动 TMD 样疼痛，提供潜在的治疗靶点。

title: Single-cell analysis of the epigenome and 3D chromatin architecture in the human retina
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Most genetic risk variants linked to ocular diseases are nonprotein coding and presumably contribute to disease through dysregulation of gene expression; however, understanding their mechanisms has been impeded by incomplete annotation of transcriptional regulatory elements across retinal cell types. To address this, we carried out single-cell multiomics assays to investigate gene expression, chromatin accessibility, DNA methylome, and three-dimensional (3D) chromatin architecture in human retina, macula, and retinal pigment epithelium/choroid. We identified 420,824 unique candidate regulatory elements and characterized their chromatin states in 23 retinal cell types. Comparative analysis of chromatin landscapes between human and mouse retina cells further revealed both evolutionarily conserved and divergent retinal gene-regulatory programs. Leveraging the advancements in deep-learning techniques, we developed sequence-based predictors to interpret noncoding risk variants of retinal diseases. Our study establishes retina-wide, single-cell transcriptome, epigenome, and 3D genome atlases and provides a resource for studying the gene regulatory programs of the human retina and ocular diseases.
title_zh: 人类视网膜表观基因组和 3D 染色质结构的单细胞分析
abstract_zh: 大多数与眼部疾病相关的遗传风险变异都是非蛋白质编码，可能通过基因表达失调导致疾病；然而，由于视网膜细胞类型转录调控元件的不完整注释，理解它们的机制受到了阻碍。为了解决这个问题，我们进行了单细胞多组学测定，以研究人类视网膜、黄斑和视网膜色素上皮/脉络膜中的基因表达、染色质可及性、DNA甲基化和三维（3D）染色质结构。我们鉴定了 420,824 个独特的候选调控元件，并表征了它们在 23 种视网膜细胞类型中的染色质状态。对人和小鼠视网膜细胞染色质景观的比较分析进一步揭示了进化上保守和不同的视网膜基因调控程序。利用深度学习技术的进步，我们开发了基于序列的预测器来解释视网膜疾病的非编码风险变异。我们的研究建立了全视网膜、单细胞转录组、表观基因组和3D基因组图谱，并为研究人类视网膜和眼部疾病的基因调控程序提供了资源。

title: Plant diversity modifies multi-trophic interactions in croplands, grasslands and forests
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Multitrophic interactions can strongly influence the structure and functioning of ecosystems, but how plant diversity influences the direction and predictability of multitrophic interactions across agricultural and natural ecosystems remains unclear. Using 149 field studies across five continents, we found that, on average, increasing plant diversity tended to exert differential top-down and bottom-up effects in croplands versus grasslands and forests. Organic and nonorganic croplands exhibited 846 and 148% higher invertebrate natural enemy-to-herbivore abundance ratios under increased plant diversity, consistent with top-down control patterns where predator gains cause herbivore declines, enhancing crop outcomes. In grasslands and forests, increasing plant diversity was associated with bottom-up effects where enhanced productivity increased both herbivore and predator populations, with the enemy-to-herbivore ratio increasing 4.73% for grasslands and 21.2% for forests. Our findings suggest that biodiversity effects on productivity are not solely explained by direct plant-plant interactions and the resulting biodiversity-productivity relationship. Rather, they reveal patterns consistent with the framework of top-down and bottom-up effects, the relative balance of which may vary depending on ecosystem and management type. The magnitude of the effects of diversified farming on crop pests suggests that crop diversification may be an important avenue for managing crop pests preventatively and thereby enhancing agricultural sustainability.
title_zh: 植物多样性改变农田、草原和森林的多营养相互作用
abstract_zh: 多营养相互作用可以强烈影响生态系统的结构和功能，但植物多样性如何影响农业和自然生态系统多营养相互作用的方向和可预测性仍不清楚。通过对五大洲 149 项实地研究，我们发现，平均而言，增加植物多样性往往会对农田与草原和森林产生不同的自上而下和自下而上的影响。在植物多样性增加的情况下，有机和非有机农田的无脊椎动物天敌与草食动物丰度比分别高出 846% 和 148%，这与自上而下的控制模式一致，即捕食者的增加导致草食动物减少，从而提高作物产量。在草原和森林中，植物多样性的增加与自下而上的效应相关，生产力的提高增加了食草动物和捕食者的数量，草原的天敌与食草动物的比例增加了 4.73%，森林的天敌与食草动物的比例增加了 21.2%。我们的研究结果表明，生物多样性对生产力的影响不仅仅可以通过植物与植物之间的直接相互作用以及由此产生的生物多样性-生产力关系来解释。相反，它们揭示了与自上而下和自下而上效应框架一致的模式，其相对平衡可能因生态系统和管理类型而异。多样化农业对作物害虫影响的严重程度表明，作物多样化可能是预防性管理作物害虫并从而提高农业可持续性的重要途径。

title: Earth’s magnetic field remained weak for 40 million years after the Cambrian radiation
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: The Ediacaran-Cambrian interval marks major environmental change and the emergence of complex life, coinciding with some of the weakest magnetic field strengths in Earth history. It has been proposed that inner core nucleation near this boundary triggered a rapid strengthening of the geodynamo during the early Cambrian, but direct constraints on magnetic field behavior across this interval remain limited. Here, we present new paleointensity results from two Cambrian igneous sequences in Brazil (~525 million years ago) and Nova Scotia (~505 million years ago). Using multiple complementary methods, both records indicate a reversing geomagnetic field that remained weak. Combined with a reanalysis of published data, our results show that weak magnetic field conditions persisted for tens of millions of years after the Cambrian radiation. These findings limit the magnitude and timing of any Cambrian geodynamo strengthening and imply that Earth’s magnetospheric shielding remained strongly suppressed during a key phase of early animal evolution.
title_zh: 寒武纪辐射后的 4000 万年里，地球磁场一直很弱
abstract_zh: 埃迪卡拉纪-寒武纪标志着重大的环境变化和复杂生命的出现，恰逢地球历史上一些最弱的磁场强度。有人提出，该边界附近的内核成核引发了寒武纪早期地球发电机的快速增强，但对该区间磁场行为的直接约束仍然有限。在这里，我们展示了巴西（约 5.25 亿年前）和新斯科舍省（约 5.05 亿年前）两个寒武纪火成岩序列的新古强度结果。使用多种互补方法，这两个记录都表明反向地磁场仍然很弱。结合对已发表数据的重新分析，我们的结果表明，寒武纪辐射后弱磁场条件持续了数千万年。这些发现限制了任何寒武纪地球发电机加强的幅度和时间，并意味着地球磁层屏蔽在早期动物进化的关键阶段仍然受到强烈抑制。

title: Genome in motion: Mapping the nucleus in health
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
title_zh: 运动中的基因组：绘制健康细胞核图谱

title: Emergent patterns of island biodiversity in the Anthropocene
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Islands have long been foundational to the development of ecological and evolutionary theory, serving as model systems for studying patterns of biodiversity. However, pervasive anthropogenic impacts—particularly species extinctions and introductions—have substantially altered island ecosystems, complicating inferences drawn from contemporary data. Here, we review how these human-driven changes have reshaped key biodiversity patterns on islands, including patterns of species richness, community composition, evolution, and species interactions. We show that many current ecological and evolutionary patterns observed on islands reflect not just natural processes but also a legacy of human-induced change spanning millennia. Approaches that better incorporate paleoecological evidence, along with improved island biodiversity databases and modeling techniques, can help better reconstruct prehuman biodiversity baselines on islands.
title_zh: 人类世岛屿生物多样性的新兴模式
abstract_zh: 岛屿长期以来一直是生态和进化理论发展的基础，是研究生物多样性模式的模型系统。然而，普遍存在的人为影响——特别是物种灭绝和引入——极大地改变了岛屿生态系统，使根据当代数据得出的推论变得复杂化。在这里，我们回顾了这些人类驱动的变化如何重塑了岛屿上的关键生物多样性模式，包括物种丰富度、群落组成、进化和物种相互作用的模式。我们表明，当前在岛屿上观察到的许多生态和进化模式不仅反映了自然过程，还反映了数千年来人类引起的变化的遗产。更好地结合古生态证据的方法，以及改进的岛屿生物多样性数据库和建模技术，可以帮助更好地重建岛屿上的前人类生物多样性基线。

title: Synaptic vesicles that store monoamines and glutamate differ in protein composition
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: Neuromodulators such as monoamines assure essential brain functions, but relatively little is known about their mechanism of release. While recent work has advanced our knowledge of active zone architecture in dopamine axons, release machinery within the synaptic vesicle (SV) remains poorly understood. Here, we address differences between the release of monoamines and synaptic transmitters by comparing the composition of SVs that contain the vesicular monoamine transporter 2 (VMAT2) versus vesicular glutamate transporter 2 (VGLUT2). Previous work revealed that these SVs differ in frequency dependence, recycling kinetics, and biogenesis. We now find differences in the abundance and isoform expression of many SV protein families and validate these differences in primary neurons and brain tissue. Functional analysis after heterologous expression in hippocampal neurons shows that loss of differentially expressed SCAMP5 selectively impairs the recycling of VGLUT2 SVs, sparing vesicles targeted by VMAT2 in the same neuronal population. These findings provide insights into the molecular diversity of SVs and mechanisms of dopamine release.
title_zh: 储存单胺和谷氨酸的突触小泡的蛋白质组成不同
abstract_zh: 单胺等神经调节剂可确保大脑的基本功能，但对其释放机制知之甚少。虽然最近的工作增进了我们对多巴胺轴突活性区结构的了解，但对突触小泡 (SV) 内的释放机制仍然知之甚少。在这里，我们通过比较包含囊泡单胺转运蛋白 2 (VMAT2) 和囊泡谷氨酸转运蛋白 2 (VGLUT2) 的 SV 的组成来解决单胺和突触递质释放之间的差异。之前的研究表明，这些 SV 在频率依赖性、回收动力学和生物发生方面存在差异。我们现在发现许多 SV 蛋白家族的丰度和亚型表达存在差异，并在原代神经元和脑组织中验证了这些差异。海马神经元异源表达后的功能分析表明，差异表达 SCAMP5 的缺失选择性损害 VGLUT2 SV 的循环，从而在同一神经元群体中保留 VMAT2 靶向的囊泡。这些发现为了解 SV 的分子多样性和多巴胺释放机制提供了见解。

title: KRASG12D inhibition reprograms the tumor-induced immunosuppressive environment and enhances NK cell–mediated antitumor immunity
source: AAAS: Science Advances: Table of Contents
abstract: KRASG12D mutation drives oncogenic progression and creates an immunosuppressive microenvironment in cancers like pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma and colorectal cancer. We investigate the immunomodulatory mechanisms of the KRASG12D inhibition and its synergy with natural killer (NK) cell therapies. We demonstrate that KRASG12D inhibition with MRTX1133 remodels the immune landscape by reducing myeloid-derived suppressor cell (MDSC) accumulation and facilitating infiltration and activation of NK and CD8+ T cells. Crucially, MRTX1133 reverses systemic immunosuppression, restoring the fitness of adoptively transferred NK cells. Mechanistically, KRASG12D inhibition impairs IFNGR1 palmitoylation and subsequent lysosomal degradation. MRTX1133 stabilizes IFNGR1 by reducing palmitoyltransferase expression and the palmitate pool. This stabilization increases IFN-γ/IFNGR signaling and up-regulates NK cell-activating ligands ICAM1 and ULBP1, thereby sensitizing cancer cells to NK cells. Consequently, combining MRTX1133 with IL-15 or adoptive NK cell therapy yields synergistic antitumor responses and prolonged survival. Our findings provide mechanistic rationale for combining KRASG12D inhibitors with NK cell-based immunotherapies to improve outcomes for patients with KRASG12D-mutant cancers.
title_zh: KRASG12D 抑制重新编程肿瘤诱导的免疫抑制环境并增强 NK 细胞介导的抗肿瘤免疫
abstract_zh: KRASG12D 突变可驱动致癌进展，并在胰腺导管腺癌和结直肠癌等癌症中产生免疫抑制微环境。我们研究了 KRASG12D 抑制的免疫调节机制及其与自然杀伤 (NK) 细胞疗法的协同作用。我们证明，MRTX1133 抑制 KRASG12D 通过减少骨髓源性抑制细胞 (MDSC) 积累并促进 NK 和 CD8+ T 细胞的浸润和激活来重塑免疫景观。至关重要的是，MRTX1133 可逆转全身免疫抑制，恢复过继转移的 NK 细胞的健康状况。从机制上讲，KRASG12D 抑制会损害 IFNGR1 棕榈酰化和随后的溶酶体降解。 MRTX1133 通过减少棕榈酰转移酶表达和棕榈酸酯池来稳定 IFNGR1。这种稳定性增加了 IFN-γ/IFNGR 信号传导并上调 NK 细胞激活配体 ICAM1 和 ULBP1，从而使癌细胞对 NK 细胞敏感。因此，将 MRTX1133 与 IL-15 或过继性 NK 细胞疗法相结合可产生协同抗肿瘤反应并延长生存期。我们的研究结果为将 KRASG12D 抑制剂与基于 NK 细胞的免疫疗法相结合以改善 KRASG12D 突变癌症患者的预后提供了机制原理。

title: A Non‐Equilibrium Flame Aerosol Process to Create High‐Entropy MOFs
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  High‐entropy alloys and ceramics have demonstrated promising applications in the past decade. Ultrafast heating and cooling can kinetically trap immiscible elements into solid solutions, expanding the compositional space and optimizing the properties of high‐entropy materials. However, the extreme temperatures required by these non‐equilibrium methods are incompatible with metal–organic frameworks (MOFs). This work presents a flame aerosol strategy for synthesizing compositionally complex, entropically stabilized MOFs, enabling new combinations of properties previously inaccessible in this class of materials. Using the HKUST structure as a prototype, this methodology is extended to a wide array of both crystalline and amorphous MOFs, and then to a 10‐element MOF that incorporates transition metals, rare‐earth metals, alkaline‐earth metals, p‐block metals, and noble metals. This strategy can be further applied to inorganic coordination polymers. This study reveals that kinetics and entropy collectively drive structural short‐range periodicity and configurational disorder in the framework, which in turn influence crystallinity, pore architecture, defect density, homogeneity, and electrochemical properties. This work expands the compositional design space for MOFs and offers new opportunities for their fundamental study and practical application.
title_zh: 一种创建高熵 MOF 的非平衡火焰气溶胶工艺
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  在过去的十年中，高熵合金和陶瓷已展现出广阔的应用前景。超快加热和冷却可以在动力学上将不混溶元素捕获到固溶体中，扩大组成空间并优化高熵材料的性能。然而，这些非平衡方法所需的极端温度与金属有机框架（MOF）不相容。这项工作提出了一种火焰气溶胶策略，用于合成成分复杂、熵稳定的 MOF，从而实现此类材料以前无法获得的新性能组合。以科大的结构为原型，该方法被扩展到一系列晶体和非晶态 MOF，然后扩展到包含过渡金属、稀土金属、碱土金属、p 区金属和贵金属的 10 元素 MOF。该策略可以进一步应用于无机配位聚合物。这项研究揭示了动力学和熵共同驱动框架中的结构短程周期性和构型无序，进而影响结晶度、孔隙结构、缺陷密度、均匀性和电化学性能。这项工作扩展了 MOF 的组成设计空间，并为其基础研究和实际应用提供了新的机会。

title: Tuning the Conversion Mechanisms of Metal–Sulfur Batteries: From Nanostructures to Single Atoms
source: Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
abstract:
ABSTRACT
                  Rechargeable metal–sulfur (M–S) batteries (Li, Na, K, Al, Zn, Mg, Ca, Cu, Fe‑based) are promising alternatives to conventional lithium‑ion batteries, featuring high energy density and cost‑effectiveness. However, their advancement is severely hindered by the sluggish sulfur conversion kinetics and the notorious polysulfide shuttle effect of the sulfur cathode. Thus, rational design of catalytic cathode materials is pivotal to realizing the practical application of M–S batteries. This review first evaluates the practical viability of various M–S batteries, further delineates the chemical behavior and transformation processes of sulfide intermediates, and summarizes the theoretical methodologies for probing sulfur cathode conversion chemistry. Notably, three classic heterogeneous catalysis mechanisms, namely Langmuir–Hinshelwood, Eley–Rideal, and Mars–van Krevelen, are innovatively utilized to interpret the cathode catalytic behavior in M–S batteries for the first time. Following this, it elaborates on the rational design principles targeting the supports and active sites of catalytic cathode materials, ranging from nanostructured engineering to single‐atom catalysis, aiming to further reinforce sulfur immobilization and accelerate redox reaction kinetics across various M–S systems. Furthermore, it highlights advances in characterization strategies for guiding rational material design and elucidating precise electrocatalytic mechanisms, and ultimately prospects the pivotal future research directions toward practical liquid and solid‐state M–S battery systems.
title_zh: 调整金属硫电池的转换机制：从纳米结构到单原子
abstract_zh:
摘要
                  可充电金属硫 (M–S) 电池（锂、钠、钾、铝、锌、镁、钙、铜、铁基）是传统锂离子电池的有前途的替代品，具有高能量密度和成本效益。然而，它们的进步受到缓慢的硫转化动力学和硫阴极臭名昭著的多硫化物穿梭效应的严重阻碍。因此，催化正极材料的合理设计对于实现M-S电池的实际应用至关重要。本综述首先评估了各种M-S电池的实际可行性，进一步描述了硫化物中间体的化学行为和转化过程，并总结了探索硫阴极转化化学的理论方法。值得注意的是，三种经典的多相催化机制，即Langmuir-Hinshelwood、Eley-Rideal和Mars-van Krevelen，首次被创新地用于解释M-S电池中的阴极催化行为。随后，详细阐述了针对催化阴极材料的载体和活性位点的合理设计原则，从纳米结构工程到单原子催化，旨在进一步加强硫固定并加速各种M-S系统的氧化还原反应动力学。此外，它还强调了指导合理材料设计和阐明精确电催化机制的表征策略方面的进展，并最终展望了实用液态和固态M-S电池的关键未来研究方向
